Just as the gentlest wind stirs grains of sand when it travels, so too do disciples of the winds take an active role in the events and lives they come into contact with during their wanderings. As a disciple of the winds, you are a shaman of wind spirits, from the gentle breeze that brings summer's warmth to the ferocious storm that scours the land, ripping trees from the earth. You particularly honor Stormhawk, and that spirit's range of emotions and thirst for vengeance are the standard by which you measure your own actions.

Although you sometimes choose to commune with the spirits of the wind among the aeries of great mountains, you seek adventure wherever the winds carry you, embracing happenstance and luck as omens of the wind spirits. If you arrive at a castle besieged by giants, you gladly join the fight against the invaders, because the winds led you there to take part in events. Where the winds travel, you follow, and you are no mere observer.

11级：门徒行动 Disciple of the Winds Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，离你5格内的每个盟友能以一个自由动作快步3格。

11级：风之护罩 Wind Shroud

Benefit: 当你使用一个原力医疗威能时，你能滑动目标1格。

11级：抢掠之风 Snatching Winds

12级：护卫之风 Shielding Winds

16级：风之回弹 Wind's Resilience

Benefit: 如果一个敌人拉近，推离或滑动一个离你5格内的盟友，你能在此被迫移动后以一个自由动作滑动该盟友1格。

20级：飓风之怒 Hurricane's Fury
Disciple of Winds Paragon Path.requirements: 萨满，[[呼唤精魂伙伴 Call Spirit Companion]]威能

Rune Shield Paragon Path.name: 符文之盾 Rune Shield
Rune Shield Paragon Path.description:
「诸神的符文强于任何钢铁。」

Prerequisite:

你认为符文是一种比任何世俗力量更强大的存在，而你将毫不留情地用它来打击危害世界与群星之主的事物。最初的守护符文就铭刻在世界的中心，那里就是你的兄弟进入最深的阴影与荒神战斗的场所。有朝一日你也将前往那神圣之所，但在此之前，你永远屹立在战斗的最前线。你的符文之语回荡在战场，令盟友振奋，敌人胆寒。

作为一名符文之盾，你掌握了一系列可以让你施展神圣魔法来保护盟友的符文。这些符文的力量极其强大，以至于仅仅念出一个音节就能扭转箭矢，挡下刀锋，化解敌人最疯狂的攻势。

11级：守卫之盾 Guardian Shield

Benefit: 当你进入一种新的符文状态时，你可以改为进入钢铁之盾符文状态。当你处于此符文状态时，每个邻近你的盟友在所有防御上获得+2加值。当你移动时，此符文状态结束。

11级：守护活力 Protective Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，每个你可见的盟友在所有防御上获得+2威能加值，直到你下一回合开始。

11级：碎击符文 Battering Rune

12级：护法符文 Rune of Shielding

16级：强力守护者 Mighty Guardian

Benefit: 由你「守卫之盾」典范特性给予的在所有防御上的加值提高到4。

20级：光辉追击盾 Hounding Shield of Radiance

Sigil Carver Paragon Path.name: 符印雕师 Sigil Carver
Sigil Carver Paragon Path.description:
「执剑空书符印，益友亦可破敌。」

Prerequisite:

“书空印”（Bereg-arnadh）是用剑书写符文的古老雅灵艺术。传说中，传奇雅灵女王苏拉德蓉（Suiradrun）的贴身保镖最早开始使用“书空印”，这个技巧从此慢慢流传开来。这项奥术艺术的使用者们会用佩剑在空中书写闪耀且蕴含魔力的瑞拉尼克文字。书写者向这些漂浮的符文中注入奥术魔力，符文则在短时间内悬停空中，散发柔光，为队友提供保护或给敌人带来毁灭。

你对舞空之剑的掌握让你成为了“书空印”的理想使用者。不管你是自学成才，或是从“书空印”的大师处得到传承，你确实掌握了在战场上施展艺术的能力。你的剑尖上有符文微微闪烁，敌人望之胆寒。

11级：激励符印 Energizing Sigil

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，离你5格内的一个盟友可以对他身上每个可豁免终止的效果做一次豁免检定。

11级：支撑符印 Bolstering Sigil

Benefit: 任意邻近你的盟友在所有防御上获得+2威能加值。

11级：神盾符印 Aegis Sigil

12级：安全符印 Sigil of Safety

16级：惩戒符印 Punishing Sigil

Benefit: 当一个离你5格内且被你标记的敌人命中一个邻近你的盟友时，你能以一个借机动作对该敌人进行一次近战基本攻击。即使该生物超出了你的正常触及范围，你也可以进行此攻击。

20级：仇恨符印 Sigil of Enmity
Sigil Carver Paragon Path.requirements: 剑法师，[[防御庇护 Aegis of Shielding]]职业特性

Blessed Psalmist Paragon Path.name: 福音歌者 Blessed Psalmist
Blessed Psalmist Paragon Path.description:
「朋友们，聆听那来自天堂的歌声，我们无需畏惧邪恶！」

Prerequisite:

众星之海回荡着音乐，从天使们光荣的合唱到魔鬼军团向战争进发时高唱的冷酷战歌。诗人们将神秘的魔法编织成凡世间的音乐与歌曲，但有一小部分专心于聆听的诗人们，他们听到了只有星海中才有的美妙音律，并将其中独特的品格和寓意加入了自己的旋律，他们将神圣的与神秘的融为一体，作出了最能打动人心的和谐表演。具有勇气和信念并且兼具好奇心的福音歌者们成为了诗人中独特的存在。

在你第一次听到来自星海的音符时，你意识到一扇大门已经向你敞开。全新的可能性充满了你的思绪，促使你重新专注于神学和历史的研究，将来自天堂的音律同你的音律融为一体。这些研究回报了你，你现在可以将天堂之音融入到你的歌曲中。奥术是你的画笔，神圣力量是你的颜料，两者的完美结合象征着你对两个世界无与伦比的掌握。

你的法术具有神圣的性质，当你救助你的盟友时，你散发出来自星海的光芒。当你吟诵祷词时，辉煌的火焰在你身旁舞蹈。而当你开始一场演出，那些超凡的存在会将祂的声音加入你的和声。你超越了所有奥术力量的极限，将奥术与众神的力量合二为一。

11级：天堂恩赐 Heaven's Favor

Benefit: 选择一个你拥有兼职专长的神术职业。你获得该职业的「引导神力」特性和所有该特性给予的威能。另外，你可以用诗人法器使用与此职业关联的神术法器威能。

11级：公正行动 Righteous Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外攻击且攻击命中时，你在这次遭遇中获得一次额外的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.A6Cq1oigOmXUjr5H]{崇高之言 Majestic Word}使用。如果这次攻击失手，离你5格内一名可以看到你的盟友恢复你的等级 + 你魅力调整值的生命值，且能以一个自由动作快步1格。

11级：黎明祷词 Song of Radiant Dawn

12级：救赎吟唱 Psalm of Succor

16级：光耀之言 Radiant Song

Benefit: 当你使用诗人攻击威能时，你能以一个自由动作消耗你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.CemNEvqZBurRpnhA]{友谊之言 Words of Friendship}威能。若如此做，这次攻击造成光耀伤害而非原本伤害类型，并获得光耀关键字。如果这次攻击命中，目标还会获得等同于你魅力调整值的光耀易伤，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：辉煌赞美诗 Brilliant Symphony

Watcher of Vengeance Paragon Path.name: 复仇监守者 Watcher of Vengeance
Watcher of Vengeance Paragon Path.description:
「You cannot hide your crimes, because they are written in your words, your body, and your actions.」

Prerequisite:

Evil wears many masks, adopts many guises, but you make it your business to peer through the illusions and see things as they truly are. You skulk through the shadows, blending into the night to observe the guilty and learn their secrets. Each word and each action reveals strengths and weaknesses, giving you the tools to overcome them when the time is right to strike.

11级：复仇行动 Vengeful Action

Benefit: 当一个你对其拥有战斗优势的敌人命中一个你能看见的盟友时，你能以一个即时中断花费一个行动点来对那名敌人进行一次基本攻击。如果此次攻击命中，你造成2d6额外伤害。

11级：监守者洞悉 Watcher's Insight

Benefit: 你在洞察，侦查和隐秘检定上获得+2加值。你同时在对抗魅惑，恐惧和幻术效果的豁免骰上获得+2加值。

11级：潜藏危机 Hidden Danger

12级：明晰目标 Clarity of Purpose

16级：察觉弱点 Witnessed Weakness

Benefit: 当你拥有任何隐蔽或掩护，且一个敌人以一次攻击对你失手时，你对该敌人获得战斗优势，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：公正惩戒 Just Punishment
Watcher of Vengeance Paragon Path.requirements: 神罚使，在洞察或侦查上受训

Avenging Slayer Paragon Path.name: 复仇杀手 Avenging Slayer
Avenging Slayer Paragon Path.description:
「正义难得伸张。我在这里在这里让你为了你的罪行付出代价！」

Prerequisite:

Beyond a few safe havens, the world is an unforgiving land filled with cruelty, terror, and profound evil. The blameless are slaughtered and the works of civilization are torn down, sometimes in a bid for conquest, but just as often out of sheer brutality. Destructive monsters regularly leave behind survivors, and a few of these take up the sword or the axe. These brave souls seek not to put past wrongs right, but to prevent others from suffering as they have, and to slake a thirst for vengeance. In this way, heroism is often forged in darkness.

At some point in your life, your course was set, your path laid before you. Maybe your career as a grim hero began the moment you or those close to you fell victim to a fate you were powerless to prevent—your life forever changed by one act of depravity. Perhaps instead, as you have adventured, you've witnessed too many appalling acts, seen too many innocents buried, or found wickedness in too many shadows. Whatever the case, you now see yourself as the only one who can stand between the helpless few and the predatory hordes. You know no respite exists for those who would protect the weak. Even so, you willingly take on that task.

As an avenging slayer, your brutal efficiency makes you a menacing figure no enemy can safely ignore. You strike fear into your enemies to protect your allies and those who have less power than you. You punish corruption with merciless retribution, defining yourself as a righteous executioner.

11级：杀手的行动 Slayer's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你对一个被你标记的敌人获得战斗优势，直到你下一个回合结束。

11级：染血的边缘 Bloodied Edge

Benefit: 当你对一个重伤的敌人有战斗优势时，你在武器伤害骰上获得等于你魅力调整值的加值。

11级：报复打击 Comeuppance Strike

12级：若隐若现的正义 Looming Justice

16级：野蛮司法 Brutal Justice

Benefit: 当你将一个被你标记的目标生命值降低到0，你在攻击骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：无情突袭 Ruthless Outburst

Hammer of Vengeance.name: 复仇之锤 Hammer of Vengeance
Hammer of Vengeance.description:
「符文中已经记录下你的罪行。现在是铸造你末日的时候了。」

Prerequisite:

符文牧师不止是研究神符和铸造它们必须的手艺，还会学习每个神符背后的历史和传说。很多符文由于恶魔、魔鬼，或荒神的缘故，已经失落了数百年。有些符文牧师发誓要纠正这些错误，致力于对诸神之敌的战斗中。你就是他们中的一员。

你用被符文强化过的神术诅咒伤害你盟友的人。那些蠢到敢于激起你怒火的人很快就会发现他们的错误。

选择这条道路的符文牧师最常见于龙裔和牛头人。这两个种族都具有对于很久以前的罪行进行报复的执著，因此这条道路很适合他们。

11级：血腥报复 Bloody Vengeance

Benefit: 当你进入一种新的符文状态时，你可以选择改为进入复仇符文状态。你在此符文状态下，当任何盟友命中邻近你的一个敌人时，你能以一个即时反应对该敌人进行一次近战基本攻击。然后此符文状态结束。

11级：复仇之举 Avenging Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，离你5格之内的敌人一旦进行攻击并以此攻击对你的盟友造成了伤害，它们就要受到等同于你体质调整值的光耀伤害。此效果持续到你下一回合结束。

11级：报复击打 Avenging Hammer

12级：复仇之盾 Shield of Vengeance

16级：无处逃避 Inescapable Vengeance

Benefit: 当你进行由你的「血腥报复」典范特性给予你的近战基本攻击时，你在此攻击骰上获得+1加值，且在此伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值。

20级：复仇之终 Vengeance's End

Vengeful Crusader Paragon Path.name: 复仇十字军 Vengeful Crusader
Vengeful Crusader Paragon Path.description:
「我是公理之剑、天堂之刃，在我面前，邪恶无所遁形。」

Prerequisite:

仇恨的火焰在你心中燃烧——你仇恨那些掠夺弱小与无辜的人、仇恨那些罪恶而无知的人。你以怒火贯注剑刃，让犯罪者受到制裁。那些罪恶之人别想在你这儿得到怜悯——迎接他们的只有死亡。

11级：即刻复仇 Vengeance's Imperative

Benefit: 当被你标记的目标进行一次不包括你的攻击，以一个自由动作，你能在此攻击后朝目标快步1格。

11级：报复行动 Vengeful Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点且你重伤时，你可使离你3格内的你可见的所有敌人成为你「神圣制裁」的目标，直到你下回合结束。

11级：强驱之力 Driving Force

12级：十字军架势 Crusader's Stance

16级：仇欲庇护 Vengeful Shield

Benefit: 当敌人攻击邻近你的盟友时，它受到等同于你力量调整值的伤害。

20级：十字军复仇 Crusader's Vengeance
Vengeful Crusader Paragon Path.requirements: 圣武士，在洞察或侦查上受训

Rrathmal Paragon Path.name: 复仇武士 Rrathmal
Rrathmal Paragon Path.description:
「我们对启蒙和自由的探寻不允许我们的敌人平安享乐。」

Prerequisite:

你的人民经过了无数年的奴役。在与吉斯洋基的分裂中，自由也对你们影响深远。自吉斯泽雷独立以来，你们成为了自己的主人，并对任何威胁到你们自由的势力抗争到底。你们绝不要再被奴役。

然而，仅仅防御是不够的。你的人民习惯于组织兄弟会，以处理各种威胁。最强的兄弟会名叫rrakkma――一个复仇协会。复仇协会汇聚了精英骨干，而这些强大的吉斯泽雷人――名叫复仇武士rrathmal――将猎杀那些贪婪注视着自由的吉斯泽雷的仇敌。每一个复仇武士将毁灭那些敌人，夺心魔、吉斯洋基人、或者被发现的任何威胁。

At times, a rrakkma has a specific goal, such as hindering githyanki plans of conquest or ferreting out a hive of mind flayers. Other rrakkmas wander until they have faced a number of foes sufficient to call the mission a success. 想加入复仇协会的吉斯泽雷人要参加特训，而在协会中任职是一种巨大的荣耀，即使对那些在外界大名鼎鼎的人物也是一样。

你就是这样一个复仇武士。你为你的人民做出过贡献，你通过了特训，或者你找到了一位传授复仇武士技巧的老师。你已学会如何果断攻击、穷寇直追和灭杀仇敌。

11级：心灵抵抗 Psychic Resistance

Benefit: 你获得10点心灵抗力。21级时，此抗力为15。

11级：无拘行动 Unfettered Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，任何你身上的晕眩、束缚、迟缓或定身状态结束。

11级：探寻机会 Trace Chance

12级：复仇追踪 Rrathmal Pursuit

16级：超凡天资 Preternatural Instinct

Benefit: 当你掷先攻时，你可以掷骰2次，且使用任一结果。

20级：复仇空间 Vengeance Shroud

Avenging Haunt Paragon Path.name: 复仇之魂 Avenging Haunt
Avenging Haunt Paragon Path.description:
「死亡不能阻止我的脚步。你觉得你可以么？」

Prerequisite:

Death frees souls from the concerns of life, but some wrongs the departed remember—even if the mind has long rotted away. You're the ghost of a life you barely recall; yet, you can't forget what they did. And you won't forgive it either. Some power put you back in this world, and whether or not it did so for this reason, you're out for revenge. Of course, those who wronged you in the past aren't the only ones on your hit list. You received a second chance, and this time you're not letting anything slide.

With each enemy you bury, you feel a little hollower. The cold rage gives way to a numbing chill, and life—your previous one and the half-life you now lead—slips quietly away into oblivion. Still, what difference does it make? You're already dead.

11级：鬼魅行动 Ghostly Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，你获得相位移动和虚体直到你下一回合结束。

11级：死之报复 Death Reprisal

Benefit: 当一个敌人的攻击将你的生命值降至0或更低时，你在对该敌人的攻击骰上获得+2加值直到你下一回合结束。

11级：致死回击 Deathly Retort

12级：幽魂形态 Haunting Form

16级：不死 Unkillable

Benefit: 你的「超凡活力」种族特性允许你保持意识直到你死亡。

20级：死亡坐标 Death Locus

Resurgent Wilder Paragon Path.name: 复兴狂野者 Resurgent Wilder
Resurgent Wilder Paragon Path.description:
「我会站起来！我要战斗！即使我身上的每一根骨头都断了，沙尘暴剥落了我的肉，我仍然会站起来战斗！」

Prerequisite:

这种方式的实践者在他们的思想和身体之间形成联系，允许他们超越身体的极限。天赋最强的狂野者有着最强的联系，而这样的人受到伤害会使他或她的灵能更加闪耀。一些狂野者在被流放到沙漠后回来了，他们本应该是一堆堆白骨。另一些人则因其战斗能力而臭名昭著，他们与一波又一波的敌人交锋，并且更凶残地攻击每一个敌人。

当你的敌人进攻时，你的思维会激增，你的肌肉和感官会以新的力量燃烧。随着你遭受的每一次割伤和擦伤，更多的力量涌上你的心头，使你的思想更加危险，保护或治愈你受伤的身体。

11级：重振活力 Reinvigorating Surge

Benefit: 每当你造成一次重击时，你可以花费一次回复力。

11级：急变行动 Volatile Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次额外攻击时，直到你下一回合结束，对此额外攻击的目标的攻击掷出19~20即可造成重击。

11级：复兴排斥 Resurgent Repulsion

12级：审视洞察 Critical Insight

16级：急变活力 Volatile Surges

Benefit: 你的随意灵能攻击威能掷出18~20即可造成重击。

20级：力量碎片 Shards of Strength

Soul Binder Paragon Path.name: 缚魂者 Soul Binder
Soul Binder Paragon Path.description:
「战斗不息，死亡不终。」

Prerequisite:

对那些奉献给奈落的人而言，收割者的本质变得愈发清晰。这一少部分可以进入冥土的碎片中——一个鸦后没有掌控的不休死者的神域——并使它屈服于自身的意志。对一名虔诚的奈落信徒来说，这几乎是最高的奖赏。

作为一名缚魂者，你与一个灵魂绑定，令其为你效力。这个灵魂可能是你想要长期折磨的敌人，你想要保持陪伴的爱人，亦或是你想要从惨死中拯救的友人。无论缘由如何，这个灵魂都必须保护和服从你。

11级：缚魂行动 Soul-Bound Action

当你压榨自身的极限时，缚魂能感受到你的努力并相应的发挥自己的力量。

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，你的缚魂 Bound Soul能同时进行一个标准动作。

11级：冥土之触 Touch of Pluton

你已经掌控了冥土的神圣魔法，并能够结合这种看似对立的能量。

Benefit: 你可以选择让你的造成暗蚀伤害的攻击同时还造成光耀伤害。

11级：召唤缚魂 Call Bound Soul

经由你的意志，你强迫缚魂来到现世，在战斗中协助你。

12级：满溢灵魂 Overflowing Soul

你遣返缚魂来使用其精华。

16级：死即源泉 Death Is the Source

你是收割者的代行人，你的屠杀维持着你和缚魂。

Benefit: 当你或你的缚魂 Bound Soul的攻击将一个非杂兵敌人的生命值降至1以下时，你获得等同于5 + 你一半等级的临时生命值。当你获得此临时生命值时，以一个自由动作，你可以将此临时生命值的一部分或全部转移给你的缚魂 Bound Soul。

20级：灰白军团 Gray Legionnaires

你开启通往冥土的通道，灰白军团的士兵前来现世遵从你的命令。这样的行为会让你的身体精疲力竭，并让 你的感官同时处在两界，在你指挥亡灵时变得脆弱。
Soul Binder Paragon Path.requirements: 任意奥术，神术或影能职业；必须信仰奈落

Chainbinder Paragon Path.name: 缚链者 Chainbinder
Chainbinder Paragon Path.description:
「我抓住他的胳膊了——他哪儿也去不了。」

Prerequisite:

You are a master of a hard and pitiless combat style. Speeches about hope and ideals aren't for you; you inspire your comrades by showing them how you can rip your enemies to shreds. You're skilled at fighting with weapons that let you hold your foes so your friends can work them over. The spiked chain is your weapon of choice, since it lets you strike from the second rank.

You might have learned your techniques in the fighting pits of a goblin fortress, in the arenas of a decadent city-state, or alongside brigands in lawless lands. You emerged from this crucible as a gang leader, a hard-hearted mercenary, or a skilled gladiator.

11级：束缚行动 Binding Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点使用连枷进行攻击且此攻击命中时，你能擒拿此攻击命中的一个生物。

11级：妨害之握 Hindering Grasp

Benefit: 任何被你擒拿的生物提供战斗优势。

11级：督军之链 Warlord's Chains

Benefit: 从下列督军随意威能中选择一个你已知的：@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.DalV5osBmX4vJY6C]{鲁莽突击 Brash Assault}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.TFvol1GdEpPeZOHn]{直觉打击 Intuitive Strike}或@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.HP4Z7XBNGu1F0VCr]{狼群战策 Wolf Pack Tactics}。所选的威能成为裂伤缚链学徒 <流派初成> Rending Chains Student 专长的关联威能，获得其增益。

11级：诱捕之链 Ensnaring Chains

12级：连枷之舞 Dance of the Flail

16级：撕裂逃脱 Shredding Escape

Benefit: 当一个敌人快步并且将要受到来自你裂伤缚链战神 <流派大成> Rending Chains Warmaster 专长的伤害时，你能改为对该敌人造成等同于你力量调整值的持续伤害（豁免终止）。

20级：抓然后砸 Grab and Smash
Chainbinder Paragon Path.requirements: 督军，[[裂伤缚链战神|裂伤缚链战神 <流派大成> Rending Chains Warmaster <Greater Style>]]专长

Master Binder Paragon Path.name: 缚影大师 Master Binder
Master Binder Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

By focusing on the study and arcane practice of your pact, you uncover its greater mysteries and master increasingly powerful magic.

11级：缚影师行动 Binder's Action

Your mastery of the magic woven into your pact allows you to draw on additional power when you push yourself beyond your normal limits.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你的契约相关联的典范特性

11级：缚影师恩惠 Binder's Favor

The entities to which you have bound yourself recognize your growing power and grant you a unique boon.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你的契约相关联的典范特性

11级：契约遭遇威能 Pact Encounter Power

The gifts you gain from your pact hone your understanding and mastery of arcane power.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你的契约相关联的遭遇攻击威能

12级：守契者之誓 Pact Keeper's Pledge

You are an increasingly valuable partner in the pact that grants your power. Your diverse associations in the realms beyond the world grant you numerous options when you need help.

16级：缚影师之赐 Binder's Boon

Your continued dedication to your pact grants you an increased understanding of the underlying mechanics of arcane power.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你的契约相关联的典范特性

20级：魔法祭品 Offering of Magic

When you attempt to offer up the entire spirit of an enemy to your pact-forged masters, those masters channel more potent power through you.

Steelsky Liberator Paragon Path.name: 钢空解放者 Steelsky Liberator
Steelsky Liberator Paragon Path.description:
「这片黑暗是我的家园，你不该来这里的」

Prerequisite:

长久以来，你的人民与Abeir的强大龙君们作战。尽管在法术瘟疫的大灾变中，一些地区的龙族暴政被推翻，但是另外一些地区仍然被龙族们的利爪和魔法残酷地压迫着，包括Faerun和回归的Abeir地区。你发誓要解放所有被龙族奴役的人们，并且时刻提防着这片自由的土地不被那些可怖的巨龙所侵犯。

钢空解放者们的力量源自于一个古老而神圣的祝福，此祝福曾在上古时期为那些遭受巨龙压迫的凡人带来希望。无人知晓究竟是神祇还是更为古老的存在创造了此祝福，然而它却随时间的流逝而变得越来越强力。每有一个惨遭龙族压迫的凡人灵魂，其哀伤与愤怒便令这神秘之力增强一分。Abeiran的龙君们越努力想要根除这些解放者，他们面对的反抗就越强烈。

多数钢空解放者来自于回归的Abeir地区，因为这片土地仍然承受着古代龙族律法的沉重压迫。不过，这些十字军的部分成员是来自于Akanul和Tymanther的龙裔和元素裔，以及其他在魔法瘟疫中被转移到Faerun的地区。数十年以来，在被巨龙威胁的土地上，无数英雄来到Abeiran王国，学习如何击败那些强力敌人的秘密

11级：巨龙之敌 Draconic Enemy

Benefit: 你在对抗龙的攻击的所有防御上获得+2加值

11级：钢空传统 Steelsky Heritage

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你恢复一个种族遭遇威能的使用，如果你在此遭遇中已消耗了它的话。若你是人类，则你在所有的d20掷骰上获得+1加值，直到你下一回合结束

11级：解放者之击 Liberator's Blow

12级：钢空架势 Steelsky Stance

16级：解放者决意 Liberator's Resolve

Benefit: 你在对抗魅惑和恐惧效果的豁免骰上获得+5加值

20级：挣脱枷锁 Break the Chains
Steelsky Liberator Paragon Path.requirements: 龙裔，元素裔，半兽人或人类

Iron Guardian Paragon Path.name: 钢铁守卫 Iron Guardian
Iron Guardian Paragon Path.description:
「你的这点攻击不足以让我对你使出全力。」

Prerequisite:

人的意志比肉身更为强大——而这世上没有人能比你更好地展现这一点。作为一名钢铁守卫，你懂得如何将灵能力量贯穿筋骨。只需一闪念，你的皮肤就能变得硬如钢铁，你的骨骼坚如磐石。在战场上你是无所畏惧的重装步兵，能够挺住最为激烈的攻击并进行致命的反击。

你无与伦比的强韧使你能够在任何战斗中坚守前线。当恐惧浮上敌人的面孔，任何刀剑、箭矢、利爪都无法伤你分毫。你的心中存有这份自信，因此你能够义无反顾地冲入战斗的最中央，挑战你所看到的每一个敌人。

11级：坚定如铁 Indomitable Iron

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在AC和伤害骰上获得+4加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：钢铁御劲 Iron Control

Benefit: 当任何敌人推离或拉近你时，你能在此被迫移动后以一个自由动作滑动该敌人2格。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：守卫者之力 Guardian's Might

12级：钢铁防御 Iron Defense

16级：无隙如钢 Impenetrable Iron

Benefit: 当你被重击时，掷一个d20。若结果为10或更高，则此重击变为普通命中。

20级：钢铁守卫形态 Aspect of the Iron Guardian

Steel Vanguard Master Paragon Path.name: 钢铁先锋大师 Steel Vanguard Master
Steel Vanguard Master Paragon Path.description:
「Trust only in your steel and your skill. People will always disappoint you.」

Prerequisite:

You are a swordmaster of renown and an expert in the famous Steel Vanguard style. This style is based on the use of large, heavy swords such as the greatsword and the falchion. Few can match your skill and lethality with a two-handed sword.

Some combat styles are associated with specific schools, academies, or regions; the Steel Vanguard technique is not one of these styles. It was developed centuries ago in the mercenary companies that served the empires of old. Countless variations and embellishments have been added to the style over time. Currently, the mercenaries known as the Steel Vanguard practice the style, and dozens of distinct regional styles have their roots in the base style.

As a famed swordmaster, you might be sought out by students who want to learn your techniques or by challengers eager to earn a name by besting a warrior of your skill. How you deal with such challenges is up to you. Between adventures, you might run a training school, teach at a famous academy as a visiting instructor, tutor young nobles, or take on an apprentice for a time. When adventure calls again, you set aside your lessons and once again use the martial skills you have honed over years of fighting.

11级：钢铁挑战 Steel Challenge

Benefit: 每当一个敌人以近战攻击对你失手时，你能以一个自由动作标记该敌人。此标记持续直到该敌人的下一回合结束。

11级：先锋行动 Vanguard Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，此攻击你在对被你标记的敌人的攻击骰上获得+4加值。

11级：钢铁冲击 Rush of Steel

12级：先锋防御 Vanguard Defense

16级：优良武器防御 Great Weapon Defense

Benefit: 当你持用双手重刃武器时，你在AC上获得+2盾牌加值

20级：残酷繁荣 Cruel Flourish
Steel Vanguard Master Paragon Path.requirements: 战士，[[钢铁先锋学徒|钢铁先锋学徒 <流派初成> Steel Vanguard Student <Lesser Style>]]专长

Steel Ego Paragon Path.name: 钢铁意志 Steel Ego
Steel Ego Paragon Path.description:
「不到你开口认输，这场比赛就绝不会结束。」

Prerequisite:

你的一贯胜利源于你的信心。即使面对挫折，你也从不犹疑，坚信不管情势如何严峻，你终将克服它。有些人因为傲慢或者愚蠢错识了你的决心，但你一次又一次的证明你所言不虚，在你的诋毁者面前显示着你的力量。

你对灵能的掌握支持着你的自信，这自信包裹着你的灵魂和身体，你的意志包裹着灵魂，抵挡你所面对的任何攻击——不管是针对你的肉体还是理智。籍着这坚定不移的决心，你能避过敌人的攻击。在敌人竭尽全力的攻击面前，你能保持屹立不倒。通过这种保障，你将你的品性投射到你的对手身上，用你击败他们的迫切愿望将他们的思维淹没。

11级：完美行动 Demanding Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能以一个自由动作使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.I9Rkf2BUKbvchLXN]{精神之矛 Mind Spike}威能，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：精神粉碎 Mind Smash

Benefit: 当你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.I9Rkf2BUKbvchLXN]{精神之矛 Mind Spike}威能造成伤害时，所有邻近目标的敌人受到等同于你魅力调整值的心灵伤害。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：激越叱责 Stinging Rebuke

12级：极度蔑视 Forceful Contempt

16级：灵能倾泻 Psionic Cascade

Benefit: 当你造成重击时，你恢复1个灵能点。

20级：恐惧憎恶 Fear and Loathing
Steel Ego Paragon Path.requirements: 战魂，[[精神之矛 Mind Spike]]威能

Enigmatic Mage Paragon Path.name: 高深学派法师 Enigmatic Mage
Enigmatic Mage Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

Your intense study and unending curiosity for everything arcane have led you to a new level of understanding. Magic has become second nature, and your command over spells sets you above those who cannot enter the arcane towers or walk the hidden paths of mystery.

11级：高深行动 Enigmatic Action

You can unravel the weave of arcane power to perform beyond your normal limits when the situation demands it.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你拥有「大师级学派法师」收益的魔法学派相关联的增益

11级：高深遭遇威能 Enigmatic Encounter Power

Your mastery of a specific school of magic grants you an innate understanding that allows you to call upon the school's power at your whim.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你拥有「大师级学派法师」收益的魔法学派相关联的11级遭遇攻击威能

除了你从法术书中准备的威能之外，此威能可以被你使用

11级：高深施法 Enigmatic Spellcasting

You see the connection between the strands of magic in the weave of arcane energy, which allows you to pick the right magical tool for each problem. Enigmatic mages use this ability to access certain utility powers when they need them most, particularly those powers that are useful only in rare circumstances.

12级：高深辅助威能 Enigmatic Utility Power

Your increased mastery of a school of magic allows you to shape and direct the flow of battle.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你拥有「大师级学派法师」收益的魔法学派相关联的12级辅助威能

除了你从法术书中准备的威能之外，此威能可以被你使用

16级：高深法术学识 Enigmatic Spell Lore

Using your deep knowledge of spell lore, you unravel one offensive spell to weave it into another. Enigmatic mages often use this ability to foil a foe's resistances and immunities, exchanging a spell that will do no harm to the foe for one that will.

20级：高深每日威能 Enigmatic Daily Power

Your specialized study of one school of magic grants you a greater measure of latent power.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你拥有「大师级学派法师」收益的魔法学派相关联的20级每日攻击威能

除了你从法术书中准备的威能之外，此威能可以被你使用

Goliath Juggernaut Paragon Path.name: 歌利亚斯破坏神 Goliath Juggernaut
Goliath Juggernaut Paragon Path.description:
「Everybody! Move!」

Prerequisite:

You are a horrific and awe-inspiring sight on any battlefield. When working in mercenary units as a means to shatter an enemy's defensive line, you and your fellow juggernauts use a combination of brute strength and cunning tactics to crush anything in your path. Many armies have seen their shield-lines falter under the crushing cascade of goliath juggernauts and many commanders have come to fear your presence in any conflict.

However, your unpredictable methods makes you a controversial addition to the rosters of any army. No one can tell what will happen when you enter the fray, and you've discovered that some commanders prefer to avoid using your skills altogether due to your rumored capriciousness. However, this purported impulsiveness has a purpose: If your foe can't anticipate your next move, you are more likely to succeed at your chosen task.

When you choose the life of an adventurer, whatever your reasons for doing so, you use your knowledge of tactics to become a truly efficient part of the team with which you journey. In combat, you prefer to place yourself in the middle of the fray so that you can cause as much chaos as possible in as short a period as is required. However, you don't position yourself in this manner consistently enough to become predictable. Also, you are not without wits. Many discount your ability to anticipate your foe's maneuvering and tactics, which can cause them to underestimate you and ultimately lead you to success.

11级：暴冲行动 Rampaging Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击且该攻击命中，则你将邻近一个命中的目标的所有敌人击倒。

11级：为战而生 Warborn

Benefit: 你的最大生命值增加10点

11级：拦腰砸断 Drive Them to Their Knees

12级：顽强无疑 Undeniable Tenacity

16级：沙场战嚎 Battlefield Warcry

Benefit: 当你在遭遇中第一次重伤时，你和所有离你5格内的盟友在攻击骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：爆碎攻击 Annihilating Strike

Guildmaster Thief Paragon Path.name: 工会盗贼 Guildmaster Thief
Guildmaster Thief Paragon Path.description:
「我和我的团队，我们将完成这项工作。无论是最好的还是临时的，都有我们的身影」

Prerequisite:

Whoever says crime doesn't pay just isn't good enough to pull it off. For the organized and resourceful, there's always an angle.

Thieves' guilds are criminal gangs that crop up mostly in urban areas. A single guild might manage or influence illegal activities such as assassination, blackmail, burglary, espionage, fencing stolen goods, grifting, smuggling, loan sharking, pickpocketing, piracy, racketeering, robbery, thuggery, and so on. A guild might also direct legal enterprises as legitimate business ventures, as cover, or as a way to control the flow of information. For instance, many thieves' guilds have their fingers in begging, bounty hunting, mercenary work, gambling, prostitution, shipping, and even street cleaning and lamp lighting.

Because a guild's business can be so varied, and because it often has trouble with legal authorities and rival gangs, it must divide its profitable interests between various centers of control. Those centers have bosses, who report to those higher in the chain of command. Thus, guilds have complicated hierarchies, clear divisions of authority, and codes of behavior that can border on downright law-abiding in some respects. A guildmaster typically leads a portion of a guild, and some guilds have a grand master who oversees a guild's entire operation.

You might be an actual guildmaster, or maybe you grew up in the criminal world and know what's what on the street and in a brawl. Your experience has left you able to run a criminal crew on jobs and in fights. You're a great skirmisher who knows how to get a job done right while helping out your pals with some "world-wise management."

11级：工会大师的行动 Guildmaster's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，作为从你的总行动点扣除的替代，你可以从任何你能看到的自愿的盟友处扣除。同样，只要你愿意且仍有意识，任何可以看到你的盟友花费一个行动点进行额外动作时也可从你的总行动点中扣除，而不是从他或她自己的。一场遭遇中可消耗的行动点限制依然生效。当你花费一个盟友的行动点进行额外动作时，你在攻击骰上获得+2加值，直到你的下一回合开始。

11级：偷盗工作者 Thieving Crew

Benefit: 离你5格内的盟友在隐秘和贼活检定上获得+2加值。

11级：工会强袭 Guild Beatdown

12级：机巧方位 Shifty Direction

16级：盗亦有道 Thick as Thieves

Benefit: 任何与你一起造成夹击的盟友在对被夹击的生物的近战伤害骰上获得等同于你魅力调整值的加值。

20级：刺击复位 Biting Repositioning

Guild Executioner Paragon Path.name: 公会行刑者 Guild Executioner
Guild Executioner Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

As a member of a powerful guild, you are afforded training and education in the killing arts that surpasses the prowess of most who work alone. You learn secret fighting techniques, gain access to experts in the field of poison use, and rise through the ranks of your guild as your skills progress. Perhaps one day you will even challenge the Grandfather of Assassins for control of the guild.

11级：攻其不备 Blindside

A key trait taught to you by your guild is how to take advantage of the ignorance of your enemies. While hidden, you can remain so still that, when your strike comes, your enemies have no time to react or to defend themselves. Though truly blindsiding your enemies is difficult (requiring them to move within striking distance of you without seeing you), good luck and a good hiding place can often make your assassinations easier than ever.

Benefit: 如果在遭遇开始时你对你的敌人处于隐藏，则你在此遭遇的第一个攻击骰上获得+4加值

11级：毁灭暗杀 Devastating Assassination

Your guild has taught you its secret techniques for executions. These secrets may be as simple as the angle of a blade or as complex as a long period of preparation before the execution takes place. Regardless of the actual form it takes, this knowledge increases the potency of your deadliest attack.

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WZ68JDhKx3FqfTsI]{刺客打击 Assassin's Strike}时，此额外伤害增加2d10

11级：行刑者行动 Executioner's Action

For you, the span of time when your killing blow streaks toward your enemy's body seems to slow to a crawl. That crucial instant passes in the blink of an eye for your enemies and allies, but you perceive each fraction of it in full clarity that lets you guide your strike to where it will do the most harm.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行攻击且你在与此攻击关联的任何伤害骰子上掷出1、2或3时（包括@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WZ68JDhKx3FqfTsI]{刺客打击 Assassin's Strike}的额外伤害和重击的额外伤害），该骰子改为造成4点伤害

12级：果敢脱身 Daring Escape

When the kill is made, you need to be prepared to bolt away at a moment's notice. Your guildmasters taught you a special slaying technique that uses the momentum of your last, deadly strike to propel yourself away. Before your enemies even know that their ally is dead, you are already speeding out of sight.

16级：致命打击 Vital Strike

In your pursuit of a greater ability to execute your targets quickly and efficiently, one of your fields of study is the anatomies of various types of creatures. You have found about more than just the natural races—you've learned where to strike demons to inflict the most damage, where the weak points of angels can be found, and where an archon's armor leaves tiny but dangerous gaps.

Benefit: 你的随意武器攻击威能失手时造成一半伤害

20级：用毒者秘诀 Poisoner's Secrets

When you reach the height of your power within your assassins' guild, you become privy to the secrets and mysteries that your guild's poisonmasters have held for many years. You not only learn the secret to crafting the deadly poison known as wyvern venom, you also learn how to mix your poisons more efficiently so that you can craft more of them in the same amount of time.

Benefit: 你习得刺客毒药双足飞龙毒液 Wyvern Venom的配方。在一次长休息中，你可以准备一个20级刺客毒药而不计入你通常能准备的毒药数量

Sword of Assault Paragon Path.name: 攻袭之剑 Sword of Assault
Sword of Assault Paragon Path.description:
「最好的防御就是打趴敌人。」

Prerequisite:

娴熟的奥术和精妙的剑术对其他人来说已足够，但是你相信制服敌人还有更好的方法。如果结合强力斩击和奥术爆破能更快击倒敌人，那为何要为技巧所局限呢？

作为攻袭之剑，你致力于融合魔法与剑术以强化攻击力。你并不喜欢严格精巧的奥术训练，宁愿直接使用更原始的元素能量爆发，而不是精心编织的咒语。

同样，你蔑视对手的精巧剑术，更偏向于力量而非技巧。你认为繁复的招式和华丽的挥舞不过是展示了剑客的自负，而不是技巧。而这种展示只会拖缓战斗。另一方面，你确保所有你的动作和奥秘呢喃都在你以单次挥剑中造成最毁灭性的打击。

11级：攻袭冲锋 Assaulting Charge

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行冲锋时，你可以使用一个近战随意攻击威能或者近战遭遇攻击威能替代此冲锋的近战基本攻击。

11级：剑法备战 Battlemage Readiness

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0vkg25zchQaif4y7]{攻击庇护 Aegis of Assault}来传送并攻击时，你可以用一个剑法师近战随意攻击威能替代近战基本攻击。

11级：法术打击 Spell Strike

12级：庇护储备 Aegis Reserve

16级：双咒攻袭 Double Spell Assault

Benefit: 当你掷先攻时，选择一个你的随意攻击威能。在遭遇结束前仅一次，你可以在以近战攻击命中后，以一个次要动作使用这个威能。

20级：雷火交加 Fire and Thunder
Sword of Assault Paragon Path.requirements: 剑法师，[[攻击庇护 Aegis of Assault]]职业特性

Lightwalker Paragon Path.name: 光芒行者 Lightwalker
Lightwalker Paragon Path.description:
「我们行进在万丈光芒中，若黑暗来袭，我们将以光明应对。」

Prerequisite:

光芒行者是一群信仰光芒大道的流浪战士，他们往来于各处的半梦灵定居点并协助他们的人民解决一切可能遇到的危机与难题。一位光芒行者这个月可能在沙恩对抗暗黑梦境的威胁，下个月则又会前去保护探索寇巴拉（Q'barra）古代通灵塔的半梦灵考古学家。在大多数半梦灵选择远离尘世与喧嚣，享受神殿要塞艾达尔内的安宁与静谧时，你却发现，这绝对不是你所期望的生活方式。你希望自己能够处在对抗暗黑梦境的最前线，你希望彻底消灭尘埃之主，你希望将和平带给你的人民，只有这样，你才能感觉到心灵上的满足。作为一名光芒行者，你享受着净化与正义之光，但你也知道：必须有人站出来对抗无所不及的邪恶。

11级：光芒行者行动 Lightwalker Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用一个光耀威能时，你或一个离你5格内的盟友恢复等同于一半你的等级的生命值

11级：步向光路 Walk the Bright Path

Benefit: 当你做一次光耀攻击时，一个离你5格内的盟友对此攻击的目标获得战斗优势，直到你下一回合结束

11级：照耀敌军 Illuminate the Adversary

12级：光芒大道 Path of Light

16级：光耀振兴 Radiant Renewal

Benefit: 你获得10点光耀抗力和10点心灵抗力。若你已经有光耀抗力或心灵抗力，则那抗力增加10点

20级：召唤光芒 Call the Light
Lightwalker Paragon Path.requirements: 半梦灵，必须信仰光芒大道

Light Bringer Paragon Path.name: 光明传播者 Light Bringer
Light Bringer Paragon Path.description:
「我将光明符文传播到最黑暗的地方。」

Prerequisite:

符文很久以来就是诸神的强力武器，但没什么符文能比太阳十二符记更强大。这些符文包含着希望、黎明、保护，与耐久。你已经研习它们很久，希望掌握其中的神圣力量。几乎没有人能明了这些符文的力量，因为掌握这力量需要研究者付出高昂的代价。你每天要凝视太阳很久，几乎失明，由此净化意识中的一切阴影。只有通过这种方式，一个符文牧师才能掌握这些符文。

作为一名光明传播者，你将太阳的光辉带到从未受过那纯净的光芒祝福的地方。你对阴影与不死生物怀有极度的憎恶。有很多生物都会躲避太阳的净化之光，而你发誓要将这光芒带到它们面前。

11级：神圣光辉 Holy Radiance

Benefit: 以一个次要动作，你可以在半径至多10格内的范围散发明亮光照。你能以另一个次要动作改变此半径或熄灭这亮光。

11级：太阳十二符文 Twelve Runes of the Sun

Benefit: 当你进入一个新的符文状态时，你可以改为进入光明传播者符文状态。当你处于此符文状态时，离你3格内的敌人无法从隐蔽上获得增益。

11级：激励之光 Invigorating Light

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点，让离你5格内的一个盟友以一个自由动作做一个标准动作，而不是你自己进行额外动作。

11级：日光击 Mote of the Sun

12级：黎明赞歌 Anthem of the Dawn

16级：不灭之光 Undeniable Light

Benefit: 当你处于光明传播者符文状态时，离你3格内的盟友不会目盲。

20级：黎明之光 Dawning Light

Honorable Blade Paragon Path.name: 光荣之刃 Honorable Blade
Honorable Blade Paragon Path.description:
荣耀支持着我刀刃上附着的闪电。如果我失去荣耀，我也将失去力量

Prerequisite:

有一些龙裔氏族并不是真正的氏族。脱去了家族的束缚，这些单独的武士为了一个共同的理想联系在一起。这是些致力于光荣战斗和获取胜利的龙裔理想的武士团体，同时致力于使龙裔——内在的巨龙——能够@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}。每个武士团体都有一个守护巨龙类型，这些团体的成员通过各种方式模仿这种巨龙，从阵营和行为到他们@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}的伤害类型

作为一位光荣之刃，你到达了这种武士氏族的顶峰。你已经开始掌握很多奇异的战斗技术，最早的就是用驱动你种族吐息能力的巨龙力量覆满你的武器。你的技术全部都是体术，他们完美体现了龙脉生物的身体素质，同时你力求通过行动体现他们的动作质量

11级：龙之剑刃 Draconic Blade

Benefit: 选择一个你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}威能可造成的伤害类型。以一个自由动作，你能把此伤害类型加到以你近战武器造成的所有伤害上，除了那些威能造成的任何其他伤害类型之外。以另一个自由动作，可以让武器伤害恢复正常

11级：龙息行动 Dragon Breath Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以同时以一个自由动作使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}，即使你在此遭遇中已经消耗掉它了

11级：龙之回避 Draconic Sidestep

12级：龙之跳跃 Draconic Leap

16级：龙之抵抗 Draconic Resistance

Benefit: 选择一个你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}威能可造成的伤害类型。你对该伤害类型获得等同于5 + 一半你的等级的抗力

20级：旋转巨龙 Whirling Dragon

Fey Beguiler Paragon Path.name: 鬼灵欺诈者 Fey Beguiler
Fey Beguiler Paragon Path.description:
「你不会总能发现我的！」

Prerequisite:

作为一个侏儒，你不得不学习在危险地世界中生存：要么保持不被注意、要么远离他人的视线、要么用魔法隐身。而作为一名鬼灵欺诈者，你做的更好。你完善了自己隐秘和掩饰的能力，在你魔法的帮助下身影变得模糊，或是让你的敌人晕头转向。

伴随着你的鬼灵欺诈者之路，你学到了很多迷惑你的敌人而不被看见的方法。你可以悄悄地走到他们身边，用一团妖野光束冲击你的敌人，然后悄然而去。或者把敌人打到发愣，留给你的朋友们处理。为了增强你的职业和典范之道，你可以学习一些技能、一些法师或者游荡者的辅助威能――无论是魔术还是简单的戏法――来增强你的隐秘，移动或者其他的能力。你有大量的方法来做到这些。

你变得狡猾而诡秘，动作无声无息，隐蔽在阴影里。谨慎细致是无法替代的，适当的掩饰则能够保住你的性命。当然有些时候，直截了当地一击也是完成工作的办法。

11级：勤学苦练 Skill Learning

Benefit: 你在一个游荡者或法师技能列表中的技能上受训。

11级：大变活人 Disappearing Trick

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来隐形直到你下一回合结束或直到你攻击，而不是进行额外动作。

11级：炫目宝珠 Bedazzling Orb

12级：聪明伶俐 Clever Versatility

Benefit: 你得到一个游荡者或法师的10级或更低的辅助威能。

16级：鬼鬼祟祟 Sneaky Gnome

Benefit: 当你做隐秘检定时，你掷骰2次，且使用任一结果。

20级：魅惑闪 Beguiling Bolt

Sea Tyrant Oracle Paragon Path.name: 海洋暴君之灵 Sea Tyrant Oracle
Sea Tyrant Oracle Paragon Path.description:
「I have looked upon the glittering sea that reflects past and future. My visions reveal both hope and disaster.」

Prerequisite:

An oracle appeared to you in dream. She strode from a cave mouth, arrayed in the sea-green robes of an ancient prophet, and called herself the scion of the Sea Tyrant. “Behold!” she declared, revealing a vision of a terrible flood in which legions of angels were swept into eternal chaos. After showing you this disaster, the oracle bathed your eyes in water, and your vision was forever changed.

Like the prophets of old, you are capable of gaining horrible insights into the future. In most cases, your predictions extend so far ahead in time that you can do little to affect the course of events. However, you sometimes predict imminent events, and in these cases, you can take steps to avert or fulfill the occurrences you foresaw.

11级：梦幻行动 Visionary Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用随意或遭遇攻击威能，且对所有目标都失手时，你获得一个额外的标准动作，但必须在遭遇结束前使用掉。

11级：预见未来 Future Foreseen

Benefit: 在遭遇中你第一次在技能检定，属性检定或豁免检定上失败时，你可以重掷该检定或豁免。你必须使用第二个结果

11级：末日前兆 Doomsday Portent

12级：天命之备 Prepared by Fate

16级：回避未来 Future Evaded

Benefit: 在遭遇中，第一次一个被你诅咒的敌人在邻近你的位置结束其移动时，你能以一个即时中断快步2格

20级：遗灵海洋暴君 Vestige of the Sea Tyrant

Vermin Lord Paragon Path.name: 害虫之主 Vermin Lord
Vermin Lord Paragon Path.description:
「闭嘴！听到了吗？感受到了吗？我的子嗣无处不在，渴望吞噬你的血肉。」

Prerequisite:

Your enduring interest in the lowliest creatures grants you power over them. You cement your connection when you invite vermin to inhabit your body, to nestle in your crevices and drink deep on your fluids. In exchange, the clicking and skittering creatures serve your command, lending their power to your efforts in championing darkness.

The vermin respond each time you wield primal magic. The more accustomed you are to these parasites, the more you learn to direct them in useful ways. Still, the cost to your body is severe. Forever more, your flesh bears the signs of the infestation you host.

11级：害虫行动 Vermin Action

You are host to countless creeping and crawling insects. When you push yourself beyond your normal limits, they emerge from your body in a terrible cloud.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动进行额外动作时，邻近你的所有敌人受到等同于你感知调整值的毒素伤害，并且你和每个邻近你的盟友在所有防御上获得+2威能加值，直到你下一回合结束

11级：害虫朋友 Vermin Friend

You have an affinity for all manner of vermin and scavengers. You welcome their presence, suffering their stings and bites gladly.

Benefit: 你获得10点毒素抗力。在21级，此抗力增加至15点

11级：蛆虫到苍蝇 Maggots to Flies

This terrible evocation infests your enemies with maggots. They grow quickly into thick clouds of black flies that swarm and distract.

12级：蜂群思维 Hive Mind

You can use primal magic to bond with your allies. Your party becomes a hive, able to act with one mind.

16级：虫群之翼 Wings of the Swarm

When you channel primal magic, the vermin infesting you take wing, lifting you where you wish to go.

Benefit: 当你使用一个原力遭遇或每日攻击威能，你获得飞行速度6直到你下一回合结束

20级：以一化千 From One to Many

Drawing on primal magic agitates the vermin you host. You surrender yourself to the swarm, joining your essence with theirs to terrorize your enemies.

Earth Shaker Paragon Path.name: 撼地者 Earth Shaker
Earth Shaker Paragon Path.description:
「我的力量就是大地的力量。跌倒不蠢，但想爬起来就很蠢了。」

Prerequisite:

Regardless of the combat tricks you have learned during your adventuring career and the tactics with which you have surprised your enemies, a part of you yearns for direct and uncomplicated applications of might. The path of the earth shaker appeals to you because it matches strength to strength—your mastery of weapons augmented by the power of the earth beneath your feet, working together to oppose the raw might of dragons and behemoths, demons and deities.

The strength of earth that you draw on allows you to move through the ground at speed, even as your attacks bypass an opponent's armor to strike at the body within. Your connection to the natural world allows you to seek out targets behind obstacles or even within the ground, and your attacks can knock your foes down.

Leave the subtleties of strategy and complex tactics to others. Instead, you keep faith with the oldest spirits of rock and earth, letting their grim determination guide you in your mission to defend the world from forces that would despoil it.

11级：全力冲击 Full Impact

Benefit: 你在对抗强韧的攻击骰上获得+1加值。

11级：大地汹涌 Surging Earth

Benefit: 当你在守护者形态下花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在你下一回合结束前，你以原力攻击威能命中的每个敌人被击倒。

11级：震撼大地 Shake the Earth

12级：踏地 Tread the Earth

16级：特定引力 Certain Gravity

Benefit: 你的随意守望者攻击可以对抗强韧而不是AC。

20级：原始鲨蜥兽化形 Form of the Primeval Bulette

Messenger of Peace Paragon Path.name: 和平信使 Messenger of Peace
Messenger of Peace Paragon Path.description:
「暴力永远是最后手段。」

Prerequisite:

妳为那些自称文明的种族感到悲伤；它们之中有太多的人沉陷在无用却永无止境的争斗中，不可自拔。除非某些勇敢的灵魂挺身而出，竖立楷模，否则战争将只会造就更多伤痛。这就是为何妳放下刀兵，立不行暴力之誓，期望能为凡俗的问题找到一个文明的答案。

作为和平信使，当争斗可以避免，妳总是在寻找方法制止它的发生。交涉是你最主要的手段：透过小心的遣辞用字与精确地评估你的敌人所欲之事，妳或许可以避开双方相互伤害的结局。然而，不是所有敌人都愿意平息他们的怒火。虽然，战斗的爆发并不是妳努力过后最佳的结局，但在如风暴般的战争中，妳能够长保冷静。弱者、厌倦战争之人与身负重伤的人们，都因妳的存在而得到拯救。

11级：非暴力誓言 Vow of Nonviolence

Benefit: 当你以一次不造成伤害的攻击命中时，你在所有防御上获得+2加值直到你下回合结束。

11级：缔造和平行动 Peacemaker's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行攻击时，你在不造成伤害的攻击的攻击骰上获得+4加值。此加值持续到你下回合结束。

11级：镇静 Pacify

12级：调停宣告 Peacemaker's Pronouncement

16级：和平灵光 Aura of Peace

Benefit: 离你2格内的所有敌人在攻击骰上承受-2减值。

20级：终结争斗 End to Strife

Inner Circle Initiate Paragon Path.name: 核心集会新秀 Inner Circle Initiate
Inner Circle Initiate Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You become a pivotal member of your druid circle, having grown in both experience and influence. The powerful evocations you learn and the blessings you gain mark you as one chosen for greatness.

11级：新秀行动 Initiate's Action

As you channel greater levels of primal power, the mysteries bestowed on you by your druid circle lend the force of nature to your attacks.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行攻击时，你在此攻击的伤害骰上获得等同于此攻击目标数量的加值

11级：庇护生长 Sheltering Growth

As a paragon protector, when you channel your power into the land around you, a measure of that energy is given back to aid an ally.

Benefit: 当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.a3ux6KLkAj2YrMG5]{自然生长 Nature's Growth}威能时，一个在此爆发范围内或邻近此爆发范围的盟友获得等同于他回复力值的临时生命值

11级：尖刺藤曼 Thorny Vines

You have long had the ability to call forth living plants even in the most inhospitable terrain. Now you channel a more formidable power, creating a burst of new growth that unleashes a primal destruction on your foes.

12级：动植物交谈 Speak with Animals and Plants

Your druid circle training has taught you to quiet your mind and listen to the nonverbal voices of the world around you. This evocation allows you to communicate with nearby animals and plants as though they were intelligent enough to converse with you. Through their senses, you are warned of danger and of the presence of hidden or invisible creatures, you can learn what has happened recently in the area, and you can extend your senses in the hope of noting trails, secret entrances, and the like.

16级：风暴之怒 Fury of the Raging Storm

When your enemies push you to your limits, they risk unleashing a storm that will quickly rage out of control.

Benefit: 当你重伤时，任何结束其回合时邻近你的敌人受到10点闪电和雷鸣伤害

20级：召唤飓风 Call Cyclone

The leaders of your druid circle are the masters of the natural world. They have shared with you the secrets of channeling the most potent force of nature. The great cyclone you can call now on is capable of pulverizing even the strongest foes. However, as you direct this storm across the field, your allies must be wary of its path.

Dark Watcher Paragon Path.name: 黑暗监察者 Dark Watcher
Dark Watcher Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

The ancient order of the dark watchers was founded by arcanists who mastered the power of shadow, then matched that power with a righteous understanding of the light of life and the Astral Sea. As a dark watcher, you are a vigilant guardian of the light of life and the natural world. The power taught to you by the order grants you unmatched defensive prowess, allowing you to protect yourself and your allies from the forces of darkness. Only by embracing the shadow can its corruption be turned to light—or so you believe.

11级：正义警戒 Righteous Vigilance

When you take advantage of a foe caught off guard, you can strike to sap its strength rather than wound its flesh.

Benefit: 当你以造成伤害的借机攻击命中一个敌人时，你可以选择此攻击不造成伤害。改为该敌人虚弱，直到你下一回合结束

11级：正义信标 Righteous Beacon

When the forces of darkness must be held at bay, you become a beacon of righteousness whose light gives strength to your allies.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，你可以选择在5格范围内散发明亮光照，直到你下一回合结束。当在此光照下，盟友在所有防御上获得+4加值，且不会引发借机攻击

11级：警戒呼唤 Call for Vigilance

As an opponent of all that is dark, you weave unseen power around your allies to protect them even when you cannot.

12级：持续警戒 Constant Vigilance

The connection you forge with your allies makes you aware when one of them falls in combat. In the blink of an eye, you slip through the realm of shadow, bypassing any foe or obstruction to come to that ally's aid.

16级：不屈于暗 Never Surrender to Darkness

Having touched the Shadowfell, you have learned to resist the inexorable pull of the plane of the dead. This power makes your presence an inspiration to your allies whenever they fight for life.

Benefit: 你在死亡豁免上失败4次才会死亡，而不是3次。当离你10格内时，盟友在死亡豁免骰上获得+2加值

20级：正义粉碎 Righteous Disruption

Your mastery of the magic of light and shadow lets you tap into and unravel the life force of your foes. Your allies can quickly gain the advantage over a creature torn apart by your wrath.

Darkstrider Paragon Path.name: 黑暗阔步者 Darkstrider
Darkstrider Paragon Path.description:
「前方是无光的漫漫长路。跟上我，你也许能活着见到太阳。」

Prerequisite:

Beneath the world of daylight lies a vast realm of eternal night—the caverns, tunnels, and vaults of the Underdark. This wilderness of stone is home to dangerous monsters and rapacious civilizations that plague the world, and it's here you're at home. You have explored the lightless passages and wandered the uncounted miles of labyrinthine caves. The bizarre ecology of this subterranean world is as familiar to you as the flora and fauna of a surface forest; you know how to survive where other heroes would find a cruel, swift death.

As a darkstrider, you are part explorer, part guide, and part hunter. You have made it your task to discover the secret paths and hidden strongholds of the Underdark, mastering the unique dangers of this horrible realm and learning the ways of the creatures and peoples who call it home. You could serve as a spy, keeping watch on the plots of the drow or the mind flayers. You might be an exterminator, fighting a shadowy war against teeming hordes of troglodytes and grimlocks in foul caverns beneath the mountains. Or you might be a subterranean trailblazer, skilled at finding treasures long hidden from the light. In any case, survival in the Underdark is a game of stealth, sharply honed senses, ambush, and savagery—and you understand its rules perfectly.

11级：暗中行动 Dark Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在所有防御上获得+4加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：黑暗边缘 Darkstrider Edge

Benefit: 在遭遇开始时，你对在遭遇中没有行动的任何生物具有战斗优势。另外，你的武器攻击对这些生物或者你对其隐藏的生物造成等同于3 + 你感知调整值的额外伤害。

11级：暗中伏击 Darkstrider Ambush

12级：暗中斗篷 Cloaked in Shadow

16级：盲感 Blindsense

Benefit: 你获得等同于2 + 你感知调整值的盲视，意味着你可以清楚地看见这范围内有效果线的生物或物体，即使它们隐形或处于障目格子中。

20级：暗中谋杀 Death in the Dark

Dark Reckoner Paragon Path.name: 黑暗算计者 Dark Reckoner
Dark Reckoner Paragon Path.description:
「一个老卓尔说过：‘报复因黑暗而变得更加甜美’。」

Prerequisite:

你威慑着一切胆敢企图伤害你、你的同盟或任何你所重视事物的蠢货。你相信，威胁毫无意义，除非你将它们付诸行动。当威胁无效时，你的报复将来得无比迅速且充满恶意。

在你看来，报复是一种美德。身为一名黑暗契约邪术师，你对报复理念有着异常深刻的认识。许多你与之签订契约的存在都充斥着复仇的欲望。在幽暗地域，轻藐和恶性争斗孕育了大量的残忍诡计与危险阴谋。

作为一名黑暗算计者，恶意与怨念已经完全融入了你的内心。自黑暗的街巷和无光的隧道中，你不断汲取着灵感与想法。你深知报复本身就是一种强大的力量之源。

11级：暗影动作 Shadow Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你与离你5格内的所有盟友获得隐蔽，直到你下回合开始。

11级：暗影凶兆 Shadow and Threat

Benefit: 当你以造成暗蚀伤害的攻击造成重击时，你获得隐形到你下回合结束或直到你进行攻击。

11级：致命裁决 Deadly Judgment

12级：暗行之影 Shadow Slip

16级：死亡诅咒 Death Curse

Benefit: 当你造成「邪术师诅咒」的额外伤害时，你可以选择再造成1d6额外暗蚀伤害。

20级：复仇诅咒 Cursing Vengeance

Darkwalker Paragon Path.name: 黑暗行者 Darkwalker
Darkwalker Paragon Path.description:
「下辈子记着别和我作对。」

Prerequisite:

所有的邪术师都同凡人难以想象的力量签订了危险的契约。他们中大部分会谨慎从事，对那些与他们签订契约的不管什么东西封闭起一部分灵魂。他们害怕自己靠得太近时将会发生的事。他们害怕自己会成为你。

极少数人愿意像你一样贴近黑暗的力量，去直视那些不洁存在的疯狂面容。你强到足以控制内心的黑暗。你每天都在拿自己的灵魂赌博，承受巨大的诅咒来换取黑暗的回报。你的身体已经成了一种束缚，使你停留在一个看起来已经不再属于你的世界上。你正迈向一个更加黑暗的区域，每天都走得更远，把光明遗弃在你的身后。

你站在两个世界之间，成为一团与大部分人从未听说过的更强大的邪恶角力的鬼魂状的阴影。你体内的黑暗力量急切的渴望着你的灵魂。迄今为止你都成功的拒绝了它们，并将它们怪异的力量为自己所用，但它每天都会使你更加难以回到光明之中。

11级：致命无形 Deadly Absence

Benefit: 当你成为虚体时，你在邪术师威能的伤害骰上获得等同于你智力调整值的加值

11级：黑暗行者行动 Darkwalker Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来成为虚体直到你下一回合开始，而不是进行一个额外动作

11级：幽魂克星 Ghostly Bane

12级：渐隐螺旋 Fading Spiral

16级：幽灵认知 Ghostken

Benefit: 你的攻击对虚体生物造成正常伤害（而不是一半）

20级：怨灵冲爆 Wraithform Blast

Shady Dealer Paragon Path.name: 黑道贩子 Shady Dealer
Shady Dealer Paragon Path.description:
「Honest merchants are as rare as water.」

Prerequisite:

A merchant house has power and influence, soldiers and workers, but everything the house is depends on its representatives' efforts. The shady dealer represents one breed of dune trader, a skilled and treacherous agent specializing in intrigue and manipulation. Some shady dealers work as independent speculators and others act on a larger house's behalf. They still travel as dune traders, shepherding goods to places in need, but they always have an ulterior motive, seeking some rumor or bit of gossip to benefit themselves or their house.

The image you cultivate masks a devious mind and a propensity for doing whatever you must to survive. Your skills at negotiation and intrigue serve you well: they let you confuse enemies and lure them into traps where your allies can strike. In time, your words and movements make fools of everyone you meet.

11级：诈骗行动 Swindling Action Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，此额外动作不会引发借机攻击。

11级：精通旅行 Well Traveled

Benefit: 当你做一次唬骗，交涉或市井检定时，你掷骰两次并使用任一结果。

另外，选择两种语言。你能说，读和些这些语言。在21级时，你能再选择额外两种语言。

11级：绳索标记 Rope the Mark

12级：可信骗术 Convincing Deception

16级：谈判专家 Skilled Negotiator

Benefit: 你在技能挑战中不会因为检定差5点或更少而失败的唬骗，交涉或市井检定而被记作失败。

20级：无知盟友 Unwitting Ally

Blackstone Guardian Paragon Path.name: 黑石守卫 Blackstone Guardian
Blackstone Guardian Paragon Path.description:
「I have peered into the darkness clouding my soul, and it has found me worthy.」

Prerequisite:

Strange dreams are common among those who wield psionics. Your dreams, however, are different. You dream of a black monolith set within a cavern rimed with ice. This vision has haunted you for as long as you can remember, but until now, you have struggled in vain to discover its meaning.

The blackstone monolith has chosen you as its champion. In another age, noble champions of a distant land fought to contain a breach to the Far Realm. They sealed the rift with powerful psionic wards, behind elemental stone imbued with their own consciousness. Each generation, the wards they forged must be resealed by new champions. You are bound to the fate of the guardians you follow.

11级：黑石行动 Blackstone Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用一个攻击威能时，你获得等同于3 + 你感知调整值的全伤害抗力，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：巨石之视 Monolithic Vision

Benefit: 每当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.I9Rkf2BUKbvchLXN]{精神之矛 Mind Spike}威能时，你同时滑动那威能的目标3格。然后目标迟缓直到它下一回合结束。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Point

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：黑石诅咒 Blackstone Curse

12级：巨石之赐 Monolithic Blessing

16级：黑石锁链 Blackstone Chains

Benefit: 每当你将一个敌人的血量降至0时，每个被你标记的敌人定身直到你下一回合结束。

20级：黑石狱卒形态 Aspect of the Blackstone Gaoler

Obsidian Stalker Paragon Path.name: 黑曜石追踪者 Obsidian Stalker
Obsidian Stalker Paragon Path.description:
「高墙、守卫和野兽——这些都无法阻止我接近我的目标」

Prerequisite:

你是一只捕猎中的幽灵，一名利用阴影魔法穿梭于最紧密防线的刺客。当你选择结束一个生命，没有阻碍能当在你的面前。

这种刺客传统起源于“黑曜石洞穴工会”，由一位先辈矮人领导，专长于追捕和杀戮幽暗地域的怪物。Initiates of the Obsidian Cave were tasked with finding and killing mind flayers, drow priestesses, and others that sought to attack the surface world. With such preventative attacks, the dwarves ensured that their mines remained safe. Since that time, the hunting phantom's techniques have passed to assassins from different traditions.

11级：追踪者行动 Stalker's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你同时获得相位移动并成为虚体直到你下一回合结束

11级：追踪者形态 Stalker's Form

Benefit: 当处于虚体时，你在对抗借机攻击的所有防御上获得+5加值。同时，每日一次，当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.8MrY6C7Zwz3kBWKi]{阴影形态 Shade Form}时，你获得相位移动直到你下一回合结束。

11级：迷雾剑刃 Blade from the Mist

12级：猎手之眼 Hunter's Eye

16级：追踪者步法 Stalker's Tread

Benefit: 你可以移动穿过敌人的空间。

20级：黑曜石坟墓之握 Grasp of the Obsidian Tomb

Siphon Paragon Path.name: 虹吸 Siphon
Siphon Paragon Path.description:
「你的恐惧，愤怒，希望和盟友都会被我吞噬。当你只剩下一具空壳，我的盛宴才会结束。」

Prerequisite:

Not all vampires are undead, drinking the blood of the living or draining souls with a touch. Some feast on intense feelings such as fear and love, anger and happiness. They are insidious creatures—parasites that gorge without drawing attention to themselves. Some might not even realize what they're doing. Regardless of whether a siphon is cognizant of his or her abilities, the effect of such a character's power is palpable, as a victim falls into the clutches of lethargy, becoming torpid and drained.

As a siphon, you use psionics to absorb thought energy from your victims, drinking deep from their emotions and feelings to increase your power. Your mind is a vortex, catching others' thoughts and using them to replenish your resources and overcome your injuries. Once you establish a link with another creature, you can draw its energy until your prey is drained and unable to act. You might keep this energy for yourself or transfer it to your allies so that they can share its benefits.

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：心灵吸血鬼 Psychic Vampire

Benefit: 当你使用一个未强化的炽念使随意威能命中一个迟缓，晕眩，震慑或受到持续心灵伤害的敌人时，你获得等同于你感知调整值的临时生命值

11级：麻痹行动 Torpid Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次攻击且此攻击命中时，离你3格内的所有敌人迟缓直到你下一回合结束

11级：阴险分心 Insidious Distraction

12级：死亡盛宴 Feast of Death

16级：汹涌汲取 Draining Surge

Benefit: 当一个离你5格内的敌人生命值降至0，或被晕眩，震慑或虚弱时，如果你在你下一回合结束前使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.tiTRAzheoj3x9rqO]{炽念汹涌 Ardent Surge}，则此威能的目标恢复等同于你感知调整值的额外生命值

20级：情绪榨取 Emotion Leech

Tiger Claw Master Paragon Path.name: 虎爪大师 Tiger Claw Master
Tiger Claw Master Paragon Path.description:
「我是猎人。你是猎物。」

Prerequisite:

The tiger claw style is an ancient, honored path. Its practitioners have incorporated techniques from different traditions, but the style retains a central feature: the tiger claw. A practitioner curls his or her fingers toward the palm to make a claw. Through iron discipline, the monk transforms each digit into a rigid talon capable of raking and rending.

Mastering tiger claw maneuvers builds your strength and hardiness, and your strikes shred enemies. You spring at your foes with astounding speed. With true mastery, you take on the characteristics of the celestial tiger. Coarse orange and white striped fur covers your body. Your hands become clawed paws and a tiger's visage replaces your features. With great green orbs for eyes and a mouth filled with sharp teeth, you embody the tiger claw style.

11级：猛扑行动 Pouncing Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次冲锋攻击时，作为冲锋的一部分你移动等同于你速度 + 2的格数，你在此冲锋中的移动不会引发借机攻击，且你能重掷作为此冲锋一部分的一个攻击骰

11级：虎爪式 Tiger Claw Style

Benefit: 当你掷一个攻击骰时，你能在此掷骰上受到-2减值。如果此攻击命中并且你触发你的「疾风连击」威能，则此威能造成4点额外伤害

11级：虎爪抓 Tiger Claw Rake

12级：狂虎 Tiger Frenzy

16级：虎之坚韧 Tiger's Endurance

Benefit: 当你使用你的回气时，你恢复等同于你力量调整值的额外生命值。另外，你的回气给所有防御提供的加值等同于2 + 你力量调整值

20级：唤醒天堂之虎 Awaken the Celestial Tiger

Gatekeeper Paragon Path.name: 护门者 Gatekeeper
Gatekeeper Paragon Path.description:
「Though the Living Gate from which you descend is destroyed, you retain a knack for guarding thresholds.」

Prerequisite:

The Living Gate, the first best defense against the horror of the Far Realm, is gone, dissolved into thousands of disparate crystal shards. A disaster, certainly, but you are keenly aware of the upside; some of those shards make up your body and some quanta of the original animating consciousness of the Living Gate makes up your mind.

Aside from the obvious benefit of your own existence, it should also be clear that you are composed of the physical manifestation of a straightforward concept, which fundamentally is about controlling access through a threshold.

Whether others call a feature a gate, a door, or an entry doesn't matter; all that matters is that you can conceive of a particular area as a threshold. Once you've got that fixed in your mind, your body viscerally responds, granting you ever greater abilities to open or close a way, to monitor a passage, to ward off foes, and to keep your allies safe.

11级：危险之阈 Dangerous Threshold

Benefit: 每当一个敌人离开一个邻近你的格子并且进入一个不邻近你的格子，此敌人向你提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

11级：护门者行动 Gatekeeper's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来获得额外动作时，直到你下一回合结束，敌人将邻近你的格子视为困难地形。

11级：不得通行 You Shall Not Pass

12级：抉择之阈 Chosen Threshold

16级：守卫门扉 Gate Ward

Benefit: 当你在遭遇中第一次重伤时，你重获@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.AqavY0p4Tyz15xSl]{抉择之阈 Chosen Threshold}辅助威能的使用。另外，任何在墙范围内或邻近你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.AqavY0p4Tyz15xSl]{抉择之阈 Chosen Threshold}创造的墙的敌人提供战斗优势。

20级：通往荒芜之门 Gate to Nowhere

Gatekeeper Mystagogue Paragon Path.name: 护门者秘法师 Gatekeeper Mystagogue
Gatekeeper Mystagogue Paragon Path.description:
「他们曾经蹂躏过我们的世界，但只要我一息尚存，他们就别想再次得逞。」

Prerequisite:

16000年前，德鲁伊成立了护门者组织。他们以全部热忱承担了守护这个世界不受在吉波尔的深渊中潜滋暗长的扭曲恐怖的侵害。虽然失败过，这些生物还是寻找突破现实世界的屏障，占领凡间的机会。护门者履行职责过程中只有一次失败。大约9000年前。异变魔逃出了Xoriat，疯狂国度位面。经过苦战，护门者以强大的封印禁锢了异变魔。但成员也所剩无几。在那之后，护门者重申了古老的誓言，继续警惕的的履行自己的职责。

作为一名护门者的秘法师，你守护着你先辈们设下的封印，并致力于对付异怪。为了履行职责，你不断旅行。因为异变魔和它们的卵无时无刻不在想要破坏封印。为了对抗他们，你以古老的技艺强化你的精神以抵抗它们的腐败力量和堕落影响。

11级：坚毅行动 Resolute Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你获得20点心灵抗力直到你下一回合结束。另外，你和每个邻近你的盟友能对任何心灵效果做一次豁免检定

11级：异界末日 Aberrant Bane

Benefit: 你的攻击在对重伤的异界生物时，掷出19-20即可造成重击。

11级：自然平衡 Nature's Balance

12级：门之封印 Gate Seal

16级：异界摧毁 Aberrant Disruption

Benefit: 当你对一个异界生物造成重击时，该生物同时震慑，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：自然净化 Nature's Purge
Gatekeeper Mystagogue Paragon Path.requirements: 任意原力职业，护门者组织成员

Phantasmagoric Scoundrel Paragon Path.name: 幻影奸徒 Phantasmagoric Scoundrel
Phantasmagoric Scoundrel Paragon Path.description:
「不...说真的，看看你身后。」

Prerequisite:

对于一些人来说，单纯靠语言来说服和欺骗对方是完全不够的。他们想要直接欺骗对方的眼睛，而不仅仅是从耳朵出发；这些人想要找到更加可靠的方式来戏弄那些妨碍他们的人。

而其中的一些人，比如你，选择涉足魔法。无论是通过训练还是纯粹的天赋，你已经掌握了幻术的艺术，并且将其与你机敏的思维和锋锐的骗术向结合，打造出了完美的骗术。

11级：致盲行动 Blinding Action

Benefit: 当你使用一个遭遇或每日威能命中一个向你提供战斗优势的目标时，你可以花费一个行动点使该目标目盲直到你下一回合结束。

11级：战地幻术师 Combat Illusionist

Benefit: 你从任意职业选择并获得一个7级或更低级的奥术幻术遭遇攻击威能，你不能选择一个你已知的威能。在21级时，你可以从任意职业选择并获得一个13级或更低级的奥术幻术遭遇攻击威能替换此威能。

11级：幻术专家 Expert Phantasmagorist

Benefit: 你能掌握并施展欺骗类仪式，如同你具有仪式施法者 Ritual Caster专长一般。另外，每天一次，你能施展一个等级低于或等于你的欺骗类仪式而不需要花费材料（不过你仍然必须使用任何此仪式要求的器材）。

12级：眼角余光 Corner of the Eye

16级：幻觉交流 Illusory Communication

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，在你进行一次唬骗，交涉或威吓检定之前，你能选择同时进行一次神秘检定。你能使用此神秘检定代替原本的检定

16级：幻术大师 Master Phantasmagorist

Benefit: 每天额外一次，你能施展一个等级低于或等于你的欺骗类仪式而不需要花费材料（不过你仍然必须使用任何此仪式要求的器材）。

20级：致命幻象 Deadly Visions
Phantasmagoric Scoundrel Paragon Path.requirements: 在神秘上受训，在唬骗或贼活上受训

Phantasm Guard Paragon Path.name: 幻影守卫 Phantasm Guard
Phantasm Guard Paragon Path.description:
「You think you've faced your worst nightmare? Sorry, that's coming up next.」

Prerequisite:

Gnomes are known for their prowess with illusions, but many outsiders believe such magic is employed merely for hiding and deception. To the gnomes, though, illusions are much more. They serve as a great equalizer, which they use to attack as well as protect. They can assault the minds of foes directly using well-crafted figments and phantasmal perceptions, which are effective regardless of the physical attributes of those involved.

Your race's natural talent for illusions combines with carefully honed swordmage techniques, creating the path of the phantasm guard. Using your magic, you assail the minds of your foes, and punish those who seek to harm your companions by revealing to them glimpses of their worst nightmares and disguising the true nature of threats.

Phantasm guards are often outwardly charming and compassionate gnomes, expressing a keen understanding of and sympathy for their fellow beings. As one, you act as a trustworthy confidant who is concerned with the plights of others. Frequently interested with exploring the meaning of "truth", you might engage in philosophical discussions with others to pass the time. However, the purpose of such kindness is just as often more cynical: the goal being to gain and exploit knowledge of potential adversaries so that you can better and more completely defeat your adversaries' minds if and when the time comes.

11级：阴影庇护 Shadowed Aegis

Benefit: 你的那些对被你标记的敌人有隐蔽的盟友，改为具有全隐蔽

11级：幻影行动 Illusory Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你恢复你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.xVLwi45qtsnFApSX]{渐隐 Fade Away}种族威能

11级：恐惧波涛 Wave of Dread

12级：噩梦景象 Nightmare Landscape

16级：隐伏精神 Insidious Mind

Benefit: 当你以带有心灵关键字的攻击命中时，你在意志上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束

20级：幻影之主 Illusory Host

Stonecaller Paragon Path.name: 唤石者 Stonecaller
Stonecaller Paragon Path.description:
「世界上的岩石都铭记着过去的错误。暗怒隐匿在石头里。」

Prerequisite:

古老的造物语言被锁在地球的骨骼中。你已经掌握了这门语言中一些最古老、最基本的音节，这些音节如此洪亮，几乎连凡人都说不出来。用你的语言和你的意志，你可以唤醒世界上的每一块石头，让它给你力量，或者向你的敌人猛烈抨击。

矮人是最早的唤石者，但这一传统后来传播到了其他种族，尤其是歌利亚斯、半兽化人和野蛮人——他们生活在自然环境中。全世界的山民都知道来自唤石者声音的力量。

11级：坚定立足 Strong Footing

Benefit: 当任何攻击将会击倒你时，你可以进行一次豁免检定。如果你豁免成功，则你不会倒地。另外，你无视由碎石，不平坦的石块或土质结构组成的困难地形。

11级：唤石行动 Stonecaller's Action

Benefit: 当你使用一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你可以同时在近程爆发2，5或者10（由你选择）的范围内创造一阵地震。直到你的下一回合开始，除你以外的所有生物将此爆发范围视为困难地形，并且你命中的在爆发范围内的任何生物在攻击效果结算后倒地

11级：大地箭矢 Earthbolt

12级：根植大地 Rooted to the Earth

16级：石之视线 Stonesight

Benefit: 只要你和地面接触，你就获得震动感知5

20级：厄运之黑色方尖碑 Black Obelisk of Doom

Desert's Voice Paragon Path.name: 荒漠之声 Desert's Voice
Desert's Voice Paragon Path.description:
「There are voices in the land. I can hear their cries in the wind and in the shifting dunes. They call to me, begging for vengeance. Have I any choice but to answer?」

Prerequisite:

Your purpose has become clear. You see it in the desolation around you, in the ruins scattered across the countryside, in every agonized face you behold. The wind carries it with the stench of carrion, smoke, and fire. The ashes left by defilers, the bone fields that mark the places where tribes, cities or entire races were wiped out—these signs have revealed to you your reason for being: to repair the world. Perhaps the pull you feel is in your head, a delusion born from desperation. Do you dare ignore it? If the despoilers aren't stopped, what future does this world have? So you take upon yourself a dread task to undo the damage done to this world.

11级：阿塔斯图腾 Athasian Totem

You construct a special totem to serve as a focus and inspiration for your crusade. The item's presence is both a comfort and an assurance that you cannot fail.

Benefit: 你获得图腾的法器擅长。另外，在你以一次使用图腾的法器攻击造成重击后，你能以一个自由动作快步1格。

11级：沙漠显能 Desert Manifestation

Your kinship with the wastelands awakens your elemental nature, making it easier for you to call upon your natural talents and to unlock new abilities you never knew you had.

Benefit: 选择一个你未拥有的元素裔种族威能，此威能必须和灰烬，岩浆，流砂或皓日显能关联。你获得此威能。

11级：废土行动 Wasteland Action

When your need is greatest, the world answers. Your extra effort summons up shrieking winds to hammer your enemies.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外攻击时，每个离你3格以内的敌人耳聋直到你下一回合结束。另外，你可以在进行此攻击前滑动每个离你3格以内的敌人1格。

11级：毁灭之怒 Wrath of the Ravaged

The world's broken and tattered spirit dances around you, waiting for your permission to unleash its wrath on the creatures it hates.

12级：元素复原 Elemental Resurgence

The wastes are rich with elemental energy. You can call upon it to give you new strength and resolve.

16级：元素专家 Elemental Adept

Your elemental manifestation grows in intensity, building inside you and letting you achieve greater results when you call on its power.

Benefit: 你在每个你拥有的元素裔种族威能上获得相关联的增益。

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.bLhCaSwDkEBr7o4q]{灰烬之遁 Ashfall Evasion}：此威能变成近程爆发3

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.E6yGfPz7l48ZeuVo]{震撼大地 Earthshock}：被此威能命中的生物不能起身直到你下一回合结束

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.cZDskRpuPLO9f8rm]{炽焰脉冲 Firepulse}：如果命中，每个邻近目标的敌人受到等同于你力量，体质或敏捷调整值的火焰伤害

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.7ojhwIJxmR0ynMNF]{流体岩浆 Flowing Magma}：此威能不再使你迟缓

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uJC3dHSkhYpKODz4]{动态流砂 Sandslide}：当处于流砂形态时，你同时获得相位移动

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.OdfCcAhQiqVRuJMm]{皓日之耀 Sun Flare}：所有被此威能命中的目标目盲直到它下一回合结束，即使它并未被此攻击重伤

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Y8pNhQtil3sbdT0r]{风中漫步 Windwalker}：此威能对你成为随意威能

20级：大灾变 Cataclysm

The desert's power is yours to command. When you use cataclysm, vengeful spirits boil out from the land, trailing elemental energy that rips your enemies to pieces.

Wildrunner Paragon Path.name: 荒野奔者 Wildrunner
Wildrunner Paragon Path.description:
「大地使我足下生翼，使我灵魂翱翔。」

Prerequisite:

野外是你的家，与大地的自然精魂的联系赐予你速度和狂野。你如同鹿一般穿过丛林，以猎豹的速度和凶猛冲入战斗。

荒野奔者的威能强调机动性，使你在打击敌人的时候快步或是迅速移动。你从一个敌人猛扑向另一个敌人，避免在狂暴引发的对敌伤害中被借机攻击。

精灵野蛮人大都踏入此典范之道，因为这些威能与他们天生的机动性互补。同样的，许多通过野蛮人兼职专长而培养出与自然之力联系的游侠也会发觉此道路的魅力。

11级：猎手狂野 Hunter's Fury

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次近战攻击时，你可以在攻击后快步等同于你力量调整值的格子。

11级：荒野奔者迅速 Wildrunner's Swiftness

Benefit: 你在速度上获得+1加值，当你处于狂暴状态时此加值为+2。

11级：迅野击 Shifting Wilds Strike

12级：步步紧逼 Press the Kill

16级：野外复苏 Wild Resilience

Benefit: 当你处于狂暴状态时，你在豁免骰上获得+2加值。

20级：荒野奔者之狂暴 Wildrunner's Rage

Ghost of Eventide Paragon Path.name: 黄昏鬼魂 Ghost of Eventide
Ghost of Eventide Paragon Path.description:
「Netheril means to enslave us. I have something to say about that. I think I'll let my blade do the talking.」

Prerequisite:

You thrive in the time between sundown and night. The shadows of twilight are all that keep you alive. They are a shroud even the Shadovar cannot pierce, from which you strike at their foul hearts. And long before the Netherese can find you, you've returned to the twilight shroud.

You are a silent blade in the mists, a trained killer whose skill at stealth foils even those foes who live in shadow and illusion. You are a ghost of eventide, a vengeful spirit fighting against an ancient foe whose tyranny has long laid a crushing yoke upon your race. It is only through wit, skill, and perseverance that anyone could survive against such dread foes. You repay their evil with death, and your training makes you the very best and bravest of any knife-wielding rogue or shadow warrior. You live on the knife's edge, tempting fate and inviting the wrath of some of the most powerful and vile enemies in all of Toril.

11级：暗影动作 Shadowed Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你同时被阴影笼罩，获得隐蔽直到你下一回合开始。

11级：暮光精准 Twilight Accuracy

Benefit: 当你对目标拥有隐蔽或全隐蔽时你的近战攻击造成1d6额外伤害。

11级：影手攻击 Shadow Hand Attack

12级：暮光脱逃 Twilight Escape

16级：暮光视觉 Twilight Vision

Benefit: 你对拥有隐蔽的目标的近战攻击的攻击骰不会受到通常的-2减值。

20级：身披暗影 Robed in Shadow
Ghost of Eventide Paragon Path.requirements: 游荡者，来自于科米尔（Cormyr），谷地（the Dalelands），埃尔图加德（Elturgard），艾弗瑞斯卡（Evereska），灰谷（Gray Vale），拉露亚（Luruar）或桑比亚（Sembia）

Dusk Oracle Paragon Path.name: 黄昏贤者 Dusk Oracle
Dusk Oracle Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

The spirits of the dead hold the accumulated lore of all creatures that once lived. Through the art of the dusk oracle, you have learned to call forth the ephemeral shades of the dead to answer questions and help you battle your foes. Whether you are a character capable of tapping into these endless memories or an empathic mortal called upon by the gods, your search for knowledge is guided by the whispers of the dead.

11级：贤者洞察 Oracle's Insight

You question the deceased, gaining insight into their memories. Faint spirits whisper directions and instructions to guide you toward your goals.

Benefit: 你可以询问任何智慧生物的尸体一个问题且得到回答。尸体只知道它生前了解的以及其尸体所在地附近的事情。尸体会如实回答，不过有时候比较隐晦

11级：预测行动 Predicted Action

As you push yourself to the limit, you call on the spirits of the dead to correct your aim or to point out weaknesses in your opponent's defenses. At times, you can share these insights with an ally.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，此攻击对抗每个目标的强韧，反射或意志中最低那项。若你花费一个行动点来进行一个给予一个盟友一次攻击的动作，则你能将此增益应用于该盟友，而不是你自己

11级：预知命中 Foreseen Hit

In the heat of combat, you listen to the shades surrounding you and use their expertise to your advantage.

12级：预见结果 Predicted Outcome

You augment your own knowledge by drawing on the shadowy memories of the dead, seeking ancient wisdom and insight to guide your actions.

16级：神谕洞察 Oracular Insight

When your opponent's guard is down, the whispering spirits you summon allow you to bypass the enemy's defenses with expert accuracy.

Benefit: 当你对一个敌人有战斗优势时，它具有的对抗你的攻击的任何抗力减少10点

20级：预知战斗 Foreseen Battle

Having earned the trust and respect of your spirit guides, you can call upon them to fight at your side.

Gray Guard Paragon Path.name: 灰卫 Gray Guard
Gray Guard Paragon Path.description:
「不择手段完成任务，道德问题之后再想吧。」

Prerequisite:

As a paladin, you cleave to principles that guide you through life, shaping your worldview and forming your moral foundation. Even if you don't follow a code of behavior, you follow the precepts of your god and work to live up to your faith's expectations. Yet the enemy never plays fair. Sometimes rules must be bent, or even broken, for the greater good.

No one knows this better than you, a gray guard. You have made a career of defying expectations and making the tough choices that your peers avoid. For you, the ends justify the means—even stealing, lying, or brutal interrogation. You do what you must to defeat the enemy. Your tactics don't make you popular with others in service to your god. Many see you as dangerous, almost as much of a threat as your enemies. Let them say what they will. You know that, deep down, they fear you and might even respect you.

As you continue down this path, you might feel estranged from your god, a disappointment to the one for whom you have sacrificed so much. The blood staining your hands has somehow darkened your soul, although your abilities are unaffected. But you do what you must.

11级：黑白两道 Gray Guard Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你可以同时以一个自由动作快步3格。另外，你的攻击骰获得+2加值直到你下回合开始。

11级：灰色警戒 Gray Guard Vigilance

Benefit: 你在侦查和市井上受训。此外，被你标记的敌人在对抗你的攻击时无法获得隐蔽或全隐蔽的收益 。

11级：衰弱斩 Debilitating Smite

12级：无情审判 Relentless Justice

16级：导火线 Demoralizing Critical

Benefit: 当你造成一次重击时，离目标最近的那个敌人在攻击骰和所有防御上都获得-2减值，直到你下回合结束。

20级：大毁灭斩 Devastating Smite
Gray Guard Paragon Path.requirements: 圣武士，在洞察和威吓上受训

Radiant Serpent Paragon Path.name: 辉煌大蛇 Radiant Serpent
Radiant Serpent Paragon Path.description:
「羽蛇的精魂熠熠生辉。」

Prerequisite:

You raise your eyes and heart to the stars and to the spirit of the shining, winged serpents that helped tame the primordials. You have chosen the couatl as a spiritual ally, embracing that legendary creature's power so thoroughly that you assume its very form. You emulate your shining ally by rising above the battle with a flourish of power or by passing through your enemies like a radiant spirit.

Like couatls, you understand the necessity of sacrifice. The coils of your power can trap enemies that would otherwise harm your allies, but you must be willing to take those allies' hurts on yourself. If your own survival is jeopardized as you protect your friends, so be it.

11级：灿烂光辉 Radiant Glow

Benefit: 你获得等同于一半你等级的光耀抗力，并对定身或束缚你的效果的豁免检定上获得+2加值。另外，每当你受到光耀伤害，你的攻击造成等同于一半你等级的额外光耀伤害，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：辉煌大蛇行动 Radiant Serpent Action

Benefit: 当你处于守护者形态下，花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你成为虚体并获得相位移动，以及等同于你速度的飞行速度，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：辉煌盘绕 Radiant Coils

12级：闪耀通道 Shining Pass

16级：牺牲斗篷 Mantle of Sacrifice

Benefit: 当你对一个敌人造成重击时，此敌人不能攻击除你之外的任何目标，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：辉煌羽蛇化形 Form of the Radiant Couatl

Doomlord Paragon Path.name: 毁灭之主 Doomlord
Doomlord Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

From brooding fortresses in the Elemental Chaos, the Doomguard watches the decay of the cosmos and its unstoppable slide into dissolution. These stoic warriors believe the universe’s fate was sealed when the gods defeated the primordials, because imprisoning these entities kept them from sustaining the world and thus doomed it. The Doomlords are the Doomguard‘s champions, warriors aligned against those who espouse order and perpetuate corrupt and tyrannical regimes. As is true of their cousins, the Doomguard Marauders (Manual of the Planes), the ranks of the Doomlords include both valiant champions of freedom and murderous anarchists.

11级：毁灭之主行动 Doomlord's Action

Channeling entropic forces causes reality to bend and groan around you until everything blackens and crumbles away around you.

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来对每个邻近你的生物造成1d10 + 你最高的属性调整值的暗蚀伤害，而不是进行额外动作。每个因此方式受到伤害的生物获得5点暗蚀易伤，直到你下一回合结束

11级：熵能汹涌 Entropic Surge

Rather than fully restore your vigor, you can channel some of your innate healing energy and release it in the form of wrath. For a few moments, you attacks fall with incredible accuracy.

Benefit: 当你花费一次回复力来恢复生命值时，你可以选择将恢复的生命值减少等同于一半你回复力值的数值，来在攻击骰上获得+2加值直到你下一回合结束

11级：熵能打击 Entropy Strike

Your weapon is a tool of entropy. With the aid of this power, your strikes undo the work of creation, one enemy at a time.

12级：毁灭之主推进 Doomlord's Advance

Entropy can cause reality to splinter or break apart. You sense the cracks around you and leap through them to ambush your foes.

16级：熵能先兆 Entropic Harbinger

The more creatures you defeat, the more the cosmos withers. Your destructive nature manifests as a field that prevents creatures from staving off death.

20级：加速终焉 Hasten the End

The ultimate expression of your power is the ability to dissolve the bonds that hold an enemy together. A successful strike causes your opponent to degenerate until nothing but dust remains.
Doomlord Paragon Path.requirements: 精铸钢铁主题，或擅长鳞甲和一件军用近战武器

Speaker of Xaos Paragon Path.name: 混乱代言者 Speaker of Xaos
Speaker of Xaos Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

The Speakers of Xaos are a society of sages, wizards, explorers, and priests who study the Elemental Chaos. You are a member in good standing of this fellowship. The Speakers maintain libraries, small colleges, and chapter houses in many elemental domains, including the City of Brass and Zerthadlun, and the organization has small chapters in various mortal worlds as well.

The Speakers have no great purpose beyond a shared interest in the magic, secrets, and phenomena of the Elemental Chaos. Members report interesting discoveries to their fellows, consult with each other on difficult problems, and work together to collect and preserve unusual knowledge or resources pertaining to the Plane Below. Individual members are also free to follow their own desires regarding whether to share information or respond to calls for assistance from their fellows. The only rule is to treat your colleagues as you would have them treat you.

11级：混乱学识 Xaos Lore

You hold potent secrets of elemental spellcasting; your elemental spells and abilities are especially pernicious and long-lasting.

Benefit: 你在对具有元素界起源的生物的攻击骰上获得+1加值，且这些生物在对抗由你创造的效果的豁免骰上受到-1减值

11级：混乱行动 Xaos Action

You command elemental powers with surprising deftness and flexibility, especially when you are under duress.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在你下一回合结束前，你可以拓宽你下一次寒冰，火焰，闪电或雷鸣攻击的效果。选择使一次近战或远程攻击增加一个射程内的目标，或使一个爆发或冲击的范围增加1

11级：元素禁锢 Elemental Durance

After calling upon a power that makes use of elemental energy, you can retain an echo or remnant of that energy. This power allows you to shape that remnant into a cage of blazing fire, bitter cold, or crackling lightning.

12级：排斥元素 Repel Elements

Your understanding of the essential nature of elemental creatures and energies provides you with the power to hold them at bay when you wish.

16级：混乱之力 Power of Xaos

You are so skilled in wielding elemental force that your successful attacks always inflict a significant amount of harm.

Benefit: 当你以寒冰，火焰，闪电，雷鸣，或元素攻击造成伤害时，重掷任何结果为1的伤害骰子，直到结果为2或更高

20级：元素锁链 Elemental Chains

You are a master at shaping elemental energy. With this power, you can transform your elemental magic into damaging bonds, pinning your enemies in place.

Fireforged Champion Paragon Path.name: 火锻勇士 Fireforged Champion
Fireforged Champion Paragon Path.description:
「What better weapon to use against our hated oppressors than the curse they foisted on us?」

Prerequisite:

The ancient curse forgeborn dwarves carry manifests itself in different ways. Although united in their uncommon appearance and the single-minded zeal with which they attack their enemies, a few dwarves, often the greatest heroes in their clans, manifest incredible power on the battlefield. When the fury is upon them, their bodies erupt in brilliant flames, obscuring their forms and scorching their enemies. Few forgeborn dwarves endure these transformations. Even the healthiest dwarves cannot withstand the fires burning within them for long, but a rare few learn to control the flames and to use them when most needed so they can destroy the foes they despise.

11级：锻与烈火 Forged in Flame

Benefit: 你的火焰抗力增加等同于一半你的等级的数值，且你的攻击无视等同于你的等级的火焰抗力

11级：灼烧行动 Scorching Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外近战攻击且此攻击命中时，每个邻近此攻击目标的敌人受到10点火焰伤害。此伤害21级时为15点

11级：锻造打击 Forge Strike

12级：燃烧回忆 Burning Recollection

16级：鲜血之火 Fire for Blood

Benefit: 当你重伤时，任何开始其回合时在邻近你的一格的生物受到5点火焰伤害。此伤害21级时为10点

20级：锻炉之灵形态 Form of the Forge Spirit
Fireforged Champion Paragon Path.requirements: [[熔炉降生传统 <矮人血统> Forgeborn Heritage <Dwarven Bloodline>]]专长

Flamebrow Commander Paragon Path.name: 火眉指挥官 Flamebrow Commander
Flamebrow Commander Paragon Path.description:
「Like Bergrom Earthfast, I endure.」

Prerequisite:

A dragon driven to wrath is a terrifying foe. It stops at nothing to quench its fury in the blood of those who wronged it. Only the desire to protect its young can drive a dragon to even greater heights of recklessness. A dragonborn warrior is little different, and a dragonborn officer displays parental loyalty to those alongside whom he fights. Such is the dragonborn warrior ideal.

An exemplar of this standard was Dhuryan Flamebrow, an audacious but beloved dragonborn mercenary from the fringes of the empire of Arkhosia. Dhuryan was noble born, but upon him fell the consequences of his father's dark deeds. Without title or property in the empire, and living under the shadow of family history, he made his way as a soldier and leader. He made a habit of leading from the front with a brashness born of being indifferent to death. Glory and the erasing of the past was his overriding aim, yet he was unwilling to sacrifice his fellow fighters for his own gain.

Dhuryan succeeded in reshaping the armies of a border province known for its barbarism and monster problems. Eventually, that province and its dragon lord became the most prominent in Arkhosia, although only Dhuryan's name is widely remembered to this day. At long last, Dhuryan had cleansed his family name. He rose then to prominence as a military advisor and became a general in the wars that eventually destroyed Arkhosia. During this time, he penned the military manifesto titled Flamebrow, in honor of his clan. Myths from many cultures say that Dhuryan fought in numerous wars in this world and beyond, and that he fell but returned to life more than once. Tales say that he stands now beyond the touch of time, alongside other legendary generals, awaiting the world's need.

Flamebrow still exists, copied into many languages. It is a treatise for the commander who wishes to defeat enemies head-on. Although it speaks of deceptive planning and long-term strategies, it also talks of brutal efficiency and courageous leadership when battle is joined.

Whether through influence, reading and practice, or direct training, your path has been influenced by Flamebrow. Boldness of action fails to fully describe your methods. You act decisively, willing to lay your own survival on the line to get the job done and protect your allies.

11级：不懈行动 Relentless Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以把你的「勇猛风采」职业特性用在自己身上就如同把自己视作自己的盟友。

11级：火眉复生 Flamebrow Revival

Benefit: 当你濒死时，你将你的魅力调整值加到任何你恢复的生命值上，而且你在死亡豁免骰上获得等同于你的魅力调整值的加值。

11级：火眉突击 Flamebrow Assault

12级：重振之诱 Rallying Lure

16级：复原怒吼 Roaring Recovery

Benefit: 每次你在重伤状态下恢复生命值，你在攻击骰上获得+2加值直到你下回合结束。

20级：复兴猛击 Renewal Smite
Flamebrow Commander Paragon Path.requirements: 督军，「勇猛风采」职业特性

Warforged Juggernaut Paragon Path.name: 机关金刚 Warforged Juggernaut
Warforged Juggernaut Paragon Path.description:
「闪一边去，肉球！」

Prerequisite:

你倾力于将自己打造成完美的机体——成为力量与勇猛的化身。也许你在终末战争中战斗在第一线，也许诞生于和平年代并且渴望体验你的军人本色。不管是哪种情况，你都尽情享受冲入敌群之中，把他们打得屁滚尿流的快感。作为一个机关金刚，你是无可阻挡的战力，身处战场，为群敌所环绕，你才能体会“家”的感觉。当你要坚守阵地的时候，你岿然不动。你的训练和构造使你能轻松承受足以将你的伙伴碾碎的攻击。

11级：冲锋行动 Charging Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行冲锋攻击时，你在速度和所有防御上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。另外，你在冲锋后可以继续进行更多动作

11级：冲锋打击 Charging Strike

Benefit: 当你冲锋一个目标且命中它时，你的攻击对它造成1d6额外伤害，且你推离它1格。另外，你可以快步1格到目标空出的空间。21级时，此额外伤害为2d6

11级：毁灭猛击 Ruinous Onslaught

12级：无情推进 Inexorable Momentum

16级：完美构装 Construct Perfection

Benefit: 你在豁免骰和坚韧检定上获得+2加值

16级：不可阻挡 Unstoppable

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，你可以做一次豁免检定

20级：钢铁峭壁 Crag of Steel

Warforged Lifeseeker Paragon Path.name: 机关人生命探索者 Warforged Lifeseeker
Warforged Lifeseeker Paragon Path.description:
「I embrace life, living as an example to others.」

Prerequisite:

You value the unique living aspect of your nature so highly, and study what it means to be alive so deeply, that you have become an expert on these subjects. Embracing your emotions and the needs of living, as well as those of others, you grow to understand life better than those who take it for granted. These insights work through your magical being, making you a better leader and healer.

11级：医疗行动 Healing Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你或一个可以看见你的盟友恢复等同于你感知或魅力调整值中更高者的生命值。

11级：社交专家 Social Savant

Benefit: 你在基于感知和基于魅力的技能和检定上获得+1加值。

11级：气魄之击 Verve Strike

12级：移情共振 Empathic Resonance

16级：移情链接 Empathic Bond

Benefit: 任何时候你使用一个威能来医疗一个盟友，你同时恢复等同于你感知或魅力调整值中更高者的生命值。

20级：释放活力 Unleashed Vigor

Adroit Explorer Paragon Path.name: 机敏探险家 Adroit Explorer
Adroit Explorer Paragon Path.description:
「你让我们趁现在就回来？可是我们还不知道下一层楼有什么东西呢！」

Prerequisite:

未知世界对你有着无可名状的吸引力。你最大的愿望是探索和发现。你完美地诠释了人类那种为知识与力量寻遍世界的天性。你有一种近乎超人的决心，这种决心来自于你的本性――它驱使你更努力地工作，更执著于战斗，乃至于去完成超越自身实力的目标。如果你不是挖掘全力去战斗，你会感觉到胜利并不完美，目标还未完成。当你越是身陷绝境，你的意志就越发坚强。你只会更加努力地战斗，并确信自己终将获得胜利。

无论你是什么动机：寻求古老的文明，渴望遗失了的奥法力量，以埃拉西斯的名义去征服自然、散播文明，亦或是贪图金钱和荣誉，但为了达成目标你不惜面对巨大的危险。凭借着专心致志，你通常能从危险中全身而退――哪怕是死里逃生。

11级：壮志雄心 Ambitious Effort

Benefit: 从你的职业中选择一个7级或更低的遭遇攻击威能。你获得该威能。如果你选择了一个你已知的遭遇攻击威能，则你可以在每场遭遇中使用该威能两次。21级时，你可以将该威能替换成一个13级或更低的你的职业中的遭遇攻击威能。

11级：浴血决心 Bloody Determination

Benefit: 当你在遭遇中第一次重伤时，在你下一回合结束前，你在下一次对重伤你的该敌人的攻击骰上获得+5威能加值

11级：英勇行动 Heroic Action
