Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时获得10点全伤害抗力，直到你下一回合结束。21级时，此抗力为20点。

12级：命运非凡 Destined for Greatness

16级：人类勇士 Champion of Humanity

Benefit: 在进行一次长休息后，你获得2个行动点，而不是1个。

20级：浴血反击 Bloodied Greatness

Clockwork Engineer Paragon Path.name: 机械工程师 Clockwork Engineer
Clockwork Engineer Paragon Path.description:
「我的朋友都是我造出来的，这算是……小爱好……吧。」

Prerequisite:

终末战争中，人们见证了机关术无与伦比的发展与进步。在促成机关人与其他完美战争机器的诞生时，机关术士们更进一步的理解了如何将科技与魔法融合起来。尽管多数机关术士都有着制造魔法仆役的习惯，但机械工程师将这一范畴上升到了艺术的高度。

机械工程师乃是利用非活化的物体创造拟态生命形式的专家。你只需片刻就能拼装出一个机械生物。你所创造出来的机械生物也非常坚固，活化时间长，并且比其他机关术士同仁们的造物更加完美。

你通过制造仆役，以及固有的机关术本领来协助队友作战，不过你可能感觉自己创造出来的小机械体比起冒险伙伴们来说还要更亲密一些。你可能极度溺爱你的造物，如果它们被摧毁，你会沉重地悼念它们，甚至为它们复仇。

在战斗之外，你身边总是围着一大圈人畜无害的机械工学造物。它们在你身边叽叽喳喳，扑腾来扑腾去，颇为有趣。许多机械工学造物都能帮你不少忙，甚至还是你的工程助手，有了它们帮助，你可以更快更轻松地创造出其它机械造物。

11级：协调行动 Coordinated Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时获得2个次要动作，但它们只能用来命令你的召唤生物

11级：持久技巧 Durable Artifice

Benefit: 你以机关术士或机械工程师威能召唤的生物在所有防御上获得+2威能加值

11级：机械士兵 Clockwork Soldiers

12级：援助技艺 Aid Artifice

16级：优异仆从 Superior Minions

Benefit: 你以机关术士或机械工程师威能召唤的生物在速度上获得+2加值，且在攻击骰上获得+1加值

20级：机械伙伴 Clockwork Companion

Weaver of Chance Paragon Path.name: 机运编织者 Weaver of Chance
Weaver of Chance Paragon Path.description:
「没有什么伟大的计划和更高的目标，一切皆为偶然。」

Prerequisite:

你领会了宇宙的本质，是一个疯神玩耍、原始翻腾的毫无意义的地方，只有法师能够成为它们的标志。你理解了世界和它的共存位面并不是刻意设计而成的，而是经过无数年代的缓慢迭代的过程。

在宇宙中，诸神们控制着灵魂们的命运。这些命运交织着宿命的轨迹，呈现出包罗万象的法则。很少有人认同你的这种哲学理论，其中的一些人甚至可能以为你疯了。但你并不对终极意义或最终目标存在幻想，你的品行更加纯净：你的善行并不是因为遵循法典或追寻一些更伟大的目标，而是因为这是你自己的选择。

11级：熵能引导 Channel Entropy

Benefit: 你可以存储和引导围绕你的熵能流动，这些勉强被控制的混沌用熵能池中的熵能点来表示。在一个短时休息或长时休息后，你的熵能池有0个熵能点。当你在任何d20掷骰上掷出20时，你的熵能池增加1个熵能点。当你在任何d20掷骰上掷出1时，你的熵能池减少1熵能点（最小为0）。

每轮一次，当你投掷一个d20并对结果不满意时，你可以从你的熵能池中消耗任意数量的熵能点，每消耗1个熵能点，投掷结果+1。如果你在你回合开始后消耗了熵能点，那么你不能再消耗熵能点直到你下一回合开始。

11级：熵能行动 Entropic Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以掷一个d6。若结果为偶数，则在你的熵能池中增加等同于掷骰结果的熵能点，同时你传送等同于掷骰结果的格数。若掷骰结果为奇数，则在你的熵能池中减少等同于掷骰结果的熵能点（最小值0），同时把一个离你5格内的敌人传送等同于掷骰结果的格数。

11级：熵能重组 Entropic Reshuffling

12级：机运代理 Agency of Chance

16级：几率博弈 Play the Odds

Benefit: 每场遭遇一次，在你使用一个奥术攻击威能进行攻击检定之前，你能以一个自由动作掷一个d6并把结果增加到此攻击检定上。若此攻击命中，则造成2d6额外伤害，同时在你的熵能池中增加等同于那次d6掷骰结果的熵能点。若攻击失手，则你受到2d6 + 你智力调整值的伤害，同时在你的熵能池中减少等同于那次d6掷骰结果的熵能点。

20级：随机威能 Random Spell

Horned Champion Paragon Path.name: 犄角勇士 Horned Champion
Horned Champion Paragon Path.description:
「别告诉我那些过分的担忧，告诉我世界的需要就好。」

Prerequisite:

你曾大地之灵交流，发现了犄角勇士斗篷的价值。你超越了肉体，成为自然之灵的容器。你的职责是高举双臂，击倒大地的敌人，终止它们的毁灭行径，并重现那不羁的光彩。

变成一名犄角勇士是一种变形的体验。过去对世界天真的忧虑限制了你，现在你见识了世界的宏伟广阔，但也看到世界需要被保护，从那些可憎的试图吸取世界的力量的黑暗势力手中保护起来。你不再被人或环境所左右，专注于最重要的任务，对个别的困境不再投以注视。你对凡人的麻烦并不比你对一只昆虫更为关心，你所有的担忧投入了整个自然界中。因此某种程度上，你被一种比友谊还要深厚的感情所束缚，那就是被铸造来连接所有生命的纽带。

11级：狠毒行动 Vicious Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行攻击且此攻击失手时，你能重掷此攻击骰，但必须使用第二次的结果。

11级：热忱追捕 Fervent Pursuit

Benefit: 当你以借机攻击命中一个敌人时，该敌人迟缓直到它下一回合结束。

11级：狂热打击 Zealous Strike

12级：迅疾步 Impetuous Stride

16级：春天赐福 Blessing of Spring

Benefit: 当你使用有变形关键字的守望者每日攻击威能时，你能以一个自由动作花费一次回复力。

20级：跳跃雄鹿化形 Form of the Leaping Stag

Ghallanda Sanctuary Guardian Paragon Pat.name: 伽兰达圣所卫士 Ghallanda Sanctuary Guardian
Ghallanda Sanctuary Guardian Paragon Pat.description:
「我劝告你立即离开。不过其实，我的一部分十分乐于见到你不照做将会导致的事情。」

Prerequisite:

做为一名圣所卫士，你是伽兰达家族的长矛尖端，擅长执行家族的授令，为宾客提供一个安全港。伽兰达家族遍布整个世界的领地都在被各种危害困扰着，例如不怀好意的地方当局，绑匪恶棍，以及狂冲乱撞的怪物。你已经受到了如何应付所有这些威胁的训练。通过你龙纹的力量，你为战斗打好了基础，以确保你的队友取得上风。你的威能帮助队友保持战意，使得敌人苦战。那些质疑你的人与你的同志很快将了解到，伽兰达家族有能力胜任使人舒适和便利之外的更多的领域。

11级：迅速行动 Swift Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，离你5格内的每个盟友能以一个自由动作快步1格

11级：热情洋溢 Hospitable Surge

Benefit: 当你花费一次回复力时，每个邻近你的盟友可以做一次豁免检定。这些盟友在此豁免检定上获得任何你在豁免检定上拥有的加值

11级：驱散入侵者 Scatter the Invaders

12级：卫士之语 Guardian's Word

16级：伽兰达圣所 Ghallanda's Sanctuary

Benefit: 当任何离你5格内的盟友进行全防御或回气动作时，该盟友获得等同于5 + 你魅力调整值的临时生命值

21级时，此临时生命值为10 + 你魅力调整值

20级：圣所打击 Sanctuary Strike
Ghallanda Sanctuary Guardian Paragon Pat.requirements: [[款待之龙纹 <龙纹> Mark of Hospitality <Dragonmark>]]专长

Stalwart Knight Paragon Path.name: 坚定骑士 Stalwart Knight
Stalwart Knight Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

Your training and experience have made you strong, and the time has come to use that strength to advance your standing as a knight and a defender. Perhaps the time has come to join an order (if you have not done so already) or to establish your own. Either way, the stalwart knight stands at the forefront of every battle, a vanguard against the encroaching darkness.

11级：坚定进攻 Stalwart Assault

When the sound of battle calls, you answer with amazing strength and fury.

Benefit: 在遭遇中你的第一回合内，你在速度和近战武器伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值

11级：坚定行动 Stalwart Action

Strength of arm and a deep core of courage allow you to push beyond normal limits for a brief moment, at the same time focusing your defensive posture to keep you safe as that moment rushes by.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你获得全伤害抗力10直到你下一回合结束

11级：进阶强力打击 Improved Power Strike

You can make an additional devastating attack during any battle.

Benefit: 你每场遭遇可再多使用一次@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}威能，但你仍然每回合只能使用一次

12级：高级武器专精 Greater Weapon Specialization

You have refined your fighting style, applying counterattacks and defensive tactics that allow you to prevail against even the strongest opponents.

Benefit: 你选择获得下列遭遇威能中的1个

剑刃防护 Shielding Blade

When an enemy swings wide, you forego a quick counterstrike to take advantage of the error. By adopting a defensive posture, your blade becomes a shield against that foe as it tries in vain to strike again.

重锤反戈 Bludgeoning Counterstrike

You have trained to take advantage of a foe's misstep, and when the enemy's attack goes wide, you are ready. The heft of your weapon lends deadly weight to your counterattacks.

16级：信念护甲 Armor of Conviction

You refuse to flee the field of battle, no matter the danger. Instead, you have learned to steel yourself against pain when your defending presence is required.

Benefit: 当你重伤时，你获得全伤害抗力5

20级：战术专攻 Tactical Focus

You add a tactical flare to your signature attack.

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.RceW5jNqBOybEKFQ]{强力打击 Power Strike}时，你可以滑动目标1格，或额外1格如果触发的威能已经滑动了目标

Steadfast Sentinel Paragon Path.name: 坚定哨兵 Steadfast Sentinel
Steadfast Sentinel Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You are now a caretaker for the land as a whole, a guardian of the natural world against incursions from other planes. Using the magic of a thousand faces, you wander the land in many guises, your primal magic sustaining your allies and draining your foes.

11级：进阶联合攻击 Improved Combined Attack

With each battle you see through to the end, the signature combat move you practice with your animal companion becomes a more integral part of your tactics.

Benefit: 你每场遭遇可再多使用一次@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.kpLlh3Orisc5fmzq]{联合攻击 Combined Attack}威能，但你仍然每回合只能使用一次

11级：哨兵行动 Sentinel's Action

When you push beyond your limits, the primal magic you channel spills over to help your allies get back in the fight.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在此额外动作之前或之后，你或离你5格内的一个盟友能以一个自由动作以最多他的速度快步。此快步中，此角色无视困难地形

11级：陆地行者 Landwalker

As you follow the path of the steadfast sentinel, you become even more connected to the natural world. By sensing every rock, every crevasse, every gust of wind, every patch of brush and grass that surrounds you, you easily avoid such hindrances.

Benefit: 你无视困难地形

12级：春之恩惠 Bounty of Spring

Your connection to the land draws you ever deeper into the everlasting cycle of growth and fulfillment that is the hallmark of all living things. By calling on the spirits of the land, you bind them and their revitalizing energy to your allies, letting those companions experience your connection to the world.

16级：千面万相 A Thousand Faces

When the primal spirits manifest, they take on an ever-changing array of forms and faces. By channeling their power, you gain a degree of this same mastery over your physical form.

20级：翠绿和谐 Verdant Harmony

At the apex of the paragon tier, you and your allies are embraced as kindred beings by the primal spirits of nature. Your foes become nature's foes, and they cannot shake off the wrath that the primal spirits bring to bear.

Knight of Unyielding Bastion Paragon Pat.name: 坚垒骑士 Knight of Unyielding Bastion
Knight of Unyielding Bastion Paragon Pat.description:
Prerequisite:

作为一个王国与国民的守卫者，许多圣武士致力于对抗一种特殊的威胁，并在危急时刻挺身而出。作为一名坚垒骑士，你的技战术极为纯熟，并且掌握着一种神秘的祈祷——这使你在对抗巨龙时更加游刃有余。

11级：屠龙挑战 Dragon's Challenge

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YqRjBvbThJCAUXDd]{神圣挑战 Divine Challenge}标记一条龙时，它在目标不包括你的攻击骰上受到-4减值，而不是通常的-2。若一条龙因你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YqRjBvbThJCAUXDd]{神圣挑战 Divine Challenge}而受到伤害，则它受到等同于你感知调整值的额外伤害。

11级：屠龙行动 Dragon-Slayer's Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来重骰一次对龙的攻击骰，或者结束一个因龙而引起的正影响你的可豁免终止的状态。若你使用此特性将取代正常情况下花费行动点所获得的额外动作。

11级：神圣偏移 Divine Deflection

12级：龙焰祭 Dragon Flame Sacrifice

16级：力量传递 Partake of My Strength

Benefit: 若你和一名盟友都成为一次近程或区域攻击的目标，则你能以即时中断对该盟友使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YViAuS30Bvn8oxke]{圣疗术 Lay on Hands}。

20级：屠龙斩 Beast-Punishing Strike

Master Spy Paragon Path.name: 间谍大师 Master Spy
Master Spy Paragon Path.description:
「我见过那些你从未想我看到的，听过那些只对你的同谋者有意义的。我对你的了解足够毁掉你。」

Prerequisite:

In halls of power, on the field of battle, and even among those who seek what is long lost, reliable information is king. Those in the know have an advantage over their allies and enemies and readily know the difference between the two. Thus have persons skilled in acquiring secrets always had ample work and reasons to hone their skills. Such agents learn how to conceal their true motives and cover their tracks while focusing on attaining their goals. Any lapse in precision can mean death.

Long ago, you learned how to sneak into places where you're not welcome. No secret is safe from your expertise and trickery. Subterfuge is your stock-intrade. You know how best to peer into the intentions of your enemies, and you work undercover with the greatest of ease. Most of your enemies never know that you are in their midst, and you always manage to turn their ignorance against them.

11级：隐蔽动作 Cover Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在额外动作结束的时候，你获得隐蔽。直到你的下一个回合结束，你拥有隐蔽，且移动超过2格或奔跑时你在隐秘检定上不受到减值。

11级：致命虚招 Deadly Bluff

Benefit: 你可以对一个邻近的敌人以一个次要动作而不是标准动作做一个唬骗检定来获得战斗优势。如果你的检定超过了敌人的洞察检定，则该敌人给予你和你的盟友战斗优势直到你的下一个回合结束。

11级：拖延显形 Lingering Revelation

12级：快速变换 Quick Change

16级：双重间谍 Double Agent

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，当一个你可以看到的敌人以它的一个盟友为目标使用了威能或者能力，你可以选择得到该威能或能力的收益如同你是那名敌人的目标一样。

20级：王牌间谍之风 Spymaster's Edge

Sword Marshal Paragon Path.name: 剑将 Sword Marshal
Sword Marshal Paragon Path.description:
「刃即我象征，当其现于战场如我持之斩敌。」

Prerequisite:

你在轻刃与重刃上有着极高的造诣，所选择的武器已成为你力量与领导的象征。只要站立在战场之上，你手中便紧握着剑刃。而当盟友需要援助之时，只需找寻你那闪耀的武器。

11级：剑刃娴熟 Disciplined Blade

Benefit: 当使用重刃武器进行一次近战攻击失手时，你以此武器在下次对同一敌人的攻击骰上获得+2加值。

11级：剑将之力 Sword Marshal's Action

Benefit: 你可花费一个行动点来恢复一个已用过的督军遭遇攻击威能，而不是进行额外动作。

11级：剑刃风暴 Blade Flurry

12级：恩惠共享 Sword Marshal's Boon

16级：挑明弱点 Skewer the Weak

Benefit: 当使用重刃武器造成重击时，你与所有盟友对被重击的目标获得战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

20级：誓约胜利之剑 Diamond Blade of Victory

Blade Bravo Paragon Path.name: 剑刃亡徒 Blade Bravo
Blade Bravo Paragon Path.description:
「你觉得护甲能保护你？来这儿，让我们看看怎么回事儿。」

Prerequisite:

Most knaves are little more than ruffians who have a talent for swordplay. These individuals prowl city streets and pit their skills against each other, trying to prove themselves. Most of these so-called bravos have more courage than common sense. They have short life spans and usually wind up in shallow graves. You, however, have proved you're different from them.

You never had formal training or studied under a master. Instead, you developed a haphazard style born of necessity and emboldened by your grit. You quickly learned that survival demands toughness, so you cultivated the ability to keep scrapping even with your back pressed to the wall.

In battle, your attacks lack the finesse and artfulness exhibited by other rogues, yet they are equally effective. Just because you don't have a fancy flourish doesn't make you any less dangerous.

11级：自信威胁 Cocksure Menace

Benefit: 每当你用近战攻击命中一个向你提供战斗优势的敌人时，你能标记该敌人直到你下一回合结束。

11级：还击行动 Riposte Action

Benefit: 当一个敌人的近战攻击对你失手时，你能花费一个行动点对该敌人进行一次近战基本攻击。在此攻击中该敌人向你提供战斗优势，并且如果你命中，此攻击造成1[W]额外伤害。如果该敌人被你标记，则此攻击改为造成2[W]额外伤害。

11级：嘲弄倒钩 Taunting Barb

12级：威胁华舞 Threatening Flourish

16级：后巷狂徒 Back Alley Bravo

Benefit: 当你快步时，你在AC和反射上获得+1加值，直到你下一回合开始。

20级：恶毒格挡 Vicious Parry

Kensei Paragon Path.name: 剑圣 Kensei
Kensei Paragon Path.description:
「吾人剑合一。」

Prerequisite:

你师承古流，令你与你所选择的兵刃浑然一体，联合出击鲜有敌手可抵抗。

11级：剑圣武术 Kensei Control Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来重掷一次攻击骰，伤害骰，技能检定或一次属性检定以代替进行一个额外动作。

11级：剑圣专攻 Kensei Focus

Benefit: 你在以你选择的一个近战武器进行的武器攻击骰上获得+1加值。

11级：绝技 Masterstroke

12级：终极格挡 Ultimate Parry

16级：剑圣掌握 Kensei Mastery

Benefit: 你在以你「剑圣专攻」选择的武器的伤害骰上获得+4加值。如果你在任何时候使用不同类型的武器，你失去该益处和「剑圣专攻」的益处，直到你进行短休息，在这段时间进行冥想，重新调整你所选择的武器为止。

20级：剑魂之舞 Weaponsoul Dance

Swordmaster Paragon Path.name: 剑术大师 Swordmaster
Swordmaster Paragon Path.description:
「我的剑高贵而致命，即是武器，亦为艺术。而在我手中，其所向披靡。」

Prerequisite:

你和你的剑犹如一体。你是剑的大师，能够以较弱的战士几乎无法想象的方法操纵手中青锋。

11级：钢之防御 Steel Defense Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时在AC和反射防御上获得+4加值直到你的下一回合开始。

11级：钢之优雅 Steel Grace

Benefit: 当你以轻刃或非长武器的重刃冲锋时，你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.9WG68H1asqjXJiIm]{顺势斩 Cleave}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.C3Znh9fus1cdT8yH]{收割打击 Reaping Strike}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.2ayOteGlxTrHIYoF]{稳定打击 Sure Strike}或@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.B8fLTOzuorUgXW6V]{铁流 Tide of Iron}来替代你的近战基本攻击。

11级：精密切削 Precision Cut

12级：血光夺目 Fantastic Flourish

16级：钢之迅闪 Steel Blitz

Benefit: 当你以轻刃或重刃造成重击时，你恢复一个此遭遇中你已经使用掉的战士遭遇攻击威能。

20级：叠浪剑 Crescendo Sword

Sword Coast Corsair Paragon Path.name: 剑湾海盗 Sword Coast Corsair
Sword Coast Corsair Paragon Path.description:
「从Luskan到Nelanther，没有我甩不掉的船，没有我杀不死的怪物。」

Prerequisite:

大海是如此的宽广无际，在陌生的彼岸有数不清的冒险在召唤着你。你总待是在船的瞭望台上，期待着一次惊心动魄的冒险或是数目惊人的宝藏。

无论前面有什么——海怪巢穴中失落的宝藏、幽灵作祟的船难遗址、邪恶领主的贮宝商船、或是终年被魔法云雾笼罩的小岛——你决心去一探究竟，并且凭你的智慧和勇气去解决那些拦住你去路的障碍。你只是想博出一番名声，管他是众人敬仰还是声名狼藉，只要在几百年后还能被人提起就够了。

尽管你是藏身于海上的铤而走险的海盗和凶残的掠夺者，但你并非是杀人不眨眼的凶手。比起抢劫穷苦，你更喜欢去打劫那些不义之财。剑岸是无比危险的，更何况你已经成为了所有社会民众的敌人。最好还是将那些诚实善良的人们置于你的保护之下。若你能驱使那些最凶狠的海盗为你而战，则金币都会是你的囊中之物。

11级：老练水手 Expert Mariner

Benefit: 当你在船上时，你在先攻检定上获得+2加值，且你在任何有关移动，航行，操纵船只或躲避险境的技能上受训。若你已经在那个技能上受训，则你在这些检定上获得+2加值。举例包括：

杂技检定，用于在桅杆横杆和摇晃甲板上保持平衡

运动检定，用于攀爬船只的外壳和桅杆

智力检定，用于确定方位和绘制海图路线

敏捷检定，用于在危险水域中掌舵

如果你操纵载具，则所有能看到你或听到你的船员都获得这些加值。

11级：大海之步 Sea Legs

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在速度上获得+2加值且无视困难地形，直到你下一回合结束

11级：恐怖打击 Strike Terror

12级：铜心铁胆 Nerves of Steel

16级：无畏攻击者 Bold Attacker

Benefit: 当你以近战攻击命中时，你在意志上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束

20级：拖行斥责 Keelhaul

Darkening Blade Paragon Path.name: 渐暗之刃 Darkening Blade
Darkening Blade Paragon Path.description:
「I am the dark of the new moon. My sword is the sharp crescent that heralds the doom you have earned.」

Prerequisite:

Gloaming guardians protect their communities fromintruders and occasional trespassers, but even thebarrier they create cannot catch all who prowl theirlands. Should their communities come under attack,the dusk elves flee, vowing vengeance on those whowrong them. The darkening blades embody the vengeance they swear and to them the dusk elves turn todestroy their enemies.

As a darkening blade, you have mastered a secretfighting style perfected through generations spent inexile. Shadows gather around you so that when youmove, you blend into them, making it hard for yourenemies to track your movements and attack you.When you strike, you do so with speed and accuracy,darting in, then melding into the gloom.

11级：薄暮行动 Gloaming Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外攻击时，在此攻击之前，你能快步等同于你的速度的格数到邻近你目标的空间

11级：暗夜之眼 Night Eyes

Benefit: 当你有全隐蔽时，你同时获得黑暗视觉

11级：消失切击 Vanishing Cut

12级：薄暮罩衣 Gloaming Shroud

16级：飞掠阴影 Flitting Shadows

Benefit: 当你冲锋或奔跑时，在考虑从借机攻击中受到伤害时，你被视为虚体

20级：失明攻击者 Blinding Assailant
Darkening Blade Paragon Path.requirements: [[薄暮精灵隐秘 <精灵血统> Dusk Elf Stealth <Elf Bloodline>]]专长

Arrowhead Commander Paragon Path.name: 箭矢指挥官 Arrowhead Commander
Arrowhead Commander Paragon Path.description:
「你在质疑我指挥的权利？先看看你能否拉开这张弓，然后我们才能聊聊。」

Prerequisite:

In combat after combat, you have proved that the arrow is among the deadliest of weapons. As you have grown as an archer, you have learned that a band of heroes is like an arrow. To be effective, it needs both a sharp head to guide it and a strong arm to set it in motion, both of which you provide.

Although you value mobility over heavy armor, your physical prowess means that you excel in melee. You try not to get lost in the thick of battle, because you might miss opportunities to bring your keen mind into play. You prefer to survey the battlefield with a glance and direct your allies to strike where an enemy force is weakest. If no such gap in your enemies' defenses exists, you unleash an arrow to create one.

11级：无处可逃 Nowhere to Run

Benefit: 当你使用远程攻击拉近，推离或滑动一个敌人进入或离开邻近你盟友的一格，那盟友在对该敌人的攻击骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：搜寻行动 Seeking Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次攻击时，能看到你的所有盟友在攻击相同目标时，忽略掩护和隐蔽直到你下一回合结束。

11级：火线 Line of Fire

12级：打这儿 Strike Here

16级：战术大师 Tactical Adept

Benefit: 你的远程攻击推离敌人的格数增加2格。

20级：跟进 Follow Through
Arrowhead Commander Paragon Path.requirements: 督军，[[强弓学徒|强弓学徒 <流派初成> Adamant Arrow Student <Lesser Style>]]专长

Gladiator Champion Paragon Path.name: 角斗冠军 Gladiator Champion
Gladiator Champion Paragon Path.description:
「我曾在七城浴血而战，没有什么再能令我惊讶了。」

Prerequisite:

民众需要英雄的存在，他们需要英勇的战士去证明无论怎样艰险的困境都能被征服、他们需要目睹残酷的战斗来缓解他们对血腥的饥渴、他们需要一个敌方去发泄生活中的挫败与怒火——他们需要角斗士，需要那些无畏的战士为他们带来一场又一场的欢愉。

你正是人民所需要的角斗冠军，你或许有一个苦大仇深的背景，你可能曾是一个奴隶或者罪犯，亦或你是一个来这里找点乐子、赚点小钱、赢得荣誉的资深战士。无论如何，你和你的勇气引起了民众的共鸣，你不再是一个只是为了自己生命而战的战士，你是他们的英雄。

11级：无畏行动 Undaunted Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行攻击且你重伤时，此攻击的一次攻击检定你骰两个攻击骰且能使用任一结果。

11级：毁灭光环 Halo of Destruction

Benefit: 无论何时，当你一次攻击重伤一名敌人时，所有邻近你的敌人（除了你重伤的那个敌人）受到等同于你力量调整值的伤害。

11级：起手式 Opening Ploy

12级：绝境再起 Fail to Disappoint

16级：破灭龙卷 Whirlwind of Destruction

Benefit: 邻近你的敌人无法快步到不邻近你的格子。

20级：终结技 Finishing Strike

Cunning Prevaricator Paragon Path.name: 狡黠诈徒 Cunning Prevaricator
Cunning Prevaricator Paragon Path.description:
「穿梭于世界之间的妖精有句谚语：唯有不诚实，才能赢得荣誉。」

Prerequisite:

精类骗子、侏儒或是其他讲故事的人都知道许多其他生物所不知晓的传说——来自僻静的森林，地下深处的洞穴，强大野兽的巢穴或是某位君主紧锁的神秘地窖。而不为世人所知的是，这些传说中很有多都仅仅是编造出来的谎言。

作为一个狡黠诈徒，你传播夸大、误导和谎言的美德（至少某些传统中确实认为这是美德）。你学习并遵循过去伟大寓言家的教导（虽然这些寓言家也是被编造出来的）并将这些知识应用到你的诗人技能之中。你将幻觉和欺骗方面的天赋用于你的朋友，给他们带来荣耀，或是用谎言让他们相信自己得到了荣耀。

11级：隐蔽行动 Shrouding Action

Benefit: 当你花费行动点进行额外动作时，你和离你5格内由你选择的一名盟友隐形，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：欺诈之德 Virtue of Deceit

Benefit: 当你使用你的「诗人美德」职业特性时，离你5格内一名你选择的盟友对他下一次攻击的目标获得战斗优势。

11级：光影谎言 Lying Lights

12级：诡计恩赐 Trickery's Reward

16级：诈徒仁慈 Trickster's Mercy

Benefit: 当你一个重伤的盟友使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.A6Cq1oigOmXUjr5H]{崇高之言 Majestic Word}时，该盟友隐形直到他下一个回合开始。

20级：谬误之光 Nimbus of Falsehood

Anathema Paragon Path.name: 解构者 Anathema
Anathema Paragon Path.description:
「Why create when destruction is so much more entertaining?」

Prerequisite:

Others of your kind shape reality as a potter works clay, but creating and reforming your environment has little appeal to you. Instead, your knowledge of the underlying patterns in the structure of the objects and creatures that make up the world around you that allows you to test and sunder that structure.

The raw stuff of life and matter are yours to toy with. Your power comes at a price, however. With each bond you break, the structure of reality is weakened to some small degree. Your work is minor compared to the ravages of time and the power of gods, immortals, and the Far Realm. But all things are connected, and your power might be the catalyst that unleashes destruction on the world.

11级：熵能复原 Entropic Recovery

Benefit: 每当你花费一个回复力并恢复生命值时，每个邻近你的敌人受到等同于你魅力调整值的心灵和暗蚀伤害

11级：侵蚀行动 Eroding Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，任何被此攻击命中的目标获得等同于3 + 你魅力调整值的暗蚀易伤和心灵易伤（豁免终止所有）

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：分散解离 Scattered Discorporation

12级：魔法干扰 Magical Disruption

16级：可憎信徒 Abhorrent Devotee

Benefit: 当你没有灵能点剩余时，你的未强化心灵术士随意攻击威能在命中一个敌人时获得一个额外效果。如果该攻击骰是奇数，则该敌人受到等同于你魅力调整值的额外暗蚀伤害。如果该攻击骰是偶数时，则你拉近该敌人1格

20级：湮灭之球 Oblivion Sphere

Guardian of the Living Gate Paragon Path.name: 界门守卫 Guardian of the Living Gate
Guardian of the Living Gate Paragon Path.description:
「有一些不属于这个世界的生物想要毁灭我们所建立的一切，我的使命就是先将他们毁灭。」

Prerequisite:

远古的契约与法则保护自然世界不会受到神祗和魔神的严重干扰。虽然魔神和恶魔很想把这个世界给弄回元素混沌，但他们的力量受到了限制。在很多德鲁伊眼中，目前世界所面临的最大威胁不是神祗或者魔神，而是那些来自遥远国度，不受远古法则制约的外来生物。这些生物不一定都想毁灭这个世界，但无论目的是什么，他们的存在本身就危及了这个世界。

作为一位界门守卫，你誓言清除所有和遥远国度有关的异常生物，并且切断两个世界之间传送门。你可能已经加入了其他志同道合者的组织（其中真实之环the Circle of the True是最大的一个）。或者还在独自一人探寻界门(Living Gate)的神秘知识。从第一阶守护开始，这一道途上，你可以掌握神秘之力。这些力量在保护伙伴，摧毁敌人方面是通常很有用的，但你务必要使用它们抵御那些想腐化和摧毁这个世界的势力。

11级：守卫行动 Guardian Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你或一个离你5格内的盟友可以进行一次豁免检定，并在此检定上获得+5加值。

11级：缠绕降灵 Entwining Evocation

Benefit: 当你进行一次区域攻击时，你对每个没有生物邻近它的目标获得战斗优势。

11级：界门一阶 First Ward of the Living Gate

12级：界门二阶 Second Ward of the Living Gate

16级：不朽精魂 Enduring Spirit

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你豁免失败时，离你5格内一个盟友可以进行一次豁免检定。

20级：界门三阶 Third Ward of the Living Gate

Gatekeeper of the Golden Palace Paragon.name: 金殿守门人 Gatekeeper of the Golden Palace
Gatekeeper of the Golden Palace Paragon.description:
「Stand with me—and by the fires of Hestavar, we'll drop them one by one!」

Prerequisite:

You exemplify the virtues of Erathis. In life, you abide by and enforce the laws of your people. You have defended your home against myriad creeping evils and brought light to the dark places in the world. In battle, you know you are only as powerful as the warriors who fight beside you, and you strive to guide them to victory just as fervently as you take up a weapon. Erathis has taken special notice of your devotion and your prowess, and she has blessed you with a powerful touch of her golden light.

To be a gatekeeper of the golden palace, as you are, one does not need a specific power source or skill set. One needs only to value the lives of their allies as strongly as their own, and to know that it is more important for an arrow to strike its target than it is to be the one who fires the arrow. With your allies at your side and Erathis in your heart, you intend to litter the battlefield with fallen enemies—even if you never lift a sword.

11级：共同行动 Communal Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来给予一个邻近你的盟友一个行动点

11级：人多势众 Strength in Numbers

Benefit: 你和任何邻近你的盟友在豁免检定上获得等同于邻近你的盟友数量的加值。

11级：启动锻造 Ignite the Forge

12级：赫斯塔瓦之赐 Hestavar's Blessing

16级：我为人人 One for All

Benefit: 当你结束你的回合时，每个邻近你的盟友可以进行一次豁免检定。

20级：拘捕居民 Citizen's Arrest

Horizon Walker Paragon Path.name: 尽头旅者 Horizon Walker
Horizon Walker Paragon Path.description:
「时光流逝，而我终将以双眼见证诸界。」

Prerequisite:

The world is vast, with few mapped places. It begs exploration, instilling wanderlust in brave hearts. Roving it is a test of skill and stamina, an ordeal that rewards the intrepid with amazing sights, exciting encounters, and more. Still, the world is only one place in the broader cosmos. Other planes also beckon to the curious wanderer. The trials and experiences they offer can defy the worldly imagination and force adaptation beyond mortal ken.

Horizon walker is the traditional name for a ceaseless roamer who seeks the unexplored regions of the universe. The appellation applies to members of a loose confederation of warriors who recognize one another as comrades on life's wondrous journey. Such travelers go from place to place, from plane to plane, developing their skills and a mystic connection with the environment. They return changed by their contact with other realms, and with knowledge to better protect the world most mortals know.

Like most horizon walkers, you have traveled the world. You learned about it and protect its inhabitants from otherworldly threats. Then you fearlessly set out into the wider universe, using your skills and the magical nature of your tie to the world to develop similar bonds with the far reaches of creation. To this day, you're incapable of staying in one place long. Unseen locales summon you with their mystery. Your destiny whispers to you from an unknown vista. Each step you take moves you closer to it.

11级：流浪行动 Wanderer's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在额外动作之前或之后，你可以进行一次移动动作。

11级：影界视力 Shadowfell Sight

Benefit: 你获得黑暗视觉。如果你身处「堕影冥界」，则你同时在侦查检定上获得＋5加值。

11级：世俗之力 Worldly Strike

12级：跨空步伐 Fey Strider

16级：星界激励 Astral Infusion

Benefit: 你在死亡豁免检定和回复力值上获得等同于你感知调整值的加值。如果你身处「众星之海」或是任何神的领地(divine dominion)，你不会因为三次死亡豁免检定失败而死，但是你如果受到的伤害使你现有的生命值降低到等同负数的你的半血值时，你依然会死。

20级：混沌破裂 Elemental Chaos Smite

Venomed Soul Paragon Path.name: 浸毒灵魂 Venomed Soul
Venomed Soul Paragon Path.description:
「解决你只用一刀」

Prerequisite:

你的灵魂在毒液中浸泡过，一个学习远古文献《毒物全书》的学徒。泽希尔在创世的黎明写下这本书，其中内含他已发明和研制中的所有毒药。几世纪以来，无数盗贼窃取了其中的文页，杀手们使用的毒药无比猛烈，令无数冒险者疯狂地寻找抗毒剂以策万全。据说，甚至泽希尔对创造这些毒物也曾迟疑过。

11级：毒药大师 Master of Poisons

Benefit: 当你进行短休息或长休息时，你可以给你的一件武器或一个弹药浸毒。选择下列一种毒素效果。在你下次短休息或长休息前，你下一次使用浸毒物品的攻击如果命中，则目标受到所选效果的影响。如果攻击失手则效果消失

✦目标受到等同于5 + 你体质调整值额外毒素伤害。

✦目标定身直到你下一回合结束。

✦直到你下一回合结束，目标无法看到离它超过4格远的任何生物。

11级：染毒灵魂 Poisoned Soul

Benefit: 你获得5点毒素抗力，此抗力21级提升至10。

11级：毒液行动 Venomous Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你对受到毒素持续伤害的敌人的攻击骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值，此加值持续到你下一回合结束。另外，你可以将一个「毒药大师」的效果应用到你的一件武器或一个弹药上。

11级：必中之毒 Inescapable Venom

12级：浸毒之吻 Venomous Kiss

16级：持久毒液 Persistent Venom

Benefit: 「毒药大师」的毒素效果不再会因失手而消失。作为替代，第一个被浸毒物品命中的目标将受到该效果。

20级：灵魂毒液 Soul Venom

Spirit Tempest Paragon Path.name: 精魂风使 Spirit Tempest
Spirit Tempest Paragon Path.description:
「精魂之风总是在这世上流动着。你必须感受它，才能汲取它的力量。」

Prerequisite:

精魂若不是世界的蒸气，我们所吐纳的生命精华，还是什么？世上的精魂是有生命的，这表示它们正在活动着。它们是世上流动的风，即使是在硬石中，或是大地最深之处，仍然存在。

作为一名精魂风使，你可以乘上来自精魂界之风，而这风在一切事物间吹抚。藉由这种能力，你可以带动战场上的各种位置变化：你呼唤精魂之风讲你和你的同伴传送到敌人眼角不及之处、带来治疗的力量，并让这种力量随着你的攻击释放到广大的空间中，让你的同伴的攻击更强力。

精魂是世界的吐息。深深地吸气，让它们动起来并引导你。

11级：魂风行动 Spirit Wind Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，每个邻近你的精魂伙伴的盟友可以用一个自由动作传送2格。

11级：治疗指引 Healing Guides

Benefit: 当你通过你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.b5U0th2xdV7Q8anM]{治疗精魂 Healing Spirit}恢复生命值时，任何邻近或位于你以萨满威能或萨满典范之道威能创造出的咒法物和区域的盟友，同时恢复生命值如同他们邻近你的精魂伙伴一样。

11级：精魂潮汐 Spirit Tide

12级：精魂涌流 Spirit Flow

16级：精魂斗士 Spirit Combatant

Benefit: 当你使用具有精魂关键字的萨满随意攻击威能时，你在此攻击上获得战斗优势。

20级：精魂风暴 Spirit Storm
Spirit Tempest Paragon Path.requirements: 萨满，[[呼唤精魂伙伴 Call Spirit Companion]]威能

Adamant Instructor Paragon Path.name: 精金导师 Adamant Instructor
Adamant Instructor Paragon Path.description:
「It is my destiny to unite the Great Teacher's peoples once again.」

Prerequisite:

The Great Teacher was revered by all the peoples of his underground realm. The ancient adamantine dragon's influence didn't spread into the land of sun and wind, but in the rock, ore, and fungus of the Underdark, his benevolence erected an island of good under the earth. Long ago, the Great Teacher rescued a group of dragonborn that that were beset by denizens of the Underdark, and instead of returning to the surface, these dragonborn devoted themselves to the Adamantine. They became his Adamant Instructors and together they forged a noble nation around the Great Teacher's hoard in the cavern complex they called Adamanth. The dragonborn prospered under the Teacher's guidance, and Adamanth became a haven for all that was good and strong. Even some drow and duergar were drawn by the Great Teacher's benevolence to renounce their darker ways and live in peace under the rule of the Adamant Instructors.

Then one day the Great Teacher departed Adamanth to deal with a nasty group of purple dragons that were slaughtering his people on the borders of his influence. He never returned. For decades, the Adamant Instructors have followed the Great Teacher's instructions, which were carved on a disk of solid adamantine in flowing draconic script by the ancient dragon before he departed. But the Adamant Instructors are hard-pressed to keep hope alive in Adamanth. Purple worms continue to assail them, the drow are assembling an army, and rumors say that mind flayers are stirring in the deep caves to the west. In the absence of the Great Teacher, it is up to the Adamant Instructors to lead the adamantine dragon's people through these dark times.

11级：受教行动 Instructed Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你和离你5格内的每个盟友在你下一回合结束前的下一次攻击骰上获得+2威能加值。

11级：雷鸣教谕 Thunderous Teachings

Benefit: 你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}种族威能在其造成的伤害类型以外还造成雷鸣伤害。另外，当你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}命中一个生物时，目标受到1d6额外伤害。（21级时为2d6额外伤害）并且你可以推离目标1格。

11级：精金冲击 Adamantine Blast

12级：伟大演说 Great Speech

16级：洞察谈判者 Insightful Negotiator

Benefit: 你在洞察检定上获得+3加值。另外，你可以使用洞察检定代替任何交涉检定。

20级：索求效忠 Demand Fealty

Feytouched Paragon Path.name: 精类浸染者 Feytouched
Feytouched Paragon Path.description:
「我被精类的力量浸染，它使我疯狂……但是我从疯狂中获得的力量又使我重新变得心智健全。」

Prerequisite:

经常造访妖精荒野和与订立契约的精类存在沟通浸染了你的整个灵魂，使你变得多少有点疯狂。但在这疯狂之中，你发现了能使你的存在提升到下一阶段的力量。妖精荒野的力量可能很疯狂，但它给你提供了一些崭新的达到目的和消灭敌人的机会。你喜欢这份疯狂并能够控制它，但被你释放的力量冲击的家伙却只能在妖精荒野无边的威力面前崩溃。

11级：精类浸染者行动 Feytouched Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作的时候，你同时在攻击骰上获得+4加值直到你的下一回合开始。

11级：锋利尾迹 Slashing Wake

Benefit: 每回合一次，当你用传送方式离开一个方格时，所有与此方格邻近的敌人受到等于你智力调整的伤害。

11级：妖野意志 Will of the Feywild

12级：微光传送 Twilight Teleport

16级：守护者的恩典 Patron's Favor

Benefit: 当一个正受到你的「邪术师诅咒」影响的敌人的生命值降到0或更低时，使用「守护者的恩典」代替「谜踪步」。掷1d6。按下表中列出的掷骰结果或任意比它小的结果作为收益。

1或2：你如常使用「谜踪步」。

3：立即进行一次豁免检定。

4：以一个自由动作传送10格。

5：你的移动速度+2直到你的下一回合结束。

6：直到遭遇结束，当一个敌人受到你「邪术师诅咒」的伤害时，他受到1d6额外伤害。

20级：精之呢喃 Whispers of the Fey

Prince of Genies Paragon Path.name: 精灵之主 Prince of Genies
Prince of Genies Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

Your life took a turn for the strange when you discovered a minor treasure containing an elemental spirit. The being trapped inside promised you much in exchange for its freedom, offering anything in its power to grant. Freeing the spirit is not so easy, since potent wards keep it imprisoned. So you came to an arrangement with it. You will search for a way to free it, and it will help you complete your quests.

11级：瓶之精灵 Genie in a Bottle

The spirit whispers advice and lends its aid as long as it has the power to do so.

Benefit: 你在技能检定和豁免检定上获得+1威能加值

11级：许愿行动 Wishful Action

Drawing on the genie's magic gives you a better chance of succeeding on your next effort.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在你下一回合结束前，你在下一次攻击骰，豁免检定或技能检定上获得+2加值

11级：精灵调解 Genie's Intercession

It is in your genie's interest to keep you alive. If an enemy manages to get in a successful blow against you, the genie whisks you away after you make a counterstrike.

12级：有限许愿 Limited Wish

Your genie can grant you whatever you wish, within reason, on a daily basis. It's also possible to use this boon to benefit one of your friends.

16级：精灵幸运 Luck of the Genies

The genie blesses you with good fortune and protects you from the most disastrous failures.

Benefit: 当你在豁免检定或技能检定上掷出1时，你可以重掷它

20级：精灵赠礼 Genie's Gift

At the apex of the paragon tier, you finally learn how to coax your genie from its vessel. When it appears, it erupts with a flash and a bang that leaves your enemies befuddled. While the spirit is free, it grants a benefit to you or an ally you name.
Prince of Genies Paragon Path.requirements: 元素界起源，或在交涉上受训

Phrenic Master Paragon Path.name: 精神大师 Phrenic Master
Phrenic Master Paragon Path.description:
「Kneel before my intellect and tremble.」

Prerequisite:

Your mind is the gateway through which you imprint your will upon the world. In your studies, you have searched for more powerful ways of asserting that will. By choosing the mind flayer as your totem creature, you've gained some of the illithid's natural prowess at bending the wills of lesser beings.

This connection has taught you hidden secrets of mental dominion, and you've found that they can also be applied to the shamanic practice of summoning spirit companions. In order to bind your new spirit companion to your will, you had to prove your dominance over it. Your spirit companion was cowed, to the point that it is more slave than friend. Even so, you know that if you let your guard down for a moment, the slave will try to become the master.

11级：困乏行动 Enervating Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时来进行一次攻击时，任何被此攻击命中的敌人在对抗此攻击造成的任何效果的豁免检定上受到-2减值。被此攻击命中的敌人提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

11级：恶毒报复 Spiteful Retaliation

Benefit: 每当一个敌人攻击你的精魂伙伴并使其消失时，此敌人晕眩直到它下一回合结束。

11级：心智锤击 Intellect Pummel

12级：仆役之盾 Minion's Shield

16级：双魂投影 Twin-Souled Projection

Benefit: 你可以选择使用你精魂伙伴的格子作为任何你的远程或区域威能的起始格。如果你的精魂伙伴不邻近任何敌人，则以此方式使用威能不会引发借机攻击。

20级：全体镇服 Total Subjugation
Phrenic Master Paragon Path.requirements: 萨满，[[呼唤精魂伙伴 Call Spirit Companion]]威能

Alienist Paragon Path.name: 精神学家 Alienist
Alienist Paragon Path.description:
「The power the Far Realm offers is worth any risk to my sanity.」

Prerequisite:

Some describe you as reckless. Others call you corrupted, claiming that your work puts all the world at risk. The Far Realm is a dangerous place, to be sure, filled with horrors beyond imagining. But the power to be found there is too tempting to ignore.

11级：异界视角 Alien Perspective

Benefit: 你在意志上获得+1加值，并且你获得等同于你一半等级的心灵抗力

11级：癫狂行动 Insane Action

Benefit: 在你花费一个行动点的回合结束时，掷骰一个d4来引发一个下列的效果

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：遥远国度赠礼 Far Realm's Gift

12级：癫狂笃定 Mad Certainty

16级：召唤异界者 Alien Summoning

Benefit: 你召唤的生物被遥远国度污染，在所有防御上获得+2加值并且其攻击造成5点额外心灵伤害。它们向免疫恐惧的敌人提供战斗优势。

20级：召唤遥远国度神孽 Summon Far Realm Abomination

Arena Champion Paragon Path.name: 竞技场冠军 Arena Champion
Arena Champion Paragon Path.description:
「我经历了数百场战斗，并且每次我都会获胜。人们会用哭喊声悼念你。干燥的沙子会饮尽你的血。与你的诸神和解吧，因为我会尽快送你去见它们。」

Prerequisite:

Forged in battle, tempered in cheers, and quenched in the blood of countless foes, you are an arena champion. Your lot is to fight for the favor of the crowds, to entertain them with the violence you know all too well. You have faced vicious beasts and battled scores of savage brutes plucked from the untamed frontiers. It makes no difference to you. Your job is to dispatch each one with flair and skill, to please onlookers with your showmanship. You are their champion, and you aim to make sure your name lives on in the hearts and minds of those who adore you

11级：敬畏行动 Awing Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，本回合你命中的每个敌人在所有防御上受到-2减值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：研究对手 Study Foe

Benefit: 当你进行全防御动作时，你在下一次攻击骰上获得等于一半你魅力调整值或一半你感知调整值的加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：重担猛击 Taxing Strike

12级：隐藏储备 Hidden Reserves

16级：抓住破绽 Seize Opening

Benefit: 当你在战斗中成功使用唬骗获得战斗优势时，你能以一个自由动作对那个目标进行一次基本攻击。

20级：放血打击 Bloodletting Strike
Arena Champion Paragon Path.requirements: 在威吓上受训，至少一个「Arena Fighting」专长，任意武术职业

Keeper of the Nine Paragon Path.name: 九印守护者 Keeper of the Nine
Keeper of the Nine Paragon Path.description:
「这是你自找的。」

Prerequisite:

古老的卷轴讲述了世界的最后日子，预言了一个暴力和毁灭将吞噬一切的时代。你读过这些羊皮卷，知道世界上将要发生的九大灾难。这些超自然的灾难在最初的日子里播撒在世界的地基上，现在被埋在遥远角落的强大的封印下。你的任务是确保封印完好无损，因为每当有邪恶力量打破封印，一切的末日就会来临。那些干涉九印的人是在戏弄所有的灾厄，并有可能扰乱世界的伟大目标。

为了保护古老的封印，你被引入了一个秘密的秩序：九印守护者。你学习了守护和毁灭的强大祷告，这样你就可以对付那些不理解力量的人。守护者们来自不同的种族，包括不同的神的仆人，但大多数都侍奉伊拉西斯,艾恩或摩拉丁。古老的分歧和嫉妒在守护神之间很常见，但所有人都同意九印必须保持隐藏和不被打破。

11级：命运劫数 Dooming Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，一个被此攻击命中的目标获得5点全伤害易伤（豁免终止）

11级：灾厄祈求者 Ruining Prayer

Benefit: 当你使用任何是近程攻击的神导士威能时，你可以将你周围的地面变为碎石；所有邻近你的格子变为困难地形，直到这些碎石被清理。

11级：警告符印 Glyph of Warning

12级：守印之罩 Keeper's Mantle

16级：守印之复仇 Keeper's Vengeance

Benefit: 当你重伤时并使用一个创造爆发的神导士威能，你可以增加爆发范围1格。

20级：第十印 The Tenth Seal

Ninefold Master Paragon Path.name: 九重导师 Ninefold Master
Ninefold Master Paragon Path.description:
当你们追随于我们脚后最原始的方法时，我已经完成了古老的魔法学业

Prerequisite:

在古代阿克霍西亚帝国，奥术魔法施放者研习九重之道，一条熟悉奥术，觉醒心灵的道路。研习此道的进展表现为学习者与巨龙力量的同调性，这是将龙裔一族固有的特点与魔法学习相联系的实践。

你是九重之道的导师，行进在通往阿克霍西亚的学者所理解的奥术极致的道路上。你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}是你储备的另一个法术，当你使用它，它拥有与你的吐息相同的元素力量。你证明控制魔法能够使其更有力量

11级：吐息专精 Breath Expertise

Benefit: 你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}威能视为属于你的奥术职业的一个奥术威能。若你持用可以用来施展你奥术威能的法器，则你可以将此法器的增强加值加到@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}威能的伤害骰上

11级：龙息行动 Dragon Breath Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以同时以一个自由动作使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}，即使你在此遭遇中已经消耗掉它了

11级：巨龙灵气 Dragon Aura

12级：反制吐息 Countering Breath

16级：龙之抵抗 Draconic Resistance

Benefit: 选择一个你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}威能可造成的伤害类型。你对该伤害类型获得等同于5 + 一半你的等级的抗力

20级：巨龙风暴 Dragon Tempest
Ninefold Master Paragon Path.requirements: 龙裔，任意奥术职业，[[龙脉施法者 Draconic Spellcaster]]专长

Dragonslayer Paragon Path.name: 巨龙杀手 Dragonslayer
Dragonslayer Paragon Path.description:
「我的剑锋锐无匹，我的盾厚重如山，我的信仰炽烈虔诚，即使是那些最恐怖的怪物也休想让我退却半步！」

Prerequisite:

身为一名信仰的捍卫者，你无时无刻都在与各种怪物搏斗，即使是它们之中最野蛮凶猛的生物——巨龙。它们的利爪尖牙让人望而生畏，它们的兽吼龙息让人胆战心惊，更让人绝望的是，它们还拥有着千锤百炼般的钢铁鳞片与超自然的顽强生命力。而且，你若以为巨龙都是些愚蠢的傻大个儿就大错特错了，它们之中不乏阴险狡诈之辈。很少有战士有机会能直面这种怪物，但你却将从这些怪物中保卫那些手无寸铁的人作为你自己的责任和义务。你一直在寻找那些破坏力惊人的怪物并结束它们的恐怖统治——不止是巨龙，甚至还有蝎尾飞狮、双足飞龙和斯芬克斯。

你或许是个掌握一定技巧的猎人，但你并不会选择用耐心地跟踪、谨慎地布置陷阱或突然的伏击来击败你的死敌。你将如骑士一般，堂堂皇皇地与这些怪物正面对抗，用你毕生的技巧与勇气来对抗它们险恶的龙息与毒牙——毫无疑问，这是一场公平的对决。

11级：巨龙杀手行动 Dragonslayer's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，直到你下一回合结束，你在对抗被你标记的生物的所有防御上获得+2加值。

11级：巨龙杀手挑战 Dragonslayer's Challenge

Benefit: 当你在遭遇中第一次标记一个目标时，直到该标记结束，你在对该目标的伤害骰上获得+2加值。21级时，此加值变为+4。

11级：挑敌打击 Challenging Smite

12级：偏转冲击 Deflect the Blast

16级：炽烈之心 True Heart

Benefit: 你在对抗恐惧效果的意志上获得+2加值。

20级：别想跑！ Ground the Foe

Dragon Guardian Paragon Path.name: 巨龙卫士 Dragon Guardian
Dragon Guardian Paragon Path.description:
「巨龙之力为我所用——它的呼吸，它的力量，它的抗性。有了这样的武器，谁能挡我」

Prerequisite:

Dragons are your legacy. You embody one of the manifestations of draconic might. The sheer physical power of dragons inspires you. Your foes glimpse these truths when you demonstrate your powers.

You have studied the movements and strategies of dragons as they fight, both when you heard or read about dragons in epic stories and on a few occasions when you were menaced by one. You are drawn to dragons' lairs or other places where dragons congregate, eager to learn more about the mighty beasts that are your personal idols.

11级：龙息行动 Dragon Breath Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次近程冲击攻击时，此攻击掷出16-20即可造成重击。

11级：卫者抗力 Guardian's Resistance

Benefit: 选择强酸，寒冰，火焰，闪电，毒素或雷鸣。将该伤害类型加入你的「巨龙之魂」职业特性所给予的抗力中。你不能选择你的「巨龙之魂」已经给予你的抗力的伤害类型。

11级：卫士龙息 Guardian's Breath

12级：龙力护盾 Shield of Dragon Might

16级：不屈吐息 Indomitable Breath

Benefit: 当你掷一个近程冲击威能的攻击骰时，此攻击无视目标所拥有的任何免疫及抗力。

20级：持久吐息 Lasting Breath
Dragon Guardian Paragon Path.requirements: 术士，「巨龙魔法」职业特性

Giantslayer Paragon Path.name: 巨人屠杀者 Giantslayer
Giantslayer Paragon Path.description:
「Don't like being hit in the shins? Then bring your face down here!」

Prerequisite:

When the deities first called upon their mortal followers to take up arms against the primordials, the first giantslayers were among the heroes who joined the angelic legions. Not all who fought giants were deemed slayers, but a tough corps of warriors faced giants successfully time and again, thus earning the moniker their descendants use with pride to this day. They developed a battle style that proved effective against creatures larger than human size, as numerous monstrous beings are.

The giantslayer is, then, an intrepid warrior prepared to face enormous foes. Although plenty of other martial paths have more mundane applications, only the gutsy and the venturesome bother to train as giantslayers. Skill in a broad range of weaponry makes taking out big foes easier. Ranged attacks can hit the eyes or other hard-to-reach areas; melee weapons can be used to take out the legs, cutting a gigantic creature down to manageable size. Such a warrior is ever resourceful.

A giantslayer must also acknowledge that gruesome death is a possible end to his or her vocation. This fact, combined with the sheer audacity required for the job, means that most giantslayers are larger-than-life figures. Those who claim the title of giantslayer have a reputation for fighting hard and playing hard. Those who share the calling respect each other. Legitimate slayers police the ranks for charlatans, following up on rumors of fake giantslayers.

When it comes to being a giantslayer, you are the genuine article. Maybe you learned the trade from a mentor. Although some military organizations incorporate such techniques, no formalized tradition of giant slaying exists. The lessons learned on your past adventures might have been all the instruction you need. Fast, tough, and courageous, you know what it takes to cut down big opponents—even if that means going for a ride on one.

11级：巨人屠戮行动 Giant-Slaying Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在攻击骰和AC上获得+2加值直到你下一回合开始。对抗大型或更大的生物时，AC上的加值改为+4。

11级：指掌穿梭 Through the Fingers

Benefit: 如果一个生物擒拿你，你可以用一个借机动作对其进行一次近战基本攻击。如果这次攻击命中，你可以用一个自由动作来尝试逃脱。同时在这次逃脱的杂技或运动检定上，你获得等同于这次近战基本攻击造成的伤害的加值。

11级：小型挑衅 Little Bait

12级：巨人骑乘 Ride the Giant Down

16级：小型目标 Small Target

Benefit: 你在对抗大型或更大的敌人的借机攻击时，你的AC获得+4加值。同时对抗中型跟更小的敌人的借机攻击时，你的AC获得+2加值。

20级：巨型屠宰 Giantslayer's Strike

Stone Keeper Paragon Path.name: 巨石守护者 Stone Keeper
Stone Keeper Paragon Path.description:
「记忆，如同巨石，永垂不朽。」

Prerequisite:

Dwarves have long memories. They strengthen their recollections by retelling stories passed down since the dark days of their enslavement to giants. Preserving these tales is the responsibility of the stone keepers, dwarves chosen for their wisdom and commitment to history. These stone fathers and mothers, as they are sometimes called, chisel stories into shrine walls and temple domes to give their history a physical presence, making them part of the architecture and wonder of dwarven cities.

As a stone keeper, you concern yourself with the past, but you are not simply a scholar. You are a holy champion who draws strength from your fury over all the wrongs ever committed against your people, bringing it to bear against foes who still threaten your race. When dwarven strongholds are in danger, you are the first to unite the clans against the enemy. You also travel widely, visiting ruined dwarven kingdoms and city-states to learn their fates and to exact vengeance when it is deserved.

Your views and beliefs encompass all of history and the place your people occupy in it. You harbor a deep-seated, smoldering anger born of ancient wrongs and long centuries of grief. Your prayers focus this anger into your attacks.

11级：无可匹敌 None So Great

Benefit: 当你对体型大于你的目标造成重击时，该目标在此攻击的其他效果结算之后倒地。

11级：威武行动 Memorable Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行攻击时，你的武器攻击造成1[W]额外伤害，直到你下回合结束。

11级：怨恨打击 Rancorous Smite

12级：杀意震天 Scrape the Sky

16级：不败天运 Unfailing Fortune

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.L1ShCyextOa3dREn]{神圣幸运 Divine Fortune}威能时，你获得+3加值而非+1加值。若你应用此加值到攻击上且失手，则你在此遭遇中获得另一次@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.L1ShCyextOa3dREn]{神圣幸运 Divine Fortune}的使用次数。

20级：拨乱反正 Every Wrong Righted
Stone Keeper Paragon Path.requirements: 矮人，牧师，在历史上受训

Great Weapon Master Paragon Path.name: 巨武器大师 Great Weapon Master
Great Weapon Master Paragon Path.description:
「挥舞这么大的武器也是一门艺术。」

Prerequisite:

You have always found the art of wielding a great weapon appealing, and during your training you focused your efforts toward mastering its forms and techniques. Although your instructors gave you invaluable insights into using these weapons, only through field experience have you come to truly master them. In your hands, a great weapon becomes like a living thing, its bulk and weight negligible in your practiced hands. You can maneuver the weapon about you, using its size to your clear advantage.

11级：传播恐惧 Infectious Dread

Benefit: 每次你用双手武器进行的近战攻击命中一个敌人，另一个邻近你的敌人在对你的攻击骰上受到-2减值，直到你下一回合结束。免疫恐惧的生物不承受此减值。

11级：招架行动 Parrying Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在AC上获得+2加值直到你下一回合结束。

11级：严厉警告 Grim Warning

12级：格挡式 Blocking Maneuver

16级：抓住空挡 Opening Seized

Benefit: 每当一个被你标记的敌人的攻击对你失手时，在你下一回合结束前，你下一次攻击对此敌人造成等同于你体质调整值的额外伤害。

20级：驱散打击 Scattering Strike
Great Weapon Master Paragon Path.requirements: 战士，「战士武器天赋」职业特性

Great Bear Shaman Paragon Path.name: 巨熊萨满 Great Bear Shaman
Great Bear Shaman Paragon Path.description:
「邪恶族裔不是我们古老大地之力的敌手。」

Prerequisite:

许多萨满传统会尊崇巨熊之灵，并将祂视为最伟大的守护精魂。如同母熊会为了保护孩子而狂怒地面对任何危险，巨熊之灵在世界之外守望着这世界，从那些想毁灭或污染世界的存在手中保护它。作为一名巨熊萨满，你也同样地保护你的冒险同伴。你的精魂伙伴是你与巨熊之灵的连结，并经由你的降魂术，来引导祂的力量和坚韧。

你主要的任务是陪在其他战士旁边，带给他们力量。在你有能力时保护弱者；如果不行，就增强那些战士的力量来让他们能够做到。为了符合你作为巨熊萨满的目标，你的精魂伙伴引起巨熊之灵的力量来驱赶敌人，在他们攻击你的朋友时惩罚他们。你的精魂伙伴将带着巨熊之灵的狂暴力量咆哮，激励你的同伴开始行动。当你驱使自己进行更多动作时，你给予同伴额外的攻击；并在敌人失去防卫时让同伴的攻击变得更强。

你是世界的保护者，而巨熊之灵的咆哮在你说出的每一个字中回响。

11级：护灵之勇 Great Protector's Prowess

Benefit: 你和你的盟友在对邻近你的精魂伙伴的被标记的敌人的伤害骰上获得+2加值。

11级：巨熊行动 Great Bear's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在该动作之前或之后，离你10格内的一个盟友可以用一个自由动作进行一次近战基本攻击。

11级：熊牙护卫 Bear Fang Defense

12级：激迫怒吼 Galvanizing Bellow

16级：海市蜃楼 Looming Presence

Benefit: 当邻近你的精魂伙伴时，你的盟友在借机攻击的攻击骰上获得+5威能加值。

20级：呼唤巨熊之灵 Call to the Great Bear
Great Bear Shaman Paragon Path.requirements: 萨满，[[呼唤精魂伙伴 Call Spirit Companion]]威能

Master of Poisons Paragon Path.name: 剧毒大师 Master of Poisons
Master of Poisons Paragon Path.description:
「最致命的毒，不能尝也不能闻。」

Prerequisite:

Few people respect the business of poisons. Among the mighty, poison is considered a weapon of the weak and a dishonorable tool at best. Yet to whom do the mighty and the wealthy turn when they are in need of discreet murder? You, of course, and you're happy to oblige. You never advertise your talents; it wouldn't do for word to spread about your skills. Through prudent inquiries, people in need have a way of finding you. No problem is too big or well protected for your techniques to work, assuming you have enough time and your client has enough gold.

Along with your success comes a raft of enemies. Your victims leave behind friends and relatives seeking revenge. Do they chase after the one who paid you? It would be simpler if they did. Instead, these pursuers come to the one who caused their comrade's end, and that person is you.

Poisoning is a subtle and dangerous art, and a few narrow escapes from angry vengeance-seekers have taught you that discretion is key. Even among your companions, you keep a low profile. It's best to keep your methods of dealing with enemies hidden. However, when you slip a little venom on a blade and the foe falls to the ground, tongue black and neck swollen, your comrades won't look too closely when that act saves them from harm.

11级：毒素专家 Poison Maven

Benefit: 当你对敌人进行毒素武器攻击时，你在伤害骰上获得等同于你智力调整值的加值。另外，受到毒素效果的敌人向你提供战斗优势。

11级：剧毒行动 Venomous Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次武器攻击且命中，此攻击的一个目标受到10点持续毒素伤害（豁免终止）。

11级：致盲之尘 Blinding Dust

12级：连绵毒素 Persistent Poison

16级：酸性毒素 Acidic Poisons

Benefit: 你造成的持续毒素伤害无视抗力。

20级：隐袭伏击 Insidious Attack

Minotaur Kinspeaker Paragon Path.name: 眷族语者 Minotaur Kinspeaker
Minotaur Kinspeaker Paragon Path.description:
「Ancestors! Hear our need, and come forth to aid our cause!」

Prerequisite:

Each generation leaves behind the ashes of the old, but the spirits of the past live on for those with the eyes to see them and the ears to hear them. You dwell in two worlds, opening your inner awareness to look upon death and tease out its secrets. You commune with these spirits, seeking out their advice and divining solutions to your troubles by solving their riddles. Their signs are everywhere—even in the omens you see and the portents you dream.

11级：先祖盟友 Ancestral Allies

Benefit: 先祖的灵魂在周围盘旋。当你以一次借机攻击命中一个敌人时，该敌人向你和你的盟友提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

11级：劝诫行动 Counseled Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，每个能看见并听见你的盟友可以重掷所有失败的技能检定，直到你下一回合结束。此盟友必须使用第二次的结果。

11级：释放野兽 Unleashed Beast

12级：先祖议会 Ancestral Congress

16级：借予精魂援助 Lend Spiritual Aid

Benefit: 当一个距离你5格内的可以看见你并听见你的盟友花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，此盟友获得隐蔽直到你下一回合结束。

20级：先祖占据 Ancestral Possession

Rakehell Duelist Paragon Path.name: 决斗浪子 Rakehell Duelist
Rakehell Duelist Paragon Path.description:
「I can see that you are eager to die, but you'll have to wait until I finish my drink.」

Prerequisite:

You are a rakehell duelist because you're the best at what you do. With a weapon in each hand, you rely on fast footwork and skillful parries. You scorn combatants who need half an hour to strap on heavy armor before they can do battle. By the time other warriors are ready, you can dispatch three sets of opponents and two flagons of ale. Knowing that a fight is around the corner, you make sure you're prepared and that you enjoy life while you can.

You have won riches and fame by going up against deadly opponents. Although your talents have earned you the means to retire to a life of luxury, you find that your pursuit of the good life seems to end up causing fights. For a rakehell duelist, that's the point. Boasting, gambling, and courting the attractive and the wealthy is fun because it can result in being challenged to a duel.

Your reputation attracts a constant stream of aspiring duelists seeking to test themselves against a master. A rakehell duelist usually relishes each opportunity to confirm that he or she is still on top, mercilessly dispatching any ambitious upstarts.

11级：决斗者守备 Duelist's Guard

Benefit: 当穿着轻甲或链甲时，你在对抗被你标记的敌人的AC上获得+1加值。

11级：副手行动 Main Gauche Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你在此额外动作之前或之后能以一个自由动作使用副手武器进行一次近战基本攻击。

11级：滑头冲锋 Sly Charge

12级：副手招架 Main Gauche Parry

16级：标记机会 Marked Opportunity

Benefit: 如果一个被你标记的邻近你的敌人快步或进行一次目标不包括你的攻击，则它向你提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

20级：保持灵活 Stay Mobile

Battle Captain Paragon Path.name: 军将 Battle Captain
Battle Captain Paragon Path.description:
「紧随吾后！胜利仅属我等！」

Prerequisite:

你成为任务中的指挥者，一个懂得振奋人心的统领能因应战场上各种因素更容易发号进攻与回守的命令。作为领导者，你需靠出色的战斗与指挥赢取盟友的信任与尊重，并将他们铸造成一个紧密的团队。

11级：军将之力 Battle Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你的盟友在攻击骰上获得+1加值直到你下一回合开始。你的盟友必须能听到且看到你才能获得该加值。

11级：破势怒号 Cry Havoc

Benefit: 在首轮（或者是首轮与突袭轮——若你的盟友能在突袭轮行动）中，离你10格以内的开始其回合的盟友在攻击骰上获得+2加值。

11级：击退 Force Retreat

12级：一瞬灵动 Bolt of Genius

16级：战斗鼓舞 Battle Inspiration

Benefit: 在你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0ZYc2nJqa9AlruyU]{振奋呼声 Inspiring Word}威能时，受到你医疗的盟友在攻击骰与速度上获得+1威能加值，直到你下一回合结束。若你选择了「战术风采」职业特性，则该盟友获得的威能加值等同于你的智力调整值。

20级：精巧旋风 Cunning Flurry

Cannith Mastermaker Paragon Path.name: 卡尼斯宗匠 Cannith Mastermaker
Cannith Mastermaker Paragon Path.description:
「我总能感觉到物品中潜藏的能力。当然在我手上，这些能力很快就不会再潜藏下去了。」

Prerequisite:

卡尼斯家族的宗匠们是十三龙纹家族中最有力量的施法者。在家族的阶层中有着相当多数目的机关术士和法师。做为一名卡尼斯宗匠，你是家族严格的魔法传统的一部分。你能够诱出你的魔法物品中隐藏的能力，并以独特的方式使用。尽管需要花费无数时日来处理残渣，并且其他的部分已经留下了它们的痕迹。大部分的宗匠的手上都承受着永久的银色条纹。

11级：宗匠行动 Mastermaker Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，一个你已消耗的魔法物品每日威能可再次使用

11级：物品亲和 Item Affinity

Benefit: 在一次长休息后，你每天可以使用3次魔法物品每日威能。21级时，你每天可使用5次

11级：力量汲取 Power Siphon

12级：物品复原 Item Resurgence

16级：奥法导流 Arcane Rechanneling

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，在你的回合内以一个自由动作，你可以消耗一次魔法物品每日威能的使用，来恢复一个奥术遭遇攻击威能

20级：闪电注入 Lightning Infusion
Cannith Mastermaker Paragon Path.requirements: [[制造之龙纹 <龙纹> Mark of Making <Dragonmark>]]专长

Pathfinder Paragon Path.name: 开路先锋 Pathfinder
Pathfinder Paragon Path.description:
「我是个猎人。你则是我的猎物。」

Prerequisite:

你成为终极的斥候，可以在任何环境中找到通过的路径。有时你找到最佳的路线，但其它情况下你不得不挥起双刀，从荒野中开出一条路来。

11级：战斗磨练 Battlehoned

Benefit: 你每天获得两个额外的回复力。

11级：开路先锋行动 Pathfinder's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你同时获得一个移动动作。

11级：一步之差 Wrong Step

12级：共同行动 Act Together

16级：残忍恢复 Cruel Recovery

Benefit: 当你命中一个敌人并且它受到「猎手标的」的伤害时，你获得等于「猎手标的」造成的伤害 + 你感知调整值的临时生命值。

20级：斩杀标记 Slasher's Mark

Student of Caiphon Paragon Path.name: 凯丰门徒 Student of Caiphon
Student of Caiphon Paragon Path.description:
「The Dream Whisperer pays more attention to the world than any other of its ilk. It might have a plan and a part to play in the world's final destiny.」

Prerequisite:

You studied the limitless abysses and the bright points of enigmatic light that hang between them. You listened to the baffling disordered sounds that emerged from the simple astronomical lenses you used for your study. You learned the stars were not the innocent lamps above the world that most assumed. Despite this unsettling knowledge, you continued your study, eventually narrowing your concentration to just one star—a star named Caiphon. That's when the dreams began.

You dreamed of a fitful star of purple fire. You walked in its light to the edge of a slime-lined pit that pulsed and heaved like a living maw, eager to consume. You hurled yourself into the cavity as the purple star flared. You fell into an amoebic sea, where you were digested over the course of a thousand years, or perhaps just one night.

When you woke, your eyes were opalescent purple orbs, and Caiphon began whispering—whispering—into your ear. Even though you could hear only the merest fragments of Caiphon's never-ending instructions and insights, a knowing smile stitched itself across your face.

11级：凯丰指引 Caiphon's Guidance

Benefit: 你的恐惧或光耀邪术师威能和凯丰学徒威能在攻击骰上掷出18-20时即可造成重击。

11级：璀璨星光 Star Bright

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，如果你使用此动作进行攻击且命中，则此命中造成5点光耀持续伤害（豁免终止）。该威能被视为拥有光耀关键字。

11级：指引之星虔信 Trust in the Guide Star

12级：紫梯之阶 Steps on the Purple Stair

16级：凯丰之赐 Caiphon's Intercession

Benefit: 当一个受到你「邪术师诅咒」影响的敌人生命值降至0或更低时，你可以选择是使用「凯丰之赐」来替代你的「虚空之运」契约之赐。一个距离你10格内的由你选择的盟友可以立即对你选择的一个目标进行一次近战基本攻击；如果此攻击命中，除通常的伤害外，此攻击造成5点持续光耀伤害（豁免终止）。如果你的盟友进行这次攻击，凯丰会索取其应得的，并对你的盟友造成5点伤害。如果你的盟友拒绝接受「凯丰之赐」，你受到5点伤害（即使没有进行攻击）；在这种情况下，你保留「虚空之运」的使用。

20级：凯丰之饥饿恩赐 Caiphon's Hungry Mercy

War Wizard of Cormyr Paragon Path.name: 科米尔战争法师 War Wizard of Cormyr
War Wizard of Cormyr Paragon Path.description:
「我曾经和耐瑟瑞尔的影魔网导师决斗过。希望你能给我留下更深的印象。」

Prerequisite:

你是向科米尔王室宣誓效忠的精英战斗法师组织的成员。你和你的同僚们是保护王国不受耐瑟瑞尔的狡猾巫术和其他更为不可思议的威胁侵害的剑和盾。战争法师和科米尔的军队协作，保护王国不被攻击。在战斗中他们会和紫龙军团共进退，展开定点攻击并对敌军洒下闪电、冰霜与火焰的魔法雨。

作为一名战争法师，你是一个专攻于战斗的艺术和技巧而不是学术研究或宇宙秘密的大师级施法者。你也想要一个没有被邪恶势力玷污的太平盛世，但是只有理想是不行的，因此每天你都磨练着可以击退黑暗狂潮赢取胜利的魔法。你的力量集中在控制战场和对尽可能多的敌人发泄奥术的愤怒上。

大多数战争法师都是科米尔人，但也有一些其他地方的人在科米尔的战争法师学院学习然后对王室宣誓效忠的。一个想要为了自己的利益在其他国度冒险的战争法师并不会受到约束——只要他对与王室相关的重要事情留神并且不背叛森林王国的最大利益就行。

11级：战争法师训练 War Wizard's Training

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，你在此攻击中的使用的任何远程或区域威能不会触发借机攻击

11级：奥法基础 Arcane Fundamentals

Benefit: 选择一个目标为一个生物的你的法师随意或遭遇攻击威能。该威能算作基本攻击。当一个威能允许你做一次基本攻击时，你可以使用此威能。（如果你以此方式使用一个遭遇威能，则它仍然消耗掉了）若你重训且不打算保留此威能，则你可以选择一个新威能与该特性关联

11级：闪电涟漪 Lightning Ripple

12级：单向屏障 One-Way Barrier

16级：战争法师屠杀 War Wizard's Decimation

Benefit: 当你以近程或区域攻击造成重击时，此攻击对所有目标造成5点额外伤害

20级：胜利风暴 Storm of Victory

Champion of Corellon Paragon Path.name: 科瑞隆之捍卫者 Champion of Corellon
Champion of Corellon Paragon Path.description:
「科瑞隆护佑于我，凡我剑所达之处，再无敌寇。」

Prerequisite:

作为雅灵宫廷的一名骑士，你宣誓效忠于妖精领主。除却骁勇善战和武艺高绝以外，你同样展现出在雅灵与精灵王国中令人钦佩的特质——非凡的耐心、优雅与怜悯。你遵循的个人准则看起来像是常人所说的“骑士精神“，但事实上，你更多以妖精的准则来要求自己的荣誉、勇敢和忠诚。大多数骑士为了让自己堂堂正正的获得胜利往往绞尽脑汁，他们用这样的行为来证明自己的勇武，但你不同，只要有效，你并不介意拿起弓弩、用点魔法或者略施诡计。即使身着最重的盔甲，你依然能最大限度的让自身保持灵活与机敏。

在雅灵中，遵循这样道路的人被称为“席德瑞恩的剑骑士“。大多数这样的捍卫者都是雅灵、精灵或者半精灵出身，因为精灵与魔法之神科瑞隆正是这些种族的庇护者。然而，任何献身于席德瑞恩神庭的人都可以成为科瑞隆的捍卫者，那些来自其他种族的科瑞隆捍卫者在多数雅灵和精灵中非常受欢迎，他们通常被视为偶像和荣誉的盟友。

11级：康复行动 Restorative Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以同时花费一个回复力。

11级：优越防御 Superior Defense

Benefit: 若你的敏捷值为13或更高，则当你着重甲时你在AC上获得+1加值。若你的敏捷值为15或更高，此加值变为+2。

11级：典雅打击 Elegant Strike

12级：优雅步伐 Graceful Step

16级：轻盈勇士 Light-Footed Warrior

Benefit: 当你着重甲时，你无视重甲的速度减值。此外，若你在你的回合内重伤一名敌人或将其生命降到0，你能以自由动作快步一格。

20级：科瑞隆之怒 Corellon's Wrath
Champion of Corellon Paragon Path.requirements: 圣武士，必须信仰科瑞隆

Dread Fang Paragon Path.name: 恐怖毒牙 Dread Fang
Dread Fang Paragon Path.description:
「你已经被我的阴影之网缠住了，现在游戏结束了，可怜的小昆虫。」

Prerequisite:

将你的敌人引入不利的战略位置。在对手没有看到你时发动突袭。在不给对手任何反击机会的情况下杀掉他。能杀掉敌人时绝对不留活口。用恐怖的死亡回敬你的敌人，令其他人不敢与你作对。在战斗中活下来，为了再次战斗。以上这些是卓尔的战斗信条，年轻的卓尔必须把这些全都牢记于心，才能在他们那个尔虞我诈的社会中生存下来。

卓尔因杀戮而闻名于世，他们会想法设法把每一个阻挡他们道路的人谋杀掉。无数的人们承受着卓尔女祭司的长鞭的残酷之吻或是卓尔邪术师的恶毒魔法的折磨。无数的奴隶在他们那反复无常的卓尔主人的压迫下悲惨地活着或是痛苦地死去。你来自这样的一个世界，如同你之前的其他人一样，你只有在享受死亡的艺术时才能为心灵找到一点慰藉。你在与同辈学员的性命相搏间学习到了卓尔的战斗基础。你掌握了在卓尔武士中流传的刀剑与十字弓的格斗技巧，想要藉此来出人头地。只有成为一名有价值的杀手，才能避免作为一个奴隶或是牺牲品而悲惨死去的命运。

或许你已经见惯了在你生活的社会中的阴谋诡计，尽量忍受蛛后的谎言吧，直到你不能从她那里获得更多为止。或许卓尔家族间的相互残杀已经让你在幽暗地域中没有任何一个盟友。你已经抛弃了过去的你。远离你的家乡，你加入了其他的流浪者团队并且继续训练你的技术。你追求着成为死亡的化身并成功超越你的族人。

11级：蜘蛛刺客 Spider Assassin

Benefit: 当对在你的回合开始时无法看见你的目标触发「偷袭」时，你造成一个额外骰子的「偷袭」伤害。

11级：恐怖袭击 Dread Sneak Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来对一个你对其具有战斗优势的目标进行攻击时，你可对其造成「偷袭」伤害，即便你在本回合中已经造成了「偷袭」伤害。

11级：毒牙蛛网 Fang and Web Strike

12级：蜘蛛虚招 Spider Feint

16级：死亡化身 Sinister Presence

Benefit: 当你将一个敌人的生命降至0时，选择你身周5格内的第二个敌人。直到你的下回合结束，你对其获得战斗优势。

20级：剧毒之刺 Venomous Sting

Dread Imperator Paragon Path.name: 恐怖统治者 Dread Imperator
Dread Imperator Paragon Path.description:
「When the gods command, I make sure you obey.」

Prerequisite:

In the days of the human empire of Nerath, many temples and faiths were wealthy and widespread enough to give rise to powerful hierarchies, kingdom-spanning organizations that often wielded both religious and secular power. These empires of faith lapsed into disorder when Nerath fell. Temples lost touch with each other, local leaders split from their distant masters, and disaffected people abandoned the great temples for generations. But in a few places, the titles and trappings of the old hierarchies survive. Imperators are among these surviving traditions, a reminder of the days when archpriests maintained temple armies led by imperators, ruled over estates, and sponsored vigilant orders of inquisitors to ferret out dissent and disloyalty.

As a dread imperator, you have been invested in accordance with the old ways. Even though your deity's faith is only a shadow of its former kingdom-spanning glory, you still wield divine authority against your deity's enemies. You have the power to compel obedience from your foes and inspire loyalty in your allies. You are a guardian of what you consider the right path, tirelessly seeking out foes both hidden and open. The day will come when the faith is restored throughout the lands, and you mean to be there to see it.

11级：欺诈控制 Deceptive Control

Benefit: 当你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GLaB471ns0JZ6wCX]{圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity}目标的攻击对你失手时，你的盟友对该目标获得战斗优势直到它下一回合结束。

11级：专横行动 Imperious Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时滑动离你5格内的一个敌人1格，或滑动离你5格内的一个盟友3格。

11级：灵魂戳刺 Soul Stab

12级：灵魂皇冠 Crown of Souls

16级：圣堂反应 Templar Reaction

Benefit: 当任何盟友对你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GLaB471ns0JZ6wCX]{圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity}目标造成重击时，你能对此目标做一次借机攻击，如果它在你的触及范围内的话。你在此伤害骰上获得等同于你智力调整值的加值

20级：统治者之审判 Imperator's Judgment
Dread Imperator Paragon Path.requirements: 神罚使，「众矢天谴」职业特性，[[圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity]]威能

Fearbringer Thane Paragon Path.name: 恐惧领主 Fearbringer Thane
Fearbringer Thane Paragon Path.description:
「你无须等到尸体倒地才知道谁是胜利者，看看那一双双流露惊恐的眼睛-那些眼睛永远看不到胜利。」

Prerequisite:

许多野蛮人堂而皇之结合个人的存在和自然的领导能力，掌握原始力量。一些野蛮人将自然原力的熟练同个人风貌气度和天生的领导能力联系在一起。其中最可怕战士就是那些利用复合力量将恐惧灌入敌人心中的恐惧领主。

作为一个恐惧领主，你凭借自己的意志和骇人之姿进行战斗。恐惧是你手中的武器，使你的敌人在你的斧剑之下软弱颤抖。狂暴时的你充满自然原力，这力量自你体内流出，鼓舞了你的同伴，并让你的敌人恐惧。

多数恐惧领主凭借他们的能力将一群残暴的战士聚于旗下。其他的，包括多数玩家角色，则带领着一小群冒险者突袭地城和其他的冒险之地。从这些看来，恐惧领主如同是野蛮人和督军的混合体，近于野蛮人出身的领导者。

11级：骇人狂怒 Staggering Fury

Benefit: 当你在狂暴状态下花费一个行动点进行一次近战攻击时，每个能看见你的敌人在攻击骰上受到-2减值直到你下一回合结束。

11级：残暴激励 Inspire Ferocity

Benefit: 当你处于狂暴状态时，任何离你5格内的以近战攻击命中的盟友在此伤害骰上获得+2加值。

11级：尖啸鹰击 Screaming Hawk Strike

12级：骇人之姿 Fearsome Presence

16级：蛮横之态 Dominating Presence

Benefit: 当你造成重击时，你的盟友对此目标的攻击骰上获得+2加值直到你下一回合结束。

20级：战斗趋势 Tide of Battle

Fear Walker Paragon Path.name: 恐惧行者 Fear Walker
Fear Walker Paragon Path.description:
「你有理由惧怕我。」

Prerequisite:

The ability to affect others with supernatural draconic fear changes the way a dragonborn sees the world. Dragonborn are already proud, and seeing other creatures flinch and cringe before him or her only swells that pride. Pleased by others' reactions, they learn how to focus the dragonfear they wield. They hone it into a weapon and force enemies to their knees, tears streaming from their faces in terror. It is an exhilarating feeling that the best fear walkers learn to control.

Your mastery of others' fear is still growing, but it is already formidable. When you choose, you make enemies grovel at your feet, and you've found few you cannot make fear for their lives with choice words and a threatening stance. Soon, you will achieve the same skill with this ability that the dragons themselves wield.

11级：掌握恐惧 Fear Mastery

Benefit: 你在恐惧威能的伤害骰上获得+2加值。

11级：恐惧行者行动 Fear Walkerwalker's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，一个你能看见的生物不能攻击你，直到你下一回合结束或直到你攻击它。免疫恐惧的生物免疫此效果。

11级：理解恐惧 Understanding of Fear

Benefit: 你在洞察和威吓检定上获得+2加值，同时你免疫龙威。

11级：恐怖浪潮 Wave of Terror

12级：恐惧光环 Aura of Fear

16级：恐惧同行 Walking with Terror

Benefit: 你在对邻近你的目标的恐惧威能的攻击骰上获得+2威能加值。

20级：强力龙惧 Dragonfear Overwhelming
Fear Walker Paragon Path.requirements: 龙裔，[[龙惧 Dragonfear]]种族威能

Battlelord of Kord Paragon Path.name: 寇德之战斗君王 Battlelord of Kord
Battlelord of Kord Paragon Path.description:
「Fame find me or death take me, I'll storm any field in Kord's name.」

Prerequisite:

Both Kord and Bane exult in battle. Bane sends his followers to conquer and pillage, using war for the sake of unjust gain, wanton violence, or sheer bloodlust. Kord's way is one of accepting challenges as they come and using mastered talents to overcome them. His dogma is one of bravery, strength, and skill. No test of mortal mettle is stronger than the crucible of battle. The glory and fame that Kord admonishes his followers to seek involves striving to win the respect of their fellows for upholding their duty and facing danger with their heads held high.

Warriors and warlords of all sorts esteem Kord. Those who know that fighting is sometimes necessary pray to Kord for favor, rather than to Bane. Such warriors know that it is the fate of a few to stand against senseless destruction and oppression. Kord's followers do so without flinching. They uphold the right to independence that Kord's wild nature demands. When battle is done, revelry, boasting, and toasting— celebrating life and health—are all that Kord requires as thanks.

Numerous schools of military thought use Kord's dogma as part of their philosophy. Leaders must be strong and courageous. They must hone their talents to assure victory and survival in bloody days. Renown should be earned through bold and decisive action that serves as an example to one's comrades. A valiant warlord protects his fellow soldiers by leading from the front and luring in the enemy, as Kord did in older days.

You are a leader who reveres Kord's ways. As such, you have shaped your skills by leading your comrades against many dangers. With a war cry, you fearlessly engage your enemies. You stride among your adversaries, seeking the greatest among them and challenging them with your amazing exploits. Your brashness inspires your allies to decisive action and helps create the opportunities in which triumph can be secured.

11级：强力行动 Mighty Action

Benefit: 当你消耗一个行动点进行额外动作时，任何能看见且听见你的盟友在攻击骰和伤害骰上获得+1加值，直到你下一回合开始。

11级：汹涌激励 Tempestuous Inspiration

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0ZYc2nJqa9AlruyU]{振奋呼声 Inspiring Word}威能时，你可以让威能目标在攻击骰上获得+2加值，在伤害骰上获得等同于你魅力调整值的加值，效果持续到你下一回合结束。如果持续时间内目标的第一次攻击失手，则目标提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

11级：胜利之主 Tempest of Triumph

12级：鲜血灵感 Blood-Tested Inspiration

16级：寇德之专注 Kord's Focus

Benefit: 当你被标记时，你可以立即对该标记进行豁免。如果豁免成功，则该标记结束。另外，你在对恐惧效果的豁免骰上获得+5加值

20级：风暴之路 Path of the Storm

Blightspeaker Paragon Path.name: 枯萎语者 Blightspeaker
Blightspeaker Paragon Path.description:
「培罗固然是仁慈的，然而我以其名义对罪有应得之徒施以惩罚。」

Prerequisite:

神力的愤怒通常表现为闪光的冲击波、天堂的烈焰、或是雷霆闪电，将神的敌人悉数毁灭。然而在某些时候，神的怒火会化为瘟疫和疾病降临在邪恶之徒头上，即便是善良的神祇有时也会有这种极端的方式来净化这个腐败的世界。

作为一名枯萎语者，你以神的名义掌握如此极端的毁灭力量。如同死亡天使一般，你手持死神之镰收割敌人的生命来增强自己的力量。对于普通百姓来讲，你是令人畏惧的存在，是代表神明黑暗一面的冷酷使者。对于敌人而言，你是恐怖的化身，是审判的宣告者和惩罚的执行者。

11级：枯萎之语 Blighting Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，所有离你5格内的敌人获得5点暗蚀易伤直到你下一回合结束。此外，你在本回合内造成的所有伤害都在原本的伤害类型之外获得暗蚀伤害类型。

11级：撕解呼召 Dissolution's Call

Benefit: 当你使用神术攻击威能造成重击时，你恢复等同于5 + 你感知调整值的生命值。

11级：死亡锁链 Chains of Death

12级：虚假生命 False Life

16级：诅咒回响 Echoed Malediction

Benefit: 当一个生物对你造成的效果豁免成功时，此生物受到10点暗蚀伤害。

20级：末日使者 Endbringer

Kulkor Arms Master Paragon Path.name: 库侯尔斗臂大师 Kulkor Arms Master
Kulkor Arms Master Paragon Path.description:
「Swords are pretty, there's no doubt of it. But if you want to crack open plate armor or split a dragon's scales, you'll need a weapon with more hitting power」

Prerequisite:

You are a well-traveled veteran, a pragmatic mercenary who has fought in a dozen different lands. Along the way, you've come to appreciate the virtues and drawbacks of various weapons. Sometimes you're a soldier, sometimes a bodyguard, and sometimes a freebooter in search of the next opportunity. Wherever you go and whatever you do, though, you're always a master of arms.

Many who share your combat style are heartless sellswords, fighting only for the next bag of gold. You might be motivated by coin, or you could find yourself drawn to a higher cause. Perhaps you pursue a calling as a wandering trainer, instructing castle guards and village militias in the effective use of their weapons. You might be a footloose traveler, searching for a worthy place or cause to serve with your martial skills. Or you might be a renowned troubleshooter, awaiting the next chance to test your skills against violent brigands or fierce marauders. You're willing to slay monsters and dangerous beasts if that's what needs to be done, but your true calling is to face enemies that have steel in their hands and prove your mastery over them.

11级：库侯尔大师 Kulkor Master

Benefit: 如果你使用一把具有多用特性的斧，锤或硬头锤命中一个给你提供战斗优势的敌人时，该敌人向所有生物提供战斗优势直到你的下一回合开始。

11级：库侯尔不懈 Kulkor Persistence

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用一把具有多用特性的斧，锤或硬头锤进行攻击，并且此攻击对所有目标失手，你可以重掷一个攻击骰但是必须使用第二个结果。

11级：斗臂大师挑战 Arms Master Challenge

12级：血液调和 Tempered in Blood

16级：痛击倒地 Smite the Fallen

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你以近战攻击击倒一个敌人时，你能以一个自由动作对目标造成等同于你一半等级的伤害。

20级：钢铁镇服 Subjugation of Steel
Kulkor Arms Master Paragon Path.requirements: 战士，[[库侯尔斗臂学徒|库侯尔斗臂学徒 <流派初成> Kulkor Battlearm Student <Lesser Style>]]专长

Ardent Champion Paragon Path.name: 狂热斗士 Ardent Champion
Ardent Champion Paragon Path.description:
「天堂怒火激起了我的灵魂，我是神的利剑，死亡对我毫无意义！」

Prerequisite:

Most avengers undergo training in secret temples or monasteries to prepare for their service and receive their powers through rites of initiation, but some are endowed with divine power simply through raw devotion to their god. Such avengers dig deep within themselves to find unmatched reserves of faith, making up for their lack of formal training with holy passion. These are ardent champions.

As an ardent champion, you are an outsider, your spirit touched directly by the hand of your deity. You are most likely unlearned in the esoteric lore of your faith, and you have little connection to any hierarchies associated with it. In fact, others who lack your passion might see you as a threat to the established ways. Where cynics and pragmatists see despair or uncertainty, you see only your divine patron's will, and you set out to accomplish it regardless of obstacles. If you are meant to triumph, you will. If you are not, you are confident that you will soon be shown another way to serve your god.

11级：神圣激情 Holy Ardor

Benefit: 当你因为你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GLaB471ns0JZ6wCX]{圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity}而进行两次攻击检定且命中目标时，如果这两次攻击骰一样，则你造成重击，除非两次结果都是1。

11级：狂热行动 Arendt Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以同时做一次豁免检定，或在此动作之前或之后快步等同于你敏捷调整值的格数。

11级：狂热旋风 Fanatical Flurry

12级：战斗狂热 Battle Rapture

16级：狂热怒火 Ardent Fury

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你对你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GLaB471ns0JZ6wCX]{圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity}目标造成重击时，你能以一个自由动作快步1格且对此目标做一次基本攻击。

20级：难遏狂热 Irresistible Ardor
Ardent Champion Paragon Path.requirements: 神罚使，「逐拿天谴」职业特性，[[圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity]]威能

Zealous Assassin Paragon Path.name: 狂信刺客 Zealous Assassin
Zealous Assassin Paragon Path.description:
「罗丝的信众苟延于阴影与诡秘，亦将灭亡于阴影和诡秘中。此乃瑟翰妮之意愿。」

Prerequisite:

每个神罚使都被教导战斗的冷酷艺术和通过几个迅疾的击打孤立并解决敌人的艺术。一些神罚使教派也强调隐秘、阴影和守秘，包括瑟翰妮、罗丝、泽希尔和维克那的教派。在这些中间，最危险的就是那些追随狂信刺客之道的神罚使。

作为这条道路的追随者，你视献身和无情为一体，变成指向神的敌人的致命武器。你的技巧专注于在战斗的边缘和阴影间游走、迅速的处决敌人的能力。你将阴影集中于周围、或是隐藏在神圣光芒的光晕中，你精通在战斗中利用空隙取得优势的技巧，在取得对敌人的战斗优势或敌人重伤的时制造更高的伤害。在此道路的顶峰，你可以使自己对敌人隐身，然后用炫目的光芒灼烧他，使他更容易被你击伤。

11级：神圣遮蔽 Divine Shroud Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时获得隐蔽直到你下一回合结束，且你可以在此额外动作之前或之后以一个自由动作传送3格。

11级：终结技 Finishing Technique

Benefit: 当你命中一个给你提供战斗优势的重伤目标时，此攻击对该目标造成1d6额外伤害。

11级：虚空杀灭 Strike from Empty Air

12级：神罚暗影 Avenging Shadow

16级：狂信者面纱 Zealot's Veil

Benefit: 当你冲锋时，你可以进行一个隐秘检定对抗你冲锋的目标的被动侦查检定（你不会在此检定中因冲锋中的移动而受到减值）。若你成功，则你此攻击获得战斗优势。

20级：狂信者之刃 Blade of the Zealot

Wild Mage Paragon Path.name: 狂野法师 Wild Mage
Wild Mage Paragon Path.description:
「如果你能控制你的力量，那你的力量还不够强大。」

Prerequisite:

你的血脉中融入了元素混沌的混乱。你的法术能开启通向元素混沌的通道，从中汲取任何可能的能量，并用混沌之力来驱策和加强。你的法术效果将变得不可预测，但混乱本身将成为它们的力量源泉。

11级：混沌行动 Chaos Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以掷一个d6来同时获得1个下列效果

11级：狂野怒涛 Wild Surge

Benefit: 当你在奥术威能的攻击骰上掷出1时，你可以接受此失手结果和你的「无束威能」职业特性，或者投掷一个d6来获得1个下列效果 d6 狂野怒涛效果 1 此攻击失手，且你和目标在此攻击结算后传送，互换位置 2 此攻击失手，且你倒地并滑动3格远离目标 3 此攻击失手，且你和目标都晕眩（豁免终止） 4 重掷此攻击骰。若你再次掷出1，则你受到2d10 + 你魅力调整值的伤害，且在此遭遇中你不能再使用「狂野怒涛」 5 此攻击命中而不是失手，且你震慑直到你下一回合结束 6 此攻击命中而不是失手

11级：暴风怒袭 Tempest Surge

12级：奥能汹涌 Torrent of Power

16级：澎湃重击 Critical Surge

Benefit: 当你造成重击时，造成1d10额外伤害。

20级：虹光矢 Prismatic Bolt
Wild Mage Paragon Path.requirements: 术士，「狂野魔法」职业特性

Kundarak Ghorad'din Paragon Path.name: 昆达拉克盗贼克星 Kundarak Ghorad'din
Kundarak Ghorad'din Paragon Path.description:
「严格来说，不太可能让小偷去抓小偷。不过，我们会试着像我们的对手一样思考和锻炼。」

Prerequisite:

你是一个独特的盗贼团体的一部分。你是昆达拉克家族的Ghorad'din的一名成员，承担对家族的防卫措施的测试，和找回被那些通过无耻地强行破坏昆达拉克金库的行为窃取的财物。

你使施法者非凡的魔法技巧与窃贼的隐秘行动相结合。结果，不再有障碍能阻挠你。昆达拉克家族并不常用到Ghorad'din，他们仅仅效命于莫瑞坎领主，昆达拉克家族的领袖。当一种新的高级保险库需要测试时，家族将在财富放置于里之前，集合Ghorad'din的人手去试着闯入并暴露设计的缺陷。尽管如此的练习磨砺了你的技能，但你更喜欢的反而可能是那些更大的挑战。最熟练的Ghorad'din被分配去找回那些被其他的神偷偷走的财物。也有传言Ghorad 'din经营刺客。

11级：克星行动 Ghorad'din Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在贼活和隐秘检定上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。你同时在AC和反射上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束

11级：谨慎破陷者 Careful Trap-Breaker

Benefit: 你在延缓陷阱发动的贼活检定上获得+5加值，且你失败的贼活检定也不会触发陷阱

11级：迷惑通行 Befuddling Bypass

12级：穿越墙壁 Thwart the Walls

16级：飞贼大师 Master Burglar

Benefit: 当你做一次贼活检定时，你掷骰2次且使用更高的那个结果

20级：防护释放 Ward Unleashed
Kundarak Ghorad'din Paragon Path.requirements: [[防护之龙纹 <龙纹> Mark of Warding <Dragonmark>]]专长

Disciple of Razaundra Paragon Path.name: 拉扎安德拉信徒 Disciple of Razaundra
Disciple of Razaundra Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You have made your warlock's pact with the shadow demon Razaundra, a creature of unmatched anger and rage. Once a powerful demon in service to Lolth, Razaundra forges pacts with ambitious warlocks, teaching them to control and channel their anger. In the hands of her disciples, rage becomes a force as deadly as any magic, and Razaundra's shadow warlocks can lace their curses with pure fury. You have learned to channel and manipulate the power of rage.

11级：暗红诅咒 Curse of Crimson Darkness

Like all disciples of Razaundra, you were chosen for your bloodlust, then taught how to control this rage. As battle escalates around you, you are filled with a roiling red darkness that you can direct at your foes.

Benefit: 当你以遭遇或每日邪术师攻击威能或拉扎安德拉信徒攻击威能命中时，你在此伤害骰上获得+2加值。若你重伤，则此加值为+4

11级：狂怒漩涡 Maelstrom of Rage

You usually direct your rage at a single enemy, but when your fury peaks, no one is safe. Your anger becomes a storm of shadows that flares out beyond your chosen foe.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，一个离此攻击的目标5格内的敌人受到等同于5 + 你魅力调整值的寒冰和暗蚀伤害

11级：拉扎安德拉鞭挞 Razaundra's Lash

Razaundra advocates controlled anger, but her own rage toward Lolth shows that not all anger can be contained. Inspired by her fury, you mimic the dread lash she wields to spread agony among your foes.

12级：怒火倾泻 Cascade of Fury

Waves of anger flow from you like heat roiling above the desert sands. You release this rage in a pulse of power that leaves your foes reeling.

16级：重定愤怒 Redirected Anger

You are not content with concentrating on and slaying only a single foe. When you destroy an enemy, you redirect the passion and rage that went into that kill, slamming another enemy with the force of your fury.

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，当你在你的回合内将一个敌人生命值降到0时，在此回合结束前，你能以一个次要动作使用一个邪术师随意攻击威能。若你重伤，则你能以一个自由动作使用它

20级：打开黑暗之门 Open the Dark Floodgates

You have achieved such mastery over your rage that you can unleash it as a force unto itself, feeling it tear free from you with violence all its own. When you surrender yourself to the darkness in this way, you channel a power that few can withstand.

Pack Master Paragon Path.name: 狼群之首 Pack Master
Pack Master Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

狼群中的每一个成员都足够凶猛而且死战不休，但通过自身的经验，通过领导的天赋，或者通过纯粹的死亡历练，当中还是有少数能成为当中无容置疑的领导者。这些领导者追随麦登的闪耀榜样，以完美的指挥为目标，全都是嫉恶如仇的天才领战者。狼群之首都是美德的明灯，在狼群的黑暗时日中尌舞同侪奋战。作为腐败和邪恶诱惑的尅星，狼群之首是狼群中的菁英。他们对勇战邪恶的舍生取义是狼群的未来成员的活教学，同时也是对可能选择黑暗之力的人的有力警告。

11级：麦登的狩猎 Maldeen's Hunt

Benefit: 你在追踪生物的侦查检定上获得+5加值，且你和你的盟友在陆地上一小时能行进5英里。当你结束移动时离一个敌人2格远，你能以一个自由动作快步1格

11级：头狼行动 Pack Master's Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点给盟友一个标准动作而不是自己。该盟友在你的回合里进行此标准动作

11级：蝎狮与飞龙 Manticore-and-Wyvern

12级：推波助澜 Casting Ripples

16级：狼群明灯 Beacon for the Pack

Benefit: 当一个盟友进行由行动点给予的动作时，该盟友可以同时移动3格或快步1格

20级：稻草士兵 Straw Soldiers

Earthfast Brigadier Paragon Path.name: 牢固准将 Earthfast Brigadier
Earthfast Brigadier Paragon Path.description:
「Like Bergrom Earthfast, I endure.」

Prerequisite:

A connection to the earth defines dwarves as a connection to woodlands defines elves. All dwarves intuitively heed the earth's example, from the sustenance and riches it provides to the inexorable might of the landslide it spawns. Dwarf bodies are durable; more than once they've been compared to the dirt and stone that dwarves treasure. Any would-be dwarf hero does well to take advantage of this natural sturdiness.

Innate toughness is a hallmark of dwarf soldiers and their leaders. Vigor makes for a soldier who can outlast the enemy by withstanding hardship and injury. A robust officer pushes troops onward not only with words, but also by determined example. Dwarf warriors are renowned for their endurance.

Bergrom Earthfast, a dwarf general of legend, exemplifies the ideal dwarf warlord. Mighty in body and mind, Bergrom led his troops against giants before dwarves became free from the slavery of the titans. He endured supernatural elements, fell magic, and the treacherous wilds of old to help bring freedom to his people. His legacy endures in a martial tradition that values a sturdy body and the ability to get one's allies to make the most of their own endurance, as much as it does tactical acumen. Although Bergrom was a dwarf and relied on dwarven resilience, his techniques have spread to other peoples. Anyone who values toughness and spirit in a soldier might learn these ancient methods.

You are such a leader. Even if you didn't acquire formal training in Bergrom's leadership approach—or aren't a dwarf—your talents have led you in a similar direction. Relying on a hardy constitution and heavy weapons as tools, you help your allies push the limits of mortal endurance. Your enemies are hard pressed to keep up.

11级：持久行动 Enduring Action

Benefit: 当你消耗一个行动点进行额外动作时，你和离你5格内的每个盟友能以一个自由动作做一次豁免检定

11级：牢固恢复 Earthfast Recovery

Benefit: 当你或任何离你5格内的盟友在重伤状态下使用回气时，该角色恢复等同于你一半等级 + 你体质调整值的额外生命值。

11级：牢固进攻 Earthfast Assault

12级：紧握优势 Press the Advantage

16级：矮人回报 Dwarven Payback

Benefit: 当一个敌人以近战或远程攻击对你失手时，你能以一个自由动作选择一名你可见的盟友。直到该盟友的下回合结束，该盟友在对触发的敌人的伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的威能加值

20级：顽石打击 Stonechannel Strike

Building Thunder Paragon Path.name: 雷鸣殿堂武士 Building Thunder
Building Thunder Paragon Path.description:
「雷霆之名谴责你。」

Prerequisite:

当你可以熟练掌握你的力量时，雷霆精魂将他们的力量成功附加到你的战争哀嚎上。当你的武器比其他雷霆野蛮人更强力地打击敌人，雷霆怒卷，你的怒吼使敌人恐惧。

它像是龙卷雷鸣，使你拥有更强的力量。更多保守的战士当他们受到越来越多的伤害时会犹豫或选择逃避，而你却会当他们接近终结时达到自己的顶峰。

当风暴最终消散，你的生硬将如雷霆惊魂般轰鸣。你掌控者风暴的核心。

11级：迅雷滚滚 Thunder Rolls In

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点使用一个雷鸣威能时，你可以将此威能创造的任何冲击3变为冲击5。

11级：震荡共鸣 Thunderous Echo

Benefit: 当你用雷鸣威能命中一个敌人时，在你下一回合结束前，你对第一个命中的生物造成等同于你体质调整值的额外雷鸣伤害。

11级：终结之雷 Finishing Thunder

12级：风暴收集 Storm Gathering

16级：雷鸣闪烁 Lightning Flash

Benefit: 你的雷鸣威能造成雷鸣伤害时改为造成闪电和雷鸣伤害。

20级：风暴之龙狂暴 Storm Dragon Rage
Building Thunder Paragon Path.requirements: 野蛮人，「雷鸣之怒」职业特性

Lightning Fury Paragon Path.name: 雷霆之怒 Lightning Fury
Lightning Fury Paragon Path.description:
「在我的胸膛中，雷霆的心跳动著──伴随著如神般的力量。」

Prerequisite:

你最大的快乐是来自于你以狂暴的雷电所成就的事蹟。当你释放夺人眼目、破碎空气且燃烧大地的雷电将敌人撕裂时，从你嘴里发出的笑声有如雷霆。你的身影被电芒的薄雾所复盖；闪电激射而出，轰击胆敢威胁你的敌人。

当你击败敌人后，你血液深处的狂怒渐归平静，但它并不会永远沉寂。即使是在沉睡深处的梦境，你也可以感觉到，你心中深处的雷云正在等待、酝酿著下一次的爆发。

11级：闪电行动 Electric Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你对离你5格内的一个、二个或三个生物造成等同于你敏捷调整值的闪电伤害。

11级：无止狂雷 Unstoppable Lightning

Benefit: 你的闪电攻击将每个拥有闪电抗力的生物视为它没有闪电抗力。此外，你的闪电攻击将每个免疫闪电生物视为它拥有等同于它一半等级的闪电抗力。

11级：狂怒电矢 Furious Bolts

12级：血蕴雷电 Lightning in the Blood

16级：闪电力场 Lightning Field

Benefit: 当你以闪电威能命中后，直到你下一回合结束，所有进入邻近你的方格或对你进行近战攻击的敌人受到2d6 + 你敏捷调整值的闪电伤害。一个敌人每回合只能受到此伤害一次

20级：强力魔矢 Bolt of Power
Lightning Fury Paragon Path.requirements: 术士，「风暴魔法」职业特性

Voice of Thunder Paragon Path.name: 雷霆之音 Voice of Thunder
Voice of Thunder Paragon Path.description:
「雷音轰鸣，万物骇然。」

Prerequisite:

你的声音就是你的力量，你将古老的吟游诗人传统学以致用，使你的力量变得更强。暴风雨中的轰轰雷声，击倒建筑的大地震颤，破涛拍岸的节奏，火焰爆炸的巨响――你的声音是浑天然的力量之声，充满了爆发与震荡。

这条道路在很多种族和文化的吟游诗人传统中出现了变种。雅灵把自然之力与他们的魔法传统结合起来，像秋风的巴拉尼或夏日的图拉尼一样，你能成为一名雷电暴雨中的高贵雅灵。矮人和哥利亚斯的吟游诗人更多地偏向于岩石的震动。卓尔吟游诗人在他们的美妙乐音当中，倾泻暴怒疯狂的言语。提夫林运用他们充满力量的歌声酝酿爆炸之力。

这条道路的特性和威能增强你的雷鸣威能的射程和效能。你的雷音之歌激荡出层层回音一次次打击你的敌人，并且你的歌声还能给予你的同伴呼唤爆力之音的能力。

11级：雷霆之音 Voice of Thunder

Benefit: 你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在此动作中的任何近程爆发攻击的范围增加1，且任何近程冲击攻击的范围增加2。

11级：唤亡之音 Voice to Wake the Dead

Benefit: 以一个自由动作，你能给予一个离你10格内的濒死盟友在死亡豁免检定上获得+2威能加值。这个加值持续到该盟友不再濒死。

11级：绵延回响 Rolling Echo

12级：厄运回响 Doom Echo

16级：爆音之语 Booming Words

Benefit: 你在使用雷鸣威能时在伤害骰上获得+2加值。

20级：雷霆之歌 Song of Thunder

Scion of Leng Paragon Path.name: 冷城后裔 Scion of Leng
Scion of Leng Paragon Path.description:
「My ancestor's spirit says I am a monarch and should kill you for your insolence. Shall I do as the ghost demands? Shall I wear your bones as a crown and your blood as my raiment?」

Prerequisite:

When you trace the path of your ancestry, it inevitably leads to one place: the Labyrinth City of Leng. That mighty dominion of minotaur power destroyed itself centuries ago, becoming a tangled ruin haunted by demons, bestial minotaurs, and the mad spirits of those who slaughtered one another during the city's final convulsions.

All the evidence you've discovered leads to one inescapable truth: You are heir to the Iron Crown of Leng. Your ancestor was the last to sit upon the Blood Throne. You live today because someone of your clan fled the fall of that terrible city.

That thought alone would be a heavy burden to bear, but you hide another secret. One of your ancestors is with you—in spirit at least. You hear his gruff voice goading you to conquer and to let your enemies' blood fall to the ground. The ancestor also incessantly demands that you seek out the lost Iron Crown. Sometimes you see his furious eyes glaring from beneath his horned brow.

You think you have only one way to be rid of him: You must find the crown, work your way to the heart of the Labyrinth City, and enthrone yourself as Lord of Leng. But maybe no spirit exists. Maybe the ghost is a symptom of a madness you inherited from the rulers of the past. Perhaps, like the Labyrinth City, you are doomed to demented savagery, haunted by dreams of the past.

11级：先祖警告 Ancestor's Warning

Benefit: 你在先攻，洞察和侦查检定上获得+2加值。

11级：冷城疯狂 Madness of Leng

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，距离你2格以内的敌人以一个自由动作对它们的一个随机选择的盟友进行一次近战基本攻击。

11级：血之词赋 Blood Fugue

12级：沸腾之血 Enthroned in Blood

16级：残酷嗜血 Relentless Bloodlust

Benefit: 当一个邻近你的重伤敌人快步时，你能以一个即时反应快步进入该敌人离开的格子。

20级：失于冷城 Lost in the Labyrinth City

Dervish of Dawn Paragon Path.name: 黎明行者 Dervish of Dawn
Dervish of Dawn Paragon Path.description:
「In the turnings of the dance, the divine purpose is made clear.」

Prerequisite:

You are among a small number of avengers who seek enlightenment through the study of desert dervish traditions. In the tireless turns of the dervish dance, the cares and distractions of the mortal world fall away, allowing you to perceive divine truths.

There are a number of dervish traditions, and not all dervishes are avengers; most are priests and scholars of desert peoples. Dervishes of the dawn represent a tradition celebrating the mystic power of the sunrise and venerating gods of hope and enlightenment. As a dervish of dawn, you are an agent of hope, a wandering mystic given the sacred task of fighting oppression and despair and setting an example of piety wherever you travel.

11级：黎明迅捷 Celerity of Morning

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以同时做一次豁免检定，且在此检定上获得等同于你感知调整值的加值。

11级：光耀祝福 Radiant Blessing

Benefit: 当你使用带有光耀关键字的遭遇或每日威能时，你在所有防御上获得+2加值直到你下一回合结束。

11级：旋风突击 Whirling Assault

12级：野性希望 Wild Hope

16级：黎明狂喜 Dervish Ecstasy

Benefit: 如果你在遭遇中重伤，则在此遭遇中你可以使用第二个引导神力威能。

20级：日出之舞 Dance of Sunrise

Alchemist Savant Paragon Path.name: 炼金专家 Alchemist Savant
Alchemist Savant Paragon Path.description:
「万物之中皆有魔力，需要的只是花点功夫提取出来.」

Prerequisite:

草药，药剂，矿石，以及其他奇异的材料都是炼金师纵横科瓦雷的工具。在炼金实验室的奇异瓶瓶罐罐中，诞生了无数神奇的产品。
