You watch from the background, strike from the shadows, and disappear without a trace after you eliminate a threat. The Vigil remains; you keep it. Thanks to your dedication, a safer and brighter day will dawn soon.

When you've been through Hell, though, the world will know it.

11级：消失行动 Disappearing Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，在你的回合结束前你能以一个自由动作以你的速度快步并进行一次隐秘检定来进入隐藏，无视因为移动而在隐秘检定上的减值。

11级：暴乱兴起 Violent Emergence

Benefit: 每当你对一个被突袭的敌人或一个你对其隐藏的敌人进行一次攻击时，你的攻击在掷出19-20时即可造成重击。

11级：神出鬼没 Remain Elusive

12级：不屈不挠 Remain Unflinching

16级：谨慎之击 Attack with Care

Benefit: 当你在隐藏时且以一次攻击对所有目标失手，则你可以重掷此攻击并使用第二次结果。

20级：保持警惕 Remain Vigilant
Champion of the Vigil Paragon Path.requirements: 烟雾与低语之环（Circle of Smoke and Whispers）的成员

First Hunter Paragon Path.name: 首猎者 First Hunter
First Hunter Paragon Path.description:
「随你逃吧，你躲不掉的。」

Prerequisite:

The bond between hunter and prey is as old as life itself. This relationship is second nature to you—a way of life that helps you work with other hunters, combining all your skill to bring down even the deadliest quarry. By learning and applying the secrets of the first hunter, you have honed your warden powers for maximum efficiency with spears and other thrown weapons. Whether you fight from the front or strike from the side, your allies can rely on you.

If you finally become the prey, let your hunter beware. You walk with the spirits of ancestral hunters at your side, and foes that corner you will feel the bite of your weapon.

11级：首猎者行动 First Hunter Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行攻击时，你的一个盟友对此攻击的目标获得战斗优势，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：猎矛大师 Spear's Master

Benefit: 你可以将任何单手简易或军用武器作为投掷武器使用，射程为5/10。当你以这种方式投掷武器进行远程基本攻击时，此攻击会造成等于你体质调整值的额外伤害。另外，如果目标邻近你的一个盟友，则你在此攻击骰上获得+2加值。

11级：首猎者之矛 First Hunter's Spear

12级：标记猎物 Marked Prey

16级：猎人同行 Hunters Together

Benefit: 每轮你第一次命中一个敌人时，选择一个盟友。在你下一回合结束前，该盟友对该敌人进行的下一次远程攻击在伤害骰上获得等于你体质调整值的加值。

20级：首猎者形态 Form of the First Hunter

Mighty Judge Paragon Path.name: 首席审判官 Mighty Judge
Mighty Judge Paragon Path.description:
「You have been judged . . . and found wanting.」

Prerequisite:

You are compelled to seek out and destroy those unworthies who thwart—by intent or by accident—the will of your patron. Your deity has tasked you to hunt down these infidels and see them brought to justice, and you do so with implacable zeal. You remain vigilant for signs of enemies of your faith. When you find them, you follow the will of your deity to the letter, bringing these foes to their knees. You tolerate no deviations from your course, whether brought about by others or by what some would call extenuating circumstances. Your half-orc heritage provides you with physical strength to handle those who might oppose your efforts to judge others as well as with mental fortitude to follow through on the task at hand.

Your god has taught you that strength hidden is strength lost. When battle must be joined, you let your foes know that you stand in judgment of them, displaying your power unflinchingly. When you call them out, they know that their time is at hand. You will carry out the sentence that you levied against them, and when they fall, you know that your god smiles upon your efforts.

11级：狂怒审判 Furious Judgment

Benefit: 每当一个敌人主动移动远离你，你可以选择重获狂怒进攻 Furious Assault种族威能的使用，而不是从「逐拿天谴」上获得在伤害骰上的加值。

11级：归核行动 Refocusing Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次武器攻击，你可以在此攻击前将你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GLaB471ns0JZ6wCX]{圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity}的目标更换成一个此攻击的目标。

11级：强烈报应 Overpowering Retribution

12级：完善之击 Ameliorating Onslaught

16级：神之狱吏 Jailer of the Gods

Benefit: 每当你将一个你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GLaB471ns0JZ6wCX]{圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity}的目标的生命值降至0时，你可以将目标永久驱逐到你侍奉神明所选领域内的监狱内，而不是杀死或击晕它

16级：残酷进军 Relentless Advance

Benefit: 当你冲锋你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GLaB471ns0JZ6wCX]{圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity}的目标时，你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.6blGJIYk8HWrw1PQ]{逐拿誓约 Bond of Pursuit}，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Z9mHDu27NEabzdx6]{报应誓约 Bond of Retribution}或@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Yrw9ny8FZp1sklIh]{引领打击 Leading Strike}来替代近战基本攻击。

20级：流放判决 Sentence of Banishment
Mighty Judge Paragon Path.requirements: 半兽人，神罚使，「逐拿天谴」职业特性，[[圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity]]职业特性

Huntmaster Paragon Path.name: 狩猎大师 Huntmaster
Huntmaster Paragon Path.description:
「看——树叶上有血。我们伤到了那条龙。它在就在附近消失了：现在我们去了结它。」

Prerequisite:

You are a renowned beast-slayer, honored for your skill at tracking down and killing ferocious monsters. No one is a better tracker than you are, and your finely honed senses make it difficult for your enemies to surprise you.

The spear is your weapon of choice, because it's suited to the hunter's work. Archery has its place, but too often you face your foe in dense thickets or cramped lairs, where the bow is a poor choice. If you find a few yards of clear terrain for a clean toss, you can throw the spear with deadly effect. If not, it's a simple, quick, and handy weapon that can deal lethal blows from just outside the range of claw or fang.

Although you're good at killing, you have no taste for wanton slaughter—for you, the greatest challenge lies in pitting your skill and strength against wicked or bloodthirsty beasts, creatures that lesser hunters fear to seek out. Dire boars and cave bears are more to your taste than common woodland creatures, and fantastic beasts such as griffons and wyverns offer an even more stirring challenge.

11级：狩猎大师行动 Huntmaster's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你的攻击对你的标的造成等同于一半你等级的额外伤害，直到你的回合结束。

11级：英勇猎手 Intrepid Hunter

Benefit: 当你指定你的标的时，你能标记该生物直到它不再是你的标的。你在对被你标记的「猎手标的」目标的攻击骰上获得+2加值，并且你在注意到或追踪它的侦查检定上获得+5加值。

11级：绯红之矛打击 Crimson Spear Strike

12级：抵冲之矛 Brace for the Charge

16级：警惕猎手 Wary Hunter

Benefit: 你不会被突袭。

20级：刺穿之矛 Transfixing Spear
Huntmaster Paragon Path.requirements: 游侠，[[狩猎之矛学徒|狩猎之矛学徒 <流派初成> Hunting Spear Student <Lesser Style>]]专长

Pack Runner Paragon Path.name: 狩猎者 Pack Runner
Pack Runner Paragon Path.description:
「To run with the pack is to be one with the pack.」

Prerequisite:

Humanoids have taken clever beasts as companions since the beginning of time. The most prevalent among such animals are those from the canine family. Like humanoids, canines have a cooperative mentality and an established social order. It's not surprising that nearly every humanoid race that has the option to do so—from humans to goblins, eladrin to gnolls—keeps hounds or doglike beasts as pets.

Myth holds that, just as humanoids have adopted canines, so too have canines adopted humanoids. One such story is the tale of Kurngarl, or Kurn the Hunter. Soon enough after the fall of the tiefling empire that the hatred of that race was still widespread, unnamed human parents bore a tiefling child. The parents left the babe in an enchanted wood to die of exposure. By some twist of destiny—or, certain versions say, by Melora's fickle mercies—wolves found the infant instead. Yunulf, “the Lady of the Wolves,” added the human child to her litter, naming him Horned Man.

Kurngarl developed uncanny skills with nature while living with his wolf family, learning from a variety of other animals as well. Eventually, a dwarf explorer named Fargrim found Kurngarl and took the tiefling child to the ancient dwarven hold of Durigirn. The young tiefling then became a citizen of the dwarven hold and roamed the wilderness surrounding it. Even so, he acknowledged no dwarven name in place of the one his wolf mother had given him. That he translated literally into Dwarven, accepting only the nickname Kurn as an alternative.

Kurngarl had many adventures, almost all with his wolf brother Grabor by his side. Kurn and Grabor were renowned as hunters and trackers among the dwarves of Durigirn. They are also mentioned in the legends of other races, enjoying a heroic reputation for battling monsters, especially gnolls and giants. Kurn the Hunter is reputed to have turned the animals of the wilderness against unjust people in civilized areas. As such, he is held as an example by Melora's followers.

Despite differences in your life's history, like Kurn, you have a preternatural connection with a canine beast. You and your companion function as a deadly unit among the larger pack made up of your other allies. For its part, your companion has taken cues from you, developing a level of competence and guile rivaling that of some humanoids. You have taken the wildness of the wolf into your spirit. Those who observe the two of you together find it hard to tell where the line between humanoid and beast is drawn.

11级：狩猎行动 Runner's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在额外动作之前或之后你可以以一个自由动作快步你一半速度的格子。

11级：追捕 Pack Chase

Benefit: 如果你和你的野兽伙伴在你的回合内移动了至少2格，则你们在攻击骰上都获得+1加值直到你下回合开始。

11级：夹击协作 Pack Runner Assault

12级：狼皮之力 Wolfskin

16级：犬之狡猾 Canine's Cunning

Benefit: 如果你距离你的野兽伙伴5格内，则你可以以一个次要动作命令它快步1格。当你如此做时，你也可以快步1格

20级：扑咬突袭 Neck-Bite Pounce
Pack Runner Paragon Path.requirements: 游侠，「兽王」职业特性，野兽伙伴（狼）

Pack Lord Paragon Path.name: 兽群之主 Pack Lord
Pack Lord Paragon Path.description:
「我和同伴们只是更大兽群中的一小部分，我们经常一起狩猎。」

Prerequisite:

With each evocation you cast, you hear the distant growls and cries of your pack. They wait for your magic to call them forth into battle, and they are eager to fight. You strengthen them with your magic, and you draw power from them. You are at your mightiest when you stand at the head of your summoned pack.

When you summon the beasts of your pack, your evocations echo through them. Their wounds knit shut, and they leap to attack with a ferocity augmented by your primal magic. In turn, you draw on their feral strength to endure your enemy's attacks and to strengthen your own.

11级：自然兽群成员 Natural Pack Member

Benefit: 当至少一个你的召唤生物在场时，你在攻击骰和所有防御上获得+1加值。

11级：兽群本能 Pack Intensity

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能以一个自由动作向一个你的召唤生物发出一个次要动作命令。如果你不在此回合给予那生物其他命令，此生物在你的回合结束时使用其本能效果。

11级：第一命令 Alpha's Command

12级：充沛兽群 Full Pack

16级：自然活力 Natural Vitality

Benefit: 通过你的德鲁伊威能召唤的生物在重伤时获得等同于你感知调整值的再生。

20级：伟大召唤 Great Summoning

Benefit: 你获得一个19级德鲁伊召唤威能。

Beastblooded Minotaur Paragon Path.name: 兽血之浴 Beastblooded Minotaur
Beastblooded Minotaur Paragon Path.description:
「Beast? Me? You haven't seen anything yet!」

Prerequisite:

The fury of Baphomet is at the root of your people's creation. His demonic rage is still connected to you and yours, giving strength. In your line of work, the allure of increased might is a temptation too great to resist. You learned to tap hatred and wrath to lay your enemies low. Fury is your friend when steel rings, and the cries of the wounded and dying fill the air. The grim majesty of combat quickens your minotaur soul. What began as your hesitant step in the direction of savagery has become a full run toward your inner beast. You refuse to pay homage to Baphomet, but you don't turn away from his gifts. Why should you, when you can use the demon lord's own weapons against him? Still, the desire to kill sometimes threatens to overwhelm you. Your body ripples with power, and you become more beastly as time passes. Should you question the wisdom of your decision?

11级：兽性行动 Beastly Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作后，你可以立即以一个自由动作冲锋。

11级：重伤爆发 Bloodied Outburst

Benefit: 每当你在一场遭遇中第一次重伤时，你能以一个自由动作对一个邻近的敌人进行一次近战基本攻击。

11级：横扫角撞 Sweeping Gore

12级：痛击之角 Thrashing Horns

16级：野蛮神化 Savage Apotheosis

Benefit: 你的速度增加2，并且你的触及范围增加1

20级：巨人横扫 Giant's Sweep

Twinclaw Slayer Paragon Path.name: 双爪杀手 Twinclaw Slayer
Twinclaw Slayer Paragon Path.description:
「站起来跟我单挑！狗崽子。」

Prerequisite:

你的勇敢每个人都看得到。你右手一把武器，左手拿了另一把。你保持自己在战斗状态。当你面对茫茫多的敌人时，你破口大骂。手持双武，旋风般挥舞着手臂，就像猛兽的双爪一样。原始精魂在你的杀戮之路上不断成长你与巨大的狼獾、镰爪巨兽、上古的部落英雄或凶残的战士的原始精魂结下契约，精魂指引你的道路，最终你将掌握双爪之怒狂暴。

11级：贴身毁灭 Close Destruction

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点做一次攻击时，你在此攻击的攻击骰上获得等同于邻近你的敌人数量的加值。

11级：战斗之雾 Threshing Mist

Benefit: 当任何你的攻击对同一个目标造成你的主手武器伤害和副手武器伤害时，你能以一个自由动作快步1格到邻近此目标的格子。

11级：双爪撕裂 Twinclaw Rend

12级：危险模糊 Dangerous Blur

16级：血之代价 Bloody Price

Benefit: 当你持用两把近战武器时，每轮一次你可以重掷一次失手的借机攻击，且使用任意一个结果。

20级：双爪之怒狂暴 Twinclaw Berserker Rage
Twinclaw Slayer Paragon Path.requirements: 野蛮人，「旋刃杀手」职业特性

Rimetongue Caller Paragon Path.name: 霜语呼唤者 Rimetongue Caller
Rimetongue Caller Paragon Path.description:
「接受冰寒之心，来挥舞这般力量。」

Prerequisite:

召唤生物通常是可以被增强的。其他一些奥术典范之道，诸如誓约召唤者，通过在召唤威能中灌输魔法能量，来创造一个更完美的奥法大军，而你的道路却是寻求对寒冰元素的掌握。透过充满力量的荒神语，你学会了用原始寒冰精华来增强每个召唤的仆从。

寒冰力量的汇集并不只幽闭了你的召唤生物，这同时把你的本质转化得更加元素化。你接受了抵抗原始寒冰的天生能力。你的皮肤，与你召唤生物的物质世界所展现的一样，呈现出冰蓝色的面容，而你的头上长满了一股股浓密的的雪白发束。甚至你用奥术燃烧的火焰，也成了蓝色的冰焰。

11级：冬之拥抱 Winter's Embrace

Benefit: 你和你的召唤生物获得寒冰抗力3；任何已存在的寒冰抗力增加3点。此寒冰抗力与其他由威能或效果提供的寒冰抗力累加。21级时，此抗力增加到5点（或增加5点）。

11级：暴风雪行动 Blizzard's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，每个邻近你的敌人受到5点寒冰伤害，同时迟缓直到你的下一回合结束。21级时，此寒冰伤害增加到10点。

11级：冬之壁障 Wall of Winter

12级：冰之呼唤 Icy Calling

16级：霜冻召唤 Frostbite Summoning

Benefit: 你召唤的生物获得「霜冻」灵气，描述如下：

霜冻（寒冰）灵气1；每个在此灵气内结束其回合的生物受到10点寒冰伤害。

20级：召唤霜焰巨人 Summon Rimefire Brute

Crystalmind Paragon Path.name: 水晶之念 Crystalmind
Crystalmind Paragon Path.description:
「You are one small part of an entity whose pieces are distributed across all the planes of existence. It's time to take advantage of that essential once-upon-a-time unity.」

Prerequisite:

Your body is an arrangement of inert matter infested with your consciousness. But the spark of your soul is just one part of a much vaster being. Yes, that entity is destroyed and its mind is splintered . . . but if you focus on the shards that make up your form, you can begin to hear the susurrus of a thousand, or perhaps even a thousand thousand other shardmind consciousnesses somewhere “out there.”

With a little more concentration, you can tap into this fantastic network of your fellows and use it to hypercharge your own cognition. You can gain a limited ability to predict the immediate future. You can channel the output of all those minds to enhance your attacks. Sometimes you have the ability to borrow the abilities from other shardminds.

When you manage a particularly clear connection, at times you can predict the future so well that you exploit a foe's momentary weakness.

All this extra mind power comes at a price; you can get caught up experiencing shadow glimpses from the lives of countless other shardminds. But occasional fugue states do not concern you; they are the price you must pay as you tap the detritus of a mind that might have once equaled a god's cognition.

11级：心灵网络 Psychic Network

Benefit: 选择两个技能：神秘，地城，历史，自然或宗教。你在这些技能上受训

11级：晶群反射 Shard Swarm Reflex

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你能以一个自由动作使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.admYIuBThQZ8pPMD]{魔晶集群 Shard Swarm}威能，即使你在此遭遇中已经消耗掉它了。

11级：视之将至 Saw It Coming

12级：水晶半身 Crystal Duplicate

16级：心灵通道 Psychic Channel

Benefit: 当你使用一个你的未强化的1级随意攻击威能时，你可以选择让此威能造成心灵伤害，而不是其原本的伤害类型。

20级：完美知识 Perfect Knowledge

Mercurial Assassin Paragon Path.name: 水银刺客 Mercurial Assassin
Mercurial Assassin Paragon Path.description:
「I can be in many places at once, or right behind you, pretendingto be your best friend.」

Prerequisite:

The House of Methys has always had a strong connection to quicksilver. As the story goes, the family fortune was forged from a source of mercury discovered in one of their iron mines, with the wizards and alchemists of the realm paying handsomely for the rare liquid metal. At some point, though, rumors spread that by digging for more mercury, the House of Methys awoke something powerful in the deeps. Then, the rumors abruptly stopped, possibly because anyone heard prying into the details about the noble house died soon after.

What most folk don't know is that a clan of twelve mercury dragons served as the source of the Methys fortune. The merchant house drained them of some of their blood, which can be transformed through ritual magic to pure mercury, and then sold the metal to the highest bidder. At first, these mercury dragons were amused that humans would pay so handsomely for their blood, and their hoards grew at the cost of a minute or two of pain. But when they learned that Methys agents had stolen a clutch of a mercury dragon's eggs to harvest for the precious liquid metal, they realized the scope of the Methys family's hunger for power. These twelve mercury dragons, maddened with grief, turned on their business partners and slaughtered the leaders, then used their polymorph ability to assume their identities. Now the Methys dragons have made it their mission to reacquire all of the mercury that came from the dragon eggs by tracking down the sales of the blood using the spotty records the Methys agents kept, plus ensure that knowledge of the ritual used to transform their blood is erased from the world. They have vowed to never again allow another agency to profit from their own blood.

To help them in this endeavor, they turned to group of dragonborn agents, gathered one by one. Soon after the original members of House Methys were dispatched, the twelve dragons discovered that by infusing their blood into that of a dragonborn, through a painful ritual colloquially called the Infusion, the dragonborn gained some abilities that benefited them in their pursuit of their masters' goal. The mercurial assassins, as these dragonborn are known, are then sent out to hunt down every drop of mercury created from the foul ritual and bring it back to House Methys. They are also charged with tracking down any copies of the ritual that might exist. Assassinating those individuals who have some portion of the mercury isn't a primary objective, but it isn't exactly frowned upon either. The mercurial assassin is rewarded no matter the circumstances.

11级：水银灵巧 Mercurial Agility

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你可以同时进行一个移动动作。

11级：水银之行 Quicksilver Movement

Benefit: 你在速度上获得+1加值，且在隐秘检定上获得+3加值

11级：流体反击 Fluid Counterattack

12级：水银伪装 Mercurial Disguise

16级：流体形态 Fluid Shape

Benefit: 当一个敌人对你进行一次借机攻击时，此敌人必须掷骰两次并使用更低的那个结果。

20级：水星奔走 Streaking Mercury
Mercurial Assassin Paragon Path.requirements: 龙裔，在唬骗或隐秘上受训

Quicksilver Demon Paragon Path.name: 水银恶魔 Quicksilver Demon
Quicksilver Demon Paragon Path.description:
「Catch me if you dare!」

Prerequisite:

Your mind rejects all notions of what is possible and impossible on the battlefield. Psionic energy flows through you, imbuing you with an irrepressible need to move. You flow around your enemies, blurring past them before they can land a blow. As you move, your attacks slip through your enemies' defenses with deadly effect. You goad a foe into following you, then wrack its mind and body as it gives futile chase.

You are quicksilver in living form, moving with such speed and grace that your enemies have no hope of pinning you down. Whether you fight alone or in the company of others who also race through the heat of battle, your enemies name you the quicksilver demon, never knowing where you will strike next.

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Point

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：快银行动 Quicksilver Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你可以在此额外动作之前或之后快步等同于你魅力调整值的格子。

11级：水银之舞 Quicksilver Dance

Benefit: 你在对抗借机攻击的所有防御上获得+4加值。另外，每当一个敌人以借机攻击对你失手时，你对此敌人获得战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

11级：反弹之舞 Rebounding Dance

12级：吸收动量 Absorb Momentum

16级：无拘移动 Unfettered Movement

Benefit: 你能以一个移动动作快步3格。当你这样做时，你不再迟缓。

20级：水银跨步形态 Aspect of Quicksilver Strides

Luminescent Swarm Paragon Path.name: 烁光集群 Luminescent Swarm
Luminescent Swarm Paragon Path.description:
「昆虫们无声交流。看看我虫群的舞姿，你会理解的。」

Prerequisite:

When you take on the form of an insect swarm, the insects glow with supernatural light. The stories of your ancestors tell of luminescent insects in primeval times, insects that led your ancestors through swamps and forests to safety. These creatures had no kindness for the enemies of your tribe and used their hypnotic lights to lead enemies astray, drowning them in deep bogs and abandoning them in animal dens. You, too, are a protector and an ally when you take on the shape of the luminescent swarm.

You can harness primal lights to bewilder and blind your enemies. Your attacks deal psychic damage and deliver effects that make it more difficult for your enemies to attack.

11级：烁光提灯 Luminescent Lantern

Benefit: 当你处于野兽形态时，你具有灵气5。此灵气内是明亮光照，且灵气内的盟友在豁免检定上获得+2加值。

11级：耀虫行动 Radiant Swarm Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，此回合你的野兽形态攻击造成等同于一半你等级的额外光耀伤害。

11级：神秘之光 Mystifying Lights

12级：明晰之光 Light of Clarity

16级：炽烈之光 Blaze of Light

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uIPQz3SRDEs59goh]{野性变身 Wild Shape}从野兽形态变为类人形态时，选择一个邻近的生物（在使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.uIPQz3SRDEs59goh]{野性变身 Wild Shape}一部分的快步之前或之后）。此生物在对你的攻击骰上受到-2减值直到你下一回合结束。

20级：辉煌集群 Brilliant Swarm
Luminescent Swarm Paragon Path.requirements: 德鲁伊，「原力集群」职业特性

Storvakal Paragon Path.name: 斯托沃卡 Storvakal
Storvakal Paragon Path.description:
「My inner harmony puts the outer world at my service.」

Prerequisite:

Githzerai strive for inner harmony, a blending of physical capacities, knowledge, and strength of the soul. They use a variety of methods to acquire this enlightenment. Among these is a cycle of quieting the mind and then returning to physical activity.

A major aspect of the process is meditation. When the mind is allowed to naturally become still in meditation, it transcends normal mental boundaries and leaves the ego behind for blissful silence. Githzerai refer to tapping this transcendent silence as “knowing oneself.” To them, this is like allowing a field to remain fallow for a season, allowing it to retain and build up the nutrients it would otherwise give away.

Returning to physical responsibilities and focused training plants seeds in the healthier soil. The body grows more in tune with the mind and the soul. Because it is nurtured in all aspects, the whole organism grows stronger.

Work and rest in such cycles bears fruit for the devotee in greater skill, greater peace of mind, and greater accord with the outer world. It is this connection of inner self and outer world that storvakals attempt to master. The storvakal has reached a milestone of personal development such that he or she can command nearby forces and expect a positive response. The storvakal's personal being also responds to adversity more like water flowing around a hammer than a stone struck by the same instrument. Githzerai refer to this state of being as “support of nature,” which garners any githzerai who has it great respect.

From now on, the world around you will reorder itself to your needs in ways small and great. Minor fortunate events that seem like luck to others will prove your inner and outer accord. The limit to this support of nature is yours to determine with your dedication and deeds. As it grows, so shall your ability to accomplish anything toward which you bend your will.

11级：重整心态 Rebalanced Mind

Benefit: 将你在攻击骰，技能检定或属性检定上总共受到的减值减少2点。

11级：复原行动 Restoring Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你可以对你身上每个可以豁免终止的效果做一次豁免检定。

11级：概率之旅 Probability Travel

12级：报复之风 Wind of Reprisal

16级：心之门扉 Mind Bar

Benefit: 你在对抗魅惑，恐惧和心灵伤害的所有防御上获得+2加值。

20级：斥责丝缕 Excoriating Strands

Death Dealer Paragon Path.name: 死亡代理人 Death Dealer
Death Dealer Paragon Path.description:
「杀戮是我的游戏。」

Prerequisite:

Some people are born killers. That penchant can be channeled in as many ways as there are reasons for slaughter. Some slay for religion or creed, others for power or influence, and still others for money, vengeance, glory, or just plain relief. Many who have a knack for murder take up violent professions, from soldier or town guard to gladiator or assassin. A few, whatever their reasons, make a career out of slaying monsters.

Killing is grim business, no matter who or what ends up dead. Nobody takes going to the grave lightly. Hands-off methods, such as poison, can sometimes work, as can stealthy techniques. Otherwise, direct and bloody conflict is the only way to go about butchery.

Strangely, a lot of would-be killers think that combat has rules. You know differently: In battle, fair play, honor, and mercy are for chumps. Fighting is all about dancing with death and being one of those still standing when the music ends. Maybe you came by your “philosophy” while being schooled as an assassin or hired sword. Of course, an adventurer's life has plenty of object lessons along the same lines: Kill or be killed.

When you start a fight, you take a little time to size up the competition. After that, it's all bloody business. If someone has the nerve to attack you, you make that fool pay in such a way that anyone watching will think twice about facing you. Nobody escapes you unless they have the ability to take you out of the fight, or you want the story of your prowess to get around.

However you gained your skills, they are honed in accordance with your brutal creed. Those who go up against you risk everything. As proven by the boost you sometimes get from brutalizing our adversaries, you take at least a little pleasure in your work.

11级：即刻行刑 No Respite

Benefit: 邻近你的敌人在豁免骰上受到-2减值。

11级：猎杀行动 Slaying Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你在每个伤害骰子上获得+2加值直到你下一回合开始。

11级：观察打击 Sizing Strike

12级：阴森诛杀 Gruesome Kill

16级：不公优势 Unfair Advantage

Benefit: 当你以近战攻击命中一个重伤的敌人时，你获得等同于你力量调整值或魅力调整值（由你选择）的临时生命值。

20级：死亡代理人突击 Death Dealer Assault

Death Arrow Paragon Path.name: 死亡利箭 Death Arrow
Death Arrow Paragon Path.description:
「我的死亡黑箭是对于你侵犯的最好回答。」

Prerequisite:

The spirits demand recompense for crimes committed against the natural world, and they accept payment only in blood. You are their collector. You range the land to exact the price your enemies must pay for violating the world. You are a relentless hunter, ruthless in your mien and efficient in your methods.

The spirits aid you in your efforts by imparting to you the ancient hunting methods of your people. Though your ancestors used these techniques to bring down game, you find them equally effective in eliminating your foes. Each time an enemy falls, you reaffirm your bond to your spirit guides, offering the fallen enemy as a sacrifice to slake their thirst until you next come upon a deserving foe.

As a crimson hunter, you focus on the striker elements found in many seeker evocations. The smell of blood provokes you, letting you move more quickly to engage your enemies. These techniques allow you to close the distance to bring an enemy in range or to skirt the battlefield for your next strike.

11级：扰乱之箭 Rattling Arrows

Benefit: 当你以远程攻击命中一个敌人且对该敌人处于隐藏时，所有邻近该目标的敌人在攻击骰上受到-2减值直到你下一回合结束。对恐惧免疫的敌人不会受到此减值。

11级：残忍之箭 Brutal Arrows

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次远程或区域攻击时，你能重掷此攻击中任何结果为1或2的伤害骰。你一直重掷它们，直到结果高于2点。

11级：野蛮之箭 Savage Archery

12级：追踪箭 Binding Aim

16级：死亡之箭 Death Arrows

Benefit: 当你命中受到你「扰乱之箭」影响的敌人时，你掷出18-20即可造成重击。

20级：厄运之云 Cloud of Doom
Death Arrow Paragon Path.requirements: 巡者，「鲜血束约」职业特性

Death's Thane Paragon Path.name: 死亡酋长 Death's Thane
Death's Thane Paragon Path.description:
「在我来之前逃跑吧，小子！我的战斗哀嚎将会带与你死亡。」

Prerequisite:

在你年轻时，你学些季节的更迭时间的变换。最后，万物消亡，你信奉那死亡的真理，你发现你对它已无畏惧。死亡就像雨打面庞、风扶散发般平凡，为什么要像惊恐的兔子般远离它们呢？

作为一个野蛮人，死亡已是你战场上的盟友，你对军事有着深入的理解，对原力魔法掌握手中。

通过你的战斗哀嚎，你可以在战场上驾驭你的敌人，如休闲像镰刀割麦一样收割掉他们。

11级：死亡右手 Death's Right Hand

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作，且同一回合内你将一个敌人的生命值降至0时，你在攻击骰上获得+2加值，在伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：死亡吼叫 Death Shout

Benefit: 每个你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.fMGh2YrCdquExJBg]{战争哀嚎 War Cry}威能推离的目标受到等同于你体质调整值的暗蚀伤害。

11级：死亡哀嚎 Death Cry

12级：杀戮场 Killing Ground

16级：死亡的必然 Inevitability of Death

Benefit: 你在你的回合开始时做死亡豁免，而不是在回合结束。当你的死亡豁免失败时，离你3格内的每个敌人受到5点暗蚀伤害。

20级：收割者狂暴 Reaper's Rage
Death's Thane Paragon Path.requirements: 野蛮人，「雷鸣之怒」职业特性

Dread Reaper Paragon Path.name: 死亡收割者 Dread Reaper
Dread Reaper Paragon Path.description:
「朋友，万物皆会凋零，我的工作就是确保你也一样」

Prerequisite:

Countless fighting styles issue from dedicated masters—unimpeachable figures who devote their lives to perfecting combat maneuvers that are carried onto the battlefield by their disciples. But not all techniques evolve from the teachings of these paragons of the warrior's art. Some methods come from origins far less noble. The path of the dread reaper is one such shadowy road.

According to legend, the first dread reaper was Gulkanon, a human paladin of the Raven Queen, stripped of his station and power for offending his god. Even without the connection to the deity he had long revered, Gulkanon was unwilling to surrender his place as her champion. He turned to a new avenue of military study, building upon the techniques of savage and fell races in the world—orcs, goblins, ogres, and trolls. He took the crude strokes of these brutish creatures and refined them, developing a range of exploits that focused his strength into a vehicle of appalling carnage. As he grew more confident in his newfound skills, he took the title “dread reaper.” He set out to send souls to his estranged patron in hopes of rekindling the bond that had been broken. Whether he succeeded is lost to time, but his legacy remains.

Some dread reapers serve the Raven Queen, and small cults of such warriors can be found who are willing to train promising candidates. Others who have this training, however, lack the will or discipline to find true favor with the god. A few stretch her tenets to accommodate their own excesses. The Raven Queen's vigilant servants have been known to hunt and slay the worst of those offenders.

Whether you had an affinity for death-dealing or found inspiration in the actions of another, you turned to the techniques of the dread reaper. The training offers you a special array of fighting maneuvers that emphasize your already impressive proficiency with two-handed weapons. Your training transformed you from a competent warrior to a terrifying force of destruction. Rather than minding your defenses, you favor wreaking havoc in combat. Enemies can't help but notice your destructive potential and ignore you at their peril. You can perform astonishing attacks, sweeping through your foes and laying them open with your steel.

11级：收割行动 Reaper's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点以双手武器进行攻击时，每个与你邻近的敌人受到等同于你体质调整值的伤害。

11级：死到临头 Impending Slaughter

Benefit: 如果你的借机攻击重伤一个被你标记的敌人，你可将其击倒。

11级：收割突刺 Reaping Lunge

12级：收割警告 Reaper's Warning

16级：收割斩 Reaping Cleave

Benefit: 当你以双手武器进行近战基本攻击命中时，一个邻近于你的敌人受到等同于你力量调整值的伤害。如果你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.9WG68H1asqjXJiIm]{顺势斩 Cleave}威能命中，则所有和你邻近的敌人都受到等同于你力量调整值的伤害。

20级：血之盛宴 Blood Harvest

Four Winds Master Paragon Path.name: 四风大师 Four Winds Master
Four Winds Master Paragon Path.description:
「我如风一般有力，如季节一般恒常。」

Prerequisite:

Devotees of the four winds strive for peace and tranquility in all that they do. They recognize, however, that violence is sometimes necessary to achieve greater harmony. Just as destructive winds can carry away anything that stands against them, a monk of the four winds is an overwhelming force.

11级：阵风行动 Gusting Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次攻击且此攻击命中时，你能在此攻击结算后以你的速度快步

11级：四风秘辛 Mystery of the Four Winds

Benefit: 每次长休息后，选择下列一种秘辛。此秘辛的增益持续到你选择另一个秘辛。

东风之秘：你获得等同于一半你等级的闪电抗力。另外，每当你快步时，你能在此快步之前或之后移动2格。

北风之秘：你获得等同于一半你等级的寒冰抗力，并在对抗魅惑效果和恐惧效果的豁免检定上获得+5加值。

南风之秘：你获得等同于一半你等级的力场抗力，并在先攻检定上获得+4加值。

西风之秘：你获得等同于一半你等级的雷鸣抗力。另外，每当你花费一个回复力，你能以一个自由动作快步2格

11级：四风袭 Four Winds Assault

12级：四风息 Breath of the Four WInds

16级：揭露秘辛 Mysteries Revealed

Benefit: 每次长休息或短休息后，你能选择两种秘辛并同时获得其增益。这些秘辛的增益持续到你选择另外两种秘辛。

另外，每当你快步时，你能改为飞行同样的距离。如果你在此移动结束时没有着陆，则你坠落

20级：四风疾 Four Winds Tempest

Seasons' Herald Paragon Path.name: 四时预兆 Seasons' Herald
Seasons' Herald Paragon Path.description:
「凡人世界的军队不断前进和征服，但随着时间的推移，它们都倒下了。四季永不停息。」

Prerequisite:

Night follows day, winter follows summer, and death follows life. These are the basic truths of the primal world. For those who understand this fact and watch closely, Great Watcher provides inspiration and guidance, revealing omens of what is to come. Shamans who have the gifts of insight and prophecy often become great political or military leaders by using these talents wisely.

As a seasons' herald, you embrace the future, whether it's promising or dreadful. You don't shy away from ill omens. Accepting what lies ahead and having the determination to prepare for it form the bedrock of your beliefs.

You follow the path of adventure out of a sense of duty to your people and to the natural world. Looking into the future to prepare for the present, you seek out evil before it develops into a larger threat. As a wandering prophet or a simple helper, you travel to those places where you are most needed to maintain the natural order, whether doing so requires stopping war, ending a drought, or preventing unnatural creatures from entering the world through a planar breach.

11级：四时预兆行动 Seasons' Herald Action

Benefit: 你能花费一个行动点让离你5格内的一个盟友进行一个标准动作，而不是你自己进行额外动作。

11级：观测先兆 Watch the Omens

Benefit: 你和离你5格内的每个盟友在先攻检定上获得+2加值。

11级：生命平衡 Balance of Life

12级：预测先兆 Read the Omens

16级：四季轮转 Turn of Seasons

Benefit: 当离你5格内的一个盟友生命值被一个敌人降至0或更低时，离你5格内由你选择的另一个盟友恢复等同于5 + 你感知调整值的生命值。

20级：必然之冬 Inevitable Winter
Seasons' Herald Paragon Path.requirements: 萨满，[[呼唤精魂伙伴 Call Spirit Companion]]威能

Karmic Shaper Paragon Path.name: 塑业者 Karmic Shaper
Karmic Shaper Paragon Path.description:
「现世如网，善行编织闪耀，恶行编织污点，两者都随着线性的时间向后或向前，果或早或晚会找到你。“众生不受问责，业力不受修改。”」

Prerequisite:

“因”与“果”是所有生物都必须面对的规律，无论是否承认其存在。每个个体的行为都会影响过去、现在和未来。你并不认为这种观点是虚无的信仰——它显然是正确的。

个体的每一个动作都像种下一颗种子。根据其行为的性质，收获的果实可能带来快乐或痛苦。你寻求增加自己在世界上种下的好“果”，并且确保你的敌人因他们的罪行而遭受同等的苦“果”。

你是业力的阐释者。凭借着你先见的能力，你可以及时的，有时甚至是戏剧性的，收集敌人的业。但你仅仅只是轻微的触及因果业力的表层。你塑造他人的因果，并尝试着不影响自己的命运。

11级：因果行动 Fated Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你可以重骰你在本回合所做的任何单个d20掷骰。

11级：消业美德 Karmic Virtue

Benefit: 当你使用「先见之德」特性来增加盟友的防御，且敌人的攻击仍然命中时，该盟友能以一个自由动作来花费一次回复力。

11级：业障 Karmic Wound

12级：扭曲业力 Warp Karma

16级：业报打击 Karmic Strike

Benefit: 当你使用「先见之德」时，离你10格内的一名盟友能以一个自由动作对触发的敌人进行一次远程或近战基本攻击。

20级：运数终结 End of Luck
Karmic Shaper Paragon Path.requirements: 诗人，「先见之德」职业特性

Shadow Shaper Paragon Path.name: 塑影者 Shadow Shaper
Shadow Shaper Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

Illusions trick the mind to evoke physical results. You have found that the interplay of shadow and illusion makes spectral images into true threats. You delight in tricking both the minds and bodies of your foes, constantly blurring the line between what is illusion and what is real.

11级：心体合一 Mind and Body

When you first begin to master shadow shaping, you learn to create illusions that have a visceral and physical effect on your foes.

Benefit: 任何你使用的对抗意志的幻术攻击威能可以改为对抗强韧

11级：噩梦成真 Nightmares Made Real

By exerting the full force of your illusion and shadow powers, you can bring a single illusion completely to life, dealing a deadly assault to your foe's psyche and body.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来对单一目标使用一个1级随意幻术攻击威能时，若此攻击命中，则此攻击造成最大值的伤害

11级：暗夜恐惧 Night Terror

Wizards can cast spells that prey on a target's fear. No one brings that fear fully to life better than you do.

12级：无尽梦魇 Never-Ending Nightmare

By infusing your illusions with shadowstuff, you can extend their duration—and their deadly effect on your foes.

16级：幻影支配 Spectral Dominance

Your psychic presence is singularly powerful. Each assault you make against a creature's mind with your shadow illusions leaves that creature at your mercy.

Benefit: 当一个敌人受到任何你的幻术攻击的效果影响时，你对该敌人获得战斗优势

20级：夜景术 Nightscape

Your mastery of shadow and illusion lets you draw forth the foulest nightmares from the minds of your foes. As you turn the battlefield into a horrid dreamscape, your enemies must overcome their own worst fears to survive.
Shadow Shaper Paragon Path.requirements: 法师，一个或多个幻术威能

Thuranni Shadow Killer Paragon Path.name: 索兰尼影杀者 Thuranni Shadow Killer
Thuranni Shadow Killer Paragon Path.description:
「我的武器发出的唯一声音是身体撞击地板的声音。」

Prerequisite:

你是索兰尼家族不得不招揽的最致命的暗杀者之一。你是费奥兰家族和任何有敌人向你买他性命之人的灾星。你杀人毫无声息，并擅长与渗透进敌人的要塞。你无情而高效地抹除目标，然后毫发无损地返回家族地界。索兰尼影杀者小心地确保着他们的行动不被科瓦雷的绝大多数居民所察觉。

11级：影消行动 Shadow-fade Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你隐形直到你下一回合结束

11级：索兰尼寂静 Thuranni Silence

Benefit: 任何离你3格内的未在隐秘上受训的盟友在隐秘检定上获得+3加值

11级：渐消之影 Descending Shadows

12级：暗影脚步 Shadowstep

16级：阴影伤痕 Shadow Wound

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你命中一个给你提供战斗优势的敌人时，此攻击同时造成5点持续暗蚀伤害（豁免终止）。在掷伤害骰后，你决定是否应用这个持续伤害。21级时，此持续伤害为10点

20级：鬼魅绞杀 Spectral Garrote
Thuranni Shadow Killer Paragon Path.requirements: [[阴影之龙纹 <龙纹> Mark of Shadow <Dragonmark>]]专长，在隐秘上受训

Talaric Ironjack Paragon Path.name: 塔拉利克铁卫 Talaric Ironjack
Talaric Ironjack Paragon Path.description:
「我的心灵已觉醒，好面对比我生命更伟大的使命。」

Prerequisite:

自从塔拉利克抄本首次编辑记录了用来对付遥远国度异怪们的战斗技术后，经年累月下来，抄本已经变成残缺不全又古老的断简残章。尽管持有抄本的战士群体已日渐式微，但仍有某些勇士会意外发现这些古老的著作，并在掌握其秘密后延续那些战士的工作。

在旅行期间，你也偶然发现了失落的抄本残页。一开始你完全没有注意到这些学识的完整意义，但随着时间推移，你逐渐拼奏完这些破片，并掌握了内含的知识。尽管他人可能会得出不同的结论，但你已学到，活着就是在自然世界与遥远国度之间战斗。每当异界的疯狂入侵日常现实时，自然世界也会暴力以对。凭借你独一无二的才能，你也成了世界怒意的具体化身。

借由拉利克抄本的教诲，你将心灵之眼转向内在，找出自身的缺陷与弱点。当你找到防御上的漏洞时，你重新分配自身的灵能力量，藉此强化防御抵挡攻击。你广泛的学习也获得了回报，你的思虑更清晰，战斗中也更为专注，对付敌人亦势如破竹。当其他战士可能倒下时，你撑了过去；当敌人攻击时，你轻易化解对方的攻势。

11级：防御光环 Defensive Aura

Benefit: 当你以未强化的随意灵能攻击威能命中，且你还有至少1个灵能点时，你在所有防御上获得+2威能加值直到你下一回合开始。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Point

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：超凡行动 Superior Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行攻击时，你在此攻击骰上获得+4威能加值，且恢复等同于2倍你体质调整值的生命值。

11级：断铁轰击 Iron-Hewed Smash

12级：持久之驱 Enduring Body

16级：铁卫命令 Ironjack's Command

Benefit: 当你花费一次回复力且恢复生命值时，离你2格内的每个盟友都能以一个自由动作快步1格。

20级：破竹之势 Overwhelming Force

Talaric Strategist Paragon Path.name: 塔拉利克战略家 Talaric Strategist
Talaric Strategist Paragon Path.description:
「汝念非汝愿。」

Prerequisite:

Long ago, when aberrant monsters first spilled into the mortal world, a warrior society was formed to protect the world from the Far Realm's corrupting influence. The society's members recorded their techniques in a volume known as the Talaric Codex. In it were the forms and disciplines needed to master their psionic fighting art. In the countless years since its formation, the society has decayed and dissolved. Its monasteries have fallen, and the writings of its adepts have been scattered across the world.

You have found fragments of writing from this ancient society and learned to focus your psionic powers to give you a tactical advantage in battle. Because your training was haphazard and pieced together from fragments of lore, you improvise where your training is incomplete, drawing from your ardent powers to fill your gaps in knowledge. Still, the teachings you uncovered proved instructive, and you can take charge of nearly any battlefield.

Central to your learning is the ability to read your enemies' intent and turn it against them. You translate the clarity of your vision and your openness to the thoughts and experiences of those around you into a decided tactical advantage. You can warn allies against impending attacks, move companions to adapt to enemy formations, and help your allies scatter when they are faced with devastating magic.

11级：思先于行 Anticipatory Action

Benefit: 当一个敌人进入邻近你的一格时，以一个即时中断，你可以花费一个行动点进行一个标准动作。

11级：战斗直觉 Battle Instinct

Benefit: 你和离你5格内的盟友，在先攻检定上获得+2威能加值。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：先发制人 Anticipation Tactics

12级：洞悉之令 Insightful Command

16级：谋者思潮 Tactician's Surge

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.tiTRAzheoj3x9rqO]{炽念汹涌 Ardent Surge}威能时，你可以滑动爆发范围内每个盟友1格。

20级：协作之力 Combined Effort

Tharos Impostor Paragon Path.name: 塔洛斯渗透者 Tharos Impostor
Tharos Impostor Paragon Path.description:
「I might number vile fiends and corrupt politicians among my associates,but I assure you, I bear them no good will.」

Prerequisite:

You have infiltrated a demon cult known as the Fraternity of Tharos in hopes of eventually destroying it and restoring a measure of hope to the beleaguered land of Impiltur. You've had to perform a vile rite involving innocent sacrifice to enter the cult, and the stain of that deed only fuels your hatred of their existence. You have sworn one day to avenge all those who have suffered by the hands of the cult, and by doing so, you hope it will exonerate your own dark past.

Using a combination of guile and infernal knowledge, you provide inside information for any adventuring group you join, chipping slowly away at the Fraternity and stopping their vile plots while keeping your cover intact.

11级：骗子大师 Accomplished Liar

Benefit: 当你进行一次唬骗检定时，你可以掷骰两次并使用任意结果。另外，你能以一个次要动作使用唬骗来佯攻（feinting）以获得战斗优势。

11级：骇人怒火 Terrifying Wrath

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，所有距离你5格以内的敌人在豁免骰上受到-2减值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：地狱火之刃 Hellfire Blade

12级：苍白契约 Ashen Compact

16级：地狱链接之怒 Hellbound Fury

Benefit: 当你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.fpFUaAJCkZ3WvK8m]{炼狱叱喝 Hellish Rebuke}命中一个敌人时，你对此敌人获得战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

20级：烧灼恶魔复仇 Demon-Fueled Vengeance
Tharos Impostor Paragon Path.requirements: 游荡者且「炼狱契约」邪术师，因布图（Impiltur）地区增益

Luckbringer of Tymora Paragon Path.name: 泰摩拉之幸运使者 Luckbringer of Tymora
Luckbringer of Tymora Paragon Path.description:
「我是幸运女仕的女儿。我愿意冒险，将自己交托在命运的手里。运气将降临勇者身上！」

Prerequisite:

作为微笑女士的神官，你相信最受宠的人是冒最大风险的人。你很大胆，因为胆大才算活着。

11级：神圣幸运 Divine Fortune

Benefit: 以一个自由动作，当你或离你5格内的一次攻击骰失手时，你可以花费一个行动点让该角色重掷此攻击，且在此攻击骰上获得+2加值

11级：幸运之刃 Luck Blade

Benefit: 你获得一个你选择的重刃的擅长。你可以使用此武器作为法器使用来施展牧师威能

11级：神圣偏斜 Divine Tilt

12级：幸运之矢 Luckbolt

16级：机率操控 Probability Control

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，你可以给任意d20骰子掷骰两次，且使用更好的结果

20级：易伤恶运 Inauspicious Vulnerability

Thri-kreen Predator Paragon Path.name: 螳螂劫掠者 Thri-kreen Predator
Thri-kreen Predator Paragon Path.description:
「我和我的伙伴，为了生存，我们学会了打猎。在这些日子里，我猎杀会说话和思考的人。但我必须这样做，因为我必须生存。」

Prerequisite:

Some thri-kreen fully hone their natural physiology, turning their bodies into weapons deadlier than the gythka. They strengthen their extra arms for making claw attacks, practice graceful jumps with their powerful legs, and augment their natural venom so it is potent enough to take down tough prey. Because of their battle prowess, these kreen often become the strongest members of their packs. It is the thri-kreen way to challenge weaker leaders, and the greatest hunters rise to positions of leadership.

As you grow into the role of thri-kreen predator, you become larger and tougher, with thicker chitinous plates and stronger limbs. Along with these physical changes, your instincts and racial memories become more acute. You sense the long lineage of the kreen, and you understand the great hunts of the past and the long-forgotten tactics that let your race survive the most dangerous periods of Athasian history.

For some thri-kreen, these changes are natural—a hereditary gift. Others use psionic powers or martial training to strengthen themselves. Some find the predator's path after being exposed to sites or objects of power that stirred deep racial memories. No matter what triggered your transformation, you have become a kreen among kreen.

11级：纵身行动 Leap Into Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能在此额外动作之前或之后以一个自由动作进行一次运动检定来跳跃。此跳跃不会引发借机攻击。

11级：强壮利爪 Strong Claws

Benefit: 你获得等同于一半你的速度的攀爬速度。你同时在螳螂锐爪 Thri-kreen Claws种族威能的伤害骰上获得+2加值。

11级：捕获利爪 Capturing Claws

12级：昆虫苏醒 Insect's Spring

16级：诱捕包抄 Entrapping Pack

Benefit: 只要你和一个与你不相邻的的盟友邻近同一个敌人，你就夹击该敌人。

20级：麻痹之咬 Paralyzing Bite

Tiefling Hellstalker Paragon Path.name: 提夫林地狱行者 Tiefling Hellstalker
Tiefling Hellstalker Paragon Path.description:
「Manifestations of the darkest flames of Hell cover me. You'll see the genuine article soon enough.」

Prerequisite:

Supernatural might comes naturally to a tiefling. Blood tied to the dark history of devils makes the reason for this obvious. In a vestigial form, this power lends vehemence to a tiefling's retaliation against attackers. History has shown that a tiefling who wishes to do so can reach inward for even more power, manifesting it in a variety of ways.

Those ways are mirrored in devils and their home. When mortals speak of the Nine Hells, they refer to fire, smoke, and the burning wrath of fiends. But the truth is more complex. The hells have ice, storms, and shadow. They even have combinations of these, the elements mixing in strange and unnatural ways to produce oddities such as lightless fire.

Some tieflings prefer to live up to expectations, displaying talent with anger and flame. They evoke terror by playing the devil's part. But they lack subtlet y, which is a devil's best tool. They fail to acknowledge that mortals most fear what they can't see.

Drawing on the darkness within, a darkness that extends from the hells, a tiefling can gain uncanny advantages against enemies. Eyes can be dimmed, darkness and invisibility can be pierced, and flesh can be burned without light.

You know this, because you have learned to summon the darkness enshrouding your soul. By coupling it with your deadly martial skills, you become a terror in lightless halls under the earth, as well as on shadowed streets and in moonless wilds. Where light does find you, you snuff it in the sight of your foes. Eventually, the shadows you call up will be able to, at times, burn your enemies like extraplanar blackfire.

11级：地狱之影 Hell's Shadows

Benefit: 当你有隐蔽或全隐蔽时，你在所有防御上获得+1加值

11级：地狱行者行动 Hellstalker Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来获得隐蔽直到你下一回合结束，而不是进行额外动作

11级：阴影打击 Dimming Blow

12级：魔鬼视线 Devil's Sight

16级：暗影愤怒 Gloom Wrath

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Xa7LQDjcYt2H9h4o]{地狱之怒 Infernal Wrath}种族威能时，你对该威能的目标获得战斗优势直到你下一回合结束

20级：暗炎缠绕 Blackfire Wind

Tiefling Warfiend Paragon Path.name: 提夫林战魔 Tiefling Warfiend
Tiefling Warfiend Paragon Path.description:
「吾之愤怒高贵无比，然怒火仍在恶魔之心内燃烧！」

Prerequisite:

魔鬼与凡人的结合创造了提夫林，他们的血脉之中永远都流淌着被污染的恶魔之血。但在这堕落之中的是力量，就如同其他的力量一样，可以被用于正途或邪道。

长久以来，提夫林让这股邪恶能量在他们的灵魂内燃烧。最基本的用途就是，地狱之力可以让提夫林将愤怒和对复仇的渴望化为比平常猛烈数倍的攻击。在过去的岁月中，提夫林战士们已经掌握了一种技巧，可以将他们的负面情绪化为战争中的强大工具。

拜尔图拉斯王朝的核心几乎全都是由那些能够将自己的恶魔之怒化为武技的强大战士构成的。尽管帝国后来破灭了，然而一些魔鬼斯的战士们却幸存了下来。他们的战斗传统仍然代代相传，延续了数个世纪。今日，少数的提夫林战士依然接受这种训练，成为一个战魔，以便能够控制他们内心的魔鬼。而另一些，那些没有经过训练的提夫林，则认为最好是通过暴力来宣泄他们内心的恶魔，以免伤及他人。

许多你的族人害怕潜伏在他们灵魂深处的污点，但是你认识到，那只不过是一种你可以支配的工具而已。无需投向邪恶的怀抱，你就可以掌握你的恶魔之力。你将从血统继承来可怖力量与致命的战斗技巧结合在一起，用来保护你的伙伴，并且让那些敢于与你为敌的人付出代价。现在，你与生俱来的堕落力量已经为你而战，致命的地狱之炎缠绕着你的武器，那些垂死挣扎的敌人的微不足道的力量在它面前转瞬即被摧毁。

11级：地狱之能 Infernal Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点以进行额外动作时，若你在此遭遇中已经用掉了@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Xa7LQDjcYt2H9h4o]{地狱之怒 Infernal Wrath}这项种族威能，则你恢复此威能的使用。

11级：狱炎之罚 Hellfire Retribution

Benefit: 每当一个被你标记的敌人做出目标不包括你的攻击时，此敌人受到等同于3 + 你的体质调整值的火焰伤害。

11级：狱炎复仇 Hellfire Reprisal

12级：地狱复苏 Infernal Resurgence

16级：燃烧战机 Burning Opportunism

Benefit: 每当你因「挑战」职业特性而做出一次攻击或者进行一次借机攻击时，若你的攻击命中，则造成等同于3 + 你体质调整值的火焰伤害。

20级：燃烧怒斩 Burning Wrath Smite

Angelic Avenger Paragon Path.name: 天罚使者 Angelic Avenger
Angelic Avenger Paragon Path.description:
「吾为神之使，誓杀神之敌。」

Prerequisite:

你成为神特殊的仆从，以天使之力宣扬神之信条。当你使用天使之力时，外表变得与天使相似：你的面容犹如天使般无暇，光羽自你背后伸展开来，下躯也同时变得模糊。

11级：天使之行 Angelic Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时在攻击骰上获得+4加值直到你下一回合开始。

11级：星耀共鸣 Astral Vibrance

Benefit: 选择一种伤害类型：闪电，光耀或者雷鸣。当任何离你5格内的重伤敌人开始其回合时，它受到等同于你魅力调整值的伤害。此伤害类型是你选择的类型。

11级：武器熟练 Weapon Training

Benefit: 你获得一个你所选的重刃武器的擅长。

11级：星光冲击 Astral Wave

12级：圣颜 Angelic Presence

16级：辉耀之血 Blood and Radiance

Benefit: 当任何敌人以一次攻击重伤你时，此敌人提供战斗优势直到它下一回合结束。

20级：天界化身 Angel Ascendant

Favored Sha'ir Paragon Path.name: 天赋元素法师 Favored Sha'ir
Favored Sha'ir Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

Your rapport with the elemental powers has grown to such a degree that they regard you as one of their own. Throughout the heroic tier, you established yourself as an able partner, ally, and, perhaps, servant of the elemental powers and in doing so earned greater and greater elemental rewards, including advanced arcane knowledge and more powerful spells. So armed, you stand ready to face even greater threats and reap even greater rewards.

The elemental powers' favor grants you deeper insights into elemental magic. Not only can your gen servant fetch potent spells, but you can pierce the barriers between the planes to draw forth power to serve your needs. Such command over creation's fundamental forces translates into an improved gen servant that, at your command, can manifest the Elemental Chaos's unruly energies in effective and dangerous ways. Not only does your gen servant improve, but when you master all the elemental gifts, you can transform your servant into a powerful elemental monolith.

11级：元素回撤 Elemental Retreat

By proving your worth to the genies, you have earned their aid when the situation turns dire. You can manifest the elemental magic that they have bestowed on you to create a doorway through which you can step to gain succor. When you return moments later, you do so charged with the might of the Plane Below.

11级：灵魔行动 Gen Action

The bond between you and your familiar strengthens. When you push past your normal limits, a surge of elemental magic transports you both.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在此额外动作之前或之后，你和你的魔宠都能以一个自由动作传送最多5格

11级：灵魔之怒 Wrath of the Genies

You have risen so far in the genies' esteem that they are ready to lend a hand if you need it. Wrath of the genies demonstrates how their interest can manifest in a sudden, destructive burst around your familiar.

12级：混乱之潮 Chaos Tide

Chaos courses through all elemental power, and its influence is what gives elemental magic its unpredictable characteristics. Learning to draw more and more upon the Plane Below can twist reality and toss about the creatures in your presence.

16级：元素典范 Elemental Paragon

Elemental power suffuses your familiar. It is this power that lets you exert your will over the chaos welling up from the Plane Below. As you become more adept, so too does your familiar, which bestows an elemental boon on you.

Benefit: 根据你「灵魔仆从」选择的魔宠，你获得一个增益。

土魔：当你的魔宠处于被动模式且你以奥术随意攻击威能命中时，你可以同时推离目标最多等同于你体质调整值的格数

风魔：当你的魔宠处于被动模式且你以奥术随意攻击威能命中时，你可以同时滑动目标最多2格

炎魔：当你的魔宠处于被动模式且你以奥术随意攻击威能命中时，目标受到等同于你体质调整值的额外火焰伤害

水魔：当你的魔宠处于被动模式且你以奥术随意攻击威能命中时，你和每个邻近你的盟友能以一个自由动作快步最多等同于你体质调整值的格数

其他魔宠：当你的魔宠处于被动模式且你以奥术随意攻击威能命中时，你可以传送最多等同于你体质调整值的格数

20级：巨兽解封 Unleash Monolith

The genies' interest in you continues to increase, and with this attention comes even greater rewards. If you have need, you can call upon their favor to transform your familiar into an elemental monolith. The elemental breaks free from the familiar’s form, its normal appearance melting away as the towering elemental comes into existence. The monolith obeys your every command and lurches forth to crush your enemies.

Heavenly Deceiver Paragon Path.name: 天国盗跖 Heavenly Deceiver
Heavenly Deceiver Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

At 11th level, your veilwalker deva takes on the heavenly deceiver paragon path. You walk just this side of a boundary thinner than the finest veil and develop an affinity for the deceptive magic of the rakshasa even as the memories of past incarnations become distant. You choose your path to take advantage of this power and wield it against evil; or perhaps you are on a path dictated by your carelessness—because the intentionally evil would already be beyond redemption. You bear patterns on your skin distinct from those on most devas. The colors are always darker and include more red than their incorruptible brethren. The patterns made by the colorations are sharper, more sudden, and more violent than the simple elegance of other devas.

The longer you remain a veilwalker, the greater a command over illusion and deceit that balancing act grants you. Manipulation of others becomes an art and a second nature to you.

11级：欺诈行动 Deceitful Action

Stealth might be your best tool at times, so you cloak yourself from the eyes of others to better achieve your ends.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你隐形直到你下一回合结束或直到你进行一次攻击。

11级：蛇佬腔 Snake-Tongued Mastery

Words are more than tools. With you, they can form reality—for others and only for a time. Your ability to deceive others allows you to twist how another perceives its environment.

Benefit: 你在唬骗检定上获得+2加值，并且你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Q2ztsCdcZ8J5gLNk]{欺诈影像 Deceitful Image}威能。

11级：幻影鞘击 Illusion-Sheathed Strike

Your mastery over how others perceive you twists within the minds of your foes, causing them painful mental distress as you attack. Your strikes also cause them to retreat from you.

12级：重复幻象 Duplicate Image

Are you where you appear to be? or are you standing slightly to the left of yourself? As you hone your ability to deceive others, you can also present others with a twin of yourself to fool their senses and make them doubt their senses.

16级：欺诈地形 Deceitful Terrain

By altering the perceptions of others, you can cause them to avoid illusory hazards. of course, you choose what they see, so you also control how they adjust their positions.

Benefit: 当你开始你的回合时，你能以一个自由动作滑动一个邻近你的敌人到一个邻近你的非妨害地形的格子。

20级：孤独幻象 Illusion of Solitude

Your mastery over how others perceive you twists within the minds of your foes, causing them painful mental distress as you attack. Your strikes also cause them to retreat from you.

Sky Hunter Paragon Path.name: 天空猎手 Sky Hunter
Sky Hunter Paragon Path.description:
「鹰是完美的捕食者，不被大地所束缚，如原始精魂般狩猎。」

Prerequisite:

虽然太初之兽通常以哺乳动物猎食者的形态现身，但有时候也会以羽翼翱翔于天空，在空中狩猎。鹰和猎鹰作为猎食者比起豹或狼毫不逊色，有些德鲁伊使用这些猛禽的形态进行狩猎。

你就是这样的德鲁伊，模仿鸟类的方式狩猎的天空猎手。在野性形态下你无法一直飞行，但可以时不时飞起，有的德鲁伊使用有点像鸡蛇――拥有使其能够短距飞行的不完善翅膀的潜猎者――的野兽形态。其他的则保持原有的野兽形态，只有使用天空猎手的能力时才化为鸟型。

11级：天空猎手行动 Sky Hunter's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在此动作前你能以你的速度飞行。

11级：羽翼之主 Master of Wings

Benefit: 你在对飞行生物的攻击骰上获得+2加值。

11级：致盲鹰爪 Blinding Talons

12级：翱翔猎鹰 Soaring Falcon

16级：野兽感知 Beast Senses

Benefit: 当你使用一个野兽形态每日威能时，你在侦查检定上获得+5威能加值直到遭遇结束。

20级：原始之鹰 Primal Eagle
Sky Hunter Paragon Path.requirements: 德鲁伊，[[野性变身 Wild Shape]]威能

Celestial Scholar Paragon Path.name: 天空学者 Celestial Scholar
Celestial Scholar Paragon Path.description:
「在太阳的金色大厅里，我闪耀着光芒。在月亮的暗室里，我欺骗了心灵。在苍穹中，我是最明亮的星星。」

Prerequisite:

The tradition of the celestial scholar is more academic than the paths of other cosmic sorcerers, and definitely more cerebral than the paths of other types of sorcerers. You plot the courses of the stars and other celestial bodies, and through this knowledge you gain access to a well of power as vast as the night sky.

11级：天空行动 Celestial Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在带有寒冰、心灵和光耀关键字的威能的攻击骰和伤害骰上获得+2加值直到你下一回合结束。

11级：宇宙和谐 Cosmic Concordance

Benefit: 当你使用一个每日奥术攻击威能且选择更改你的「宇宙巨轮之魂」时阶时，你可以选择其他两个时阶中的任意一个。

11级：时阶聚焦 Phase Focus

Benefit: 你的「宇宙巨轮之魂」的一个时阶变得更加强大。从以下增益中选择一项。

灼热之日：当你处于太阳时阶下在你的回合开始时，离你2格内的所有敌人受到等同于你力量调整值的火焰和光耀伤害。

守望之月：当你处于月亮时阶时，每个邻近你的敌人在豁免失败时受到等同于你力量调整值的光耀伤害。

遥远之星：当你处于星辰时阶下且一个敌人的攻击对你失手时，你能以一个自由动作传送等同于你力量调整值的格子。在一次攻击命中你后，你也能以一个即时反应传送。

11级：天空印记 Celestial Sigil

12级：天空抗性 Celestial Resistance

16级：天空防御 Celestial Defense

Benefit: 当你处于与你的「时阶聚焦」相应的时阶时，你在所有防御上获得+2加值

20级：天空封印 Celestial Seal
Celestial Scholar Paragon Path.requirements: 术士，「宇宙魔法」职业特性

Weapon of Fortune Paragon Path.name: 天命兵器 Weapon of Fortune
Weapon of Fortune Paragon Path.description:
「一切都归结到机会：是我活还是你死？」

Prerequisite:

You are a servant of a deity of luck, and you completely trust your own good fortune. As a symbol of your devotion to chance, you always carry a set of dice with you. When in doubt, you trust the dice to determine your actions. Just like the wind, you can be gentle and complacent or a dangerous storm capable of destroying those who stand in your way. Although you are always unpredictable, you can be a brave and loyal companion; fortune brought your company together, after all, and you know better than most that great deeds often flow from unlikely friendships or chance meetings.

You are probably a worshiper of Avandra or a similar deity. Your purpose is to inspire people to be daring, to take chances and seize opportunities, for those who take no risks never realize their full potential. In battle, you have learned to rely on chance. You are a potent combatant when luck favors you.

Although you might not represent the typical image of a divine servant, you are nonetheless a faithful devotee of your deity and your beliefs. You have little regard for the strictures of formal worship—you're more likely to be found gambling in a tavern than praying in a temple. But when chance leads you to down the path to adventure or into a situation that demands action, you don't hesitate to join the fight. After all, that's what's the dice told you to do.

11级：天眷幸运 Fortune Favors the Fortunate

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，掷一个d6。如果结果是6，则你照常进行额外动作，但是不消耗此行动点，且你可以在此遭遇中再花费一个行动点。

11级：我赌了 I'll Take that Bet

Benefit: 当你受到重击或你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.GLaB471ns0JZ6wCX]{圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity}的目标造成重击时，你可以用一个自由动作掷一个d6。如果结果是1，则你受到2d6伤害。如果结果是5或6，则此重击变成普通命中。

11级：运气大于技术 Luck, Not Skill

12级：恩赐标记 Signs of Favor

16级：运气在我这 Luck Is on My Side

Benefit: 当你在豁免骰上掷出20时，你可以结束你身上2个可豁免终止的效果。

20级：赌徒的花招 Gambler's Flourish
Weapon of Fortune Paragon Path.requirements: 神罚使，[[圣仇宣言 Oath of Enmity]]威能

God Warder Paragon Path.name: 天神狱吏 God Warder
God Warder Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

The gods decreed that the primordials would trouble the planes no more. To make good on this proclamation, they directed their servants to maintain prisons and preserve chains to ensure that these beings never escaped. You have made this cause your own and pledged your implement or weapon to the holy purpose of containing the primordials forever.

11级：强取行动 Exacting Action

The holy cause to which you are pledged lets you call an ally to your side or drag an enemy forward to face you.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，选择一个离你5格内的你可见的生物。你可以拉近该生物最多5格

11级：天国之链 Heaven's Chains

The Astral Sea's enemies cannot escape your wrath. Your attacks bind them with weighty shackles.

Benefit: 定身的敌人给你提供战斗优势。另外，当你以近战或远程每日攻击威能命中一个敌人并对它造成伤害时，你能将此伤害减少10（且此伤害不少于10）来定身目标直到你下一回合结束

11级：正义禁令 Righteous Prohibition

You pass judgment on your foe, calling upon godly intervention to punish your enemy for its wicked intent.

12级：守护推进 Warding Advance

The gods invest you with the holy power you need to protect allies from attack and punish your chosen foes in the same maneuver.

16级：禁锢邪恶 Bind the Wicked

Your justifiable anger binds your foes as securely as if you had wrapped them in chains.

Benefit: 当你以近战或远程攻击命中一个定身敌人时，你可以使该敌人束缚，而不是定身

20级：禁锢之链 Chains That Bind

The gods reveal the prayer you need to shackle an enemy as securely as the gods bound the primordials.

Angelic Aspect Paragon Path.name: 天使化身 Angelic Aspect
Angelic Aspect Paragon Path.description:
「吾为侍奉吾神之天使。」

Prerequisite:

在众神对抗魔神的上古战争中，神导士是众神在凡间最信赖的仆人，他们被允许使用最纯粹的神圣力量，就如同神的不朽使者――天使一样。在那些时日中，最受宠信的凡人神导士和天使之间的区别是极难分辨的。一些神导士吸收了太多的神圣能量，令他们的外表看起来仿佛天使。而与之相对的，一些天使主动将体内的神圣精能散去，并穿起了凡人的服饰扮成神导士，这些天使自愿将力量抑制下去，以便能够作为神的使者更好地在凡间活动并侍奉神。

你是这众多典范之道中的一员，这指引你到达新的方向：你既非完全的天使也非完全的人类，而是两者的合体。作为一名天使化身，你以凡人之体引导神圣能量，从而显现出天使的特性：你对光明与黑暗力量有特殊的抵抗力，你的令人敬畏的外貌让试图攻击你的人感到深深的恐惧，你生出双翼展翅翱翔飞越战场，你的攻击犹如天使一样威力无匹。

若你生为凡人，则你的转变已经开始，你已经踏入了天界的门槛，并将转化为更强大的不朽生灵。若你曾经生为天使但隐藏于凡人的躯壳之下，则这层掩盖正在缓缓褪去，而你原本的真实面目逐渐显露出来。无论是何者，都足以令你的敌人在你面前恐惧战栗。

11级：翅翼行动 Wings of Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能以一个自由动作飞行8格，且你在AC上获得+2加值直到你下一回合开始。

11级：天使抗力 Angelic Resistance

Benefit: 你获得10点暗蚀抗力和10点光耀抗力。如果你已经拥有此二种抗力之一，则已拥有的抗力增加5点。

11级：天使之刃 Angelic Blades

12级：守护光环 Shielding Nimbus

16级：天使光华 Angelic Emanation

Benefit: 当你未重伤时，攻击者在对你的攻击骰上受到-2减值。

20级：冷焰光柱 Coldfire Pillar

Knight of Celestia Paragon Path.name: 天堂山骑士 Knight of Celestia
Knight of Celestia Paragon Path.description:
「The first time I beheld the beauty of Celestia, its splendor so moved me that I swore to become its champion.」

Prerequisite:

As a knight of Celestia, you are an icon of virtue, championing the causes of Celestia and doing battle with those that seek its ruin. Although you retain devotion to your own deity, you also enjoy the favor of the gods that dwell in Celestia. You advance the agendas of the deities of Celestia in addition to that of your patron deity.

When you use your knight of Celestia powers, a flickering flame appears above your head, displaying the blessing the gods have bestowed upon you.

11级：威吓光环 Aura of Menace

Benefit: 当一个你标记的生物从你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YqRjBvbThJCAUXDd]{神圣挑战 Divine Challenge}中受到光耀伤害时，该生物在半径20格内散发明亮光照，且给任何攻击者提供战斗优势，直到你下一回合结束

11级：神之祝福 Blessing of the Gods

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在所有防御上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束

11级：天堂山挑战 Celestia's Challenge

12级：光辉守卫 Brilliant Guardians

16级：专注之敌 Dedicated Foe

Benefit: 当你对一个你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YqRjBvbThJCAUXDd]{神圣挑战 Divine Challenge}标记的敌人造成重击时，此攻击无视该生物的抗力，且目标从@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YqRjBvbThJCAUXDd]{神圣挑战 Divine Challenge}中受到光耀伤害，如同它进行了一次目标不包括你的攻击。此伤害会触发你的「威吓光环」

20级：净化光辉 Purifying Radiance

Favored Soul Paragon Path.name: 天佑之魂 Favored Soul
Favored Soul Paragon Path.description:
「Who am I? I am the sword of heaven, forged on the anvil of the world, and you have angered my master.」

Prerequisite:

You have long harbored a divine spark within yourself, a subtle shard of your god's essence. Long has it lain dormant, but as you dispatch your enemies and see your oaths through, the essence awakens and infuses your body with astral brilliance until your mortal shell transmutes into something greater than what it once was. Your deeds are the catalyst for your transformation into a favored soul. Once you set foot on this glorious path, you ever after carry with you the blessings of your god.

Becoming a favored soul triggers several physical changes, specifically the appearance of feathery wings that grow, almost overnight, from your back. These wings have strength enough to bear your weight. Your feathers can be any color you like. As you continue down this path, your body lightens, your bones becoming hollow and strong so you can fly more easily without sacrificing your durability. By the time you complete this path, your lower body trails off into mist when you fly, thus marking you as one of the heavenly host, kin to angels, and a special servant of your god.

11级：天佑行动 Favored Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你或邻近你的一个盟友可以同时花费一个回复力。

11级：天堂之盾 Heaven's Shield

Benefit: 当你满血时，你在所有防御上获得+1加值。

11级：光耀冲击 Radiant Rush

12级：天使之翼 Wings of Angels

16级：天堂恩赐 Heaven's Boon

Benefit: 一对羽翼从你背后展开，你获得飞行速度6。只有当你未穿甲或穿轻甲时才能使用这个速度。

20级：天空之战 Celestial Skirmish

Ironstar Mauler Paragon Path.name: 铁星重锤手 Ironstar Mauler
Ironstar Mauler Paragon Path.description:
「Aggression is the key to victory. Get in there and start mixing it up while your enemy is still trying to decide if it wants to fight or not. Hesitation is a luxury we can't afford.」

Prerequisite:

You are a battle-tested master of the Ironstar combat style. You wield a mace or a flail as easily as a graceful elf duelist wields a rapier; in your hands, these cruel weapons are as light and quick as willow switches. You have spent countless hours attaining the necessary balance, concentration, and intuition to use these weapons effectively. With uncanny precision, you can crumple a shield, break a weapon-hand, shatter fangs, or crush a skull.

Beyond mastering the style's pure physical technique, you have absorbed the attitude and mindset of the Ironstar masters. Your chosen style is more than pure strength and savagery. You recognize that fearlessness, intimidation, and aggression are weapons every bit as important as the maces or flails you wield.

Warriors of different races and lands have developed techniques similar to yours, but none have studied them more carefully—or practiced them more fiercely—than the dwarf masters who originated the Ironstar technique. You have learned from their teachings and become a fierce and tough-minded warrior. You are the first to charge into the fray and the last to leave it. Enemies do well to fear you.

11级：铁星行动 Ironstar Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用一个与铁星学徒 <流派初成> Ironstar Student 专长或铁星碎击者 <流派大成> Ironstar Crusher 专长关联的威能时，你掷出18-20即可造成重击，并且你将你在此攻击中使用的武器视为拥有高重击特性。

11级：铁星大师 Ironstar Master

Benefit: 你在使用硬头锤和连枷的攻击骰上获得+1加值。

11级：毁灭粉碎 Devastating Smash

12级：铁星架势 Ironstar Stance

16级：铁星掌握 Ironstar Expertise

Benefit: 每当你以一个硬头锤或连枷命中一个敌人时，该敌人对抗此攻击造成的任何效果的豁免骰上受到-2减值。

20级：碎裂狂怒 Crushing Fury
Ironstar Mauler Paragon Path.requirements: 战士，[[铁星学徒|铁星学徒 <流派初成> Ironstar Student <Lesser Style>]]专长

Commando Captain Paragon Path.name: 突击队长 Commando Captain
Commando Captain Paragon Path.description:
「These roughnecks bow to no king, but they do follow me. Under my command, they can go anywhere and do anything. What do you need?」

Prerequisite:

Sometimes a small squad of specially trained or highly skilled people can do what an army can't. A precise strike or a cunning raid can turn the tide in many dangerous situations. Numerous nobles and mercantile interests keep or patronize assault teams such as these for situations that call for decisive offensive action. A unit of such specialists can instead become its own employer, attacking and looting monster lairs on the borderlands and becoming rich in the process. Another such group might itself become a menace, turning superior combat prowess toward banditry or tyranny.

The world is in a dark age. Desperate times favor resourceful people. But even bold and venturesome folk need wily leadership to thrive. Such a leader helps a team hit hard and stay mobile, avoiding obstacles, overcoming foes, and keeping one step ahead of the enemy. In fact, precision command and an eye toward stealth can make all the difference in smallsquad engagements.

You are such a leader, whether through formal training in elite unit command or as a result of direct experience, or both. Those who observe you might say you're the team's commander, but you see yourself as an expert facilitator among able peers. You know the skills of those with whom you work, and you always have the right trick to keep the whole party in fighting shape. The cohesion you have created among your comrades has seen you through much in the past, and it speaks of your future success.

11级：突击行动 Commando Action

Benefit: 当你消耗一个行动点进行额外动作时，你选择的一个离你10格内的敌人对你提供战斗优势，直到你下一回合结束

11级：伪装命令 Camouflaging Command

Benefit: 当你使用一个能给予一个盟友移动的督军威能时，该盟友获得隐蔽直到你下一回合结束。

11级：攻其不备 Blindside Assault

12级：机动突袭 Commando Maneuver

16级：迁移策略 Mobility Tactics

Benefit: 当邻近你的盟友快步时，该盟友可以多快步1格

20级：士气震慑 Morale-Shaking Strike

Shock Trooper Paragon Path.name: 突击骑兵 Shock Trooper
Shock Trooper Paragon Path.description:
「快速移动！给他们致命打击」

Prerequisite:

Nerath was a just nation, it is said, but it would be a lie to say that it was built solely through negotiation, the spread of knowledge, and cultural influence. No, as any historian can tell you, Nerath rose on the splintered shields and shattered blades of its soldiers. When an object of conquest doesn't bend, it must be made to bow.

That was the job of Nerath's legions. Those armies consisted primarily of highly trained heavy infantry supplemented by heavy cavalry—the famed knight protectors. Nerath's military traditions were derived from older sources. In what any dragonborn would claim to be fine dragonborn style, a special auxiliary force of devastating light infantry led many of Nerath's assaults. These were the empire's shock troopers. Military historians liken them to similar troops among other cultures and peoples, especially elves and dragonborn.

The typical shock trooper wore chainmail over leather, and carried a longsword and short sword, or dual short swords. The trooper was trained to break the line of an enemy force, moving quickly to kill and wound as many enemy soldiers as possible. If a trooper broke through the enemy line, the job then became direct assault on enemy command positions.

Although Nerath no longer exists as an empire, more than a few of its traditions linger. Numerous fighters and schools of soldiery carry on shock trooper traditions. This is to say nothing of the similar soldiers among other peoples, such as dwarf assault fighters. Any warrior who wants training in this brutal and mobile assault style can readily find it.

You are part of this sudden strike tradition of fighting. Unlike those warriors who form battle lines, you move among your enemies, defying them to strike you down and forcing them to pursue you. Your daring onslaughts confuse and astonish your adversaries. Even so, your guard is never down, especially in your favorite place: the center of a throng of foes.

11级：步法行动 Footwork Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在AC和反射上获得+2加值，直到你下回合结束。如果在此加值生效期间，一个近战攻击对你失手，你可以用一个自由动作快步1格。

11级：致命战士 Deadly Soldier

Benefit: 当你持用副手特性武器时，该武器的伤害骰提升1级。

11级：惊吓旋风 Shocking Twister

12级：攻击步法 Assault Footwork

16级：快速死神 Quicker Death

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你对一个目标有战斗优势时，你在对该目标的一次近战伤害骰上获得等同你敏捷调整值的加值。

20级：震慑冲击 Shocking Skewer

Turathi Hell-Kite Paragon Path.name: 图拉斯残虐者 Turathi Hell-Kite
Turathi Hell-Kite Paragon Path.description:
I'm skilled in a martial art that's over a thousand years old. I'd teach it to you, but you'll be dead too soon.

Prerequisite:

拜尔·图拉斯帝国所留下的并不仅仅是废墟。知识也是它留下的财富。没有建造过伟大的建筑、创造出美妙艺术、神奇的魔法以及经历过最重要的——战争之前，没有任何一个社会能够企及如此的高度。冒险者、学者以及爱好者们长久以来一直在搜索着这地狱帝国授权的贵族们的战争秘密。

你知道这些秘密中的一个：一种特别为提夫林发明的被遗忘的战斗技巧。借鉴提夫林的精神才能和独一无二的身体条件而形成的令人震惊的特技。你对残虐者之道的研习使你更深刻的理解自己的身体素质，并能够超越其限制

11级：图拉斯韧劲 Turathi Tenacity

Benefit: 将你智力或魅力调整值加到你回复力值上。另外，你获得一个回复力

11级：尾扫行动 Tail Sweep Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来做一次近战攻击时，每个邻近此攻击的目标的敌人被击倒，无论你命中或失手

11级：地狱撞击 Hell's Ram

12级：驾驭魔鬼之尾 Ride the Devil's Tail

16级：图拉斯活力 Turathi Vigor

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Xa7LQDjcYt2H9h4o]{地狱之怒 Infernal Wrath}时，你获得等同于10 + 你智力或魅力调整值的临时生命值

20级：烈焰之刃 Flame Blade

Turathi Highborn Paragon Path.name: 图拉斯名门 Turathi Highborn
Turathi Highborn Paragon Path.description:
「我们祖先的错误不是使用了恶魔的力量，而是没有能控制它们。」

Prerequisite:

拜尔・图拉斯的罪孽在他提夫林后人的不详外貌中显露无疑，而且毫无掩饰。弯曲的犄角，有力的尾巴，燃烧的双眼都提醒着世界――跟恶魔打交道的无比危险和可怕代价。许多提夫林克服了他们灵魂中的阴霾。但是有一些却发现很难摆脱自己罪恶血统的影响。很大程度上，是因为这些人的祖先曾经是第一批与阿斯莫迪斯和其他九层地狱魔鬼签定契约的提夫林。

作为图拉斯名门，你背负着先祖毁掉提夫林一族的罪孽。无论好坏，你都保留着和九层地狱的联系，甚至比其他提夫林还要强烈。在愤怒之时，你爆发出强烈的地狱火焰；地狱的力量也提升了你其他的才能。凭借着从拜尔・图拉斯的古代贵族中流传下来的知识，你能够扰乱敌人的心智，或者将他们变为你的奴隶――哪怕你在用地狱火焰吞噬他们。

11级：图拉斯疯狂 Turathi Frenzy

Benefit: 你在对重伤敌人的伤害骰上获得等同于1 + 你魅力调整值的加值。

11级：地狱火行动 Hellfire Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行攻击时，此攻击命中时造成2d6额外火焰伤害。

11级：混淆火矢 Bolts of Bedevilment

12级：地狱新星 Infernal Nova

16级：俯首称臣 Kneel before the Turathi

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Xa7LQDjcYt2H9h4o]{地狱之怒 Infernal Wrath}种族威能时，你同时击倒目标。

20级：图拉斯奴仆 Thrall of Turath

Dragon Marshal Paragon Path.name: 屠龙元帅 Dragon Marshal
Dragon Marshal Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

Entire schools of study have been devoted to the topic of making war upon dragons and other fearsome beasts of great size, and you have studied them all. Whether leading an adventuring party or an entire army, you are most at home with the swords and spells of allies behind you, and one really big target before you.

11级：屠龙者行动 Dragon-Slayer's Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来重掷一次对龙的攻击骰，或者结束一个来源于龙的当前正影响你的可豁免终止的状态。使用此特性会替代通常的进行额外动作的行动点增益

11级：手足同仇 Vengeance for All

Benefit: 当你从一次近程或区域攻击中受到伤害，每个你可见的，并且是同样是此攻击的目标的盟友在对攻击你的该生物的攻击骰上获得+1加值，直到你下一回合结束。如果攻击者是龙，则此加值为+2。

11级：困兽战法 Beast-Surrounding Maneuver

12级：哪疼打哪儿 Hit Him Where it Hurts!

16级：不屈不挠 Unflagging Spirit

Benefit: 当一个你可见的盟友花费一个行动点进行一次攻击且失手时，此盟友获得等同于你等级的临时生命值且能进行一次豁免检定。如果此盟友的攻击对一只龙失手，则此盟友恢复等同于你等级的生命值，而不是获得临时生命值。

20级：断息打击 Breath-Taking Slam

Shinaelestran Guardian Paragon Path.name: 褪隐城守卫 Shinaelestran Guardian
Shinaelestran Guardian Paragon Path.description:
「任何邪恶都不能完好地通过这里。」

Prerequisite:

In the depths of the Howling Forest lies a realm of wonder and magic—the eladrin city of Shinaelestra, the legendary City of Rangers. Each night Shinaelestra shifts silently across the veil separating the Feywild from the mortal world. It appears in the forest depths for a few hours before fading back to the Feywild at sunrise. The feral monsters and savage humanoids haunting the Howling Forest have learned to give the eladrin city a wide berth, for each night the guardians of Shinaelestra range far over the twisted paths and shadowed dells in search of evil's servants.

You have dwelt among Shinaelestra's vine-covered ruins and tree-shaded manses, learning from the great ranger lords who govern the city. You might have visited the city between adventures, or perhaps you lived and studied there long ago and have now reached a sufficient level of achievement to call yourself a Shinaelestran guardian. You are welcome to return to Shinaelestra any time you wish to take up service with Lord Calenon, the ruler of the city. However, the skills you learned in the City of Rangers are in great demand throughout the world, and you can honor your old mentors by battling monsters and savagery wherever they threaten people of good heart.

11级：守卫行动 Guardian Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在此额外动作之前或之后，你能以一个自由动作快步等同于你感知调整值的格数。另外，你在攻击骰上获得+2加值，直到你回合结束。

11级：守卫防御 Guardian Defense

Benefit: 每当你从你的其中一个游侠职业特性中获得攻击骰加值，你在AC上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：热切追捕 Eager Pursuit

12级：隐形阔步 Invisible Stride

16级：守卫警惕 Guardian Vigilance

Benefit: 你在侦查检定上获得+2加值。另外，在突袭轮中你的回合内，你能以一个自由动作指定你的标的。

20级：月之狂怒 Moon Wrath

Uncarnate Paragon Path.name: 脱形者 Uncarnate
Uncarnate Paragon Path.description:
「皮肤，器官，骨骼包裹着的不过是一个容器——我渴望摆脱它来从世界的束缚中得到自由。」

Prerequisite:

脱形者的终极目标是成为纯净意识的存在，不被肉体的存在束缚。“肉体是脆弱的，而精神坚不可摧”，这一警句在心灵术士之间广为流传，但是脱形者们将它作为指导的真谛。他们寻求脱去形体，成为纯净意识和灵能意愿的载体生物。

脱形者们并不寻求如一些奥术专家选择的不死之路。虽然脱形者在使用能力时可能被误认为阴魂般的存在，然而阴魂是被不死的寒冷之链束缚着，并不是灵能力量的自生意志。

你将自己尽可能地置于最伟大的灵能挑战之下：保持意识的清晰与力量，缓缓忘记支持意识的肌肉。到了最后，除了意识都无关紧要。

11级：闪烁无形 Flicker into Nothing

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点以灵能威能攻击时，你成为虚体直到你下一回合结束。

11级：朦胧步伐 Misty Step

Benefit: 你的灵能攻击无视虚体特性。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：幽影挂钩 Phantom Hook

12级：脱落躯壳 Shed Body

16级：无形之态 Discarnate Form

Benefit: 当你消耗至少4个灵能点来强化一个灵能威能时，你成为虚体直到你下一回合结束。

20级：形体溶解 Dissolve the Flesh

Vadalis Griffonmaster Paragon Path.name: 瓦塔利斯狮鹫大师 Vadalis Griffonmaster
Vadalis Griffonmaster Paragon Path.description:
Size: 大型

Speed: 6格，飞行8格

Trained Skills: 运动，坚韧

 

「往天上看，我的朋友。你会在那儿发现我。」

Prerequisite:

在终末之战最后几年，瓦塔利斯开始训练狮鹫骑士——骑着驯化狮鹫的士兵。做为一名瓦塔利斯狮鹫大师，你参与训练了那些狮鹫与他们的骑手。凭借你的龙纹之力，你成为了一名专家骑手，在狮鹫的背上活动自如。

11级：狮鹫大师行动 Griffonmaster Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，在你攻击后，你的瓦塔利斯驯养狮鹫能进行一个标准动作或移动动作。若此狮鹫使用那动作来攻击，则那攻击造成1d6额外伤害

11级：瓦塔利斯狮鹫 Vadalis Griffon

Benefit: 你可以将你的动物伙伴替换为一只瓦塔利斯驯养狮鹫

瓦塔利斯驯养狮鹫 属性值: 力量20，体质18，敏捷16，智力2，感知12，魅力6 防御: AC 13 + 等级，强韧 14 + 等级，反射 12 + 等级，意志 12 + 等级 生命值: 16 + 10*等级 攻击加值: 等级 + 2 伤害: 2d6 近战基本攻击: 爪抓；等级 + 3 vs. AC；2d6 + 力量调整伤害 坐骑: 瓦塔利斯驯养狮鹫是一个坐骑 协作冲锋: 当此瓦塔利斯驯养狮鹫的骑手冲锋时，除了骑手的冲锋攻击外，此狮鹫能以一个自由动作做一次爪抓攻击

11级：狮鹫撕扯 Griffon's Pull

12级：活力俯冲 Invigorating Dive

16级：瓦塔利斯仪式技艺 Vadalis Ritual Techniques

Benefit: 你掌握并可以施展问道自然 Commune with Nature和魅影驹 Phantom Steed仪式，如同你具有仪式施法者 Ritual Caster专长一般

20级：撰取突袭 Snatching Assault
Vadalis Griffonmaster Paragon Path.requirements: 游侠，「兽王」职业特性，[[驾驭之龙纹 <龙纹> Mark of Handling <Dragonmark>]]专长

Scion of the All-Spirit Paragon Path.name: 万灵之子 Scion of the All-Spirit
Scion of the All-Spirit Paragon Path.description:
「万灵将世界展现在我眼前，现在我会将这些事交给你。」

Prerequisite:

尽管许多守望者都口头上认可万灵的存在，但你却欢迎万灵进入你的灵魂深处，将自己转变为万灵的强大助力，力求在你所做的一切中彰显万灵的真理。

成为万灵之子，是一种改变你人生的体验。你摒弃了你凡人生活中那些似乎无关紧要的琐事，而去拥抱了存在于万物中的伟大灵魂。尽管你仍然存在于肉体之中，但你却与万灵建立了一种灵性的共鸣，重塑了你的本质，并将你的灵魂与最伟大的原力灵魂相融合。你是万灵的纯粹代表，寻求通过运用万灵赋予你的力量来保护自然界。

11级：万灵行动 All-Spirit Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你成为虚体并获得相位移动，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：万灵打击 All-Spirit Strike

Benefit: 每当你造成重击时，你的伤害无视目标的所有抗力，包括虚体。

11级：万灵之音 Voice of the All-Spirit

12级：万灵步 All-Spirit Step

16级：分享万灵 Share the All-Spirit

Benefit: 每当你花费一个回复力时，离你5格内的一个盟友进行一次豁免检定，并在此豁免检定上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值。

20级：万灵化形 Form of the All-Spirit

Jack-of-All-Trades Paragon Path.name: 万事通 Jack-of-All-Trades
Jack-of-All-Trades Paragon Path.description:
「对...我能做这个，那个...还有那个。」

Prerequisite:

You are a jack-of-all-trades; learning new skills comes naturally to you, and you enjoy pitting your abilities against any challenge. Your thirst for knowledge will drive you to learn new skills until the day you die.

Since your youth, you have had an intense yearning to learn more than what books and teachers could provide. You understood from a young age that knowledge and skill can take you places that money and influence can't. You hoard knowledge the way a dragon covets its treasure, though you are happy to share it with anyone you consider worthy, or when doing so suits your fancy.

Folks might consider you a pack rat or a dabbler, but you know that the items you collect and the skills you acquire will help you in the future. And when you're there to save the day, anyone who derided your habits will realize the mistake and thank you.

Eladrin are a natural choice for this path because of their high Dexterity and Intelligence, as well as the fact that they gain an additional skill of their choice. Humans also excel as jacks-of-all-trades because of their vast variety of experiences and versatility of skill and knowledge.

11级：涉猎者 Dabbler

Benefit: 你在所有技能检定上获得+2加值。

11级：专家攻袭 Expert Assault

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在技能检定上获得+5加值，直到你的回合结束。

11级：恶棍哲学 Scoundrel's Philosophy

12级：才华横溢 Always a Natural

16级：进阶涉猎者 Advanced Dabbler

Benefit: 你在三个技能上受训 。

20级：书中全技 Every Trick in the Book

Deadstalker Paragon Path.name: 亡灵追猎者 Deadstalker
Deadstalker Paragon Path.description:
「不朽必须被终结，寄生虫。」

Prerequisite:

有着与生俱来的探察亡灵的天赋，你决心以毕生致力来追猎和消灭这些可憎之物。或许这一天命的召唤作为死亡主题的传统传承自你的父母。也可能复仇才是你毁灭不死者的真实动机。也许你把你的天赋视为一种允许你保护弱者的天赐。你引导你的敏锐知觉化作致命的精准和平滑的操控——这两点同时也会帮你对抗活物的。

11级：猎亡者行动 Deadstalker's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你不会因任何原因给任何敌人提供战斗优势，并且不会被擒拿，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：不屈之血 Indomitable Blood

Benefit: 你在对抗魅惑和恐惧效果的豁免检定上获得+2加值。

11级：穿刺猛击 Impaling Blow

12级：立时脱困 Deadwalker Instant Escape

16级：直死之眼 Deadeye

Benefit: 每轮一次，你在对一个你以攻击命中的单个不死目标的伤害骰上获得+5加值。

20级：死眼直击 Deadeye Strike
Deadstalker Paragon Path.requirements: [[吸血鬼传统|吸血鬼传统 <吸血鬼血统> Vampiric Heritage <Vampire Bloodline>]]专长

Keeper of the Past Paragon Path.name: 往日卫士 Keeper of the Past
Keeper of the Past Paragon Path.description:
「我的先祖通过我说话，她的话对你来说可不是什么好兆头。」

Prerequisite:

每当一个瓦伦纳的新生命降生时，往日卫士都会在场，以确定将引导这个孩子度过一生的先祖精魂是谁。当每一个瓦伦纳的生命结束时，往日卫士都会评判这名死者的一生，以确保每一个伟大的先祖精魂都能永垂不朽。以这种方式，往日卫士们引导着每一个瓦伦纳人从诞生之日到死亡之日走完他的人生。无论一名往日卫士使用何种形式的力量，他们都同样崇拜并且从受尊敬的先祖之处得到力量。往日卫士之间的区别不在于他们的力量来源，而在于他们汲取先祖力量的方式。萨满通常与守护他们的祖灵有着血缘关系，是伟大先祖的直系后代。督军则会以身作则——将先祖的训导付诸于战场。诗人们则会激励同伴们效仿古代英雄的伟业。不管以什么具体的方式，作为往日卫士，你与先祖的灵魂交流，并接受他们的建议和指导。有时候甚至是直接并使用来自先祖的光荣力量。

11级：远古仇敌 Ancient Enemies

Benefit: 你在关于巨人和地精的怪物知识检定上获得等同于你智力调整值的加值。你同时能够流利的说，读，和写巨人语和地精语。

11级：鼓舞行动 Inspirational Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，每个能看到并且听见你的盟友在速度上获得+4威能加值，直到你下一回合开始。

11级：熟练鼓舞 Inspirational Practice

Benefit: 当你使用遭遇或每日威能命中一个敌人时，直到你下一回合结束，该敌人提供战斗优势。

11级：报复打击 Retributive Strike

12级：先祖化身 Ancestral Avatar

16级：先祖报应 Ancestral Retribution

Benefit: 当一名敌人对一个由你每日攻击威能造成的效果豁免成功时，该敌人受到5点持续心灵伤害（豁免终止）。

20级：祖灵风暴 Storm of the Ancestors
Keeper of the Past Paragon Path.requirements: 精灵；诗人、萨满或督军；必须信仰先祖之灵（the Spirits of the Past）

Ancestral Incarnate Paragon Path.name: 往世化身 Ancestral Incarnate
Ancestral Incarnate Paragon Path.description:
「也许你穷尽一生学会了这知识。而鄙陋如我，则以十二世的时间『掌握』它。」

Prerequisite:

所有的天族多多少少都会有些前世的记忆，而他们也把自己当作是这些前世化身的精神后裔。对于你来说，前世的记忆更加清晰。作为一名先祖化身，你可以轻易地呼唤前世的精神――可能来自于几个世纪以前的精神――来指引你、保护你甚至是挫败你的敌人。那些冒失鬼在与你交战的时候将学会：与他们交战的不仅仅是一个今世的你，还有千千万万曾经的你。

11级：恢复行动 Resurgent Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外行动时，你可以恢复一个在此遭遇中已使用过的遭遇攻击威能。此威能的等级必须不能高于你的等级 - 4，而且你必须在进行额外行动时使用此威能。

11级：从容面貌 Serene Countenance

Benefit: 你在对抗使你晕眩或震慑的效果的豁免骰上获得+2加值。

11级：往世护神 Past-Life Guardian

12级：往世奴仆 Past-Life Servant

16级：往世侍僧 Past-Life Acolytes

Benefit: 当你施展任何仪式时，你可以呼唤3个你前世的灵魂化身走出你的身体来帮助你。每个化身给予你在仪式技能检定上的+2加值，或提供一个回复力支付仪式所需的回复力――如果有的话。化身数量20级时为4个，25级时为5个，30级时为6个。

20级：往世先锋 Past-Life Vanguard

Adept of Whispers Paragon Path.name: 微语导师 Adept of Whispers
Adept of Whispers Paragon Path.description:
「智者知道人不可能同时既说又听。]

Prerequisite:

创造之语的力量可以将元素按照你的意愿任意扭曲，不过即便是凡人的言辞也同样具有毁灭和创造的能量。与其侃侃而谈，不如侧耳倾听，在安静的理解中寻找真正的智慧。你说话的方式简洁而柔和，并且无比谨慎地斟酌着用词。你妥善地使用着寄宿在你的话语中的力量，即创造之语的力量，令你的思想和灵魂与你所侍奉的神灵完全一致。

11级：先导之动 Adept's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时在神术威能的攻击骰上获得+2加值，且你可将神术威能的冲击范围或爆发范围增加1。此效果持续到你下一回合开始。

11级：沉默外表 Silent Presence

Benefit: 你在隐秘检定、洞察检定、和威吓检定上获得+2加值，且生物不能以盲视或震动感知来察觉到你。你在唬骗检定和交涉检定上受到-2减值。

11级：告诫微语 Admonishing Whisper

12级：恢复之语 Restorative Word

16级：振奋之声 Raised Voice

Benefit: 当你使用一个神术攻击威能时，你可以选择在做出任何攻击检定前使用振奋之声。对于此攻击，当你掷出19-20时即可造成重击，且敌人在对抗此攻击的效果的豁免检定上受到-2减值。然而，你晕眩直到你下一回合结束。

20级：末日低语 Whisper of Doom

Vistani Execrator Paragon Path.name: 维斯塔尼咒诅使 Vistani Execrator
Vistani Execrator Paragon Path.description:
「I am the lurking sickness in your veins, the lurking fear in your mind, and the lurking stain on your soul. From me you'll receive no less than you deserve.」

Prerequisite:

Rumor and legend speak of horrifying Vistani curses. Few are willing to put these dark parables to the test. Threat of ill fortune or a wasting disease is enough to keep the Vistani safe from numerous threats.
