Blood Moon Stalker Paragon Path.description:
「今夜，红色的满月升上天空，这是血月之夜，吾之夜。」

Prerequisite:

有的传说讲述了血月，在一个夜晚甚至一个季度的时间内，太初之兽以实体漫步于这个世界的荒野。据说在血月出现期间，世界上的捕食者更为危险，也更为饥渴。按照某些传说的说法，血月是这个自然界的反常现象，是由神祗或者被冒犯的原始精魂所引发的。无论血月究竟是如何产生的，又有什么具体的效果，有的德鲁伊将其作为用以捍卫自然平衡的狂野激情的象征。

你是一位血月行者，钟爱自己的野兽形态，并且选择能让你在野兽形态下更具威胁的威能。当你的身躯化成兽型，你的心灵也更为野性。你带着自豪和愉悦忘情的战斗，在自身野兽本能和感知的指引下攻击你的敌人。你不仅是凶猛的猎手，安静的潜行者更是原始精魂的守护者，确保不论是神祗还是原初者都不会越界。

你和你的同伴或先辈都以血月之力捍卫这个世界。

11级：血月行动 Blood Moon Action

Benefit: 当你在野兽形态下花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能同时以一个自由动作做一次近战基本攻击。

11级：血月猎手 Blood Moon Hunger

Benefit: 当你以一次近战或近程攻击使一个敌人的生命值降到0时，你能以一个自由动作使用你的回气。

11级：血月狂暴 Blood Moon Frenzy

12级：野性精准 Feral Accuracy

16级：狂暴之爪 Wild Push

Benefit: 当你在野兽形态下时，你的重击范围变为19-20。

20级：殊死搏杀 Nature's Grave
Blood Moon Stalker Paragon Path.requirements: 德鲁伊，[[野性变身 Wild Shape]]威能

Swift Strider Paragon Path.name: 迅捷阔步者 Swift Strider
Swift Strider Paragon Path.description:
「站在两极之间，一个你熟悉的世界，以及一个你永远无法触及的世界。」

Prerequisite:

You move with liquid grace and in a way that shows that you are unhindered by your environment. The primal spirits with whom you ally yourself guide your steps so that you can move without fear, boldly moving faster than your foes can track. You might use hidden pathways and shortcuts through the world. Or you might have taken your first step into the spirit world and, by doing so, now have the same freedom enjoyed by the land's spirit custodians.

Becoming a swift strider allows you to move with astonishing speed. You can anticipate your enemy's attacks and spring to safety. As you follow this path, your body begins to blur when you move, making it hard for foes to protect themselves from your strikes.

You attack while moving, spin away when your enemies hit you, and, eventually, speed through their ranks, delivering strikes that rob them of their mobility and increase your speed. By moving just outside the reach of your foes, you can deliver punishing attacks with your seeker powers to contain and control them so that your allies can move in for the kill.

11级：防御快步 Defensive Shift

Benefit: 在每个你的回合内你第一次快步时，你在AC和反射上获得+2加值直到你下一回合开始。

11级：逃离行动 Escaping Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能以一个次要动作进行快步，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：幻影攻击 Blurring Offensive

12级：现世报 Swift Vengeance

16级：阔步打击 Swift Stride Assault

Benefit: 当你进行移动动作且结束移动时离你起始位置至少3格远，你在轻投和重投武器的伤害骰上获得等同于你力量调整值的加值，直到你的回合结束。

20级：小飞弹 Striding Barrage
Swift Strider Paragon Path.requirements: 巡者，「灵魂束约」职业特性

Ravenkin Paragon Path.name: 鸦后神眷 Ravenkin
Ravenkin Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

From time to time, the Raven Queen's gaze lingers on a mortal soul whose courage and devotion sparks her cold heart. To these mortals she sends a special boon—a raven-shaped shadow whose appearance is a sign of her favor.

Those who gain this blessing are known as ravenkin, and from that point on they are never truly alone. The shadow raven that keeps them company is a physical connection to the god of death. Devout worshipers of the Raven Queen are the most common ravenkin. However, some ravenkin are recent converts to her faith, unsure of what they have done to warrant such a gift.

Since the blessing that marked you as a ravenkin, you have been aware that you are watched by the Raven Queen. Some might grow uneasy under such scrutiny, but you embrace it, knowing that you have a special place in the god's plans.

11级：影鸦魔宠 Shadow Raven Familiar

The raven that has come to you is a herald of the Raven Queen's favor and an omen of the destiny that opens before you. Its unreadable eyes watch you, giving the impression that it serves another even though it always does your bidding.

Benefit: 你获得影鸦 Shadow Raven魔宠

11级：乌鸦之视 Sight of the Raven

As long as your shadow raven is perched on your shoulder, darkness can hold no secrets from you.

Benefit: 当你的影鸦 Shadow Raven魔宠在被动模式下，你具有黑暗视觉

11级：凶残行动 Murderous Action

Melding your soul with the shadow raven, you learn to project your attacks through it. When you push yourself, your magic unfurls as a haze of shadow that lashes out at your unsuspecting foes.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用一个奥术攻击威能，且你的影鸦 Shadow Raven魔宠在主动模式时，该攻击可以把影鸦的空间作为起始点

11级：寒冬之鸦 Winter's Raven

The shadow raven watches over you on behalf of the god of death and brings cold vengeance against those who would harm you.

12级：鸦之侵掠 Raven Harrier

Your shadow raven is no stranger to combat, and proves it by harassing your enemies to thwart their defenses.

16级：鸦之连结 Bonded Raven

The rapport you share with your shadow raven connects both of you in spirit and thought.

Benefit: 你能和你的影鸦 Shadow Raven魔宠在10格内以心灵感应沟通。你必须有对它的效果线才能以此方式沟通。你的魔宠同时在所有防御上获得+2加值

20级：鸦之无情 An Unkindness of Ravens

You have served the Raven Queen well, and she rewards you in your time of need. From the cold heights of Letherna, a flock of shadow ravens is dispatched to fight at your side.
Ravenkin Paragon Path.requirements: 任意奥术职业，在宗教上受训

Raven Herald Paragon Path.name: 鸦之先驱 Raven Herald
Raven Herald Paragon Path.description:
「一切事物都会终结。见证它是我的任务」

Prerequisite:

The transition to death is a holy road on which all living things are pilgrims. Every creature steps onto that road at birth. When fate's appointed hour comes, every creature steps off into whatever waits beyond the finite and visible path. So it has been, and so it should be. These are the truths of the Raven Queen.

Yet some do not hold to the proper path. Brazen mortals defy the natural order by avoiding that righteous hour of ending. A few do so by magic or other means, the most common of which is to become undead.

Undead aren't, in and of themselves, offensive to the Raven Queen. Still, shambling dead brought back to a mockery of life through foul magic deserve to be destroyed. So do those undead that defy true death by serving other entities, such as Orcus or Vecna. A few bold souls manage to elude death without otherwise blaspheming the Raven Queen's edicts. Still, demise must come for them in time as well.

It is the duty of any who serve the Raven Queen to bring down the proud, showing them the equality that only death provides. Within temples where the Raven Queen is esteemed above all others, the clergy offers support and training for those who would be her instruments of death. Cults form around the ideal of righteous killing, of becoming heralds of death. Common folk know of the Raven Queen's heralds and whisper of their mission when sudden loss of life visits the prideful, the wicked, or those cursed by undeath.

You have consciously devoted yourself to becoming a tool in the Raven Queen's wintry hands. Perhaps you came to this commitment on your own, or maybe you have an affiliation with the Raven Queen's hierarchy in the world. The origin of your connection to the mistress of winter makes little difference. As a harbinger of destiny, you know that every foe who falls before you has met its appropriate end.

11级：死亡仪式 Death Rites

Benefit: 你获得仪式施法者 Ritual Caster专长且在宗教上受训。你同时在死亡豁免上获得+4加值

11级：杀戮行动 Slaying Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点对一个邻近的重伤或有不死关键字的敌人进行一次近战基本攻击时，你在这次攻击骰上获得+2加值。

11级：揭露灾厄 Unraveling Blow

12级：死亡面纱 Death's Veil

16级：光耀前锋 Radiant Striker

Benefit: 每次你造成「偷袭」伤害时，你可选择将该伤害化为光耀伤害。

20级：终结通报 Herald the End

Winter Fury Paragon Path.name: 严冬怒火 Winter Fury
Winter Fury Paragon Path.description:
「万物在春天复苏，除了你。」

Prerequisite:

冬天与死亡是自然循环的一部分，旧的消亡为新生让出了道路。你是一个杀手，一个冬天的使者。你将带走敌人的生命，让他们成为新生的培土。

冬天是自然用来淘汰弱者的测试。你试图拥抱冬天。从比山之巅更高的寒冷的天空精魂交流。从那极北的寒冷荒地精魂获取饥寒怒火。用寒冷的愤怒武装自己。

11级：复原之冰 Surging Ice

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来做一次攻击时，此攻击命中的第一目标和每个邻近它的敌人定身直到你下一回合结束。

11级：冰心收割者 Ice Heart Reaper

Benefit: 你在对定身目标的攻击骰上获得 +1加值，在伤害骰上获得+2加值。

11级：严冬之握 Clutch of Winter

12级：冰川之盔甲 Armor of Glaciers

16级：寒霜收割者 Frost Reaver

Benefit: 你获得10点寒冰抗力。当你造成无类型的伤害时，你可改为造成寒冰伤害。

20级：世界末日狂暴 World's End Rage

Stoneblessed Paragon Path.name: 岩石赐福者 Stoneblessed
Stoneblessed Paragon Path.description:
「山里有什么？让我掰开来瞧瞧！」

Prerequisite:

谁也说不清歌利亚斯的血统和他们所居住的山脉的联系。如同这些山脉一样，歌利亚斯从不畏惧围绕着他们的生活的狂风暴雪和悬崖峭壁。大多数的歌利亚斯骄傲于居高立下的力量，但有少数则开始体现山脉的精神。

你就是这样的一个英雄，一个歌利亚斯岩石赐福者，与岩石和山脉有着非同寻常的联系。脚下岩石鼓舞着你，大地的元素滋养着你，直到有一天你成为故乡峰顶的化身。你可以从岩石岩石中抽取力量，从而超越凡人的形态，作出惊人的动作。你的攻击有如山倾地裂。当你到达此典范之道的顶峰，你可以变成一块实体的石头，压碎那些想干掉你的敌人。

当你踏上这条道路，作为你与山脉之间紧密联系的体现，你的特性和形体也会缓慢变形。你的皮肤如砂岩一般坚硬，保护你不受伤害；你的眼睛失去水分变得如钻石般闪耀，反射出彩虹般的光芒；石质皮肤紧贴着你的肩膀，你的肘部也变成晶体。这些特性标志着你是一个真正的守护者，是歌利亚斯的英雄！

11级：石皮行动 Stonehide Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时在AC上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：非凡触及 Unusual Reach

Benefit: 你的近战触及范围增加1。

11级：山石狂扫 Mountain Sweep

12级：顶峰优势 Summit Advantage

16级：山石碾压 Mountain Crush

Benefit: 当你以双手武器造成重击时，此攻击造成等同于2倍你体质调整值的额外伤害。

20级：雪崩之击 Avalanche Assault

Wildfire Genasi Paragon Path.name: 野火元素裔 Wildfire Genasi
Wildfire Genasi Paragon Path.description:
「把你的剑放回鞘里，白痴，否则我就把它熔成废铁。」

Prerequisite:

有人说，炽热的火焰存在于每个元素裔的内心之中，不过就算这是真的，那也无法与你体内那狂暴的地狱烈焰相比。你是操纵烈焰与烟尘的大师，将所有敢于怀疑你力量的人统统烧成炭渣和灰烬。火焰在你的手中无比的温顺，它尽情的在你的掌上舞动，并且对你的每个念头作出回应

你是烈焰的后裔，你的力量源于炙热的地狱之心，你用咆哮的烈焰灼烧你的敌人或保护你的伙伴。你身边盘旋着不熄的火焰旋风，任何胆敢攻击你的人都会被火焰所烧灼。

火焰存在于你的生命血脉之中，虽然对他人而言意味着毁灭，但是却带给你无穷的活力。那些在战斗中面对你的可怜家伙们并不知道，他们要面对的可不是一个凡人，而是火山之力与熔岩之血，任何胆敢朝你举起武器的人必将感受到烈火焚身的极度痛苦

11级：炽热涌动 Fiery Surge

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，所有邻近你的敌人受到等同于一半你的等级 + 你力量调整值的火焰伤害。另外，你在带火焰关键字的攻击骰上获得+1加值，直到你此回合结束

11级：操控烈焰 Control the Flames

Benefit: 当你显能「烈火之魂」时，任何离你2格内的盟友共享你的种族火焰抗力

11级：焰魂燃烧 Firesoul Combustion

12级：生命余烬 Embers of Life

16级：焰魂灵气 Firesoul Aura

Benefit: 你始终被一层闪烁的火焰罩衣包围。若一个敌人以近战攻击命中你，则它受到5点火焰伤害

20级：焰魂爆燃 Firesoul Conflagration
Wildfire Genasi Paragon Path.requirements: 元素裔，「烈火之魂」元素显能

Wildcat Stalker Paragon Path.name: 野性漫游者 Wildcat Stalker
Wildcat Stalker Paragon Path.description:
「这只猫敏感且凶猛，就如同它的主人一样」

Prerequisite:

独立、勇气以及机敏的头脑与身体——这正是猫所拥有的。在采取行动之前它喜欢从一个不错的角度来仔细观察。猫都很爱玩耍，通常它们安静且整洁，但是打起架来它们也毫不含糊。这是一个专擅伏击与致命突袭的隐形杀手，它们会以最快的速度结果猎物。当朋友在周围时，猫便会与其分享一切。

你可以从猫的身上看到你自己，同样的你也可以在自己身上看到一点猫的影子。你也是机敏的猎手，拥有猫样的优雅与胆量。突袭与快攻对你来说最为拿手，同时，你也能够照顾好自己。

这也许就是为什么你选择了充满野性的大猫做为你的伙伴（又或者是它选择了你）。你激发了你的猫咪的潜力，在认知、秘密、感觉上获益良多。在你身旁，你的野兽伙伴已经成为一个强大的勇士，利用其攻击技能，击倒你们共同的敌人，就好像它们的游戏那样。

你的大猫的名气也会随着你的事迹而流传。它已经成为那些遇见你的，受你影响的以及反对你的人确认你的一个标志。当讲述你的故事时，在那些神话记述中你的猫会始终站在你的身旁，如同你们是一个整体。

11级：瞄准要害 Neck Seeker

Benefit: 你与你的野兽伙伴在对任何处于重伤状态且被指定为你的标的的敌人的攻击骰和伤害骰上获得+1加值。

11级：藏身入影 Prowling Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时获得隐蔽直到你下回合结束。

11级：直视破绽 Cat-Eyed Strike

12级：悄无声息 Lurk Unseen

16级：猫之猎物 Cat's Quarry

Benefit: 当你或者你的野兽伙伴将一个敌人的生命值降到0时（无论此敌人是否是你的标的），你可以用一个自由动作代替次要动作来指定一个新的标的。

20级：豹袭 Panther Pounce
Wildcat Stalker Paragon Path.requirements: 游侠，「兽王」职业特性，野兽伙伴（猫）

Feral Spirit Paragon Path.name: 野性之魂 Feral Spirit
Feral Spirit Paragon Path.description:
「He doesn't like you. I don't like you either. Watch yourself―we both bite.」

Prerequisite:

To most mortals, an animal is a pet or a tool, a companion or a means to an end. Such creatures provide food, labor, protection, and even company. Only in rare cases does the relationship between master and beast transcend these mundane trappings. Every beastmaster is an exception to this generality, learning to become one formidable unit with an animal that is at once a friend, a guardian, and a weapon. Beastmasters know that, after the bond is formed, the capabilities and fate of master and beast are linked.

Beastmasters among many races have nurtured the mystical connection between master and pet. They cultivated communication that transcends speech and approaches telepathy. As such a beastmaster grew in power, the magic of the world infused the relationship. It bound the animal and mortal closer together, driven to do so by the devotion, ritual connection, and common cause the two shared. Contact among peoples spread this technique, which some claim originated with elves.

Elf or not, you've managed to foster such a transcendent relationship with your beast companion. Although each of you is fiercely independent and deadly, you share emotions and thoughts. Each knows when the other is in need. You work in unison to fell your foes, and even your allies swear you act to support each other more quickly than any communication could possibly allow. In time, you might grow so close as to seem like one incredible being sharing two bodies.

11级：可怖伙伴 Fearsome Partnership

Benefit: 当你距离你的野兽伙伴10格内时，野兽伙伴的伤害骰获得+2加值。

11级：野性活动 Feral Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你的野兽伙伴同时在攻击骰上获得+4加值直到你下回合开始。

11级：野性转移 Feral Diversion

12级：灵魂迅捷 Swiftness of Spirit

16级：灵魂链接 Spirit Link

Benefit: 当你的野兽伙伴使用回气时，你可选择花费一个你的回复力而不是野兽的。

20级：双魂合击 Twin-Soul Strike

Nocturnal Paragon Path.name: 夜行者 Nocturnal
Nocturnal Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

Your innate connection to shadow, night, and the freedom you find within the darkness led you to the nocturnal path. By embracing this connection, you begin to wield the power shared by the shadowy predators that preceded you. You can step between this world and the world of shadow, summoning the aid of your nocturnal packmates from that shadow in times of need.

11级：暗夜跨步 Nightstrider

As a nocturnal predator, you stride in and out of the Shadowfell at will. When you launch yourself at an enemy, the barriers thrown up by the material world are of no concern.

Benefit: 当你冲锋一个你可见的生物时，你在此冲锋的移动上获得相位移动

11级：夜行者狂暴 Nocturnal Frenzy

In the thick of battle, blood calls to blood. When you push yourself to the limit, each successful strike unleashes greater fury.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用一个随意攻击威能且命中了至少一个目标时，然后你能以一个自由动作冲锋

11级：品尝黑血 Savor the Black Blood

You are a creature of the hunt, drawing strength from the fear of your prey as you stalk it. When the moment comes to strike, your dark bloodlust revitalizes you as you lay into your foe.

12级：召唤群影 Summon the Shadow Pack

As your status in the shadow pack rises, you are able to summon others of your kind to your aid. Your call brings forth giant birds of prey, great cats, and other predators whose shadowy forms shift and flow around you.

16级：两界猎人 Hunter of Two Worlds

As a nocturnal, you are a member of a pack that exists in two worlds at once. Through careful focus, you can slip the bonds of space to embrace your shadow nature, letting you move unhindered for a time.

Benefit: 当你使用一个由标准动作替换来的移动动作时，你可以失去一次回复力，使你在这个移动动作中获得相位移动

20级：秽恶捕食者 Tainted Predator

You are a master hunter among the creatures of your pack, and you can channel the dark life force of the deadliest predators.

Watcher of the Night Paragon Path.name: 夜之看守者 Watcher of the Night
Watcher of the Night Paragon Path.description:
「你对我而言，没有秘密」

Prerequisite:

你知道被关在门后的秘密。当每一个角落都隐藏着来自幽暗地城的威胁时，要守护人民的平静生活使他们不会被彻底毁灭，就只能够靠你的警觉了。

11级：夜之看守者行动 Watcher of the Night's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时在隐秘检定和侦查检定（包括被动侦查）上获得+5威能加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：对抗阴影 Against the Shadows

Benefit: 当你攻击邻近的生物时，你无视它的隐蔽

11级：奥术之刃 Arcane Blade

12级：沒有秘密 No More Secrets

16级：阴影杀手 Shadowslayer

Benefit: 当你有任何隐蔽时，当你对一个给你提供战斗优势的目标做借机攻击时，你能造成「偷袭」伤害，即使你失手

20级：瞠目巨创 Glaring Wound

Dujun of Erathis Paragon Path.name: 伊拉西斯的督军 Dujun of Erathis
Dujun of Erathis Paragon Path.description:
「When diplomacy and philosophy fail, war brings advancement to the benighted.」

Prerequisite:

Progress, taming of the wilds for the good of all, innovation, collaboration, and the rule of law—these are the values Erathis has set before mortals. Yet the nature of the world opposes her. Empires rise like beacons only to be shattered within a few centuries, leaving flickering shards of civilization behind. Still, in each age, a mighty and ambitious few rise to beat back the shadows and create a safe haven for common folk.

Those who follow Erathis's edicts range from plucky adventurers who rid the wilderness of dangers to would-be lords who subdue untamed lands to call their own. The god of civilization delights in the expansion of organized habitation. She blesses those who boldly make way for progress, as well as those who defend existing societies against fell beasts.

To truly and fully take Erathis's dogma to heart is to embrace both cooperation and leadership. You must be educated in the ways of governance and regulation, as well as be cognizant of the follies of history that ravaged the cultures of old. You must look outside the confines of secure walls and take Erathis's banner to new territory. To sit idly within the halls of established civilized edifices simply won't do.

So far, you have proven to be one of the few who can undertake this mission. You know that a true leader must be an authority in combat and in peace, but also be a guide who elicits the help of capable collaborators. You cultivate camaraderie, planning a meaningful role for all in battle and outside it. You have polished your party into the perfect cohesive unit, proven by the extraordinary heights at which it performs under your guidance. Now, it's time to move onward to broader conquest and, perhaps, your own dominion.

11级：组织行动 Organizing Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来给予每个能看见且听见你的盟友一个在他下一回合内的额外移动动作，而不是自己进行额外动作

11级：公共援助 Communal Aid

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0ZYc2nJqa9AlruyU]{振奋呼声 Inspiring Word}时，目标可以花费一个你的回复力而不是他自己的，但仍按照目标的回复力值计算

11级：分级进攻 Graded Assault

12级：统一势 Unification Stance

16级：团结美德 Solidarity's Virtue

Benefit: 你和离你10格内的盟友在夹击或援助他人时获得额外的+1加值。

20级：强硬外交 Diplomacy of Steel

Hospitaler Paragon Path.name: 医护者 Hospitaler
Hospitaler Paragon Path.description:
「我是治疗者和护卫者，战友的后盾，敌人的噩梦。」

Prerequisite:

你的灵魂引领你踏上研究医术的道路。在战场上，你如同光辉的希望灯塔一般为你的同伴提供医护。当你为伤者提供援助，为濒死者净化灵魂时，你体现了仁慈和关怀--特别是在将对敌人的伤害转化为对队友的治疗时。

11级：医护者之祝福 Hospitaler's Blessing

Benefit: 在你当前挑战的一个敌人对你的一个盟友进行一次攻击时（此攻击不包括你），无论此攻击命中与否，该盟友都恢复等同于你一半等级 + 你感知调整值的生命值。

11级：医护者行动 Hospitaler's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，离你5格内的所有盟友恢复等于你的感知调整值的生命值。

11级：守护之打击 Warding Blow

12级：治愈之泉 Healing Font

16级：医护者的关怀 Hospitaler's Care

Benefit: 你将你的魅力调整值加到你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YViAuS30Bvn8oxke]{圣疗术 Lay on Hands}威能恢复的生命值上。

20级：活人剑 Life-Giving Smite

Arbiter of Forgotten Justice Paragon Pat.name: 遗忘正义之仲裁者 Arbiter of Forgotten Justice
Arbiter of Forgotten Justice Paragon Pat.description:
「Though Amoth is gone, all he stood for, all he fought for, remains. My very presence is proof—but if you require more, I shall be happy to deliver.」

Prerequisite:

Some invokers have learned to harness Amoth's lingering might by using the powers presented above,but a few—a rare but growing few—have gone further.They have devoted themselves in full to Amoth,spreading justice in his memory and drawing at leastin part on his own surviving might to do so.

You are one of these select few. Whether you havededicated yourself exclusively to Amoth's teachings,or serve other gods of justice in memory of Amoth,you draw upon the lingering energy of the murderedLord of kalandurren. As an arbiter of forgotten justice, you know that one must deal with the evils thatplague mortals and gods alike. Their crimes must bepunished—from simple human greed to the murder ofAmoth.

11级：惩治行动 Retributive Action

Benefit: 当一个离你20格内的盟友重伤或生命值降到0时，你能以一个借机动作花费一个行动点。当你这么做时，你在攻击骰和伤害骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束，且你进行一个标准动作

11级：正义之银 Sliver of Justice

Benefit: 当你以神术攻击威能造成重击时，一个离该目标10格内的由你选择的盟友恢复等同于5 + 你感知调整值的生命值

11级：猛击光刃 Smiting Blades

12级：惠赐信徒 Favor the Faithful

16级：正义灯塔 Beacon of Justice

Benefit: 你的光耀攻击掷出19-20即可造成重击。若对抗恶魔和魔鬼，则18-20即可造成重击

20级：魂火覆罩 Soulfire Mantle
Arbiter of Forgotten Justice Paragon Pat.requirements: 神导士，必须遵守阿莫斯的戒律

Self-Forged Paragon Path.name: 义体改造者 Self-Forged
Self-Forged Paragon Path.description:
「我会通过任何必要的手段来强化我自己。」

Prerequisite:

在现今的科瓦雷社会中，机关人得到了许多关注。其他种族对待他们的态度格子迥异，从将他们视为物品或财产到将他们按照新兴的智慧种族对待，都有发生。对待机关人，人们或冷漠，或反感，或宽容。而你，作为一名义体化改造人，则有着完全不同的观点：你希望加入他们，成为机关人这个种族中的一员。在终末战争期间，一小部分创造出了机关人这个种族的优秀技术人员认定了人类未来进化的方向：义体化。此后，他们离开了前雇主的掌握，并开始探寻通过在自己的血肉之躯上增加机械组件来强化自身的道路。

成为一名义体化改造人的一部就是为自己安装一部战斗机械手，这是一种样子很类似全身板甲的五指铁手套的钢材质机械化手。这个战斗机械手将替换你原有的手，自此以后，你可以将各种战斗武器和设施安装在这只战斗机械手上。当然，只有最为狂热的机械主义者才会选择这条伤残自身的道路。

11级：强化行动 Fortifying Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你获得等同于5 + 一半你的等级的临时生命值

11级：战斗机械手 Battlefist

Benefit: 你拥有一个战斗机械手，它代替了你的一只手。它是一个你擅长的近战武器，属于硬头锤武器组，造成1d8伤害，+3擅长加值。你能以战斗机械手持握物品，就如同是你的手一般。你可以对战斗机械手使用附魔魔法物品 Enchant Magic Item，分解魔法物品 Disenchant Magic Item和转移附魔 Transfer Enchantment仪式。对战斗机械手使用分解魔法物品 Disenchant Magic Item不会摧毁它

11级：支撑结构 Supporting Construction

Benefit: 你移植到身体上的部件使你更加持久。你在对抗持续伤害的豁免骰上获得+2加值

11级：机械手打击 Battlefist Smash

12级：自我修复 Self-Repair

16级：更多义体 More Metal Than Flesh

Benefit: 你可以附加和嵌入各种附件，如同你是机关人一般

16级：附加回弹 Added Resilience

Benefit: 当你进行死亡豁免检定时，你可以取10或掷出的更好的结果

20级：猛击铁拳 Flailing Gauntlet
Self-Forged Paragon Path.requirements: 除机关人之外的任意种族，必须是机关术士

Ocular Adept Paragon Path.name: 异瞳使 Ocular Adept
Ocular Adept Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

For those who wish to control their foes from a distance, there is no better totem creature than the beholder. Ocular adepts are seekers who wish to control everything they see. They possess minds bursting with energy, looking for release.

The first and greatest expression of the link with your totem creature is the manifestation of a spiriteye. This weapon resembles nothing more than a ghostly eye which floats in front of the ocular adept. Despite its appearance, a seeker can use some of the principles learned with a mundane ranged weapons to fight with the spiriteye. It takes intense concentration and manipulation of the psionic and primal magics to create the spiriteye, but in time, the ocular adept gains mastery of the weapon and can control it with thought alone.

Like the eye tyrant, you can make several swift attacks at range and float across the battlefield to a safer location. Attacks made with your spiriteye resemble the beholder's dreaded eye rays, and you have the same variety of effects with them (albeit with less control).

11级：齐射行动 Blasting Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行远程攻击时，你能以一个自由动作用你的异瞳对另一个目标进行一次远程基本攻击。

11级：异瞳具显 Spiriteye Manifestation

Benefit: 你能以一个自由动作将你的远程武器变为异瞳。你的异瞳使用该远程武器的擅长加值，特性和增强加值，但不再需要弹药或使用动作装填。该转变持续到你以一个次要动作结束或直到你下一次长休息结束。

11级：异瞳射线 Totem Eye Beams

12级：腾扬环视 Soaring, All-Seeing

16级：完美异瞳 Spiriteye Perfection

Benefit: 当你使用异瞳具显特性时，你的异瞳漂浮在你的头顶，你能以精神来控制它进行攻击。你不再需要用手来持用异瞳，且当你使用异瞳进行远程基本攻击时，这次攻击不会引发借机攻击。

20级：破灭速射 Rapid Eye Rays of Doom

Impilturan Demonslayer Paragon Path.name: 因布图恶魔杀手 Impilturan Demonslayer
Impilturan Demonslayer Paragon Path.description:
「如果必须的话喷吐火酸吧。今天我要将你发黑的头骨加入我的收藏品中」

Prerequisite:

因布图（Impiltur）是一片被围困的土地。它曾经是周围王国仰望的繁荣的文明堡垒，金库里装满了黄金和闪闪发光的无价之宝。现在，恶魔在它的荒野中出没，土山嘴山脉（Earthspur Mountains）每天都会出现更多的瘟疫肆虐和令人着迷的噩梦。

作为一个恶魔杀手，你无所畏惧地猎杀那些在你的家园游荡的可憎的怪物。恶魔是大多数冒险家噩梦中的东西，但你的训练和对毁灭恶魔的强烈投入让你有能力放下这些超凡脱俗的恐怖。你猎杀恶魔就像低级游侠猎杀狼或熊一样，把这些令人反感的怪物推倒在地，然后把它们切成碎片。你的死亡处理能力甚至赋予你的盟友绕过恶魔惊人防御的力量。你的双刃是恶魔的克星，在他们肮脏的军团中划出一条血路，并将他们的黑暗势力从你曾经伟大的王国中清除。

11级：恶魔杀手之刃 Demonslayer Blade

Benefit: 你的「猎手标的」职业特性对恶魔造成1d6点额外伤害。

你同时在发现有关恶魔知识的神秘检定上获得+5加值。

11级：恶魔杀手之怒火 Demonslayer's Wrath

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，所有邻近你的敌人在AC上受到-1减值，直到你下一回合结束。

对恶魔来说此减值是-2而不是-1

11级：恶魔杀手之阻 Demonslayer's Hindrance

12级：招架恶魔 Demonward

16级：恶魔厄运 Demon's Misfortune

Benefit: 当你伤害一个恶魔时，此恶魔失去所有抗力直到你下一回合结束。当你对一个不是恶魔的敌人造成重击时，此生物失去所有抗力直到你下一回合结束。

20级：恶魔之祸怒火 Demonbane Flurry

Shadowblade Paragon Path.name: 阴影刀锋 Shadowblade
Shadowblade Paragon Path.description:
「黑暗就是我的武器」

Prerequisite:

你是阴影刀锋，一个能够将多种夜晚之力引入致命武器的刺客。在你的命令下，阴影扭曲摇曳。一个动念，你可以创造阴影刀锋，一种如同钢铁刀刃般锋利的由纯粹黑暗构成的武器。只要你周围存在阴影，你绝不会手无寸铁。

With your shadowblade, you can slice the raw stuff of a foe's shadow. With each cut, you extract part of that essence, and at a foe's death you can infuse that shadow with a magical effect. At your command, the shadows you have harvested appear as looming shades to distract a foe, swirl around you to shield you from sight, or reach forth like hungry apparitions to douse torches and lanterns.

11级：阴影掌控者 Master of Shadows

Benefit: 当你使用你的阴影刀锋将敌人生命降低到0时，你获得1个幽暗碎片。以一个次要动作，你可以消耗1个幽暗碎片来获得下列一种效果

◆你对一个与你邻近的敌人获得战斗优势，直到你下回合结束。

◆你在本回合进行的下一个隐秘检定上获得+5加值。

◆你熄灭一个光源，直到你下回合结束。这个光源必须离你10格之内，且不能大于一盏提灯。

你同时能持有最多5个幽暗碎片。在一次长休息后，你所有未消耗的幽暗碎片消失，但获得1块幽暗碎片。

11级：阴影刀锋行动 Shadowblade Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你在所有攻击上获得战斗优势直到你的回合结束。同时作为此回合最后一个动作，你能以一个自由动作传送10格。

11级：黑夜武器 Weapon of the Night

Benefit: 以一个次要动作，你可以创造一把阴影刀锋。这是一个具有轻投特性的轻刃武器，+3擅长加值，1d8伤害，射程5/10。你获得此武器的擅长。如果在你回合结束时你没有触碰阴影刀锋，则它消失。

11级：灵魂甲虫 Soul Reaver

12级：蔽视面纱 Veil of Unsight

16级：黑夜之眼 Eyes of the Night

Benefit: 你获得黑暗视觉。

20级：阴影诅咒 Shadow Curse

Master Skald Paragon Path.name: 吟唱大师 Master Skald
Master Skald Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You have learned much in your time as a collector of stories, and you have put that knowledge to use as an adventurer. As you progress into the paragon tier, your repertoire of tales and legends grows, as does your arcane scholarship. Your reputation and recognition extend across the world—and even across the planes themselves.

Your skald has reached the rank of master, and you are regarded as such both by your fellow bards and by the world at large.

11级：吟唱诗人行动 Skald's Action

Timing is the better part of heroism. When it comes time to strike quickly, either you do so on your own or you enable a friend to do so in your place.

Benefit: 当你在你的回合内花费一个行动点时，你可以放弃进行额外动作使在你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.yFh0PDqOoJjNn9c3]{吟唱诗人灵气 Skald's Aura}内的一个盟友以一个自由动作进行一个标准动作

11级：舌灿莲花 Cling to Your Words

Your words of encouragement ring in your allies' ears even in the direst of times. When your allies would otherwise plunge into unconsciousness, they cling to your words in the hope of pulling out a victory.

Benefit: 当在你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.yFh0PDqOoJjNn9c3]{吟唱诗人灵气 Skald's Aura}内的一个盟友的生命值降到1以下时，你能以一个即时反应对该盟友使用灵气的医疗增益，但只有当灵气的医疗增益还有剩余次数时才能使用

11级：乘胜追击 Inspiring Success

When you succeed, your allies see your triumph and take note. Though much of the time you are telling them tales of victory or singing songs of success, to actually see you drive your weapon into an enemy can do wonders to reinforce your words.

12级：技能保障 Assured Skill

Someone who has traveled as much as you have has seen more than one person's share of amazing feats of skill. You can relay these tales of achievement to your allies, helping them succeed on a task that they might otherwise fail.

16级：回春妙手 Expert Rejuvenation

When your words allow one of your allies to regain strength, they bring a level of comfort that soothes wounds better than even the most soothing balms.

Benefit: 当你以医疗威能给一个生物恢复生命值时，该生物恢复4点额外生命值

20级：死之旋律 Death March

One of the most lethal arrows in your verbal quiver, this song can either be a dirge for the dead or a eulogy for the lost. When you recount it for your allies, it serves as a none too subtle reminder that death is what awaits them if they fail.

Argent Soul Paragon Path.name: 银白之魂 Argent Soul
Argent Soul Paragon Path.description:
「吾至之处无绝望之立足之地。」

Prerequisite:

You are a brilliant vessel; you embody hope, joy, and endless confidence, and your presence lifts your allies' spirits. On the battlefield, you wash away despair, dispel doubt, and fuel your allies' passions. As an argent soul, you have an uncommonly pure spirit. You see the best in every situation, finding solutions where others find only defeat. Melancholy has no hold on you, for optimism's light burns away grief. Others find your good nature infectious and strive to rise to your example.

The road to becoming an argent soul is varied. You can simply be a good and wholesome person, untouched by the horrors you have witnessed, or you might have been touched by a god, your soul purified and claimed for a higher purpose. Regardless of the cause of your transformation, it is profound.

Whenever you attack with your ardent powers, a silver corona glimmers around you. Those it touches feel their confidence building, the pain from their injuries falling away so that they can keep fighting no matter the odds.

11级：复苏重击 Restoring Critical

Benefit: 当你以炽念使或银白之魂威能造成重击时，一个离你5格内的盟友可以花费一次回复力。

11级：激发行动 Imprisoning Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行攻击时，你和每个离你5格内的盟友获得等同于你体质调整值的临时生命值。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：银白打击 Argent Strike

12级：完美监牢 Burgeoning Reserves

16级：银白毁灭 Argent Devastation

Benefit: 当你以炽念使或银白之魂威能攻击时，你掷出19-20即可造成重击。

20级：银白之血 Argent Flood

Silverstar Paragon Path.name: 银星 Silverstar
Silverstar Paragon Path.description:
「只有女神才能听见你的祈祷，不过我愿意做任何捍卫她们的事情。」

Prerequisite:

你遵循的道路时明时暗，即是天空女神塞伦涅之道。在这每时每刻都在改变的世界上，依然有一件永恒不变的事情：塞伦涅永远都在提防着她那黑暗中的妹妹莎儿的阴谋。银星将来自她们女神的光明与希望带给黑暗中的人们，捍卫着那些其他人失去的东西。

与其他的神不同，塞伦涅愿意和那些并不单独研究她意愿的信徒分享她的力量。法师、邪术师、吟游诗人和术士都可以成为银星。

在魔法灾变之前，塞伦涅在凡间的信徒多是兽化人：狼人、野猪人、熊人和其他因为月亮而变身为动物的人都是她的信徒。在魔法灾变之后，兽化人不断增加，以至于超出了塞伦涅的控制的围。塞伦涅为这些受害者们尽力做她能做到事，但在有些时候，她所能做的只是赐给他们快速的银色刀锋。

11级：变化之女神 Goddess of Changes

Benefit: 你对兽化人携带的疾病免疫。你所有的武器和法器攻击都视为由镀银武器进行的

11级：月之星火 Moonsparked

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，所有离你5格内的敌人不能获得隐蔽和隐形的增益，直到你下一回合结束

11级：开放纪律 Open Discipline

Benefit: 与此典范之道相关联的攻击威能使用的属性是你魅力，智力或感知中最高的那个。那些使用奥术威能的角色能正常地使用他们的法器来施展这些威能

11级：塞伦涅之泪 Tears of Selûne

12级：月光术 Moonglow

16级：月之圣谕 Moon Oracle

Benefit: 当你在你的回合内以攻击命中时，所有离你20格内的盟友在豁免骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束

20级：月火 Moonfire
Silverstar Paragon Path.requirements: 可以使用法器的任意奥术或神术职业，必须信仰塞伦涅

Exorcist of the Silver Flame Paragon Pat.name: 银焰驱魔师 Exorcist of the Silver Flame
Exorcist of the Silver Flame Paragon Pat.description:
「肮脏的恶魔，我驱逐你！滚出这里再也不能回来！」

Prerequisite:

在这个世界中，没有任何力量能比银焰教会更加热衷于打击邪恶。这些神圣战士们不知疲倦地将投入抵抗恶魔、魔鬼、狼人，以及亡灵的永恒战争中，直至战死。多数银焰教会的成员都会在适当的时候选择成为银焰驱魔师。他们往来于世界各地，将自己有限地生命投入无限地为信仰献身中去。

身为银焰驱魔师，你与银焰有着紧密的沟通与链接，并且成为银焰在凡间展现力量的容器与代理人。银焰之音选中了你执行这项伟大的事业，揭露并精华腐朽势力的责任从此就属于你了。你将不断磨砺自己，使自己具备足够的实力去消灭邪恶。你将对你的敌人释放出信仰的力量，以银焰将他们灼烧成灰烬，完成审判并伸张正义。无论你使用任何祷言，一株银白色的火苗都将浮现在你的额头前，昭示你神圣的身份以及在教会中的地位。

11级：银焰行动 Silver Flame Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你的攻击造成2d6额外火焰和光耀伤害，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：烈焰增幅 Bolstered by Flame

Benefit: 当你使用火焰威能时，你和一个离你5格内的盟友获得等同于你感知调整值的临时生命值。

11级：谴责之火 Flame of Censure

12级：戒卫之炎 Warding Flame

16级：银焰驱魔 Silver Exorcism

Benefit: 当你使用火焰或光耀威能攻击一个恶魔，魔鬼，变形生物或不死生物时，你可以重掷任何结果为1或2的伤害骰子。

20级：银焰圣印 Silver Brand
Exorcist of the Silver Flame Paragon Pat.requirements: 任意神术职业，必须信仰银焰

Argentum Alliance Paragon Path.name: 银之联盟 Argentum Alliance
Argentum Alliance Paragon Path.description:
「By the honor of Sephitherax, you oppress these people no more!」

Prerequisite:

High atop the mountains in Hoar Frost Castle, the mighty Sephitherax trains an elite corps of dragonborn so that they can defend the innocent. Honorable and decent people respect the Argentum Alliance, and the unscrupulous and corrupt fear it. All flights of chromatic dragons dread the justice of the Alliance, but the white dragons especially seek the destruction of Hoar Frost Castle. Backed by the power of the ancient silver dragon Sephitherax, the Alliance can help people overthrow evil despots or theocrats. They are the first to respond to volcanic eruptions or floods to maintain order and defend people from those who might prey upon weakness. An Argentum Agent is a savior and a welcome sight to the impoverished.

Many a fierce dragonborn, inspired by the tales of the bravery of the Alliance, makes his or her way to the summit of the tallest mountain to Hoar Frost Castle, where each expects to be judged by Sephitherax. In the bailey yard of the castle, with thick ice encrusting the flags and silverwork, each dragonborn kneels before the hundred steps before the citadel.

The ancient silver questions each supplicant. When Sephitherax raises his left claw, the candidate is banished from Hoar Frost Castle immediately. When the wise old dragon raises his right claw, the supplicant might one day become an Argentum Agent, but that day is not today. He or she is given a hot meal and sent down the mountain with the expectation that he or she will perform worthy tasks before returning to the Castle one year hence to be judged again. If the candidate is worthy, Sephitherax pronounces him or her an Argentum Agent by raising both claws and embracing the dragonborn. Rarely is a dragonborn raised the first time he or she is presented to Sephitherax; many are judged two or three times before Sephitherax declares the supplicant an Argentum Agent.

Brothers train at Hoar Frost Castle, and they learn to harness the frigid winds from Sephitherax. The color of the scales of an Argentum Agent fade over time and are replaced with a metallic gleam. None are sure if this transformation is due to the icy conditions or the proximity and blessing of the Heart of Sephitherax, an amulet artifact bestowed to the ancient silver by Bahamut.

11级：银之行动 Argent Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次攻击时，你标记离你5格内的每个敌人直到你下一回合结束。

11级：银之吐息 Argent Breath

Benefit: 你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}种族威能在其造成的伤害类型以外还造成寒冰伤害。另外，当你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.MW2qXnwLDplZxk3v]{龙息 Dragon Breath}命中一个生物时，该目标受到1d6额外伤害。（21级时为2d6额外伤害）并迟缓直到你下一回合结束。

11级：银之审判 Argent Judgment

12级：抵御坠落 Defend the Fallen

16级：银之庇护 Argent Protection

Benefit: 你获得等同于10 + 你一半等级的寒冰抗力。

20级：寒澈之息 Breath of Sephitherax

Valiant Hexblade Paragon Path.name: 英勇魔剑士 Valiant Hexblade
Valiant Hexblade Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You are a shining warrior armed with the Feywild's power and steeped in strange magic from an otherworldly patron.

11级：维持行动（精类契约） Sustaining Action (Fey)

The first steps on your paragon path reward you with greater access to the magical energy of your pact. You learn to use this magic to draw forth the Feywild's life-giving energy to sustain you.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你恢复等同于你魅力调整值的生命值。另外，在此额外动作之前或之后，你能以一个自由移动传送最多等同于你敏捷调整值的格子

11级：精类契约面貌 Fey Pact Visage

Fey magic infuses and transforms you into an idealized version of yourself.

Benefit: 你在交涉检定和先攻检定上获得+2加值

11级：白井诅咒 White Well Curse

You learn to tap into the White Well's power through your pact and summon it to destroy your enemies. Soft light plays across your features and suddenly intensifies in a blinding flash.

12级：白井祈祷 White Well Invocation

The Lady watches you with great interest. She celebrates your triumphs and mourns your defeats. Her increased attention results in greater access to her power; you can call upon her name to aid you when your situation is dire. The lady lends you powerful magic to become pure, silvery light. With this boon comes her sorrow, a poignant grief that can crush your spirit.

16级：进阶精类契约之赐 Improved Fey Pact Boon

The magic gained from your pact helps you to merge with the moon's light, to let it flow through you and shield you from harm. As your experience with this magic grows, so too does your ability to transform yourself into this brilliant radiance.

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.esB8rpNvfR3PcZhQ]{灵魂步伐 Soul Step}时，你成为虚体直到你下一回合结束

20级：精类契约变形 Fey Pact Transformation

Your bond with the Lady grows strong and her affection for you seems boundless. You can call upon her favor to become a shining knight, a devoted protector who fights for her honor and hand. So transformed, your enemies recoil in fear, sensing their demise in the moonlight that dapples your armor.
Valiant Hexblade Paragon Path.requirements: 邪术师（魔剑士），[[精类契约 Fey Pact]]

Valiant Cavalier Paragon Path.name: 英勇圣骑兵 Valiant Cavalier
Valiant Cavalier Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You are a living embodiment of your chosen virtue. Each action you take, whether in or out of battle, is guided by your deep attachment to your chosen path.

11级：英勇圣骑兵行动 Valiant Cavalier's Action

When you push yourself beyond your limits, your dedication to your virtue allows you to call on reserves of divine power to help you and your allies overcome any challenge.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你的美德相关联的典范特性

11级：美德健康 Virtuous Health

Your chosen virtue guides many of your choices, and it remains a guiding ideal whenever you face an important decision point in your life. By the same token, the divine power of your virtue supports you when you need it most. The strength you draw from it grows deeper as you advance its cause.

Benefit: 你在豁免骰上获得+2加值。你同时对等级不高于你的疾病免疫。

11级：美德信标 Beacon of Virtue

In battle, you serve as an example to others when you use the powers of your chosen virtue. The divine power you command radiates from you, identifying you as a natural battle captain and helping you to protect and aid your allies during combat.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你的美德相关联的遭遇攻击威能

12级：美德旗帜 Banner of Virtue

When the first cavaliers fought alongside the gods, they forged mighty battle standards to rally their allies and challenge the masses of monsters gathered by the primordials. Many tales speak of how an army of good, on the verge of defeat, steeled its courage and won the day when the banner-bearing cavaliers refused to yield an inch to an onrushing horde of monsters.

By using divine power to call on the memory of those times, a cavalier can create glowing, spectral versions of the ancient standards. Depending on your virtue, the banner that you create inspires your allies in different ways.

Benefit: 你获得1个与你的美德相关联的辅助威能

16级：持久勇者 Enduring Champion

You have endured many difficult battles and trying ordeals in your quest to uphold virtue. While those experiences were painful, they and your faith have inured you to hardship.

Benefit: 你在你的回复力值上获得等同于你魅力调整值的加值

20级：美德责任 Virtuous Burden

Your patience and dedication have paid off, helping you to become a living avatar of your virtue. Now that you stand on the verge of epic power, you can directly channel the might of your virtue for short periods of time, imposing that might upon your enemies. While they are affected, even if only for a moment, your foes are forced to follow your virtuous path, which might be enough to turn the tide of a battle. Then, as your enemy shrugs off the virtue, it receives a divine rebuke for daring such an offense.

Benefit: 你获得一个与你的美德相关联的每日攻击威能

Umbriri Paragon Path.name: 影卫刺客 Umbriri
Umbriri Paragon Path.description:
「完美的理解，完美的控制——这些才是得到真正力量的关键。认识自己就是赢得胜利。」

Prerequisite:

奈瑟瑞尔（Netheril）的剑法师们是幽影与钢剑之主，完美融合了奈瑟瑞尔武士们的战技与法师们的奥术。你接受了奈瑟瑞尔剑法师之技艺的训练，并成为了危险致命的影卫刺客中的一员。你的刀锋之中调和了黑暗、魔法以及暗影之主们微妙的技巧，融会贯通为一门完美的刺杀艺术。

奈瑟瑞尔人不喜欢他们的战斗的秘法被拿来对付他们。你终生被阴影中的阴影（Shadows In The Shadows）所追杀，它们会确保你在把此道中的秘密传给外人之前就横死街角；忠诚于奈瑟瑞尔巫师们的影卫刺客也会唾弃你，认为你令那些耗费千百心血来完善此技的前人们蒙受了耻辱

大多数影卫刺客都是奈瑟瑞尔的人类，那些于百年之前回到费伦者的暗影之裔（shadowborn）的后代，他们以斗士与精英卫士的身份服务于幽影飞地之城（City of Shade Enclave）；其他的则是那些执行命令的表现足以让人信赖、并因此收到邀请加入影卫之道训练的森比亚人。这些人中有一部分仍秘密地忠于记忆中那个独立自主的森比亚（Sembia），并向他们的主人们隐瞒着这份不忠。最强大的影卫刺客是远古的幽影剑圣们，那些土生土长的阴影行者(Shadovars)；为表彰其技艺与忠诚，他们被赐转化为不死的阴影

11级：阴影行动 Shadowy Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你和所有邻近你的盟友获得隐蔽直到你下一回合结束。

11级：阴影防御 Shadow Defense

Benefit: 你获得等同于5 + 一半你的等级的暗蚀抗力 当你使用任意「剑法庇护」威能时，此抗力值增加10，且你的近战基本攻击造成5点额外暗蚀伤害。这些增益持续到你下一回合结束

11级：刺客之影 Assassin Shadow

12级：蔽日之影 Concealing Umbra

16级：阴影寿衣 Shadow Shroud

Benefit: 如果你对一个敌人有隐蔽，则你对它获得战斗优势

20级：心灵附影 Shadowed Psyche

Shadow Dancer Paragon Path.name: 影舞者 Shadow Dancer
Shadow Dancer Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You embrace the darkness as a means of perfecting the teleportation ability that quickly becomes your trademark in combat. When you strike like living shadow, you leave your foes to wonder where you might appear next.

11级：舞者伏击 Dancer's Ambush

Your mastery of teleportation is such that when you slip back from the space between, your enemies cannot hope to stand against you. Whether you leap from midair, lash out with your weapon as you pass, or appear in utter silence, your attack catches your foe wholly by surprise.

Benefit: 当你在你的回合内传送时，在你此回合结束前，你在下一次攻击骰上获得战斗优势

11级：舞者行动 Dancer's Action

When you push yourself beyond your normal limits, the shadow magic infusing your body and soul spins out from you in a web of darkness. Using the secret lore you have mastered, you move along those shadowy tendrils in the blink of an eye.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，在那攻击之前或之后，你能以一个自由动作传送最多5格

11级：幽暗卷须 Shadowy Tendrils

The magic you use to slip through shadow grants you a limited ability to control that darkness. By imbuing your own shadow with your mastery of teleportation, you send a foe on a dizzying journey that slips the bonds of space.

12级：暗影追击 Shadow Stalk

As you hone your ability to step through shadows, you are able to seize partial control of another creature's shadow, then to meld it with your own. While you and your enemy are bound in this way, it cannot hope to escape your wrath.

16级：徘徊暗影 Lingering Shadows

When you hide from your enemies, shadow spins between you to more effectively shroud their sight.

Benefit: 如果在一个生物的回合开始时你对其处于隐藏，则你对该生物隐形直到它回合结束

20级：暗影踪迹 Trail of Shadows

At the height of your power, the shadows around you flicker and shift like black fog. You call on the bitter power of the Shadowfell as you move, leaving behind a shroud of darkness to scour your foes.
Shadow Dancer Paragon Path.requirements: 任意传送随意或遭遇威能，在隐秘上受训

Cloaked Sniper Paragon Path.name: 影行狙击手 Cloaked Sniper
Cloaked Sniper Paragon Path.description:
「你告诉我：在远处射击的成功是不是好过在近处的失败。」

Prerequisite:

The advantage of getting the drop on an enemy is acknowledged far and wide. Equally prized is the benefit of taking out important targets with little risk. No one is better at accomplishing either task than a trained sharpshooter, and the sharpshooter's weapon of choice is the crossbow.

Nations and mercenary groups train specialized soldiers to use crossbows in this fashion. Underworld organizations do the same. Any such soldier is essentially an assassin who knows how to use a crossbow to slay from a distance without attracting notice. Dwarves in particular prize this exception to their normally straightforward battle tactics. That race produces fine snipers.

Such shooters don't shy away from a normal fight. They understand that reconnaissance and a plan, along with the ability to strike unseen from a great distance, are great advantages in a combat situation. A good ambush leaves the enemy weakened and confused, giving any follow-up assault a better chance of working.

You have chosen to hone your skills along these lines. You prefer to strike from hiding with a wellplaced shot and to remain unobserved during a confrontation, aiding your allies by picking off foes without ever drawing notice. The hand crossbow is your preferred weapon.

Sniping is the ultimate tactic for you. The sound of a bolt finding its target is the sweet toll of victory. A bolt you fire might take out a sentry in a single hit, as well as sending your enemies scurrying for cover. If you miss, no matter. You can slink back into the shadows until you have a chance to shoot again.

11级：十字弓高手 Crossbow Savant

Benefit: 当你使用任意弩时你的标准射程增加5格，最大射程增加10格。你所擅长的手弩被视为一个副手武器，任何以次要动作装填的弩可以以自由动作装填。

11级：狙击手行动 Sniper Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点作远程基本攻击且你对目标有战斗优势时，你可以在伤害上附加你的「偷袭」伤害，即使你已经在这一回合造成了「偷袭」伤害。如果攻击命中，你可以快步1格。

11级：旋矢狙击 Sudden Bolt

12级：看不到的射击 Unseen Shot

16级：特种作战 Versatile Combatant

Benefit: 当你的主手装备近战武器，在你的副手装备手弩时，用手弩进行攻击时，你不会引发借机攻击。

20级：无源之射 Bolt from Nowhere

Shadow Assassin Paragon Path.name: 影子杀手 Shadow Assassin
Shadow Assassin Paragon Path.description:
「你需要某些要人命的东西时，很难发现干得比我好的。」

Prerequisite:

你是一台杀戮机器，从阴影当中做出致命血腥而有效率的打击，想将针对你的攻击变为敌人的苦痛。你相信先下手为强，而且你深知只有打击者知道的惩罚之道。

11级：影子杀手行动 Shadow Assassin's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时在攻击骰上获得+4加值，直到你下一回合开始。

11级：影子杀手还击 Shadow Assassin's Riposte

Benefit: 任何邻近你的敌人在对你的近战攻击中失手时，你可以用一个自由动作对其造成等同于你敏捷调整值的伤害。

11级：杀手之眼 Killer's Eye

12级：“别傻了，朋友。” Bad Idea, Friend

16级：开膛剖腹 Bloody Evisceration

Benefit: 你的「偷袭」伤害对重伤敌人增加1d6。

20级：最后一击 Final Blow

Abiding Reaper Paragon Path.name: 永恒收割者 Abiding Reaper
Abiding Reaper Paragon Path.description:
「You've evaded death long enough. Now it has found you.」

Prerequisite:

Regardless of your religious bent, the traditions of your people run strong in your veins. Those veins have spilled your own dark blood for fated deeds; and those deeds have, in turn, moved you along the road to fulfilling the dream almost every shadar-kai holds in mind and heart. The natural course of your life seems to be to fulfill your people's ancient pact against all those who stand in opposition to departing creation. Whether through your intentional strengthening of your shadar-kai nature or by happy chance, your body has grown strong in death. You are drawn to those who defy death and fate, especially creatures that have immortality—natural or otherwise. To such ones you deliver the sweet freedom of death, sending them into the arms they sought to avoid. Their resistance is for naught. You are a representative of the inevitable. In your terrifying strength you abide—perhaps one day in immortality justly granted, but certainly in legend.

11级：血之召唤 Blood Calling

Benefit: 每当你重伤一个目标时，此目标向你提供战斗优势直到它不再重伤。

11级：致死行动 Deathly Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，此攻击无视所有抗力和虚体并且结束目标的再生（如果有的话），直到你下一回合结束。

11级：收割混乱 Reaping Disruption

12级：恐惧复生 Fearsome Revival

16级：坚硬灵魂 Hardened Spirit

Benefit: 每当一个生物进行一次对抗你强韧或意志的攻击并失手，你获得等同于你一半等级 + 你体质调整值的临时生命值。

20级：收割者之飨 Reaper's Repast

Eternal Blade Paragon Path.name: 永恒之刃 Eternal Blade
Eternal Blade Paragon Path.description:
「你面对的不只是我，还有七世最出色的战士们。」

Prerequisite:

The Order of the Eternal Blade is a secretive group, but you sought out its masters and gained entry. Whatever drove you to the order, you knew you made the right choice when the masters first instructed you. On that day, you first learned to communicate with your blade guide, the psychic resonance of generations of eternal blades that came before you.

The order's first members foresaw the emergence of psionic magic. When those members died, they cast their minds forward in time in search of worthy heirs to their cause. You are one such heir. Your blade guide lingers near you, teaching you the fighting arts of the eternal blades. Even if you fall in battle, your experience shall not be lost, for you too shall cast your mind forward in search of a new champion to guide.

11级：剑灵 Blade Guide

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.QXvYTsOkgHxARJwu]{剑灵 Blade Guide}威能

11级：剑灵行动 Guided Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在你回合结束前，你能重掷下一次失手的攻击骰。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：永恒警戒 Eternal Vigilance

12级：剑灵的忠告 Blade Guide's Counsel

16级：永恒战士 Eternal Warrior

Benefit: 当你的生命值降到0或更低时，濒死状态既不会使你失去意识，也不能迫使你进行死亡豁免，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：侵略指引 Guided Aggression

Evermeet Warlock Paragon Path.name: 永聚岛邪术师 Evermeet Warlock
Evermeet Warlock Paragon Path.description:
「光明之地造就深暗之影。」

Prerequisite:

即使在那些最黑暗的时刻中，永聚岛的灯塔总是闪耀着辉煌的明光。在那雅灵的家园——永聚岛的森林中居留着许多古代的精魂，你同这些远古的精魂们建立了邪术师契约。与永聚岛的精魂们建立契约的大多都是已经同其他精类建立联系的邪术师（即建立了精类契约的邪术师），不过任何的邪术师，无论他建立了什么类型的契约，都可以通过同永聚岛的精魂建立契约来取得新的力量。

那些被遗忘的、飘忽不定的永聚岛的精魂们，总是会慷慨地赋予凡人以力量，只要他们能呼唤出那些秘密的姓名，那些已经将近千百年没有从凡人唇中读出的姓名。永聚岛的妖精们可以自由自在地出入妖精之野。若有了他们的帮助，你便可以掌握那些凡人无法驾驭的力量。

你就是对抗黑暗的明光，是在那最为深暗阴冷的夜幕中闪耀的希望之灯塔。

11级：精野苏醒 Feywild Wake

Benefit: 当你通过传送离开一格时，你对所有邻近该格的敌人隐形，直到你下一回合开始

11级：急速行动 Mercurial Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时获得一个移动动作且你的速度增加1，直到你此回合结束

11级：耀目灯塔 Blinding Beacon

12级：妖精之光 Feylights

16级：通道精通 Mastery of Passage

Benefit: 当你传送10格或更少格时，你可以携带一个邻近你的盟友一起传送。该盟友出现在邻近你目的地的任意你选择的格子

20级：月花激励 Moonflower Inspiration

Everflame Guardian Paragon Path.name: 永焰守卫 Everflame Guardian
Everflame Guardian Paragon Path.description:
「第一束火最热烈。」

Prerequisite:

When Everflame first sparked upon the world, it left behind fires that burned without fuel, stoked only by Everflame's essence. Guided by the spirits, shamans gathered these embers and tended to them. Even though Everflame originated outside the world, with time and careful tending by these Everflame guardians, its fires became part of the natural order.

As an Everflame guardian, you embrace two equal tasks. On one hand, you search for demons, devils, primordials, and other creatures that have intruded into the world, scouring them with the fiery might of Everflame. On the other hand, you seek to ensure that new life rises in the aftermath of great calamity. Whether a volcanic eruption destroys a region, a great fire burns a forest, or a legion of monsters disrupts the natural order, you seek to nurture the world back to health, believing that no force, not even Everflame itself, can extinguish hope or life.

11级：永焰行动 Everflame Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，离你5格内的每个盟友恢复5点生命值，离你5格内的每个敌人获得5点火焰易伤直到你下一回合结束。另外，离你5格内的每个敌人失去火焰抗力或免疫直到你下一回合结束。

11级：焰火守卫 Guardian of the Flame

Benefit: 你获得5点火焰抗力。如果你已经有火焰抗力，则此抗力增加5点。

11级：生命之火 Spark of Life

12级：守护者之盾 Guardian's Shield

16级：燃新之焰 Renewing Flames

Benefit: 当你使用原力医疗威能治疗一个盟友时，邻近此盟友一个敌人受到5点火焰伤害。

20级：长者之焰 Elder Flame

Daring Blade Paragon Path.name: 勇武之刃 Daring Blade
Daring Blade Paragon Path.description:
「剑刃是我的乐器，你的血会化作它的音符。」

Prerequisite:

在你的手中，剑刃也可以作为曼陀林一般的乐器。作为一名吟游诗人，你的表演还有歌曲是给盟友带来新的灵感，给敌人带来绝望。你可以用大胆的吟诵来让战况明晰，或是用机智和诡谋扰乱敌人的感官。这些吟游诗人音乐能够做到的事情，其他的表演方式也可以做到。

你认为与其花时间在腐朽的古老传说或是复杂的乐器之上，不如专注于剑刃的性能。你用精确的武术和完美的剑术风格，再加上一点即兴创作，将残酷的近身肉搏提升为了令人惊叹的体术及剑技表演。你用令人眼花缭乱的剑舞和锋利的机智来扰乱你的敌人。

在成为一名勇武之刃后，你将武术技巧融入了法术之中，将两者融合为你独有的战斗风格。你证明了自己的力量并不比肌肉发达的战士更差，自己的速度并不比迅捷狡猾的盗贼更慢。通过你的表演和讥讽，你的敌人会陷入致命的分心从让你能够有时间使出毁灭性的打击，你的剑刃留给敌人的只有残影。你通过表演和速度在挫败敌人的同时，激励你的盟友在战斗中爆发出更强的潜能。

11级：勇武行动 Daring Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来标记所有能看到你敌人直到你下一回合结束，而不是进行额外动作。当你如此做时，你获得10点临时生命值。

11级：勇武才能 Daring Improvisation

Benefit: 当你进行一次武术近战武器攻击时，你可以使用魅力代替原本属性来计算攻击骰和伤害骰。

11级：亮出武器 Weapon Display

12级：防御剑舞 Defensive Posture

16级：迷惑剑舞 Blade Feint

Benefit: 你可以使用次要动作进行一次唬骗检定来对一名敌人获得战斗优势，而不是标准动作。如果你成功通过唬骗对一名敌人获得了战斗优势，并且在你下一回合开始前使用近战武器攻击命中该敌人，则直到你对该目标一次攻击失手前，目标给你提供战斗优势。

20级：侵略旋斩 Offensive Spin Slash

Umbral Cabalist Paragon Path.name: 幽暗秘术师 Umbral Cabalist
Umbral Cabalist Paragon Path.description:
「I have seen into the darkest abyss and made its power my own. I fear nothing of this world.」

Prerequisite:

Centuries ago, a powerful covenant of warlocks known as the Umbral Cabal summoned a demon lord to do its bidding. The demon, known as Kulnoghrim the Terrible, committed such horrific deeds of carnage and madness that it became too much for the warlocks to bear. The group bound the fiend by using a forbidden ritual, destroying themselves in the process and leaving Kulnoghrim to languish into obscurity.

By studying their methods, you gain the ability to ward yourself from attack and bind your foes as this cabal did the great demon lord. With each secret you uncover, you grow closer to accomplishing what they could not: gaining the ability to bind Kulnoghrim as a vestige and unleashing his demonic fury to burn your enemies and drive them mad.

11级：限制行动 Restricting Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，你束缚一个受你「邪术师诅咒」影响的敌人，直到你下一回合结束

11级：秘术师防护 Cabalist's Warding

Benefit: 当你重伤时，你在强韧，反射，或意志上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值，直到你不再重伤

11级：深渊命令 Command of the Abyss

12级：净化斥责 Clarifying Rebuke

16级：恶魔抵抗 Demonic Resilience

Benefit: 每场遭遇中你第一次受到有类型的伤害时，你对那个伤害类型获得10点抗力，直到遭遇结束

20级：遗灵库尔诺格瑞姆 Vestige of Kulnoghrim

Ghost Blade Paragon Path.name: 幽魂之刃 Ghost Blade
Ghost Blade Paragon Path.description:
「漫步两界间，刃舞如轻语。」

Prerequisite:

和其他剑法师一样，你可以轻松地利用世界背后的道路来穿行。但这些奥法通路对你来说，比你的其他同类提供了更多，因你学会了在不同位面的间隙中滑行的技巧。

经常穿越位面的旅程改变了你的知识和技能。当你精妙挥剑扭曲空间时，可以同时处于两个位置，将物质性的躯体分于次元两端。你可能会呈现鬼魂的外观，但这不过是暂时的变化。即使处于位面之隙，你的刀锋亦不会褪色——对敌人而言，它就是真实的威胁。

你怪异的形态在某些圈子中为你赢得了“幽魂”的绰号。你笑对这种称呼，尽管绰号并不准确，但恐惧确实是不错的武器。

11级：滑掠尘网 Slip the Weave

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你变成虚体直到你下一回合结束。

11级：瞻前忽后 Here nor There

Benefit: 每当你使用一个传送威能时，在你下一回合结束前，你对你下一次武器攻击的一个目标获得战斗优势。

11级：幽魂之剑 Ghost Sword

12级：相位闪避 Phase Evasion

16级：隙间潜行 Stalker of the In-between

Benefit: 当你是虚体或者能够相位移动时，所有被你标记的生物给你提供战斗优势，且你的传送威能的允许你传送的距离增加2格。

20级：无所不在 Omnipresent Assault

Ghostwalker Paragon Path.name: 幽冥行者 Ghostwalker
Ghostwalker Paragon Path.description:
「吾可见证六道轮回。」

Prerequisite:

The Monastery of the Eternal Void stands at a crossroads where the Shadowfell washes against the world's shores. Some who study in the monastery delve into the Shadowfell's secrets, but most of the disciples there contemplate the nature of life and death, the soul's final migration, and the fate awaiting creatures in the afterlife. Proximity to the darkened plane informed the monastery's fighting techniques as they developed into their current forms.

Your training at the monastery opened your inner eye, allowing you glimpses from this world into the realm of the dead. Those visions left a mark on you; your flesh is pale and dark circles ring your eyes, as if death's touch draws near. Despite these changes, you are no less vital and have gained uncanny insight into the nature of souls and their movements.

As a ghostwalker, you use psionic power to cloak yourself in shadow and thereby avoid attacks. You can also strike at a foe's life force, sapping its strength.

11级：幽冥行动 Ghostwalker's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次攻击时，任何被此攻击命中且给你提供战斗优势的敌人虚弱，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：两界穿梭 Of Two Worlds

Benefit: 你对任何给你提供战斗优势的敌人具有隐蔽。此外，当任何敌人以近战攻击对你失手，且你具有隐蔽或全隐蔽时，你能以一个自由动作快步1格。

11级：催魂夺魄 Tormented Spirit

12级：舞魂势 Soul Dance

16级：驭魂驾灵 Ride the Spirit

Benefit: 当你将一个敌人生命值降到0时，你能以一个自由动作传送等同于你感知调整值的格数。直到你下一回合结束，你对在此传送结束时每个邻近你的敌人获得战斗优势。

20级：睚眦之魂 Vengeful Ghost

Ghost Panther Paragon Path.name: 幽影豹魂 Ghost Panther
Ghost Panther Paragon Path.description:
「不要再给我们惹麻烦，否则我就把你抓去喂给在这世上狩猎的豹之精魂。」

Prerequisite:

原始狩猎者的奥秘即为，死亡只不过是我们生命的一部分；猎物的死亡将带给猎食者生命。而猎食者死亡时，则将生命带给食腐生物。死亡只是以巨轮的形式在呈现凡物的存在，而且是萨满对精魂界的信仰中很重要的一部分。

作为一名萨满，你总是与死亡走得很近。现在你已准备好踏上幽影豹魂之道，这条死亡和生命将纠缠得更近的道路。你在荒野中狩猎、在猎物前躲藏、如同猫中最敏捷者一般地跳跃攀爬。你呼唤豹灵来攻击敌人，让你的猎物虚弱，帮助你从敌人的攻击前跳开，并领导你通过精魂界传送到敌人面前。

11级：豹魂感知 Ghost Panther's Wisdom

Benefit: 当邻近你的精魂伙伴时，你和你的盟友在隐秘检定获得+5威能加值。

11级：豹魂行动 Ghost Panther Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，每个邻近你的精魂伙伴的敌人对你和你的盟友提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

11级：猎兽精魂 Predator Spirit

12级：巨猫闪跃 Great Cat's Dodge

16级：先祖豹魂 Panther Ancestors

Benefit: 你在杂技、运动和隐秘检定上获得等同于你感知调整值的加值。

20级：豹魂旋绕 Ghost Panther Spiral
Ghost Panther Paragon Path.requirements: 萨满，[[呼唤精魂伙伴 Call Spirit Companion]]威能

Stygian Adept Paragon Path.name: 幽狱使者 Stygian Adept
Stygian Adept Paragon Path.description:
「恐惧只来自你自己内心。」

Prerequisite:

There are shadows in the mind. Unnerving memories, old fears, and crushing disappointments all lie ready to be exploited and manipulated. Those who know these fears can turn them into weapons, amplified until they unravel the consciousness. You are familiar with these fears, and you wield them like razors.

As a stygian adept, you sense the fear and terror in your enemies, harnessing these emotions and using them to attack your foes' minds. With your powers you can create phantom terrors that only your opponent can perceive, distracting the enemy from your allies as they move into position. A foe firmly in your grasp finds itself lost in a maze of half-realized imaginings, each more terrible than the last.

11级：逃之夭夭 Fleeing Fear

Benefit: 当你以恐惧威能命中一个敌人时，你可以滑动该敌人1格。

11级：破敌行动 Unraveling Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行恐惧攻击时，每个被此攻击命中的敌人获得等同于你体质调整值的全伤害易伤，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：幽狱打击 Stygian Strike

12级：萦绕之影 Haunting Shadows

16级：恐怖之域 Fearsome Zone

Benefit: 在任何由你的灵能威能创造的区域中的敌人在攻击骰上受到-2减值。免疫恐惧的敌人不受到此减值。

20级：无形之怖 Subconscious Horror

Underchasm Darkwatcher Paragon Path.name: 幽域深坑暗黑观察者 Underchasm Darkwatcher
Underchasm Darkwatcher Paragon Path.description:
「I bear the gifts of the earth and power from beyond this realm, and with these weapons, I am a most formidable foe.」

Prerequisite:

Not all that lived in the western Great Rift perished during the calamity that resulted in the creation of the Underchasm. Some managed to survive in small, isolated groups by keeping themselves one step ahead of the drow and other Underdark horrors that prowl the depths. Vowing to defend their heritage at all costs, many of these deep earth dwellers made pacts of power to keep their kind safe and strike back at the creeping evils on the edges of their enclaves. You have chosen this path, becoming a stalwart protector of your kind, but it was not without sacrifice that you came to your power.

You have emerged from the depths of the Underchasm and have seen and heard terrible things that few others have experienced firsthand. Your dark connection to entities beyond this world has steeled your resolve to fight against the enemies of your people, and your bond with the earth is unbreakable.You serve as a valuable guide when your group heads underground, but you're also a very capable protector when the time comes to fight, steeled by years of a harsh, lightless existence.

11级：刺破黑暗 Pierce the Darkness

Benefit: 你获得黑暗视觉。如果你已经拥有黑暗视觉，则你在侦查检定上获得+2加值。

11级：石形诅咒 Stoneform Curse

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，受到你「邪术师诅咒」的生物同时被标记。

11级：幽黑打击 Deepdark Strike

12级：咒火之光 Cursefire Light

16级：黑石卷须 Darkstone Tendrils

Benefit: 你对同时被你诅咒和标记的敌人获得战斗优势。

20级：焦褐巨人化形 Form of the Umber Hulk
Underchasm Darkwatcher Paragon Path.requirements: 守望者且邪术师，东裂谷（East Rift）地区背景

Glee-born Paragon Path.name: 愉悦之子 Glee-born
Glee-born Paragon Path.description:
「Never underestimate the value of a well-timed jest.」

Prerequisite:

Dragonborn can be a harsh and taciturn race. When a dragonborn becomes known for excessive jesting or practical jokes, he or she is shunned and called glee-born or “touched by copper.” Rather than accept scorn, glee-born embrace their fun-loving nature and welcome the title with pride, even if they are forced into exile away from dragonborn lands. Luckily, many human kings welcome glee-born into their courts as jesters or courtesans.

Glee-born are quick to laugh, but they can be dangerous in battle. A sly word or cutting insult can easily distract a foe, and glee-born are known to have arcane talents that they use liberally in combat.

Only true copper dragons could match the sly wit of a glee-born, and many scholars posit that the gleeborn must have coppers in their lineage. Indeed, the scales of older glee-born have been known to develop an orange hue and even a green verdigris tinge late in life. If they live long enough, that is.

11级：无礼行动 Insulting Action

Benefit: 当你对一个给你提供战斗优势的目标失手时，你可以花费一个行动点来重掷此攻击骰，并在此攻击骰上获得+2加值。你必须使用第二次的结果。

11级：油嘴滑舌 Glib Tongue

Benefit: 你在唬骗和交涉检定上获得+3加值。

11级：翻转冲击 Flip and Blast

12级：揭示佯攻 Revealing Feint

16级：监禁观众 Captive Audience

Benefit: 当你以一个奥术攻击命中一个生物时，所有邻近该生物的敌人给你提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

20级：设立谜语 Set a Riddle

Blooded Champion Paragon Path.name: 浴血冠军 Blooded Champion
Blooded Champion Paragon Path.description:
「生而为战！」

Prerequisite:

牛头人的勇士阶层从不轻易承认任何人。想要成为一个公认的冠军，一个浴血勇士，你必须被证明你不仅技艺高超，还能控制住自己内心的狂野。年复一年，你已证明你对武器的精通和对自我的掌控，你也终于获得了应有的承认。

日以继夜的训练不仅仅让你获得了更高的地位，你对于技巧的专注使你的战斗水平超过了绝大多数勇士。你的武器是你意志的延伸，挥舞过处，血肉横飞。

更重要的是，在你的人生旅途中，你将精神力量融入到你的战斗中，直到你成为一个令人称道的战争机器。令你陶醉的杀戮快感提升了你的肾上腺素，但它掌控不了你；你的屠戮渴望增加了你攻击的力量，但它也没能让你失控。你明白你的人民正遭受腐化折磨，而野蛮行径只会让人在黑暗泥沼中越陷越深。所以你的每一场战斗都能证明你的决意，并驱散那些缠绕你心头的阴影。

11级：充沛行动 Vigorous Action

Benefit: 当你在重伤状态下花费一个行动点来进行攻击时，你获得等同于你体质值的临时生命值。

11级：侵略再起 Aggressive Resurgence

Benefit: 当你使用你的回气时，你可以放弃恢复生命值和防御加值，而是恢复你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.lyITOGSmHJB4idZ2]{抵撞冲锋 Goring Charge}种族威能，且在攻击骰和伤害骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：接续角撞 Follow-Up Gore

12级：嗜血快步 Bloodthirsty Shift

16级：永不言败 Never Say Die

Benefit: 当你的生命值降到0或更低时，你不会因为濒死状态而失去意识，直到你死亡豁免检定失败。

20级：冲刺角撞 Driving Gore

Elemental Tempest Paragon Path.name: 元素风暴 Elemental Tempest
Elemental Tempest Paragon Path.description:
「杀我？你不如去尝试把风斩断，或者压制住火山的爆发。你可能杀死一座山吗？」

Prerequisite:

你如海上清风般连绵不绝，你如龙之愤怒般激昂炽烈，你拥抱着你家乡的那片混沌。化身火焰可以融化精金，化身破浪可以淹没舰队，化身狂风可以冻结飞龙，化身闪电可以摧毁城堡，所有这些力量都源自你的灵魂，你就是自然之力的化身。

11级：双重显能 Dual Manifestation

Benefit: 你可以同时使用2个元素显能。你在每次短休息或长休息后选择你当前显能的元素。在同一场遭遇中你可以使用这2个显能的遭遇威能。你的外貌对应为一种显能或另一种（不是混合的）

11级：元素攻击 Elemental Attacks

Benefit: 你的元素风暴攻击威能造成的伤害类型是给予你当前的元素显能。大地之魂造成力场伤害，烈火之魂造成火焰伤害，风暴之魂造成闪电伤害，流水之魂造成强酸伤害，狂风之魂造成寒冰伤害

11级：元素汹涌 Elemental Surge

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你可以选择采用5个元素显能（大地之魂，烈火之魂，风暴之魂，流水之魂，狂风之魂）的任意一个。若你不能正常显能你选择的元素，则你获得那显能的增益直到遭遇结束。若你选择了一种你可正常使用的显能，但不是你当前通过「双重显能」使用的，则你可以立刻改变你使用的显能是哪2个

11级：风暴爆发 Tempest Burst

12级：吸收元素 Absorb Elements

16级：风暴领主 Tempest Lord

Benefit: 若你有火焰，寒冰或闪电抗力，则这些抗力都增加5点

20级：元素之怒 Elemental Fury
Elemental Tempest Paragon Path.requirements: 元素裔，[[额外显能 Extra Manifestation]]专长

Elemental Savant Paragon Path.name: 元素学者 Elemental Savant
Elemental Savant Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You have grown confident in your ability to shape your chosen element to your will. Winds shift and swirl at your least gesture, and flames brighten and dance in your presence, eager to answer your call.

Having mastered the talent of manipulating your element in the world around you, you now seek to understand its secret essence and bind it to yourself.

11级：元素使行动 Elementalist Action

When supreme effort is called for, you can pour your all into your elemental spells to launch an attack of exceptional intensity. Even enemies that manage to elude your attack still feel some of its furious impact.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在你下一回合结束前，你下一个术士攻击威能对此攻击的一个目标造成额外伤害。此额外伤害等同于一半你的等级

11级：学者专攻 Savant Focus

Your intensive study of your chosen element reveals new insights. In combat you can wield your favored element with uncanny precision.

Benefit: 你在由你的「元素专精」给予的威能的攻击骰上获得+1威能加值

11级：学者威能 Savant Power

Already skilled in the control and manipulation of your favored element, you discover a new way to manifest your powers in battle.

Benefit: 你获得一个额外的你选择的术士随意攻击威能

12级：元素形态 Elemental Form

After exhaustive study and practice, you gain the ability to transpose your body in the natural world with your chosen element. In this form you are a roughly human-sized copy of yourself, insubstantial and amorphous. Though you can't easily attack in this form, it provides you with excellent protection from attack and offers you other advantages.

16级：防护给予 Confer Protection

Your native resistance has made you virtually immune to all but the most powerful manifestations of your chosen element. You can provide your companions with similar resistances to energy you have mastered.

Benefit: 当盟友邻近你时，他们共享你从「元素专精」职业特性获得的抗力

20级：元素本性 Elemental Nature

You are slowly becoming an elemental creature. Your body is no longer mere flesh and blood; you might have a trace of fire in your blood or rock in your very bones. This demi-elemental nature makes you unusually resistant to effects that incapacitate other characters.

Benefit: 你在对抗持续伤害和晕眩或震慑效果的豁免骰上获得+2加值。你同时每天获得一次额外的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.TcM6d8suDEVh9Loz]{元素形态 Elemental Form}使用次数，但你每场遭遇只能使用此威能一次

Elemental Anchorite Paragon Path.name: 元素隐者 Elemental Anchorite
Elemental Anchorite Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

The most devoted students of the elements often withdraw from the society of fellow mortals to contemplate the deep truths of existence. You have chosen the lonely path of the elemental anchorite, dedicating yourself to a life of austerity and reflection. When your companions return to home, family, and high honors after their adventures, you instead seek solitude in places of great elemental power. The secrets of the universe are engraved in the stone of mighty mountains and whispered by the winds that sigh across lonely deserts. 　　Some elemental anchorites seek isolation in order to master ever more formidable abilities, using elemental essence to further whatever purposes they deem important. Others are more philosophical, and view themselves as servants of balance who act to check the excesses of forces, monsters, or villains that disturb the natural equilibrium of the world. The purpose to which you put your understanding of elemental forces is ultimately up to you.

11级：隐者行动 Anchorite's Action

Elemental forces do not exist only in rock, air, or water; they also infuse every being composed of matter. In desperate moments, you can call upon these internal forces for strength and endurance.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，你可以结束你身上所有定身或束缚效果。另外，你在元素攻击骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合开始

11级：隐者稳定 Anchorite's Stability

You are keenly aware of your surroundings, and of the physical forces at play around you. It is difficult to move you when you don't want to be moved.

Benefit: 当你将被击倒或被迫移动时，你可以做一次豁免检定来取消此击倒或被迫移动

11级：平衡之力 Force of Balance

You exploit the subtle potential of forces in your environment to lend extra effectiveness to your attack.

12级：防护元素 Shielding Element

You can preserve some of the energy of your elemental attacks to protect yourself.

16级：元素给养 Elemental Sustenance

The power of the elements sustains and fortifies you. The endless endurance of the earth or the burning vigor of fire help you to recover from fatigue and injury when you call upon your elemental powers.

Benefit: 当你使用一个每日元素威能时，你可以花费一次回复力 减免

20级：元素卓越 Elemental Transcendence

Elemental energy sleeps in all things; with this power, you unlock it from pebble, air, plant, or creature. The destructive release of energy leaves a scorched area around you but fuels your elemental powers.

Primal Summoner Paragon Path.name: 原力唤者 Primal Summoner
Primal Summoner Paragon Path.description:
「这不是战斗，是狩猎。而你不是猎人。」

Prerequisite:

Perhaps you were raised in the wilderness and learned to summon beasts to serve as your hunting companions. Perhaps your community needed protection, and you learned the ways of summoning animal guardians at a moment's notice. Or it could be that you grew up hearing the whispers of animal spirits and are a master at calling them to your side. Whatever your route to the path of the primal summoner, you seek a mastery over summoned beasts that other druids do not possess. Some of your abilities help your beasts act on their instincts, whereas other abilities help you command those beasts with even greater skill.

The primal slayer that you learn to control at the peak of your power is an ancient spirit. It might not be the most mighty creature you learn to summon, but its ability to change its shape echoes the versatility of your power.

11级：野生之道 Feral Ways

Benefit: 当你的召唤生物使用其本能效果时，它们恢复等同于你感知调整值的生命值，并在这类效果进行的任何攻击的攻击骰上获得+2威能加值。

11级：原力唤者行动 Primal Summoner Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能以一个自由动作给予你的一个召唤生物一个标准动作命令。

11级：血牙预兆 Redfang Prophecy

12级：严格控制 Tightened Control

16级：行动如一 Move as One

Benefit: 当你使用一个移动动作进行移动时，你的一个召唤生物也能以其速度移动。

20级：召唤原力杀手 Summon Primal Slayer

Primal Mapper Paragon Path.name: 原力绘图者 Primal Mapper
Primal Mapper Paragon Path.description:
My spirit is part of this land, and I carry the landscape within me. You cannot block my path.

Prerequisite:

When did you first know that your awareness of the world around you is unique? Perhaps you were underground when a gust of wind blew out your torches, leaving your party in utter darkness from which only you could lead the way back. or maybe you were attacked under cover of a thick fog and shouted out, "Retreat and regroup at our last campsite!" only after you said this did you realize that you were the only one for whom that was as easy to find as your own foot. Your comrades have long relied on your intuition to determine which tunnel leads to the surface and where you will find higher ground that better allows you to defend yourself against your pursuers.

Some primal mappers are disciples of Lugos's teachings, while others have discovered his principles independently. You took your first steps toward the path of the primal mapper when you became aware that each of the places in the world has its primal spirit of place—a spirit intimately connected to its location. Your devotion to noticing and remembering every detail of the lands you travel makes you akin to these spirits of place. Like them, your abilities go beyond a superior tactical understanding of position and landscape and into a mystical realm where making a representation of a place gives you power over it. You need not even physically create a map to provide a connection by which spirits from that realm can enter the mundane world; simply visualizing one will suffice. Let those who would stand in your way beware!

11级：改程行动 Rerouted Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在此额外动作之前或之后，你能以你的速度移动或以一半你的速度快步

11级：复兴奔跑 Revitalizing Run

Benefit: 当你使用你的回气时，你能同时以你的速度移动或以一半你的速度快步

11级：灰狼之诱 Pale Wolf's Lure

12级：同盟地形 Allied Terrain

16级：地形精通 Lay of the Land

Benefit: 你无视困难地形

20级：卢戈斯之猎 Lugos's Hunt

Primordial Channeler Paragon Path.name: 原始引导者 Primordial Channeler
Primordial Channeler Paragon Path.description:
「Earth, wind, and water churn inside me, yearning to be free.」

Prerequisite:

Waves of cold, fire, lightning, and thunder surge within you like a roiling elemental, contained in shroud of skin. You dream of being swept away in a conflagration whose size will grow without bound and one day break through planar walls themselves.

You've heard of the ancient ones, the primordials who forged the world in an elemental explosion. You feel a kinship to those entities, and as you gain more and more power, you begin to suspect you are actually related to them. If your suspicion is more than just conjecture, what does that bode for your future?

11级：原始行动 Primordial Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，每个离你3格以内的敌人受到等同于你敏捷调整值的伤害。此伤害类型和你「狂野之魂」正在提供的抗力类型相同。

11级：原始展现 Primordial Manifestation

Benefit: 如果你「狂野之魂」正在提供的抗力类型是寒冰，火焰，闪电或雷鸣，则你同时获得下述对应的增益。

寒冰：被你攻击命中的生物迟缓直到你下一回合结束。

火焰：被你攻击命中的生物受到等同于你敏捷调整值的火焰伤害（豁免终止）。

闪电：被你攻击命中的生物在攻击骰上受到-2减值直到你下一回合结束。

雷鸣：被你攻击命中的生物耳聋（豁免终止）。

11级：原始之怒 Primordial Rage

12级：原始之赐 Primordial Boon

16级：席卷之元素 Overwhelming Elements

Benefit: 每当你以攻击命中一个生物时，此生物的抗力减少10点（最低0点）直到你下一回合结束。

20级：原始裂谷 Primordial Rift
Primordial Channeler Paragon Path.requirements: 术士，「狂野魔法」职业特性

Arrow of the Moonbow Paragon Path.name: 月弓之箭 Arrow of the Moonbow
Arrow of the Moonbow Paragon Path.description:
「月亮用弓对准黑暗。我们就是弦上的箭。」

Prerequisite:

在夜色之下，恶霸和谋杀者蠢蠢欲动。它们感觉到有些甚么在注视着它们，仿佛天上有一只肉食鸟在盘旋等待最佳的猎食时机。有些时候，这感觉足以阻止他们的卑鄙行为。但远远更常见的是需要采取更直接的行动，用银箭狙杀这些邪恶。

月弓之箭是一个分散各地的秘密组织，里面的兄弟姊妹都将一生奉献以确保每一名凡人都有公平的机会去写下他或她的命运，改变自己的星宿。这些箭的足迹远而广阔，不求回报，只要能在干掉目标物后没收对方身上的东西就足够。这些人包括各种使用神力的英雄好汉，有各自的趋向，但他们都偏爱秘密活动，花招，和最重要的隐秘。

11级：月吻行动 Moonkissed Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次使用弓的攻击时，你可以将一个攻击骰掷骰两次并使用任意一个结果。

11级：微明游子 Walker in Twilight

Benefit: 你在隐秘上受训并获得昏暗视觉。如果你已经在隐秘上受训，则你获得用于隐秘的技能专攻 Skill Focus专长。

11级：三月光 Three Moonbeams

12级：月明眼 Moon Eye

16级：破除迦锁 Break the Bonds

Benefit: 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.WUIYL0v3nVDbBTeh]{破除迦锁 Break the Bonds}引导神力威能

20级：月箭 Moon Shot
Arrow of the Moonbow Paragon Path.requirements: 「引导神力」职业特性，擅长一把弓，必须信仰瑟翰妮

Euphonic Bow Paragon Path.name: 悦音弓使 Euphonic Bow
Euphonic Bow Paragon Path.description:
「我拨动弓弦放出箭矢如同我拨弄琴弦，我用它为你的逝去演奏一曲挽歌。」

Prerequisite:

你将音乐，箭术以及魔法结合成了一门光彩夺目的技巧，用艺术的方式来使用武术。仅仅是在你瞄准时，你的敌人就会在恐惧和敬畏之间动摇不定。你每一次射击时弓弦都发出悦耳的音调产生共鸣，你的箭矢如同鼓点一般在精准打击敌人的同时推动战斗朝着你们有利的方向前进。甚至连你敌人的惨叫声和也会连同武器与盾牌或盔甲的碰撞声混合在一起，让你的奥术将这一切编织成一首美妙的战斗交响曲……

每一次精妙的战斗表演都在你的指挥下按部就班的上演，如同你拥有预知未来某个瞬间的能力一般。

11级：弓法器 Bow Implement

Benefit: 你可以使用弓作为法器来使用诗人威能。当你使用弓作为法器时，将弓的增强加值加到攻击骰和伤害骰上，以及其特性所带来的任何额外伤害（如果适用的话）。你将其作为法器使用时，不能在攻击上获得武器擅长加值。

当你使用弓作为法器来使用远程诗人攻击威能时，威能的射程会增加到弓的标准射程（如果那个威能的原本射程更短）。你也可以将射程增加到弓的最大射程，并且攻击骰会正常的承受因最大射程导致的-2减值。

11级：和音行动 Harmonic Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，一个离你10格内你选择的盟友能以一个自由动作进行一次基本攻击。

11级：杂音箭矢 Arrow of Cacophony

12级：音速打击之歌 Song of Sonic Striking

16级：齐射火力 Volley Fire

Benefit: 当你使用诗人远程攻击威能造成重击时，你能以一个自由动作对该目标进行一次远程基本攻击。

20级：敌意圣歌 Anthem of Antagonism

Twiceborn Leader Paragon Path.name: 再生领袖 Twiceborn Leader
Twiceborn Leader Paragon Path.description:
「My story will live on. Will yours?」

Prerequisite:

The folktale of Jarret the Twiceborn is told throughout the lands. Although humans and elves cherish this celebrated figure, many other peoples speak of him with reverence. Tales differ about his actual heritage, human or half-elf. It is known that he was born to common folk outside elf lands in a kingdom that would one day be part of the empire of Nerath.

Jarret's natural charm won him friends above his station, including young nobles with little or no chance of inheritance. As a result, Jarret gained martial training and took to forming groups of do-gooders and fortune seekers. His ability to lead these small bands to success against all odds came to be well documented. He and his comrades traveled widely and are credited with making life safer in many places. Jarret's companions seldom left the adventuring life for any reason other than significant wealth; certainly death was not the primary reason.

Jarret wasn't so lucky. He fell in battle against the mind flayers of Thoon deep within the Underdark. No magic could bring him back.

The story doesn't end there, however. Many believe Jarret was reborn as a lad of the same name who grew up in nearly the same place. This perhaps-reincarnated Jarret became an inspiring leader and hero like his namesake. He performed similar deeds, and never refuted claims that he was the same Jarret. Instead, he used the rumor to his advantage, renewing former ties of friendship and striking fear into old enemies. He became known for taking special interest in opposing aberrant creatures, such as mind flayers. Those who knew and loved him eventually dubbed him Jarret the Twiceborn. Yarns say he lives still in the heavens, alongside great generals from times past.

Jarret's accomplishments and methods are recorded in story, history, and song. From these, many venturesome souls draw inspiration and try to duplicate Jarret's feats. Some successful imitators even claim to teach his methods.

Maybe your natural talents led you on a road similar to Jarret's. You've taken what you could from folktales and, perhaps, teachers. In your travails, you carry on Jarret's folk-hero tradition. In doing so, perhaps you'll become even greater than the Twiceborn.

11级：再生恢复 Twiceborn Recovery

Benefit: 当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0ZYc2nJqa9AlruyU]{振奋呼声 Inspiring Word}时，你可以选择2个目标而不是1个。每个目标都可花费一个回复力，但没有此威能提供的额外恢复值。当你如此做时，你不能选择自己为目标

11级：进攻行动 Assault Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，每个离你10格内的盟友在攻击骰上获得+2威能加值直到你下回合开始

11级：怀旧攻击 Reminiscent Assault

12级：双生策略 Twinning Ploy

16级：双重防御 Twofold Defense

Benefit: 每个能看见且听见你的盟友，当他使用回气时，他在所有防御上获得+4（而不是通常的+2）加值直到他下一回合结束

20级：附议打击 Seconded Smite

Reforged Soul Paragon Path.name: 再造之魂 Reforged Soul
Reforged Soul Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

However you came by your elemental nature—by birth or through exposure to elemental magic—you are now an elemental creature. Exploring your heritage and testing its limits increases your personal power as well as your ability to command the magic flowing from the Elemental Chaos. The more you grow in power, the stronger the plane's hold on you becomes.

11级：混沌之触 Chaos-Touched

Your elemental nature grants you some control over and resistance to elemental energy.

Benefit: 在每次长休息结束时，掷一个d10并参阅下面的表格。你获得对应的伤害类型的10点抗力，且你的再造之魂攻击威能获得该伤害类型。此增益持续到你下一次长休息结束

11级：汹涌行动 Surging Action

When your need is greatest, you can manifest your elemental nature as a surge of chaotic energy.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次额外攻击时，若此攻击是近程或区域攻击，则它造成1d6额外伤害，若此攻击是近战或远程攻击，则它造成1d10额外伤害。此额外伤害的伤害类型与你「混沌之触」特性决定的伤害类型一致。21级时，此额外伤害提升为2d6和2d10

11级：元素倾泻 Elemental Cascade

Calling forth the chaos building inside you lets you release a gout of elemental energy to assail your foes.

12级：流动混沌 Flowing Chaos

More and more, you are becoming a conduit to the Elemental Chaos. Now you learn a way to release your inner energy to augment those around you.

16级：混沌之拥 Embraced by Chaos

The Elemental Chaos's influence on you grows, giving you an expanded command of your innate abilities.

Benefit: 当你使用你的「混沌之触」特性时，你可以掷骰2次且使用这两个结果。当你得到2个一样的结果时，选择任何其他伤害类型来代替

你同时能够流利地说，读，写荒神语

20级：元素泛滥 Elemental Flood

You can loose the force raging inside you in an explosion of energy that selectively targets your foes.
Reforged Soul Paragon Path.requirements: 元素界起源，或[[生于元素 Born of the Elements]]专长

Fang of Zehir Paragon Path.name: 泽希尔之毒牙 Fang of Zehir
Fang of Zehir Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

在执行泽希尔的大祭司的命令中，你没有失败，你已经把许多灵魂送到了黑暗之神的嘴里，赢得了巨大的荣誉。现在，泽希尔命令用黑暗取代了你灵魂的一部分，把你标记为一个有价值的仆从，把你变成受祝毒牙之一。你为这个荣誉进行了激烈的斗争，作为泽希尔最狂热的信徒之一，第三蛇环的成员们给予了你应得的尊重。

作为泽希尔之毒牙，你最关心的是尽可能多地为你的神提供灵魂。你是一个神圣的杀手，被泽希尔和祂的大祭司派去执行特殊任务。作为对你信仰的奖赏，泽希尔会改变你的思想和身体以反映这种殊荣。据说，泽希尔最忠实的毒牙最终会完全脱离其温血形态，变成神圣之主的倒影。

11级：淬毒行动 Envenomed Action

当你在战场中滑行时，你在进行英雄壮举之时，呼唤你的神祇借予你毒蛇之咬。午夜之蛇的毒牙浸入敌人的体内，让敌人愈发痛苦。

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用一个武器攻击威能时，所有被此威能命中的生物同时受到10点持续毒素伤害并被迟缓（豁免终止所有）。

11级：毒蛇之速 Serpent's Speed

你对泽希尔越是虔诚，你的本质就变得越像蛇。蜿蜒的身形还有蛇类的肌肉让你在战斗中对抗黑暗之神的敌人。

Benefit: 你在速度上获得+1加值。

11级：毒素汹涌 Surge of Poison

泽希尔是《万毒之书 the Book of All Venoms》的作者，他用这本书中传播致命的知识，以加强他虔诚的追随者的攻击。

12级：影蛇形态 Shadow Serpent Form

你嘲笑那些低级的蛇舌教徒，他们只能变成普通的蟒蛇。泽希尔亲自赐予你力量让你成为祂最受尊敬的仆从，影蛇。

16级：更多灵魂 More Souls for Zehir

当你把灵魂交给午夜之蛇，也只会满足泽希尔无尽的欲望。你的神渴望更多的灵魂，祂保佑你的剑刃，这样你就可以把曾经难以杀死的受害者送到祂的面前。

Benefit: 你的攻击无视毒素抗力。

20级：泽希尔之指 Fingers of Zehir

这个可怕的祈祷可以让你引导蛇人诅咒的可怕力量，把你的武器变成一团有毒的眼镜蛇。

Tactical Warpriest Paragon Path.name: 战策祭司 Tactical Warpriest
Tactical Warpriest Paragon Path.description:
「领取战争的恩赐吧！」

Prerequisite:

你的神需要战争按着其信条进行，而处于战争旋涡中心的你则是神所挑选的祭司。只要呼唤神力，你的武器就闪耀出神圣的光芒。

11级：额外伤害行动 Extra Damage Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外行动时，在该回合内，你在使用标准动作进行的攻击的伤害骰上获得等同于你一半等级的威能加值。

11级：失手应策 Warpriest's Strategy

Benefit: 每遭遇一次，若你或邻近的一名盟友在近战攻击或近程攻击时掷出1，你可让其重掷。

11级：战铠熟练 Warpriest's Training

Benefit: 当你穿着重甲时，你在AC上获得+1加值。

11级：战争怒吼 Battle Cry

12级：战神恩典 Battle Favor

16级：挑衅 Warpriest's Challenge

Benefit: 当你以随意近战攻击命中一个敌人时，你可选择标记该敌人直到遭遇结束。此敌人邻近你时，它下一次快步或攻击除你之外的生物时，你能对此敌人进行一次借机攻击。如果你以此特性标记一个新的敌人，则之前此特性的标记消失。

20级：战火连绵 Battle Pyres

Battle Engineer Paragon Path.name: 战地工程师 Battle Engineer
Battle Engineer Paragon Path.description:
「一间工坊？我不要那玩意。我是属于战争前线的。」

Prerequisite:

在终末战争时期，大量机关术士选择了加入军队，提供后勤与技术支持。不过，其中有一小部分机关术士甚至更为极端，他们拒绝在后方的工坊中工作，而是执意要走上前线。他们就是战地工程师。战地工程师在战争中确确实实地证明了自己的力量。如今，这些人仍然遵循着在战斗中应用技术的传统，是非常优秀的伙伴。

11级：侵攻行动 Aggressive Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在武器攻击骰上获得+1加值直到你下一回合结束，且你的武器攻击造成1d6额外伤害直到你下一回合结束

11级：凶残附魔 Brutal Enchantment

Benefit: 当一个你的机关术士或战地工程师威能给予一个盟友在武器伤害骰上的加值时，该盟友的武器同时具有凶残1特性，直到此加值结束。若那武器已经有凶残特性，则没有任何效果。

11级：高等魔法武器 Greater Magic Weapon

12级：飞逝元素 Fleeting Dweomer

16级：精准附魔 Accurate Enhancement

Benefit: 当一个你的机关术士或战地工程师威能给予一个盟友在武器攻击骰上的加值时。此加值增加2

20级：持续球粒 Persistent Spheres

Battlefield Archer Paragon Path.name: 战地射手 Battlefield Archer
Battlefield Archer Paragon Path.description:
「没有我射不中的目标，无论它有多远，或者有多小。」

Prerequisite:

你成为箭术的典范，一个即使在最恶劣的战场环境下也能保持沉着冷静的无敌射手。你的经验和技巧体现在每一支射向目标的箭中，而每场有你参加的战斗都会变得更加顺利。

11级：射手动作 Archer's Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来重掷一次远程攻击骰或远程伤害骰，而不是进行额外动作。

11级：战地经验 Battlefield Experience

Benefit: 你可以同时指定不止一个生物作为你的标的，数量最多等于你的感知调整值。此外，所有对标的进行的攻击在攻击骰上获得+1加值。

11级：集火射击 Combined Fire

12级：射手荣耀 Archer's Glory

16级：战斗活力 Battle Surge

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作或获得「射手动作」的收益时，你同时在对抗借机攻击时的AC上获得+5加值，直到遭遇结束。

20级：标的末日 Quarry's Bane

Battleweaver Paragon Path.name: 战斗编织者 Battleweaver
Battleweaver Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You have adapted your arcane talents to control the field of battle. Your tradition originated with gnomes of the Feydark, who escaped their fomorian masters by mastering shadow magic to make their innate talent for illusions even more potent. Like those gnomes, you are an illusionist at heart, building your tactics on deception and misdirection. The shadowstuff you infuse into your spells makes those illusions a tangible part of the battlefield.

11级：妨碍幻术 Hindering Illusion

When you enter an opponent's mind to craft your illusions, you hinder the foe's ability to engage with the terrain around it.

Benefit: 当你以随意幻术攻击威能命中一个生物时，该生物迟缓直到你下一回合结束

11级：编织者行动 Weaver's Action

When you push yourself in battle, you bind strands of shadowstuff into your illusions, shackling the minds of your foes and taking advantage of their confusion.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用一个幻术攻击威能时，你对该威能的每个目标都具有战斗优势。另外，该威能每命中一个目标，你就能一个自由动作快步最多2格

11级：战斗编织 Battleweave

Your signature illusion warps the battlefield around your opponents. As they struggle to navigate the illusory terrain you lay down around them, you and your allies can take advantage of their distraction.

12级：幻影庇护 Illusory Shelter

Just as you learn to warp the battlefield to hinder your foes, you can protect your allies with the same magic, manipulating strands of light and shadow into an impenetrable protective weave.

16级：穿刺幻术 Pierce Illusion

Your mastery of illusions is second to none, and your powerful images undermine the minds of your foes.

Benefit: 任何敌人在对抗你的幻术威能的效果的第一次豁免骰上受到-2减值

20级：重构战场 Reshape Battlefield

As you reach the pinnacle of the battleweaver's art, you master a powerful illusion that can transform the battlefield to your liking.
Battleweaver Paragon Path.requirements: 任意奥术职业，至少2个幻术随意或遭遇威能

Battle Mage Paragon Path.name: 战斗法师 Battle Mage
Battle Mage Paragon Path.description:
「你以为我只是个普通的学者，只能埋首于我的卷轴和书里？再想想吧！」

Prerequisite:

当你披上法师袍时，你并没有把战斗的刺激留在身后，所以为啥你要躲在后面，让战士享受所有的乐趣呢？你有足够的技能和技术让你成为一个真正的战法师，根据情况和状态，准备对近处或远处的敌人造成伤害。你甚至学会了用奥术能量来暂时摆脱死亡——并且你等不及在战斗中试试它了。

11级：奥术还击 Arcane Riposte

Benefit: 当一个生物引发你的借机攻击时，你能用你的一只手做一次借机攻击（智力 + 4 vs. AC；21级：+6）。选择寒冰，火焰，力场或闪电。此借机攻击命中时，你造成1d8 + 智力调整值的由你选择的类型伤害。

11级：战斗法师行动 Battle Mage Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时在攻击骰上获得+4加值，直到你下一回合开始。

11级：强力反击 Forceful Retort

12级：奥术回春 Arcane Rejuvenation

16级：战斗边缘 Battle Edge
