Benefit: 当你在遭遇中第一次重伤时，你能以一个即时反应使用一个你的随意威能。

20级：终结法术 Closing Spell

Battle Chaplain Paragon Path.name: 战斗牧师 Battle Chaplain
Battle Chaplain Paragon Path.description:
「别害怕，吾友。我们所行乃是神之意旨。」

Prerequisite:

When evil bubbles up from the Abyss and spills into the world, when insane hordes raid and plunder civilized lands, or when lawlessness threatens society, you fight back to preserve the world. You shoulder this burden willingly, but you can lighten the load by uniting your companions behind your holy mission. You lead through your inspiring presence, wise words, and brave deeds, with the goal of one day ushering your allies to the glory that awaits bold champions of your faith.

You are a soldier of your god, but not a proselytizer. All deities and their servants have a place in the world. Your role is to unite disparate beliefs and achieve a common victory. Your tolerance, however, does not extend to those agents of ruin who would subvert your harmonious message with their ambition and greed.

When you sing hymns and recite scripture in battle, a silver halo appears above your head as a symbol of your belief and divine blessing. Its light fills your comrades with hope and purpose, helping them to rise above the mundane and seize their destinies.

11级：战歌 Battle Chant

Benefit: 当盟友命中邻近你的敌人时，你可以标记该敌人。此标记持续到你下回合结束。如果被标记的敌人进行了一次目标不包括你的攻击，则你能以一个自由动作快步1格。

11级：圣盾祭司 Shielded Priest

Benefit: 你获得轻盾和重盾的擅长。

11级：激励行动 Stirring Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行攻击时，邻近你或邻近你攻击目标的一位盟友，能同时以一个自由动作进行一次近战基本攻击，并在此攻击检定上获得等同于你力量调整值的加值。

11级：战争序曲 Revelation of Battle

12级：征战圣歌 Battle Hymn

16级：说不如作 Deeds not Words

Benefit: 当你以近战攻击使敌人重伤，或使敌人的生命值降至0，或对敌人造成重击时，邻近你的一个盟友在伤害掷骰上获得等同于你力量调整值加值，直到你下回合开始。

20级：否决败阵 Deny Defeat

Battle Champion Paragon Path.name: 战斗勇士 Battle Champion
Battle Champion Paragon Path.description:
「伤痕会告诉你我的经历。听我指挥，能打胜仗。」

Prerequisite:

You have seen more battles than you can count. The clash of weapon against armor, the bitter screams of dying soldiers, the creaking of saddle leather, all of this and more are as much a part of you as the blood in your veins and the heart that pumps it. No training could prepare you for the atrocities you witness. No drill simulates the life and death struggle between enemies. You may have learned the fundamentals from your mentor, but the battlefield was your true instructor.

You combine tactical genius with practical application, blending your talent for maneuver with your mastery over fighting techniques and weaponry. You lead from the front, charge into battle, and smash through your enemies. You can direct your allies to positions where they can be most effective. Those who fight on your side learn much from your techniques, and by following your example are better able to respond to the enemies arrayed against you.

The battle champion paragon path is best suited to tactical warlords and guardian fighters. Your path features improve your allies' performance, giving them a powerful edge when using action points and the ability to match your attacks when you spend an action point. Your powers work best when you are engaged with an enemy while allies are nearby.

11级：勇士风采 Champion's Presence

Benefit: 当一个你可见的盟友花费一个行动点进行一次额外攻击时，此盟友在第一个攻击骰上掷骰两次，并使用更好的结果。此攻击掷出19-20即可造成重击。

11级：防御呼声 Defensive Word

Benefit: 任何从你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0ZYc2nJqa9AlruyU]{振奋呼声 Inspiring Word}中恢复生命值的盟友同时在所有防御上获得+2加值，直到他进行一次攻击。

11级：了结他 End This

12级：警惕防御 Vigilant Defense

16级：老兵行动 Veteran Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次额外攻击时，一个邻近你的盟友能以一个自由动作进行一次近战基本攻击。

20级：果决战术 Decisive Stratagem

Combat Veteran Paragon Path.name: 战将 Combat Veteran
Combat Veteran Paragon Path.description:
「追随我。没人会死，我将引领你们走在胜利之道上！」

Prerequisite:

你是战地的老手，通晓各种仅能从战斗中学会的战术与技巧。并且你不仅知道如何在战斗中存活——还懂得赢得胜利。战斗技巧与先天的领导才能令你如友相伴。亦正因如此，盟友乐于与你共同战斗。

11级：战将之力 Combat Veteran's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，离你10格以内的一个盟友能以一个自由动作做一次移动动作。

11级：如钉坚韧 Tough as Nails

Benefit: 你获得一个额外的回复力。当你使用回复力时，将你的体质调整值的加入到你恢复的生命值中。

11级：突进 Skirmish Ploy

12级：致命错失 Miss Me Once

16级：战斗医者 Battle Healer

Benefit: 在你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0ZYc2nJqa9AlruyU]{振奋呼声 Inspiring Word}威能时，目标可同时做一次豁免检定。

20级：至优策略 Superior Tactics

War Chanter Paragon Path.name: 战争歌者 War Chanter
War Chanter Paragon Path.description:
「我们曾与为世间熟知的伟大的英雄们并肩战斗！」

Prerequisite:

吟游诗人熟记所有过去英雄的传说，用来鼓舞人心，激励他们的同伴。作为一名战争颂者，你视那些传战场的咆哮，金铁交戈之声，战士的哭喊，行军的踏步声――所有的这些编织成了战争的交响乐，如一股痛苦的洪流横穿整个战场，将你的朋友和敌人全部卷入其中。

你的音乐与言辞激励你的同伴做出更加伟大的勇敢行为。你的勇气之德给予你与同伴相当的临时生命，你自己的战技能帮助同伴对抗伤痛。你的威能与督军的有着相似的方式，给予你的同伴移动和攻击对付你挥动武器击打的敌人。

11级：榜样激勉 Inspire by Example

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，每个离你5格内的盟友在攻击骰和伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：言辞激勉 Inspire by Word

Benefit: 当一个盟友通过你的「勇武之德」获得临时生命值时，你得到同等数量的临时生命值。另外，当你将一个敌人的生命值减至0或重伤一个敌人时，一个离你10格内的盟友获得等同于5 + 你体质调整值的临时生命值。21级时此临时生命值为8 + 你体质调整值。

11级：胜利猛击 Victorious Smite

12级：战地咏唱 Battle Chant

16级：行动激勉 Inspire by Deed

Benefit: 你一场遭遇能花费2个行动点，而不是1个。

20级：胜利愿景 Visions of Victory
War Chanter Paragon Path.requirements: 诗人，「勇武之德」职业特性

Longarm Marshal Paragon Path.name: 长柄元帅 Longarm Marshal
Longarm Marshal Paragon Path.description:
「I prefer my foes on the end of a spear.」

Prerequisite:

The spear and its cousins have existed almost as long as creation. It was the first weapon ever made, and it and its variants are still the most common arms in use. Simple spears are designed heavy for melee or light for throwing. A melee spear can be used with one hand or two. Specialized variations of the spear such as the longspear, the tratnyr, and various polearms were specifically designed for war. Such weapons provide a huge boon in the form of reach, allowing a wielder to strike from

relative safety and to control the melee. Others, the tratnyr in particular, are multipurpose. Spears are the perfect weapon choice for smallunit commanders who like flexibility. Javelins and other thrown spears enable their wielders to loose volleys at a closing enemy, or make a viable option against a foe that prefers to stay at a distance. With a single spear, a warrior can choose to fight with a shield or without. Longspears and polearms allow an officer to contribute to combat while leading frombehind the front line, where the clash can be better observed and directed.

Cognizant of the benefits of the spear, you chose to specialize in this multifaceted weapon. You trained to make long lunges and quick jabs with your weapon. A spear's haft is a defensive tool for you, and you have learned how to hedge in your foes or open deep wounds. Your skill is a blessing to your allies, who have seen that your mastery makes you a more reliable leader.

11级：精准推刺 Accurate Thrust

Benefit: 当持用矛时，你在攻击骰上获得+1加值

11级：长柄行动 Longarm Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，若你持用矛，则你的近战触及提升1格直到你下一回合结束

11级：强劲长矛 Driving Spear

12级：回旋长矛 Whirling Spear

16级：愤怒触及 Bristling Reach

Benefit: 当在你近战触及范围内的一个敌人没有以快步移动或进行一次远程攻击，你能以一个借机动作对该敌人造成等同于你智力调整值的伤害

20级：关键撕裂 Vital Rend

Polearm Master Paragon Path.name: 长武器大师 Polearm Master
Polearm Master Paragon Path.description:
「一寸长，一寸强！」

Prerequisite:

适性广，易造易用，这就是长武器。长武器基本上就是一根长杆末端上的一柄短刃，很简单。但一寸长一寸强，即使是最基本的长枪，在菜鸟手里也是有效的武器，到了大师手里更能枪枪夺命。

比较复杂的长武器华丽地融合了枪及剑或斧的优点，更多变，杀伤力更大。战场上整队的士兵都用长武器，城里的守卫亦利用它们保护市民。

基于长武器的普及性和简易制作，它们是基础军训的一部份。但训练场只能教你那么多，进阶技巧还是需要靠实战磨练。

在你的冒险旅途中，你练出了一身长武器的好本领。你能做成可怕的伤害，可以挥武驱散围着自己的敌人，还能够以无可比碍的触距操控身边的战场，保护队友。

11级：突进动作 Lunging Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点把你的触及武器的触及范围增加1格，直到你的下一回合开始为止，而不是进行额外动作。

11级：强制触距 Forceful Reach

Benefit: 当你使用触及武器进行会推离，拉近，或滑动目标的武器威能时，强制移动的距离增加1格。

11级：杠杆击 Leveraging Strike

12级：远袭式 Reaching Stance

16级：长武器之触 Longarm Grasp

Benefit: 当你持用触及武器时，如果在你2格之内且被你标记的敌人快步或进行目标不包括你的攻击，你可以用一个即时中断对该敌人进行一次近战基本攻击。

20级：长武横扫 Polearm Sweep

Long Night Scion Paragon Path.name: 长夜子嗣 Long Night Scion
Long Night Scion Paragon Path.description:
「小心，白痴。凛冬将至。」

Prerequisite:

你获得了冬季庭院，亦或是冰霜王子的青睐，冬季妖精的力量在你体内流动，使得你的血液变得冰冷。有时你可以感受到你那位冷酷的契约者的存在，正在通过你的眼睛观察这个世界。这种荣誉其实是相当危险的。这意味着你的那位契约者对你的行动了如指掌，并且知晓你对契约的遵守程度。

妖精荒野其余的领主可以察觉到你与冬季庭院的羁绊。如果你参加群星议会或者与至高妖精交涉，你可能会受到其忠实仆从的尊敬，但这也有可能是一把双刃剑。与其他的凡人相比，你应该更加了解议会的习俗并遵守这里的规矩。你不这么做的话，这将对你以及你的契约者影响不好。

你的威能与凛冬的原初力量相关。你的冰冷血液在血管内流动，你感受不到冰雪与寒风的叮咬。那些冷对你的人将会知晓何为触摸冰冻心脏。

11级：极深寒意 Deeper Chill

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行带有寒冰关键字的攻击时，该攻击的伤害无视寒冰抗力。如果这次攻击命中了一个没有寒冰抗力的生物，则造成等同于你智力调整值的额外寒冰伤害。

11级：冰霜恩惠 Frost’s Favor

Benefit: 在每次长休息后，你可以选择一个你已知的奥术遭遇攻击威能。该威能获得寒冰关键字，且该威能造成除了它拥有的类型的伤害之外，还会造成寒冰伤害。你同时获得10寒冰抗力。

11级：苍白王子之怒 Wrath of the Pale Prince

12级：凛冬之血 Winter's Blood

16级：刺骨寒风 Winter Winds

Benefit: 每回合一次，当你通过传送离开一格时，与该格邻近的敌人受到等于你智力调整值的寒冰伤害，且迟缓直到你下一回合结束。

20级：冰冻心脏 Frozen Heart
Long Night Scion Paragon Path.requirements: 邪术师，与冬季妖精的「精类契约」

Master Summoner Paragon Path.name: 召唤大师 Master Summoner
Master Summoner Paragon Path.description:
「我的想象力决定我仆从的力量。」

Prerequisite:

Without form and order, all life reverts to its natural state of chaos. Without thought, there can be no life, and you prove this maxim by creating life from the power of thought. You are the master of summoning, shaping the raw possibility of your psionic power into whatever form you desire. The servants you fashion are granted a semblance of life, which they sacrifice willingly to fight on your behalf. Your creations are many and varied. Your focus allows you to bestow a consistent range of traits that mark them all as your children, and that grant unequalled usefulness on the battlefield.

11级：驱策行动 Driven Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点给予一个让召唤生物进行一次攻击的特殊命令时，此攻击在攻击骰上获得等同于你魅力调整值的威能加值，且被此攻击命中的所有敌人受到5点额外伤害

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：柔韧创造 Resilient Creation

Benefit: 当你使用一个心灵术士或心灵术士典范之道威能召唤一个生物时，此召唤生物获得等同于你魅力调整值的临时生命值。

另外，每当你花费一个回复力时，你控制的一个召唤生物恢复等同于你智力调整值的生命值

11级：持续收割 Sustaining Harvest

12级：护卫召唤物 Warded Summons

16级：进化形态 Evolved Form

Benefit: 当你使用一个心灵术士或心灵术士典范之道威能召唤一个生物时，你能给予此召唤生物下列特性之一。

灵敏步态：此召唤生物在速度上获得+4威能加值。

光洁双翼：此召唤生物获得飞行6（盘旋）。

水生威胁：此召唤生物获得水生关键字和游泳8。

钩状尖刺：此召唤生物的借机攻击造成2d6额外毒素伤害。

不稳定尸体：此召唤生物的生命值降至0时会爆炸，对爆发3范围内的所有生物造成15点伤害

20级：完美斗士 Ideal Champion

Truthseeker Paragon Path.name: 真理追寻者 Truthseeker
Truthseeker Paragon Path.description:
「真理之光会揭露一切秘密、否决一切虚假。」

Prerequisite:

Deception worms its way through the world, corroding morals and subverting ideals. Only through constant vigilance can this welling corruption be checked. Many divine servants battle obvious foes—undead, demons, and other foul creatures—but the enemies you face are far more insidious. You explore realms of shadow and deception, leading the fight against enemies who use guile instead of brutality.

To combat such forces, you armor yourself in the truth, using its radiance to burn away the lies and falsehoods your foes employ. In your presence, the enemy cannot hide or use its tricks, and it stands exposed before you.

Facing the worst sort of villains leaves its mark on you. You age prematurely, lines creasing your face, but such ravages of the body do not extend to your spirit. Each victory only firms your resolve. When you wield your truthseeker powers in the name of your god, your voice sounds like thunder and your enemies quail before your righteous presence.

11级：谴责行动 Censuring Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来使用神术攻击威能时，直到你下回合结束，任何结束其回合结束时邻接你的敌人在所有防御上受到-2减值（豁免终止）。

11级：治疗真理 Healing Truth

Benefit: 每个你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.5wfZztM0RjQlVLiY]{治愈真言 Healing Word}威能的目标对抗恐惧、幻术与变形效果时在所有防御上获得+2威能加值，直到遭遇结束。

11级：揭露腐败 Corruption Unveiled

12级：明晰圣地 Shrine of Clarity

16级：清晰无比 Unequaled Clarity

Benefit: 当你进行洞察检定时，你能掷两次骰并使用任意一个结果。此外，你在被动洞察检定上获得+4加值。

20级：真理时刻 Moment of Truth

Soldier of Conquest Paragon Path.name: 征服战士 Soldier of Conquest
Soldier of Conquest Paragon Path.description:
「You cannot defeat me, for I draw on the strength of the Iron General.」

Prerequisite:

You have become a true warrior of Bane—a soldier who lives for combat and conquest. You are granted powers to aid you in that conquest, but only if you use them wisely; they'll not do the job for you.

Even if you're of a martial class, this paragon path's powers are divine prayers.

11级：抉择仇敌 Chosen Foe

Benefit: 任何你已经标记或受到一个由你造成的可豁免终止的效果的目标向你提供战斗优势

11级：击倒他们 Strike Them Down

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，每个邻近你的敌人向你和你的盟友提供战斗优势，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：致其痛苦 Suffer the Foe

12级：使其跌落 Fell the Foe

16级：绝不动摇 Never Falter

Benefit: 你在意志以及对抗魅惑和恐惧效果的豁免检定上获得+2加值。

20级：不屈之击 Indomitable Assault
Soldier of Conquest Paragon Path.requirements: 任意武术或神术职业，必须信仰班恩

Warpath Berserker Paragon Path.name: 征途狂战士 Warpath Berserker
Warpath Berserker Paragon Path.description:
「What need have we for tactics when we have strength and audacity?」

Prerequisite:

Tactics have their place. A cunning stratagem can give you and your fellows a decisive advantage in the opening forays, but slavish adherence to plans invites disaster. Circumstances change, and when they do, the best response is to do something your enemy would never expect.

You stand between two worlds. You have the knowledge and training of a field commander, but your military expertise is ever at odds with your reckless manner. You might devise some plan but abandon it quickly, giving in to your bloodlust and rage when circumstances change. When you do, your allies find your wrath infectious, the frenzy overtaking common sense as they smash through their opponents.

The most powerful warpath berserkers come from bravura warlords and thaneborn barbarians. Wrath burns within you, seething in your heart. Yet you can master this anger and bend it to incite your allies to find new courage and strength. Those nearest you feel your wrath and make it their own, and the longer they fight alongside you, the more intense their outbursts become.

11级：觉醒之怒 Awakened Wrath

Benefit: 每当一个你能看见的盟友以近战攻击造成重击时，你对所有敌人获得战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

11级：煽动行动 Inciting Action

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来让一个能看见并听见你的盟友进行一次在攻击骰和伤害骰上获得等同于你魅力调整值的加值的冲锋攻击，而不是获得一个额外动作。如果此攻击失手，此盟友向所有攻击者提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束。

11级：切碎他们 Crush Them

12级：勇气试炼 Test of Mettle

16级：传染狂暴 Infectious Rage

Benefit: 每当你处于狂暴状态或正在享受狂暴者之怒 <兼职野蛮人> Berserker's Fury 专长的增益时，所有可以看见并听见你的盟友在伤害骰上获得+2加值。

20级：征途狂暴 Warpath Rage

High Forest Scout Paragon Path.name: 至高森林斥候 High Forest Scout
High Forest Scout Paragon Path.description:
「比狼和熊更危险的东西在这些古老的森林里徘徊，朋友。保持沉默，跟在我身后，你才会会完好无损地穿过这里。」

Prerequisite:

在至高森林中，古老森林深处的秘密被严密地保护着，很少有人知道在阴影中行走的许多野生动物。银牡鹿、聪明的野兔、独角兽、雄鹰大小的蝴蝶和熬过了一百个冬天的树鸮在黑暗中漫步。树皮包裹的柱子支撑着一层又一层的雨棚，将阳光过滤成一百种祖母绿和金色。但至高森林也庇护着致命的危险。野生森林生物、纹身野人和闹鬼的手推车是旅行者面临的常见威胁。

但更糟糕的是，隐藏在阴影上谷中的丑陋而强大的瘟疫缠身的生物，被遗忘的耐瑟瑞尔（Netheril）恶魔仆人在它们主人归来后醒来，来自纳迦拉（Najara）的蛇人（yuan-ti）在寻找他们不愿说出名字的东西。许多威胁困扰着你家里阴暗的灌木丛。

这些敌人不会在没有标记的情况下通过。你是树上的鬼魂，风中的箭，对于那些在树林里游荡的怪物来说，你是迅速而无情的死亡。森林是你的国家，你不会善待不请自来的客人。蛇和魔鬼都无法躲避你的箭。

11级：致盲视线 Binding Sight

Benefit: 每当你可以花费一个行动点进行额外动作来攻击时，你的目标不能使用传送效果直到你下一回合结束。

11级：疫病杀手 Plagueslayer

Benefit: 你比被法疫（Spellplague）改变的生物更加强壮。你在对被法疫改变或拥有法痕的生物的攻击的攻击骰上获得+2加值，并且造成等同于你感知调整值的额外伤害。（如果你对一个目标进行多次攻击，则此额外伤害只应用于第一次攻击）

11级：银箭 Argent Arrow

12级：无阻移动 Unrestricted Movement

16级：森林之行 Forest Walk

Benefit: 你无视由树木，灌木丛，植被或自然植株构成的困难地形。

20级：缚敌之箭 Binding Arrows

Champion of Order Paragon Path.name: 秩序斗士 Champion of Order
Champion of Order Paragon Path.description:
「秩序以荣誉约束混沌，而我的每项行动每个行为都在支持着秩序。」

Prerequisite:

作为秩序的典范，你接受秩序的观念并且在自己的一言一行中切实履行它。秩序诸神赞扬你为他们的事业和理想而战，反击混乱邪恶的敌人的行为。在混乱邪恶的生物面前，你的武器散发出闪耀的光芒。

11级：斗士行动 Champion's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时迸发出耀眼圣光使得邻近你的敌人在所有防御上受到-1减值，直到你下一回合开始。

11级：秩序防御 In Defense of Order

Benefit: 当你邻近一个被你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YqRjBvbThJCAUXDd]{神圣挑战 Divine Challenge}的目标时，若目标在进行目标不包括你的攻击则会引发你的借机攻击。此外，你在攻击被你挑战的恶魔和元素生物时可以造成额外的2d6光耀伤害。

11级：公正审判 Certain Justice

12级：无人可免 None Shall Pass

16级：斗士之锤 Champion's Hammer

Benefit: 你的攻击无视恶魔和元素生物的抗力。

20级：秩序的裁决 Rule of Order

Deadly Berserker Paragon Path.name: 致命狂战士 Deadly Berserker
Deadly Berserker Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

You have battled your way out of the dangerous wilderness, faced ever-growing threats, and managed to keep yourself alive despite your occasional recklessness. You grow stronger both in your connection to the primal spirits and in your martial prowess. This marriage of power makes you a dangerous and skilled warrior when in control of your emotions, and a force of nature when you give in to your rage.

11级：狂战士行动 Berserker's Action

When you succumb to your rage, usually you do not regain control until after all your enemies are dead or defeated. But you are starting to learn how to let small amounts of your rage bubble up to the surface when needed. With focus, now you can allow only a portion of that fury to fuel your attacks.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行近战武器攻击时，你对此攻击命中的每个目标造成1d12额外伤害

11级：收割狂怒 Reaping Fury

Though many might see the attacks you make while driven by your bloodlust as reckless and wild, those blows take a toll on your enemies.

Benefit: 当你受到你的「狂战士狂怒」职业特性的效果影响时，当你以武器使用随意攻击威能或遭遇攻击威能失手时，在你下一回合结束前，你在下一次命中的武器攻击的伤害骰上获得等同于你力量调整值的威能加值

11级：千种死法 A Thousand Ways to Die

You are a versatile warrior with many fighting styles honed to give you an advantage, and your skill does not fade when you give way to the beast within. Even when the primal spirits' power flows through you, your fighting instincts remain, allowing you to select the best technique to fight your foes.

12级：力量涌动 Surge of Strength

Whether it's a rush of adrenaline driven by urgency or invigorating power given by primal spirits, you are able to surprise your enemies with your resurgence.

16级：无上耐力 Supreme Stamina

As your enemies grow fewer, you grow stronger. Each foe's defeat fuels your fighting power and allows you to stand against long odds on the battlefield.

Benefit: 当你的攻击将一个非杂兵敌人的生命值降到0时，你获得等同于5 + 一半你的等级的临时生命值

20级：平息暴怒 Slake the Rage

Sometimes, nothing will calm you until you have seen your enemies destroyed. Even when you are in full control, though, at times you must unleash some of your fury on a foe, satisfying your bloodlust.

Seer of Endings Paragon Path.name: 终末先知 Seer of Endings
Seer of Endings Paragon Path.description:
「在我眼里，你已经死了。」

Prerequisite:

A small faction of tieflings views the world through a veil of decay that shrouds the ugly and the beautiful alike with the appearance of death and rot. Some seek ways to minimize the influence of these visions on their lives. Other blightseers embrace the knowledge that the gaze of ruin grants them. They study the appearance of a thing as it is now and as it is in its ruined state, and over time they learn to read their visions for meanings about the present. The destruction they see serves as a constant source of omens about creatures' fates and instructions on how to bring about those fates.

Through ardent research, you have developed a catalogue of what your visions mean. How you act on this knowledge depends on your goals. The information is yours to use as a superlative assassin or as a way to avert terrible fates.

11级：死亡先知行动 Death-Seer's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，一个你能看见的生物对你的攻击获得等同于你智力调整值的易伤，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：健壮弱点 Weakness of the Hale

Benefit: 你总是对任何你能看见的非重伤的非杂兵生物具有战斗优势。

11级：死亡之视 Deathly Glare

12级：预知死亡 Foretold Death

16级：强力凝视 Puissant Gaze

Benefit: 将你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.6dFDysmGKxlvoLZO]{毁灭凝视 Gaze of Ruin}造成的易伤增加等同于你智力调整值的数值，将其造成的在伤害骰上的减值增加2点，将其造成的在AC上的减值增加1点。

20级：死亡视角 Visions of Death
Seer of Endings Paragon Path.requirements: 提夫林，[[毁灭凝视 Gaze of Ruin]]种族威能

Summer Rhymer Paragon Path.name: 仲夏诗人 Summer Rhymer
Summer Rhymer Paragon Path.description:
「韵起声飞常如旧，剑飘刃舞宛作诗。」

Prerequisite:

在妖精荒野的居民中，最有力量的就是泰安德拉（Tiandra），仲夏女王（看位面手册）。她的庭院是她超卓的美丽的一个映像，繁茂的花环被高高挂起，到处都充满了鼎盛的活力。她的微笑能使作物成熟，她的好意使凡人在诗歌上的天赋觉醒。

不管是仲夏女王确实地向你微笑，或者你只是在渴求得到她的祝福，你最终都得到了与仲夏妖精一定程度上的结合，学习他们音乐的魔力。由于你与妖精紧密的练习，你与你的同伴可以自由传送，而且你能呼唤仲夏女王的成长力量来辅助你的治疗威能。

如果你的服务令女王满意，你很可能从她那里获取相当的宠爱。过去那些伟大的英雄得到了高贵的头衔，各种魔法器具，通往强大的魔力的方法，以及其他来自女王之手的赠与。作为妖精，仲夏女王相当地值得信赖，但是最好记住：没有妖精的赠与是真正免费的。

11级：妖精之径 Feypath

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在这个动作之前或之后，你能以一个自由动作传送你自己或一个邻近你的盟友5格。

11级：女王恩泽 The Queen's Grace

Benefit: 当你使用一个诗人医疗威能提供了治疗时，每个被治疗的目标都恢复等同于你魅力调整值的额外生命值。

11级：女王庇护之歌 Song of the Queen's Protection

12级：曲径之歌 Song of Spiral Paths

16级：夏庭裁断 Judgment of the Summer Court

Benefit: 当一个敌人失手的攻击触发了你的「巧智之德」职业特性时，你在对该敌人的攻击骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：高庭之歌 Song of the High Court
Summer Rhymer Paragon Path.requirements: 诗人，「巧智之德」职业特性

Scion of Renewal Paragon Path.name: 重生之子 Scion of Renewal
Scion of Renewal Paragon Path.description:
「我们沐浴在大河的精魂之中。你无法伤害我们。」

Prerequisite:

One of most ancient of shamanistic practices focuses on the river of renewal, an ancient, all-encompassing flow of spiritual energy that protects living things and allows them to heal. Tribal elders invoke the river of renewal to cleanse plagues, grow crops destroyed by pestilence, and help close the wounds of war. No sickness exists that this powerful energy cannot cure. Many shamans who strive to end suffering and bring healing to their people seek to be bathed in the spirits of the river.

As a scion of renewal, you invoke spirits from the river to cleanse your allies. Through your power, the body's natural healing is accelerated, making it able to better fight off diseases and effects of a natural and magical nature. You can call on the spirits of the river to strike at your foes, leaving behind an aura of healing for your allies. Your spirit companion becomes a fount of spiritual energy from the river of renewal, taking on a watery appearance as it provides a neverending supply of pure energy to bolster those around it.

11级：生命源泉 Fountain of Life

Benefit: 你的治疗精魂威能在决定邻近你精魂的一个盟友所恢复的额外生命值时，使用d8而不是d6。你治疗精魂威能的目标能选择不从花费回复力中恢复生命值，而是改为进行一次豁免检定。

11级：修补行动 Mending Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，邻近你精魂伙伴的每个盟友能恢复等同于你感知调整值的生命值。

11级：新生洗礼 Renewing Wash

12级：重生之雨 Rain of Renewal

16级：惊人涌动 Striking Surge

Benefit: 当一个邻近你精魂伙伴的盟友使用其回气时，他同时在攻击骰和伤害骰上获得+2加值，直到他下一回合结束。

20级：涤荡之潮 Purging Wave
Scion of Renewal Paragon Path.requirements: 萨满，[[呼唤精魂伙伴 Call Spirit Companion]]威能

Hexer Paragon Path.name: 咒术师 Hexer
Hexer Paragon Path.description:
「艺术可以在任何媒介上创作。画家在画布上作画，吟游诗人谱写史诗，音乐家谱写美妙的和声。而我的诅咒是如此美丽和有效，以至于任何听到的人都会受到侵害。」

Prerequisite:

任何一个邪术师都可以尖叫“我诅咒你！”但在你看来，这样的诅咒是肤浅的，毫无意义的。如此简单、空洞的诅咒等同于背叛了邪术师从宗主那里获取奥术力量的能力。一个普通的诅咒可能足以让敌人畏缩，但你认为诅咒应该给敌人带去血液凝固，目眦尽裂，目瞪口呆的冲击。

你已经深入研究了创作诅咒的复杂结构。你发现，一个合适的诅咒可以造成比大多数邪术师意识到的更大的效果。当你施咒时，你的敌人就会因你的诅咒而退缩。你学会了用诅咒来编织法术和用法术来编织诅咒。你的身体和思想与你发出的诅咒产生共鸣。当你说话的时候，所有听见你话的人都会退缩。

11级：谴责诅咒 Damning Curse

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，每个受你「邪术师诅咒」影响的生物在攻击骰上受到-2减值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：高等咒术 Greater Hex

Benefit: 你可以对离你5格内的你可见的一个敌人施放你的「邪术师诅咒」，而不是对最近的你可见敌人施放你的「邪术师诅咒」。

11级：咒术尖啸 Hexblast

12级：复仇咒术 Vengeful Hex

16级：漫步诅咒 Walking Curse

Benefit: 每当你的「邪术师诅咒」对一个生物造成伤害时，你能滑动该生物1格。

20级：背弃咒术 Hex of Abandonment

Spell Commander Paragon Path.name: 咒术指挥官 Spell Commander
Spell Commander Paragon Path.description:
「Cast your spells where I say,when I say,and how I say and we'll all live to tell about today's battle.」

Prerequisite:

Spell commanders are artificers who transform their alliesinto walking weapons of arcane destruction. Typically foundas a part of more militaristic arcane institutions, spellcommanders learn magic that help them increase their allies'spell power. Additionally, most spell commanders work as apart of a small squad, and many of the spells they wield arefocused around small squad tactics, indluding rapidly movingacross the battlefield.

Most spell commanders receive standard military training,including the foundation of small arms use (particularly bowsand crossbows). Spell commanders combine conventionalmiliary education with their arcane knowledge to create amore hybridized approach to warfare.

As a spell commander, you know how to combine traditionalcombat techniques and weapon use with the power ofarcane magic. Your focus is on transforming your allies intomore accurate, more powerful, and more mobile forces,effectively taking on the role of a squad leader who usesspells to facilitate this transformation.

11级：奥术武器大师 Arcane Weaponmaster

Benefit: 你可以使用弓或弩作为远程机关术士攻击威能的法器。当你这么做时，把这些威能的射程增加5。

11级：咒术指挥官行动 Spell Commander's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次攻击时，一个离该目标10格内的盟友能以一个自由动作进行一次基本攻击或使用一个1级随意奥术攻击威能。那个盟友攻击的目标必须至少包含一个你此攻击的目标。

11级：咒文追踪器 Spell Tracer

12级：咒力变更 Alter Spell Power

16级：法力爆发 Unleash Spell Power

Benefit: 当一个邻近的盟友将要做一次基本攻击时，该盟友可以改为使用任何他知道的1级奥术随意攻击威能。那个盟友必须使用远程威能替代远程基本攻击，近战威能替代近战基本攻击

20级：活体之门 Living Gate

Gnome Nightcloak Paragon Path.name: 侏儒夜蓬 Gnome Nightcloak
Gnome Nightcloak Paragon Path.description:
「Striking down evil from the darkness, and returning silently before the light of dawn.」

Prerequisite:

Blending divine magic with your race's gifts for stealth and cunning, you follow the path of the nightcloak. You bend the shadows that can hide villainy to your own purposes. You seek to protect yourself and your allies from threats, and you seek out evil where it hides under cover of darkness—eliminating it silently, before it can erupt forth to threaten the world of light.

An armored defender of your faith, you nonetheless have learned to become a silent predator, shrouded by protective shadowstuff and able to slip in and strike where foes are least prepared. You can step through the boundary between light and dark to cover distance quickly, or briefly disappear from view to find a new position or to make a surprise attack.

Originally created by adherents of Sehanine for missions requiring some degree of subtlety, the nightcloak tradition has since spread to gnomes of all faiths. Indeed, with the gnome value for secrecy and preservation of outward peace, some would say a group of warriors such as the nightcloaks was inevitability. Many nightcloaks defend hidden gnome communities from danger, venturing out to sabotage or eliminate growing threats without leaving a trace of their presence. Still others travel the world, alone or in like-minded bands of heroes, quietly protecting the interests of gnomes and other goodly races by rooting up the seeds of evil in the darkness that shelters it.

Some might question your covert methods, demanding justice be carried out in full view of all; even considering stealth to be tantamount to cowardice. But you know it's best to fight darkness with darkness so that you can preserve the overall peace of the innocents. And besides—nobody will ever see you.

By day you might cultivate an image of the friendly gnome knight in shining armor, but when darkness falls, you assume a sterner demeanor, silently and ruthlessly hunting down corruption and villainy before sunrise, when you return to your gregarious ways with none the wiser.

11级：黑暗面纱 Veil of Darkness

Benefit: 当进行隐秘检定时，你可使用你的魅力调整值来代替敏捷调整值。另外，当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.xVLwi45qtsnFApSX]{渐隐 Fade Away}种族威能时，你或一个邻近你的盟友获得等同于你魅力调整值的全伤害抗力，直到你下一回合结束

11级：跃动暗影行动 Leaping Shadow Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在此动作之前或之后，你能传送等同于你的速度的格数

11级：影跨斥责 Shadowstride Rebuke

12级：暗夜掩护 Cover of Night

16级：来自阴影 From the Shadows

Benefit: 每轮一次，当你命中一个被你标记且给你提供战斗优势的目标时，你对该目标造成2d6额外伤害

20级：狂乱影流 Tumultuous Shadowflow
Gnome Nightcloak Paragon Path.requirements: 侏儒，圣武士，在隐秘上受训

Moon Hunter Paragon Path.name: 逐月者 Moon Hunter
Moon Hunter Paragon Path.description:
Prerequisite:

Among the archfey, few entities are more mysterious than the Maiden of the Moon. Elusive even to others of her kind, the Maiden of the Moon has only one apparent interest: removing the blight of lycanthropy, both from the Feywild and from the natural world. On the boundaries of the lycanthrope realm of Brokenstone Vale, some who have survived being ravaged by those creatures find inspiration from the Maiden of the Moon, taking up arms to hunt and slay the lycanthropes. In honor of the Maiden, they call themselves the moon hunters.

Moon hunters are attuned to the power of the Feywild's moon, which is larger and brighter than the full moon in the natural world. They can channel its power to harm lycanthropes and other shapeshifting foes. In this manner, they are similar to the fey giants known as firbolgs. Like those hunters, they travel across the Feywild, calling forth auras of moonfire to reveal their enemies in the darkness. Once they find their prey, many use crescent-shaped blades to cut their foes down in a bloody harvest.

In time, most moon hunters expand their hunt to include all creatures that take on another form to prey upon innocent folk, including rakshasas, doppelgangers, hags, oni, and lamias.

11级：月火行动 Moonfire Action

The Maiden’s light shines fiercely within you. It guards you from the ravages of lycanthropy and undue influence, and it makes your attacks more effective against lycanthropes and similar creatures.

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行一次攻击时，被此攻击命中的敌人无法从隐形或任何隐蔽中获得增益（豁免终止）。

11级：染银之魂 Silvered Soul

Like the mighty firbolg hunters, you have learned to harness the moon’s pale illumination. When the stakes are high, you can encase hidden enemies in a halo of silver light that reveals their presence.

Benefit: 你在对抗魅惑效果和遭受疾病的豁免检定上获得+2加值。另外，所有你的武器和法器攻击被视为镀银的

11级：强力变形 Forceful Transformation

Your attacks already benefit from your connection to the Maiden of the Moon. With a greater focus, however, you can affect shapechangers like the moon affects lycanthropes, assaulting their minds and bodies. If your foe can change its shape, your attack causes it to experience mental anguish and physical pain as it fights to maintain control of its body.

12级：圣女之光 Maiden's Light

With a single word of praise to the Maiden of the Moon, you become a beacon in the darkness, shedding pale moonlight that leaves shapechangers and creatures changed from their natural forms in a vulnerable state.

16级：圣女祝福 Maiden's Blessing

You have earned the attention of the Maiden of the Moon, impressing her with your prowess. When you need a moment's respite, the Maiden reaches out to you, offering you relief from a harmful effect.

Benefit: 当你使用你的回气时，你可以同时进行一次豁免检定

20级：满月之映 Reflect the Full Moon

As you reach the pinnacle of your power, you have earned the Maiden of the Moon's approval. She grants you the power to call forth the light of the full moon to blind your enemies. Lycanthropes and their ilk are transfixed by the moon's radiance.

Master of the Forge Paragon Path.name: 铸造大师 Master of the Forge
Master of the Forge Paragon Path.description:
「拿你的武器过来，我将以诸神的愤怒祝福它。」

Prerequisite:

铸造符文是个很少有符文牧师钻研的符文。只有经过了在铸造厂的经年劳作，一个人才有希望习得铸造符文的秘密。你就是这样的符文牧师。在研修期间，你不仅学习神圣魔法的秘密，也了解了铸造之力的精妙。在神祗与导师的指引下，你锻造武器与盔甲，锻炼作为诸神的斗士所必需的意志与体魄。

铸造大师由铸造符文中获取力量，用神术加持盟友的武器和盔甲。在你的祝福下，刀锋可轻易划开岩石，盔甲甚至能挡下巨龙的利爪。此道的追随者中，矮人符文牧师是最常见的。矮人热衷金属工艺的天性使得铸造符文对他们而言是个常见研究课题。

11级：刀锋符文 Runes of the Blade Smith

Benefit: 当你进行短休息或长休息时，你可以碰触一件你或盟友携带的武器。该武器在伤害骰上获得+1加值，直到你将此加值赋予给另一件武器。

11级：活力铸造 Forge Rune Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点以进行额外动作时，你和离你5格内的每个盟友在武器伤害骰上获得+4加值，直到你下一回合结束。

11级：钢铁呼唤 Call of Iron

12级：锻造祝福 Blessing of the Forge

16级：不屈钢铁 Indomitable Steel

Benefit: 当你进行短休息或长休息时，你可以碰触一件你或盟友穿戴的重甲。该盔甲在AC上获得+1加值，直到你将此加值赋予给另一件重甲。

20级：锻造怒火 Fury of the Forge

Blade Banshee Paragon Path.name: 追命猎手 Blade Banshee
Blade Banshee Paragon Path.description:
「你听见了嘛？那呼啸而至的死亡宣告。」

Prerequisite:

The Feywild sings with eldritch energy. It is infused with magic from its twilight sky to its sparkling depths. Fey creatures, its children, are bathed in its supernatural flow. Even the simplest among them have powers beyond those of worldly mortals, bestowing simple tasks with an otherworldly enchantment.

Eladrin are among the heritors of the Feywild's nature. As humans and other races tamed portions of the world, so too did the eladrin subdue parts of the Feywild according to their fey temperament. They evolved a complex society, rich in crafts and traditions that also sing in concordance with the Feywild. As followers of mores inspired in elder days by the god Corellon, eladrin treat life and all its aspects as an art. Everything they do, wonderful or wicked, reflects this ideal.

Like their counterparts in the world, eladrin have had to fight and die to defend their way of life. Each eladrin learns to wield the longsword, the traditional weapon of the eladrin people. They have martial disciplines that teach an eladrin to channel the innate magic in his or her spirit, as well as that stored within the elements.

A blade from the Feywild or crafted by eladrin hands has a special beauty. The metal vibrates with bizarre potential. Some eladrin learn to make steel shaped into such a blade sing its heart's song. That song is a fey cry that portends loss of life, and those who wield it are known across the cosmos as blade banshees.

Over the years, you've developed a terrifying synergy with your blades. You understand the secret heart of fey-crafted steel. Its unmistakable, dread voice announces your displeasure. As you fight, your blades buzz and keen, unleashing rending vibrations against your foes. But when your soul is bent to friendship or mercy, your swords hum with your own gentleness, briefly bringing a bit of peace to others before shrieking into battle once again.

11级：追命行动 Banshee's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一点行动点进行额外动作并持用两件近战武器时，所有邻近你的敌人会受到等同你感知调整值的雷鸣伤害。

11级：裂命之刃 Bladed Disruption

Benefit: 当你持用两件近战武器，在你的回合内任何生物被你的近战攻击命中不止一次时，该生物在攻击骰上受到-2减值，直到你下回合开始。

11级：钢之咆啸 Steel Scream

12级：治疗回馈 Soothing Reverberation

16级：尖叫之刃 Shrieking Blades

Benefit: 当你持用两件近战武器，你的近战攻击造成等同你感知调整值的额外雷鸣伤害。

20级：智取敌首 Mind-Bending Blades

Harrowing Swarm Archer Paragon Path.name: 锥心射手 Harrowing Swarm Archer
Harrowing Swarm Archer Paragon Path.description:
「我的视线无比敏锐，我的攻击毫不留情。你无法逃离我的箭。」

Prerequisite:

Inspired by the way a wasp swarm engulfs an enemy, you overwhelm opponents with a mass of arrows or bolts. You are a master of the Harrowing Swarm style. You make relentless attacks that panic your foes and deliver seemingly endless waves of pain.

By perfecting the style, you can disrupt your opponents and cause lingering wounds. You have studied the wasp's streamlined grace and learned how to stay on the move and reduce the damage inflicted by your foes' attacks. A harrowing swarm archer does not balk at melee. You might pick ranger powers that are reactive or powers that allow you to shift quickly through battle. That way, you can quickly escape any dangerous situations and then strike back against foes that confronted you.

Harrowing swarm archers often train as town or militia archers before taking up the discipline. You might pursue adventure for a variety of reasons. Perhaps you seek treasure or fame, or maybe you want to hunt the most dangerous and feared beasts so that you can test your skill against them. As a harrowing swarm archer, you have made a study of nature, observing the physical defenses of natural creatures. You have applied those lessons to your own technique, so now, wherever you go, you feel confident that your foes will respect your sting.

11级：狙击手行动 Sniper's Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次远程攻击且命中你的「猎手标的」目标时，该标的受到5点持续伤害（豁免终止）。此持续伤害在21级时增加至10。

11级：折磨猎物 Tormenting the Prey

Benefit: 你在对受到持续伤害的任何敌人的攻击骰上获得+2加值。

11级：野蛮蛰刺 Savage Sting

12级：黄蜂逃脱 Wasp's Evasion

16级：掠射 Glancing Shot

Benefit: 即使你对你的「猎手标的」目标失手，你也能对它造成「猎手标的」伤害。

20级：致命箭群 Deadly Swarm
Harrowing Swarm Archer Paragon Path.requirements: 游侠，[[锥心之射学徒|锥心之射学徒 <流派初成> Harrowing Swarm Student <Lesser Style>]]专长

Drow Wanderer Paragon Path.name: 卓尔漫游者 Drow Wanderer
Drow Wanderer Paragon Path.description:
「这片黑暗是我的家园，你不该来这里的」

Prerequisite:

幽暗地域对地表的居民来说是个可怕的地方，肉食性的真菌覆盖着石壁。凶险的怪物潜伏在黑暗之中，而那暗无天日的幽深暗影之中，藏匿着邪恶的文明。 对你来说，这就是家。你深知幽暗地域中每一条阴暗的隧道，每个溶洞中的每个转角，每条通道中的每个角落都是你的盟友，让你静静地逼近你的敌人。你是黑暗中的猎手，你在你的猎物还没有察觉你的存在之时便从影中出击！

你的那些同类对你来说全无用处。当你在黑暗的荒野中磨练你的技艺时，其他的卓尔在他们的城市中的堕落和冷酷中浑浑噩噩。 你长年磨练你与生俱来的魔法之力，如今它在你的血液中奔流，远超过那些家伙的力量。你在黑暗中自由地大步漫游，而他们还在罗丝的奴役鞭笞前摇尾乞怜。

生活就是一次漫游，你活着的目的就是追求那些在你的视野外等待着你的奇迹和激动心弦的冒险。黑暗是位小心眼的女士，但你对她实在是了如指掌。无论你选择的道路是横穿费伦的地表还是漫游在它的地下，都无人能阻挠你的前路。

11级：伏击行动 Ambusher Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作来攻击时，若你的目标没有发现你，则你在此攻击骰上获得+2加值

11级：岩石感知 Stone Sense

Benefit: 当在地下时，你在先攻，地城和侦查检定上获得+2加值

11级：突然冒出 From out of Nowhere

12级：黑暗之力 Strength in Darkness

16级：火之微尘 Firemotes

Benefit: 你在对当前受你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.2LSip5oOMayYQWnP]{黑暗之火 Darkfire}威能影响的目标的伤害骰上获得+5加值

20级：黑暗之刃 Darkblade

Purple Dragon Knight Paragon Path.name: 紫龙骑士 Purple Dragon Knight
Purple Dragon Knight Paragon Path.description:
「为了国王和祖国而战！」

Prerequisite:

你的生命就是为了服侍科米尔王室和保护科米尔人民免受世界上虎视眈眈的邪恶所侵袭而存在。科米尔的军队并不缺少长枪和利刃，但是你是国家最强大的战争机器之一。邪恶无处不在，折磨着那些无法保护自己的人，而你就是代表了正义的宝剑和坚盾。

作为一名科米尔的骑士，你的荣誉就是一切。你不会扭曲荣誉，因为这么做会玷污你对死去同志的记忆。你不会向邪恶妥协，你也不会像许多人一样对邪恶视而不见。你的誓言就是无论不公、贪婪和邪恶在哪里抬起那丑陋的头颅你都会与之作战。哪里残忍和罪孽滋生，哪里堕落盛行，哪里你伟大王国的仇敌兴旺，哪里就是最需要你的地方。

你的训练不亚于任何人，你强烈的决心不止一次将你从鬼门关拉了回来。你的战技远超敌人，但这并不是你最强大的力量。你最令人印象深刻的技能就是作为战场指挥官。你是一个行过了涂油礼的骑士，也是一个只要在场就能鼓舞同享你崇高事业的伙伴的天生领袖。

11级：科米尔骑士训练 Cormyrian Knight Training

Benefit: 当你使用你的回气时，你在攻击骰上获得+1加值，直到你下一回合结束

11级：紫龙专注 Purple Dragon Focus

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，直到你下一回合结束，你能以一个自由动作使用你的回气。若你已经用过了回气，则你不获得此增益

11级：集结攻击 Rallying Attack

12级：集结呐喊 Rallying Cry

16级：紫龙灵气 Purple Dragon Aura

Benefit: 所有邻近你的盟友在豁免骰上获得+2加值

20级：为了科米尔！ For Cormyr!
Purple Dragon Knight Paragon Path.requirements: 战士，圣武士或督军；隶属于科米尔

Nature's Avatar Paragon Path.name: 自然化身 Nature's Avatar
Nature's Avatar Paragon Path.description:
「自然即我，我即自然。」

Prerequisite:

野精灵表现着自然变幻的面貌，每一天，每个野精灵选择一种自然的形态。

对你而言，这些形态并非仅仅是短暂的状态，他们是对多变的、充满力量的自然的反映。在你守护世界的征程中，每个形态都让你获益良多。当你重伤时，你能从每个形态中获得额外的增益。你明白如何将这些自然形态的力量融入到你的攻击中。最终，你掌握了快速转变形态的能力，这足以面对任何挑战。

11级：浴血形态 Bloodied Aspect

Benefit: 根据你当前的自然形态，你获得相应的增益。

先祖形态：当你重伤时花费一次回复力，你恢复等同于你感知调整值的额外生命值。

驱逐形态：当你重伤时，你在攻击骰上获得+1种族加值。

狩猎形态：当你重伤时，你在速度上获得+1种族加值。

11级：适应行动 Adaptive Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点时，你能以一个自由动作来把你当前的自然形态改变成另一个。如果你已经使用了之前形态相关联的遭遇威能，则你不能新形态相关联的遭遇威能，直到你完成了一次短休息。

11级：寒风彻骨 Freezing Blast

12级：自然新生 Nature's Rebirth

16级：浴血活力 Bloodied Vigor

Benefit: 当你重伤时使用你的回气，你在攻击骰和伤害骰上获得+2威能加值，直到你下一回合结束。

20级：自然净化之火 Nature's Purging Fire

Freedom Fighter Paragon Path.name: 自由斗士 Freedom Fighter
Freedom Fighter Paragon Path.description:
「Every slave is a knife held close to the master's neck. All you need is the courage to press your advantage. He thinks that your chains deprive you of your strength when in fact, they are the weapons with which you fight. Use those shackles to serve freedom!」

Prerequisite:

Power alone is not reason to rule. One should earn obedience and loyalty, not force or buy it. The people need to understand that slavery serves no one. It is merely the strong stealing from the weak, and while that might suit the odious scavengers that sup on dusty carrion in the deserts, it's no way for people to live. They need someone to pull the veil from their eyes and break the bonds that restrict their thinking. Even the slaves need someone to show them they can be free. They need inspiration. They need an example—someone like an escaped slave.

You are a rarity in Athas: You believe in freedom. You fight not just for yourself but for others. Anyone who seeks to escape the master's whip deserves your help—as long as they don't wish to turn the lash upon others. The slave masters, the corrupt nobles, the rich merchants, and the sorcerer-kings—they have the power, but slaves outnumber free people ten to one, and that means the odds are in freedom's favor.

11级：为自由而战 Fight For Your Freedom

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，所有离你10格内的被敌人标记或擒拿的盟友能以一个自由动作进行一次基本攻击。如果一个盟友的基本攻击命中一个标记或擒拿此盟友的目标，则此标记或擒拿结束。如果范围内没有盟友被标记或被擒拿，则改为你可以选择一个离你5格内的盟友以一个自由动作进行一次基本攻击。

11级：同袍援助 Comrade's Help

Benefit: 当援助一个技能或属性检定时，你能以一个移动动作使用援助他人动作。如果你正在协助一个逃脱的尝试或一个打破束缚或寻找逃路的技能或属性的检定（打开铁链上的锁的贼活检定，打破一个门的力量检定，寻找一条路的侦查检定，等等），你提供的加值等于4而不是2。

11级：牺牲之击 Self-Sacrificing Strike

12级：鼓舞典范 Inspiring Example

16级：自由要求警惕 Freedom Requires Vigilance

Benefit: 你和所有离你3格内的盟友在先攻，侦查和洞察检定上获得+2加值。

20级：恶毒守护者 Vicious Guardian

Firestarter Paragon Path.name: 纵火者 Firestarter
Firestarter Paragon Path.description:
「以吾心之力，灼汝之躯……」

Prerequisite:

The elemental flame and arcane fire can be devastating on the battlefield, but the power of the psionic fire you wield is more deadly by far. You can scorch your enemies or scour them from the inside out. You cloak yourself in flames to protect yourself from foes as you lash them with your fiery touch.

11级：无惧火焰 Fear No Fire

Benefit: 你获得等同于一半你等级的火焰抗力

11级：力场与烈焰 Force and Flame

Benefit: 当你使用一个灵能力场攻击威能，你能选择让此威能造成火焰伤害而不是力场伤害

11级：典范灵能点 Paragon Power Points

Benefit: 你获得2个额外灵能点。

11级：野火行动 Wildfire Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，邻近你的每个敌人受到等同于你感知调整值的火焰伤害。如果你花费此行动点使用一个心灵术士攻击威能，选择你以此攻击命中的一个目标。邻近该目标的每个生物受到等同于你智力调整值的火焰伤害

11级：饥渴之焰 Hungry Flames

12级：火焰之行 Fire Walk

16级：炽烈火环 Fiery Nimbus

Benefit: 当你使用一个灵能攻击威能造成重击时，离你2格内的所有敌人受到等同于你感知调整值的火焰伤害，并且你获得炽烈火环，直到遭遇结束。当你有炽烈火环时，你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.i5FDK2l3QJr08NPX]{炽烈绽放 Fiery Lash}威能，并且开始其回合时邻近你的任何生物受到等同于你感知调整值的火焰伤害

20级：自燃 Spontaneous Combustion

Curseborn Paragon Path.name: 诅咒之子 Curseborn
Curseborn Paragon Path.description:
「We all inherit the sins of our ancestors; how we choose to deal with them in our time determines if we pass them along to our children.」

Prerequisite:

Each drow character is born into darkness and then burdened with the Corellon's curse and Lolth's blessing. The curse manifests in their enslavement to the Spider Queen, while the blessing represents the goddess's filthy touch, a gift ensuring the drow remain in her service. Drow can use only a portion of Lolth's power, manifesting it into clouds of darkness or limning their enemies with purple flame, but a few drow are powerful enough to expand their talents in other areas. These drow learn to unlock the hidden reserves of their curse and exploit them to achieve greater results.

As a curseborn, you have awakened hidden powers within you. Whether you believe these powers are further gifts granted to you by the Spider Queen or are a permutation of your existing abilities granted by Lolth's touch, or even a revelation based on your efforts to find redemption, the results are the same. Your Lolthtouched powers are intensified, your darkness is alive with umbral strands of shadow, and your ability to create darkfire is magnified to encompass to affect a number of enemies. In addition, you also learn methods of using Lolth's gifts in superior ways, from burning your foes with the flames of darkness to sliding into the Shadowfell to cloak your body with tendrils of darkness.

Your evolution into a curseborn results in a subtle transformation that is unnoticeable except when you are using your curseborn or Lolthtouched powers. Each time you tap into these abilities, your bright eyes flare, casting your face into ghastly shadows, while tiny black spiders composed of living shadow scurry off to vanish into puffs of acrid smoke. None of these features interferes with your other abilities, but drow recognize you as being kissed by the Spider Queen.

11级：依附之影 Clinging Shadows

Benefit: 除了正常的效果外，你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.U0xWOrD6dFqKjn4t]{黑暗之云 Cloud of Darkness}威能的区域对除你以外的所有生物是困难地形。

11级：诅咒之子行动 Curseborn Action

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点来进行额外动作时，你可以重获一个你在此遭遇中已经消耗的「罗丝之民」的威能

11级：受诅之火 Accursed Flames

12级：卓尔影步 Drow Shadow Stride

16级：黑暗火灾 Darkfire Conflagration

Benefit: 每当你使用你@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.2LSip5oOMayYQWnP]{黑暗之火 Darkfire}威能时，你能以三个生物为目标而不是一个。

20级：惑人之光 Alluring Lights

Ancestral Weapon Paragon Path.name: 祖传神兵 Ancestral Weapon
Ancestral Weapon Paragon Path.description:
「什么才是人生中最重要的？是为了荣耀与胜利去结束每一场战斗。」

Prerequisite:

长者们向年轻人简述着祖先们踏遍这片土地冒险的故事。故事中，这些祖先是力量，智慧以及其他一些今日人们需要的精神的集合。祖先们的战斗精神像律规一样鼓舞着、教授着后人。最后，年轻人终究成长，向他们的祖先一样成为历史中的长者。

作为那些成长为先者的人中的一员，你是例外的。在那些最激烈的战斗时刻，你总能是一个有力的杀器。你可以激励你的人民完成逆天转命的战斗，你的勇气可以让你成为一个长久流传的英雄。

祖传精魂当乱世时选择了你。如果你败了，他们将会在附近把你迎入远古的战争桎梏之中。

11级：强壮精魂 Strong Spirit

Benefit: 将你的魅力调整值加到你的回复力值上。

11级：战魂之触 Battle Spirit's Touch

Benefit: 当你花费一个行动点进行一次攻击且命中至少一个目标时，你可以花费一个回复力。

11级：飙血暴怒 Blood-Spattered Fury

12级：上祖风气 Ancestor's Presence

16级：致命暴殴 Lethal Rampage

Benefit: 当你因「暴殴打」进行一次近战基本攻击时，你可以用一个用近战随意攻击威能替代它。

20级：祖传神兵狂暴 Ancestral Weapon's Rage
Ancestral Weapon Paragon Path.requirements: 野蛮人，「暴殴打」职业特性

Redeemer of the Damned Paragon Path.name: 罪恶赎者 Redeemer of the Damned
Redeemer of the Damned Paragon Path.description:
我并非独自对抗邪恶。在我的身边站着我的提夫林祖先，他们曾经被诅咒永驻地狱，而现今则寻求着他们罪行的救赎。同我们作对，没有哪种邪恶能够逃脱。

Prerequisite:

You channel the damned spirits of your tiefling ancestors to battle evil.

Those most responsible for the evils of Bael Turath paid with their souls, and others who did not shoulder the same responsibility were swept down to the Nine Hells in the bargain. Though far from innocent, these tiefling spirits seek redemption for the evils done to the world in the name of their empire. Their crimes are not your own, but they are your legacy, and you are determined to help your ancestors repay their debt.

The worlds of the living and of the spirits each bear wounds left by Bael Turath. With the help of tiefling souls seeking salvation, perhaps you can heal these wounds. And if you can turn a few mortals away from the path of evil in time to save their souls, so much the better. After all, the burning grip of the devils is not so strong that it can claim souls the world wants saved.

11级：唤魂入战 Calling Souls to Battle

Benefit: 你可以花费一个行动点来传送你自己和最多5个你可见的自愿盟友到邻近一个离你10格内的你可见的敌人的任意格子。每个传送的角色对该敌人获得战斗优势，直到你下一回合结束

11级：赎者回报 Redeemer's Reward

Benefit: 每次你将一个非杂兵敌人生命值降到0时，你或一个邻近你（或你的精魂伙伴，如果你有的话）的盟友在所有防御和豁免骰上获得+2加值，直到你下一回合结束

11级：在劫难逃 Your Doom Awaits

12级：牺牲精魂 Spirit of Sacrifice

16级：精魂庇护 Spirit Shielding

Benefit: 你获得等同于5 + 一半你的等级的暗蚀抗力

20级：焰魂救助 Firesoul Salvation
